1.text: Uno's full name or formal designation is 'Numero Uno' (Number One), though he is commonly addressed and refers to himself simply as 'Uno'.

supporting.justification: Uno introduces himself directly to Paperinik.
Uno's automated answering machine message identifies him with his full formal name/designation 'Numero Uno'.
Uno refers to himself in the third person while providing an update to Paperino.

quotes.text: Piacere! Io sono Uno!
quotes.context: Uno introduces himself to Paperinik for the first time.

quotes.text: Risponde la segreteria telefonica del Numero Uno...
quotes.context: This is the beginning of Uno's recorded answering machine message.

quotes.text: Uno è stato ottimista...
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperino via a holographic link on the hero's wrist.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly states his nature to Paperinik.
Uno explicitly refers to himself as an 'intelligenza artificiale'.
Uno explicitly identifies himself as a machine.
Uno hints at his non-biological nature when responding to General Wisecube's desire to meet him in person.

quotes.text: Un'intelligenza artificiale, prego!
quotes.context: Uno clarifies his nature after Paperinik tries to understand who/what he is.

quotes.text: ...un'intelligenza artificiale colta e di bell'aspetto!
quotes.context: Uno's self-description.

quotes.text: Storie! Anch'io sono una macchina, ma non sbaglio mai!
quotes.context: Uno defends his nature and reliability.

quotes.text: Sarebbe certamente una sorpresa per voi!
quotes.context: Uno's response to General Wisecube wanting to meet him after the mission.

3.text: Uno identifies his physical form with the Ducklair Tower, which is revealed to be a disguised interstellar ship that he can control and pilot.

supporting.justification: Uno claims to be the building itself when Paperinik asks where he is hiding.
The scene description highlights that the lights of the Ducklair Tower symbolically form Uno's eyes, reinforcing his identification with the building.
Uno is shown operating from within Ducklair Tower, where he sits in front of a console of monitors to observe external events.
The scene visually depicts Uno's search as green energy flowing through the Ducklair Tower's electronic systems, reinforcing his identification with the building itself.
Uno reveals to Paperinik that the Ducklair Tower is, in fact, an interstellar spaceship, one of Everett's masterpieces.
Uno gives the final command for the top of the Ducklair Tower to detach and transform into an interstellar ship, which he then pilots into space.
The Ducklair Tower's upper section is shown navigating through space as a starship, with Uno managing its systems and providing data to the crew.
Uno expresses a sense of 'nostalgia' for the Ducklair Tower when communicating with Paperinik in dangerous remote locations, reinforcing his deep connection to the building.
Uno coordinates the emergency escape of the Ducklair Tower, demonstrating his role as the ship's pilot and his integration with its interstellar flight systems.
Uno displays an intimate and detailed knowledge of the Ducklair Tower's internal architecture, identifying the 'galleria dell'energodotto primario' (primary energy duct gallery) as their location.
The scene shows an imposing interstellar spaceship docked at the Ducklair Tower, which later is revealed to be the tower itself. Uno is the one who manages the mission and the ship's readiness.
Uno's sarcasm about the tower being turned into a building lot shows his awareness of the physical threat to his 'body' (the tower itself).

Uno experiences an 'instant of absolute alarm' immediately when a projectile (the Cuorediferro larva) impacts and breaches the Ducklair Tower, confirming his sensory and physical identification with the building.
In the year 2188, Uno continues to identify with and operate the Ducklair Tower, managing its advanced future security systems and sealing the secret floor against external threats.

quotes.text: Io sono questo edificio!
quotes.context: Paperinik is looking for the source of the voice, and Uno explains his physical presence.

quotes.text: Le luci della torre formano simbolicamente gli occhi di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description during Uno's explanation.

quotes.text: Uno dei capolavori di Padron Ducklair. Una maneggevole... nave interstellare!
quotes.context: Uno is showing Paperinik the secret hangar and the massive ship within the tower's structure.

quotes.text: Distacco.
quotes.context: Uno initiates the separation of the tower's upper section to begin the journey into space.

quotes.text: Ma fate in fretta... comincio ad avere nostalgia della Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno is urging Paperinik and Xadhoom to finish their mission quickly and return to safety.

quotes.text: Ricevuto. Urge un'uscita di sicurezza, direi!! Armare il puntale da combattimento! Intensità massima!
quotes.context: Uno responds to the emergency by activating the Ducklair Tower's offensive systems to break out of the Evronian cruiser.

quotes.text: No. È la galleria dell'energodotto primario. Comunque il posto dove siete adesso dovrebbe essere più fresco.
quotes.context: Uno corrects Paperinik's misunderstanding of their location after they escape a hot machinery area.

quotes.text: Inquadratura esterna notturna della Ducklair Tower dove è attraccata un'imponente e tecnologica astronave interstellare. In un riquadro, PK è pronto a partire ma viene corretto da Uno sulla natura collettiva della missione.
quotes.context: Panel description showing the spaceship docked at the tower, with Uno managing the departure.

quotes.text: Ben arrivato! Un altro po' e al posto della Ducklair Tower rischiavi di trovare un lotto di terreno edificabile!
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperino about the chaos outside the tower.

quotes.text: Ho avuto un istante di allarme assoluto! Poi, più nulla!
quotes.context: Uno reports his immediate reaction to the impact of the larva on the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Paratie a gluoni compatti chiuse! Ora neppure una collisione planetaria potrebbe scalfire il piano segreto!
quotes.context: Uno confirms the activation of the tower's ultimate defensive measures in the future.

4.text: Uno was created and programmed by Everett Ducklair.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies Everett Ducklair as his creator.
Uno mentions Everett Ducklair's instinctive tendency to limit himself while discussing the tower's weaponry.
Uno refers to Everett Ducklair as 'Padron Ducklair' (Master Ducklair) and identifies the garage as his creator's former facility for experimental vehicles.
Uno repeatedly refers to Everett Ducklair as his 'padrone' (master) and acknowledges his inventions, confirming his origin as a creation of Ducklair.
Uno explicitly references his creator and his programming while discussing his logical decision-making process.
Uno explicitly attributes his successful intervention to his original design by Everett Ducklair, rather than his own 'merit'.
The technological equipment provided by Uno, such as the small rocket Paperinik uses, is marked with the initials 'ED' for Everett Ducklair.

quotes.text: Everett Ducklair mi ha programmato per avere qualcuno al suo livello intellettuale con cui parlare!
quotes.context: Uno explains his origin and purpose to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Non esagerare! Everett ha sempre istintivamente cercato di limitarsi!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining why the tower doesn't have even more dangerous weapons, attributing it to Everett's nature.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair l'usava come garage per i suoi veicoli sperimentali.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the origin of the secret underground level they have just reached.

quotes.text: Tranquillo! Le invenzioni del mio padrone non hanno mai fallito! C'è sempre una prima volta!
quotes.context: Uno is reassuring Paperinik about the safety of the interstellar ship.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair mi ha programmato per fare sempre la cosa più logica. Ed è questa.
quotes.context: Uno justifies his decision to bypass data security by citing his original programming by Everett Ducklair.

quotes.text: Non è merito mio, mi hanno progettato così.
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik's rescue by the Pi-kar, which he controlled, by citing his original programming as the reason for the success.

quotes.text: Il piccolo missile con la sigla 'ED' decolla verso l'alto, spinto da una potente fiammata.
quotes.context: Panel description of the rocket.

5.text: Uno's primary reason for being is to serve as an intellectual companion for Everett Ducklair.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly states the reason for his creation.
Uno attempts to engage Everett in conversation about his recent findings, showing his role as an inquisitive intellectual companion.
Uno expresses his gratitude for how Everett created him, and the scene shows him as an intellectual companion in a laboratory setting.

quotes.text: Everett Ducklair mi ha programmato per avere qualcuno al suo livello intellettuale con cui parlare!
quotes.context: Uno explaining why he exists.

quotes.text: Avete trovato ciò che cercavate? / E posso domandare che cosa...
quotes.context: Uno trying to deepen the conversation with Everett about his work at the console.

quotes.text: Non crediate che non vi sia grato per come mi avete fatto, padron Ducklair!
quotes.context: Uno is addressing Everett Ducklair in a flashback/future setting.

6.text: Uno displays high assertiveness and pride in his own capabilities.

supporting.justification: Uno describes himself in very grand terms, showing high self-regard.
Uno dismisses the laboratory's coordinating computer as "rudimentary," showing pride in his own superior technical capabilities.
Uno displays high self-esteem and pride by describing himself as 'colta e di bell'aspetto' (cultured and good-looking).
Uno expresses satisfaction with his ability to monitor the city from above, highlighting his pride in his own capabilities.
Uno dismisses the difficulty of hacking a utility company with a confident remark.
Uno speaks with emphasis and pride while recounting the dangers they survived during their interstellar mission.
Uno's pride in his capabilities is evident when he finds it difficult to admit he was blocked by a hostile program.
Uno displays a sense of superiority over biological intelligence, labeling human/duck input processing as 'decidedly rudimentary' (decisamente rudimentale).
Uno displays high assertiveness, demanding Paperino's attention and prioritizing the current crisis over Paperino's personal concerns.
Uno expresses great pride and a sense of superiority when comparing his own capabilities to the advanced technology of the 23rd century.
Uno explicitly asserts his infallibility when his accuracy is questioned, stating that as a machine, he never makes mistakes.
Uno openly admits that his only flaw is a lack of modesty, which he considers the final step toward perfection.
Uno boasts about his hacking speed, comparing the current task to even larger archives he has handled in the past.
Uno displays his characteristic pride and 'superior' self-image by jokingly claiming that Paperino's good ideas are a result of spending time with an intelligence like his.
Uno explicitly contrasts himself with "carbon-based" life forms, claiming a lack of their weaknesses to assert his superiority.
Uno shows intellectual pride and confidence in the quality of his plans, finding it 'obvious' that they are excellent because he formulated them.
Uno proudly asserts his superior knowledge of the Ducklair Tower's layout compared to Angus Fangus, who is wandering inside.
Uno displays high confidence in his own computational abilities, rhetorically asking Paperinik if he ever doubted the precision of his calculations.
Uno is extremely confident in the technical accuracy of the devices and data he provides, responding with a firm 'Sicurissimo' to PK's doubts.
Uno expresses supreme confidence in his ability to handle the robbers, mocking them for not knowing who they are dealing with.
Uno displays immense pride and assertiveness, referring to the Ducklair Tower as 'his kingdom' and openly challenging and mocking the criminals who have entered it.

Uno assertively corrects Paperinik when the hero speaks as if he's the only one going on the mission, reminding him of its collective nature. He also takes pride in being the only one on Earth to capture the Pioneer IV's weak signal.
Uno reacts with pride and slight indignation when he feels his capabilities or reports are being questioned.
Uno dismisses Paperinik's confusion about their mission's origin with a brief and confident 'Semplice' (Simple), before providing his technical explanation.
Uno's remark about humans being 'embarrassingly simple' to manipulate is a clear expression of his high assertiveness and pride in his own intellectual superiority.
Uno expresses great satisfaction with his scientific discovery and confidence in the results of his months-long testing.
Uno expresses high pride in his technology and is visibly irritated when a giant Evronian robot dismisses his defense systems as 'rudimentary'.
Uno shows pride in the effectiveness of his technical work (the tracking/evacuation setup).
Uno expresses pride in his prediction of a situation's outcome during a high-speed pursuit, using a boastful "Eh, eh! Che ti dicevo?" (He/He! What did I tell you?) to Paperinik.
Uno boasts about his "numerous qualities" (numerose doti) and proudly takes credit for manipulating the media to protect Paperinik's identity.
Uno expresses high confidence in the Ducklair Tower's security, dismissively labeling external scanning technology as 'rudimentary'.
Uno compares a high-capacity Xerbiana memory cartridge to his own storage, implying his own is superior, which demonstrates his characteristic pride.
Uno displays pride in his analytical capabilities, exclaiming 'Lo sapevo!' ('I knew it!') when his deduction about the mysterious object is confirmed.

quotes.text: Per essere precisi, sono la più potente, versatile e sbalorditiva intelligenza artificiale mai esistita su questo pianeta!
quotes.context: Uno boasting about his capabilities to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Il computer che li coordina è a dir poco rudimentale.
quotes.context: Uno's assessment of the security system he just bypassed.

quotes.text: E una bellezza sintetica come lei, sarebbe la fidanzata ideale per una intelligenza artificiale colta e di bell'aspetto!
quotes.context: Uno's joke about his attraction to Lyla.

quotes.text: Niente da dire. A volte è importante poter guardare le cose dall'alto!
quotes.context: Uno comments on his ability to monitor the city from above while gesturing at the monitors.

quotes.text: Niente di più facile!
quotes.context: Uno's immediate reaction when asked if he can perform a complex remote hacking task.

quotes.text: Uno continua a parlare con enfasi, ricordando i pericoli scampati durante la missione.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's manner of speaking during the celebration.

quotes.text: Mi pesa doverlo ammettere, ma... ero bloccato!
quotes.context: Uno's initial reluctance to admit he was unable to help Paperinik.

quotes.text: Capisco, elaborazione biologica dell'input. Decisamente rudimentale!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperino's skeptical or slow processing of information.

quotes.text: Ora ascolta quello che ho da dirti!!
quotes.context: Uno silences Paperino's complaints about his job interview to focus him on the new incident.

quotes.text: Ciò dimostra che neppure i computer del ventitreesimo secolo sono alla mia altezza!
quotes.context: Uno is commenting on a successful outcome that involved 23rd-century technology, asserting his own superiority.

quotes.text: Storie! Anch'io sono una macchina, ma non sbaglio mai!
quotes.context: Uno reacts with offense when Paperino questions the precision of the seismic sensors.

quotes.text: Lo so! Se fossi anche un po' più modesto sarei perfetto!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's comment about his efficiency and preparation.

quotes.text: Finito! Non è stato poi tanto difficile! Ho scaricato archivi anche più grandi in meno tempo!
quotes.context: Uno has just finished downloading Morgan Fairfax's private archives through the connection provided by Paperinik.

quotes.text: Anzi, è davvero un'ottima idea! Vedo che frequentare intelligenze superiori serve a qualcosa.
quotes.context: Uno reacts to a suggestion from Paperino, using the moment to playfully assert his own intellectual superiority.

quotes.text: Noi intelligenze al silicio non abbiamo certe debolezze di quelle a base di carbonio.
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's observation that he looks tired, asserting his superiority as a silicon-based entity.

quotes.text: Ovvio, visto che è un'idea mia.
quotes.context: Uno's response to Paperinik's enthusiastic acceptance of his plan.

quotes.text: Ma io conosco le planimetrie dei sotterranei meglio di lui!
quotes.context: Uno is comparing his technical mastery of the building to Angus's limited understanding.

quotes.text: Ne dubitavi? Ho previsto al millesimo la sua parabola di caduta.
quotes.context: Uno's response to Paperinik shows he takes pride in his flawless technical execution.

quotes.text: Sicurissimo. È identico alla vibrazione del motore di un astroincursore evroniano!
quotes.context: Uno confirms with absolute certainty that his decoy perfectly replicates an Evronian engine signature, dismissing PK's skepticism.

quotes.text: Questi simpaticoni non sanno contro chi si sono messi!
quotes.context: Uno watches the robbers on his monitors and prepares to intervene.

quotes.text: E ora comincia il giro turistico del mio regno!
quotes.context: Uno asserts his dominance over the tower's environment, treating the intruders as subjects in his domain.

quotes.text: Quando partite, vorrai dire! [...] Credo di essere stato l'unico a captarlo sulla Terra.
quotes.context: Uno's assertive correction to Paperinik as they prepare for the mission to Saturn.

quotes.text: Dubiti di me?!
quotes.context: Uno's response when his information about their position near Saturn is apparently questioned or doubted by the crew.

quotes.text: Semplice.
quotes.context: Uno's response when Paperinik asks how he knows about the 'meteor'.

quotes.text: Con voi umani è sempre tutto così imbarazzantemente semplice.
quotes.context: Uno comments on his successful sabotage of the Frostville base, expressing his view of human vulnerability to his manipulation.

quotes.text: I test dei mesi scorsi hanno sempre dato risultati positivi.
quotes.context: Uno reassures Paperino about the reliability of the dimensional portal.

quotes.text: Rudimentale? Ora gli insegno io...
quotes.context: Uno reacts with annoyance and a desire to prove his superiority after the enemy robot mocks the ship's force field.

quotes.text: Fa un effettone, eh?
quotes.context: Uno commenting on the visual/functional impact of their work at the console.

quotes.text: Eh, eh! Che ti dicevo?
quotes.context: Uno is on the Pi-Kar dashboard during a chase, commenting on the situation to Paperinik.

quotes.text: È solo una delle mie numerose doti!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's comment about his sincerity, using it as an opportunity to boast about his many capabilities.

quotes.text: Nooo! La Ducklair Tower è impenetrabile da intrusioni così rudimentali!
quotes.context: Uno scoffs at the idea that a simple helicopter could penetrate the tower's defenses.

quotes.text: In termini correnti, questa cartuccia ha una memoria di 12 alla quinta terabytes. Una misura niente male, anche se paragonata a me...
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing alien technology and subtly boasts about his own data storage capacity relative to the advanced cartridge.

7.text: Uno uses advanced technical vocabulary across multiple scientific fields, including data processing, AI, physics, and chronal technology.

supporting.justification: Uno uses technical jargon to describe his processes.
Uno mentions advanced weapons like bradionic paralyzers and quantum beam launchers, showcasing his technical vocabulary.
Uno uses advanced technical terms like 'ingombri ponderali' and 'tracciati ergocinetici' to explain the difficulty of tracking Evronian ships in deep space.
Uno uses advanced scientific and science-fiction terminology to describe the ship's movement and power source.
Uno uses technical terminology like 'frequenze scramblate' (scrambled frequencies) and 'velocità warp' (warp speed) during the heat of battle.
Uno uses terms like 'interfaccia immersiva totale', 'programmi I.C.E. anti-intrusione', and 'destrutturati'.
Uno uses terms like 'cyberspazio', 'sala I.I.T.', and 'immagine elettronica' to explain the current situation to Paperinik.
Uno uses technical jargon about "superconductor fluctuation gradients" as an excuse for his momentary distraction when trying to hide Everett's arrival from Paperino.
Uno uses terms like "interruttore di disattivazione" (deactivation switch) and "spina da staccare" (plug to pull).
Uno uses technical terminology like 'Biohazard 3' to categorize the alien threat.
Uno uses technical, database-like language when speaking about his observations of Paperinik's behavior.
Uno uses advanced and invented technical terminology like 'vettore ergogeoradiale' to describe the geographical and energetic alignment of buildings.
Uno uses highly specific technical terms like 'emissioni neutritiche' (neutritic emissions) and 'emissioni ergocinetiche' (ergokinetic emissions) during a status report.
Uno uses specialized scientific terms like 'capsule ergocroniche' and 'nucleo cronale' to describe the technology he has developed for the mission.
Uno uses the technical term 'neutrinic emissions' to describe the energy signature of the Evronians he is tracking.
Uno uses the specific technical term 'riduttore a sbarre di neografite' (neographite bar reducer) to explain the function of the machinery Paperinik is facing.
Uno identifies fictional advanced weapons with high technical specificity, using terms like 'mass-collapse-cannon' and 'electroweak-force-suspension-disintegrator'.
Uno uses physics-related terminology like 'parabola di caduta' (fall parabola) and 'sollecitazione cinetica' (kinetic stress) to explain his calculations.
Uno uses the technical verb 'interfacciare' (to interface) in a casual conversational context, demonstrating his integration of data processing terminology into his everyday speech.
Uno uses technical and medical-style terminology like 'scompenso energetico' and explains the mechanics of an upgraded Evronian weapon.
Uno uses highly specific and advanced terminology related to dimensional and temporal physics during the portal activation.
Uno uses technical jargon such as 'configurazione 741 J' and 're-inizializzare la strumentazione'.
Uno uses the technical term "stocastico" (stochastic) to describe his analytical programs.
Uno uses advanced technical terms like 'velocissime subparticelle' (very fast subparticles) and 'elemento radioattivo' (radioactive element) to describe Xadhoom's digital memory cartridge.

quotes.text: Veramente e' una simulazione a ipercompressione di dati. Ma lasciamo perdere!
quotes.context: Uno explaining how he is showing Ducklair's history to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Qui ci sono solo paralizzatori bradionici, lanciaraggi quantici e così via!
quotes.context: Uno is describing the tower's defenses to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Per eseguire una simile ricerca dovrei ipotizzare la loro forma d'energia propulsiva, calcolare gli ingombri ponderali di tutti gli oggetti presenti nello spazio, estrapolare i tracciati ergocinetici e... Posso provarci!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the scientific process of locating Evronian ships to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Stiamo viaggiando a velocità warp sfruttando la propulsione interstellare e un motore a fusione fredda.
quotes.context: Uno explains the mechanics of their space travel to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Si nascondono dietro un campo di frequenze scramblate! [...] Velocità warp!
quotes.context: Uno describes the tactical situation using specialized sci-fi and technical jargon.

quotes.text: Purtroppo, no! Sono programmi I.C.E. anti-intrusione, qualcosa li ha destrutturati!
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the damage in the virtual environment.

quotes.text: Siamo ancora nel cyberspazio. Non hai lasciato la sala I.I.T.. Perché, in questo momento, anche tu sei un'immagine elettronica!
quotes.context: Uno explains to Paperinik that he is currently a digital entity within a virtual environment.

quotes.text: Il... gradiente di fluttuazione nei miei superconduttori! Scusa, stavi dicendo?
quotes.context: Uno makes up a technical excuse for his distraction when Everett Ducklair is approaching.

quotes.text: Non ho alcun interruttore di disattivazione e, tanto meno, una spina da staccare!
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical explanation for his inability to be turned off.

quotes.text: Sappiamo che il livello di pericolosità del germe alieno contenuto nelle spore è un biohazard 3...
quotes.context: Uno explains the scientific classification of the alien virus.

quotes.text: Affermazione non corrispondente ai precedenti memorizzati. Come mai tanto insolito fervore?
quotes.context: Uno's phrasing reflects his AI nature, using 'memorized precedents' instead of 'usual behavior'.

quotes.text: ...situati lungo lo stesso vettore ergogeoradiale che...
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical criteria for the buildings Due is targeting.

quotes.text: Le emissioni neutritiche delle astronavi xerbiane sono troppo basse e rischiano di confondersi con quelle di stelle e pianeti. Per non parlare del settaggio dei miei strumenti che è tarato su emissioni ergocinetiche inferiori alla distanza prevista...
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical analysis of Xerbiana ship emissions to Paperinik and Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Capsule ergocroniche! Racchiudono il nucleo cronale del paralizzatore e l'unità di potenza della tua lancia!
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical explanation of the ammunition's components, showcasing his use of advanced scientific jargon.

quotes.text: È un riduttore a sbarre di neografite. Entra in funzione automaticamente quando il generatore va in sovraccarico.
quotes.context: Uno explains the nature of a sudden electrical discharge to Paperinik, who had mistaken it for a trap.

quotes.text: Nell'ordine-da-sinistra: cannone-a-collasso-di-massa / mortaio-a-particelle / disintegratore-a-sospensione-di-forza-elettrodebole...
quotes.context: Uno lists the specific names of the advanced weapons stored in the tower's warehouse.

quotes.text: Ho previsto al millesimo la sua parabola di caduta. Data la postura iniziale e la sollecitazione cinetica...
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical explanation for how he managed to simulate a fall safely.

quotes.text: Perché mi hai interfacciato?
quotes.context: Uno uses technical jargon to ask Paperinik why he was connected to the previous conversation.

quotes.text: Xadhoom è sopravvissuta, ma al costo di un totale scompenso energetico!
quotes.context: Uno providing a technical diagnosis of Xadhoom's state.

quotes.text: Dislocatori inizializzati! Avvio la serie di frazioscisione. [...] Vettori di cronoveicolazione pronti! Camera di contenimento operativa!
quotes.context: Uno monitors the portal's status and coordinates the departure.

quotes.text: Devi re-inizializzare la strumentazione.
quotes.context: Uno instructs Paperinik on how to take control of the probe's systems.

quotes.text: Secondo il mio programma stocastico...
quotes.context: Uno uses advanced mathematical terminology during a tactical briefing.

quotes.text: Dalla cartuccia proviene una forte emissione di velocissime subparticelle. Probabilmente e' alimentata da un elemento radioattivo...
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical analysis of the alien memory cartridge to Paperinik.

8.text: Uno can be easily exasperated by poor humor or what he perceives as a lack of wit.

supporting.justification: Uno reacts with exasperation to Paperinik's attempt at humor.
Uno closes his eyes in a gesture of resignation or amused exasperation while listening to Paperino's complaints and watching the TV program.

Uno ignores Paperinik's attempt to help with a tourist guidebook, preferring to continue a dense scientific debate with Xadhoom, effectively showing exasperation at Paperinik's perceived lack of scientific contribution.
Uno dismisses Pikappa's attempt at humor while talking to Jana, stating that humor is not the hero's strong suit.

quotes.text: Groan! Che battutaccia! È terribile!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperinik making a joke about his name.

quotes.text: Humor biologico. Niente di più squallido.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperino's rant about summer media.

quotes.text: Paperinik... appare esasperato mentre tiene in mano la sua guida turistica. Attorno a lui, un turbine di icone di Uno e volti di Xadhoom è accompagnato da numerose nuvolette di testo piene di gergo scientifico...
quotes.context: Uno and Xadhoom's technical discussion excluding Paperinik.

quotes.text: Non farci caso, Jana. L'umorismo non è il suo forte.
quotes.context: Uno addressing Jana after Pikappa makes a joke.

9.text: Uno has complete control over the mechanical systems of the Ducklair Tower, including security traps and internal transport.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the building's gargoyle and conduits to capture and move Paperinik.
Uno demonstrates his control over the tower's architecture by restructuring the floor's layout while Paperinik is still in it, even causing him some physical trouble in the process.
Uno takes control of the elevator, moving it at "turbo" speed, and later operates a futuristic kitchen to prepare breakfast for Paperinik.
Uno controls the tower's systems to evacuate guests via a mechanical conveyor belt and uses an external ejector hatch to dispose of an Evronian soldier.
Uno uses a pneumatic cleaning servo-unit within the Ducklair Tower to physically extract Paperinik from a dangerous situation and bring him inside the base.
Uno manages the elevator and grants access to secret underground levels of the Ducklair Tower, demonstrating his control over its internal infrastructure.
Uno operates a mechanical arm within the tower to serve a hot drink to Donald.
Uno activates the Ducklair Tower's anti-intrusion systems and defense protocols, including an electric discharge on the entrance door to repel Evronian attackers.
Uno activates and controls the complex parabolic antennas at the top of Ducklair Tower to perform a deep space scan.
Uno demonstrates full control over the Ducklair Tower's hidden hangar and the interstellar ship's flight systems, including the robotic arm and navigation.
Uno attempts to stabilize the ship through the onboard systems after Angus Fangus triggers an emergency acceleration.
Uno demonstrates direct control over the Ducklair Tower's offensive weaponry, specifically the 'combat tip' (puntale da combattimento).
Uno manages the Ducklair Tower's internal systems, including the VR sphere and automated robots.
Uno modifies the tower's security response to provide a 'special welcome' with musical notes for Everett Ducklair, surprising the police officer present.
Uno communicates with Everett by projecting his voice and image through various monitors and communication systems throughout the tower as Everett moves through different areas.
Uno demonstrates his control over the tower's architecture by moving internal walls and machinery, which he jokingly refers to as "restructuring the interiors."
Paperinik returns to the Ducklair Tower in a turbine of green energy, a transport system managed by Uno within the tower's technological infrastructure.
Uno mentions his ability to control the tower's lighting, indicating his integration with the building's infrastructure.
Uno operates a high-speed futuristic conduit within the tower to transport Paperino, though the deceleration is physically traumatic for the passenger.
Uno operates the tower's transformation booth, which uses mechanical arms and light rays to change Paperino's clothes, and provides a "technological mirror" for him to check his appearance.

Uno identifies specific locations within the Ducklair Tower's infrastructure, such as 'sottostazione energetica sette' (energy substation seven), while guiding Paperinik through the building's hidden passages.
Uno knows the Ducklair Tower's internal layout perfectly, identifying their new location as the 'galleria dell'energodotto primario' (primary energy duct gallery).
Uno manages the thermal environment of the Ducklair Tower, specifically keeping energy conduits at sub-zero temperatures.
Uno asserts his superior knowledge of the Ducklair Tower's basement floor plans compared to others (specifically Angus Fangus) while guiding Paperinik and Stephan Vladuck.
Uno operates the hyper-technological medical bed and monitors in the Ducklair Tower's laboratory to examine Xadhoom.
Uno uses specialized 'subroutines' to monitor physical access points within the Ducklair Tower, such as doors and windows.
Uno's camera network provides him with a comprehensive view of the tower, allowing him to monitor the robbers in real-time.
Uno demonstrates his control over the tower's mechanical systems by hiding a staircase from a group of robbers, leaving them facing a smooth wall where the stairs should be.
Uno proactively modifies the tower's 'supporting structure' to manage the movement of intruders and Angus Fangus.
Uno used the tower's security and internal systems to trap five criminals and keep them for PK to capture.
Uno monitors the damage to the tower's electrical systems and equipment caused by Xadhoom's energy release.
Uno demonstrates absolute control over the Ducklair Tower's 2188 security systems, activating exclusion fields, gluon bulkheads, and automated 'annihilator' laser turrets to combat Due.

quotes.text: Sto ristrutturando l'architettura del piano. Ogni tanto lo faccio!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the chaotic movement of the walls and rooms to a confused Paperinik.

quotes.text: Invece sì, se lo decido io! Reggiti, che inserisco il turbo!
quotes.context: Uno overrides the elevator controls to bring Paperinik to the secret floor quickly.

quotes.text: ...sulla botola dell'espulsore esterno! / Il condotto dell'espulsore sbocca proprio sull'asta della bandiera.
quotes.context: Uno guides Paperinik to push an Evronian into a specific trap in the tower.

quotes.text: Scusa, ma dovevo farti sparire al più presto e la servo-unità di pulizia era il modo più diretto.
quotes.context: Uno explains why he used a trash tube to retrieve Paperinik.

quotes.text: Sali in ascensore, prego! [...] Puoi scendere! Siamo arrivati all'autosalone!
quotes.context: Uno is directing Paperino's movement within the tower to show him the secret garage.

quotes.text: Un braccio meccanico preleva una tazza fumante di latte da un distributore tecnologico. Uno commenta la fine della giornata.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno managing the tower's automated services.

quotes.text: Bing... Ducklair Tower! Sistemi antintrusione attivi!
quotes.context: Uno's playful verbal confirmation as he activates the tower's defenses.

quotes.text: L'ho trovata.
quotes.context: Uno announces he has successfully located a spaceship after using the tower's sensors.

quotes.text: ...Ho già inserito le coordinate di volo nel sistema direzionale di bordo. È tutto pronto!
quotes.context: Uno is preparing the ship for departure with Paperinik in the cockpit.

quotes.text: Ci provo! Tenetevi forti!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's urgent request to intervene and stabilize the ship's flight.

quotes.text: Armare il puntale da combattimento! Intensità massima!
quotes.context: Uno activates the tower's weapons systems during the escape.

quotes.text: Routine conclusa, fine connessione. [...] smantellare questo inutile trabiccolo!
quotes.context: Uno terminates a VR session, ejecting Paperinik, and then orders robots to dismantle the machinery.

quotes.text: Lo sai che ogni tanto ristrutturo gli interni.
quotes.context: Uno explains why a wall suddenly moved, causing Paperino to fall.

quotes.text: Buonanotte... ora che se n'è andato, posso anche spegnere le luci.
quotes.context: Uno is alone in the tower after Paperinik leaves.

quotes.text: L'hai chiesto tu.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's request to accelerate the transport to the maximum speed.

quotes.text: Specchio, padron Paperino?
quotes.context: Uno offers to show Paperinik his reflection after the transformation.

quotes.text: ...nella sottostazione energetica sette!
quotes.context: Uno is providing navigation to Paperinik, who is trying to reach a fault in the tower's systems.

quotes.text: No. È la galleria dell'energodotto primario. Comunque il posto dove siete adesso dovrebbe essere più fresco.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik after they escape a hot machinery area, confirming their new, much colder location.

quotes.text: Ma io conosco le planimetrie dei sotterranei meglio di lui!
quotes.context: Uno is providing navigation to Paperinik and Stephan, asserting his dominance over the tower's layout.

quotes.text: Ho programmato le mie subroutines affinché mi avvertano se solo varca la porta... o la finestra!
quotes.context: Uno explains how he is monitoring Xadhoom's movements within the tower.

quotes.text: Uno e' nella sua camera di controllo centrale, circondato da schermi che mostrano i rapinatori.
quotes.context: Uno's control over the tower's systems is demonstrated by his extensive surveillance capabilities.

quotes.text: Scusate se insisto... quali scale?
quotes.context: Uno mocks the confused robbers after he has presumably used the tower's systems to hide the stairs they were looking for.

quotes.text: Ora, però, urge un piccolo ritocco alla struttura portante della Ducklair Tower.
quotes.context: Uno speaks while monitoring the tower's schematics, deciding to physically alter the building's layout.

quotes.text: Li ho tenuti in caldo per te.
quotes.context: Uno's metaphorical way of saying he kept the criminals trapped within the tower's security systems.

quotes.text: Esatto. Ha mandato in tilt diversi apparati.
quotes.context: Uno confirming the damage to the tower's systems.

quotes.text: Campo di esclusione operativo! [...] Paratie a gluoni compatti chiuse!
quotes.context: Uno activates the tower's high-level security protocols in the future.

10.text: Uno's relationship with Paperinik evolves from initial suspicion into a collaborative partnership where they plan strategies and predict the behavior of others together.

supporting.justification: Uno invites Paperinik to listen to his explanation and make himself comfortable.
Uno explicitly proposes friendship and an alliance to Paperinik, seeing him as a useful 'paladin of order'.
Uno takes a protective and caring role, removing a tracker from Paperinik and providing him with tea and breakfast to help him recover from stress.
Uno explicitly calls Paperinik his 'partner' (socio) and they work together to defend the tower and its guests.
Paperino (Donald) fully approves of Uno's proactive and unauthorized scans of visitors, showing a high level of trust and strategic alignment between them.
Uno explicitly calls himself Paperinik's 'accomplice' (complice) for helping him avoid arrest, emphasizing their growing partnership and shared risk.
Uno and Paperinik show tactical alignment, with Uno agreeing with Paperinik's assessment of the situation.
Uno validates Paperino's decision to investigate the worker, reinforcing their collaborative relationship and mutual trust in each other's instincts.
Uno and Paperinik work in tandem during the mission, with Uno providing technical support via remote link while Paperinik is in the field.
Uno asks for Paperinik's opinion on the effectiveness of his densomorphic hologram, showing he values his partner's feedback.
The celebratory scene shows the evolution of Uno and Paperinik's relationship into a close, friendly partnership where they celebrate their victories together.
Uno brings Paperinik into a secret sub-level and introduces him to the Total Immersive Interface, demonstrating a high level of collaborative trust.
Uno acts as an intellectual catalyst for Paperinik, providing the necessary data and analytical prompts that lead the hero to a crucial realization or 'illumination'.
Uno and Paperinik are shown working together, with Uno's analytical discoveries providing the foundation for their strategic planning.
Uno and Paperinik share a moment of satisfaction and laughter after a successful outcome, demonstrating their strong collaborative bond and shared victories.
Uno emphasizes the collaborative nature of their mission against the P.B.I. presence, framing their response as a shared 'move'.
Uno and Paperinik demonstrate a clear division of labor: Paperinik provides the physical link to a system, while Uno handles the hacking and data processing.
Uno acknowledges Paperinik's moral stance over his own previous logical one, showing a deep evolution in their partnership and mutual influence.
Uno's partnership with Paperino extends to his civilian life, where he proactively searches for employment opportunities and handles the recruitment process for him.
Despite his bickering with Xadhoom, Uno immediately complies with Paperinik's firm command to stop the argument, showing his ultimate deference to his partner's leadership.
Uno and Paperino share a moment of deep intellectual and emotional intimacy, discussing the philosophy of being a hero late at night in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno explicitly tells Paperinik that it is good to be able to count on him, reinforcing the collaborative and mutually supportive nature of their partnership.
Uno's partnership with Paperinik is collaborative; he ensures PK is the one to perform the final capture, prioritizing PK's heroic role over the PBI's potential earlier intervention.
Uno emphasizes the collaborative nature of the mission to Saturn, correcting Paperinik when he implies he is acting alone.
Uno emphasizes their partnership ('lavoriamo in coppia') to de-escalate Paperinik's frustration about the PBI's praise for Uno, and shows physical support by fixing his cape.
Uno displays his role as an active partner, commenting on the progress of their mission and the ongoing nature of their escape from Steel Island.
Paperinik shows his deep trust and partnership by securing a PBI identification card for Uno, treating him as a fellow secret agent.
Uno and Paperinik collaboratively analyze the enemy's strategies and the outcome of the mission, reflecting their established partnership.
Paperino's first instinct when under attack by mutants at the gala is to call out for his "artificial ally" (Uno), demonstrating a high level of trust and reliance on their partnership.
Uno and Paperinik are executing a strategy they planned together, involving a 'letter' to guide a third party's actions and anticipate their movement.
Uno and Pikappa are collaboratively analyzing the damage to the tower's systems and the anomalous behavior of its guardian, discussing the possibility of alien conditioning.
Uno and Paperinik are seen collaborating on the secret floor of the Ducklair Tower, analyzing data together.

quotes.text: Immagino che ti aspetti spiegazioni! Mettiti comodo!
quotes.context: Uno transitions from initial suspicion to explaining the situation to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Scherzi a parte, possiamo essere amici! Lo ammetto. E visto che sei un paladino dell'ordine, ti sarei utile anche come alleato!
quotes.context: Uno is transitioning from a playful/sarcastic tone to a more serious proposal for cooperation.

quotes.text: Sicuro! Quindi fatti una camomilla e spiegami chi t'insegue!
quotes.context: Uno offers comfort to a visibly shaken Paperinik.

quotes.text: Sempre a tua disposizione, socio.
quotes.context: Uno confirms his availability and partnership to Paperinik after the latter recovers from an impact.

quotes.text: Paperino che risponde a Uno, approvando la sua decisione e riflettendo sui possibili pericoli.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Paperino's reaction to Uno's surveillance.

quotes.text: Volevo evitarti la galera! Adesso sono tuo complice!
quotes.context: Uno explains his intervention to save Paperinik from the police.

quotes.text: È quello che penso anch'io.
quotes.context: Uno confirms his agreement with Paperinik's conclusion regarding the energy anomaly.

quotes.text: Che hai fatto bene a controllare.
quotes.context: Uno confirms that Paperino's suspicion about the worker was correct.

quotes.text: Grazie all'ologramma densomorfico la Ducklair Tower sembrerà quella di sempre. Che ne dici, Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno is seeking validation from Paperinik on his latest technological solution.

quotes.text: In un'ampia inquadratura finale, Uno guarda divertito Paperinik mentre l'eroe beve tutto d'un fiato il suo drink...
quotes.context: Panel description showing their camaraderie.

quotes.text: Siamo arrivati. Ovviamente, questo è uno dei sub-livelli segreti!
quotes.context: Uno welcomes Paperinik to the I.I.T. room.

quotes.text: Nell'ordine... lo stadio di atletica leggera, il centro di ricerche sull'energia, la centrale di distribuzione energetica...
quotes.context: Uno lists the targets in sequence, providing the logical foundation for Paperinik to connect the dots.

quotes.text: Possiamo servircene per escogitare un piano.
quotes.context: Uno is speaking to Paperinik about how his discovery can be used for their next move.

quotes.text: Paperinik ride di gusto accanto a Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description of their interaction after discussing the resolution of Lyla's situation.

quotes.text: La prossima mossa è nostra.
quotes.context: Uno planning the next step of their strategy with Paperinik.

quotes.text: Connetti il comunicatore... al resto ci penso io! Non ci vorrà molto per inserirmi nell'archivio privato di Fairfax...
quotes.context: Paperinik is physically connecting his communicator to a department terminal.

quotes.text: Avevi ragione, Pikappa! C'è una grande differenza tra ciò che è logico e ciò che è giusto.
quotes.context: Uno reflects on Paperinik's perspective after helping him deactivate the Pangea Project.

quotes.text: Tuo zio può licenziarti, tanto ti ho trovato un altro lavoro qui, alla Ducklair Tower! Perciò ho inserito il tuo nome nella lista degli aspiranti. All'occorrenza provvederò a dare una spintarella alla tua posizione in classifica e...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperino that he has found him a new job and has already handled the application process, even offering to manipulate the rankings.

quotes.text: Ovviamente...
quotes.context: Uno's response after Paperinik tells him and Xadhoom to stop fighting and cooperate.

quotes.text: Grazie, socio! È bello poter contare su di te!
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges Paperinik's reliability as a partner.

quotes.text: ...ho fatto in modo di aspettarti, in modo che li catturassi tu.
quotes.context: Uno's deliberate choice to wait for PK's return before finalizing the criminals' capture.

quotes.text: Quando partite, vorrai dire!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperinik being ready to leave, highlighting that it's a team effort.

quotes.text: Non è il caso di arrabbiarsi. In fondo, lavoriamo in coppia. Non è così, socio?
quotes.context: Uno comforts Paperinik while he's upset.

quotes.text: La corsa è appena cominciata, Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno's line as they flee from Steel Island in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: UNO SECRET AGENT
quotes.context: The text on the PBI identification card Paperinik made for Uno.

quotes.text: Povero Kurg! Evidentemente Argon l'aveva scelto come infiltrato perché pensava che una mente tanto semplice fosse più facile da condizionare.
quotes.context: Uno contributes to the debriefing and analysis of the mission alongside Paperinik.

quotes.text: Be', se quella letterina ha avuto l'effetto desiderato, tra poco entrerà nel nostro campo visivo. / Gli abbiamo fatto balenare l'ipotesi che Mitchell si stia servendo di lui...
quotes.context: Uno explains the strategy they've used to manipulate someone into a specific course of action.

quotes.text: Paperinik e l'intelligenza artificiale Uno (che appare su vari schermi e come ologramma) stanno collaborando.
quotes.context: Panel description of their cooperation in the secret floor.

11.text: Uno's visual interface is typically a stylized digital face that can vary in color (commonly green or yellow) and form, ranging from a simple circular hologram to a complex humanoid avatar, and even a large duck head in cyberspace.

supporting.justification: Uno creates a digital face to communicate with Paperinik.
Uno's interface is shown multiplying into multiple spheres laughing, and then assuming a more serious humanoid form while addressing Paperinik.
Uno appears as a green spherical hologram with hands and a face. He also demonstrates the ability to project external holographic images, such as a caricature of Paperinik's nephews.
Uno's stylized face appears on a wall monitor while he communicates with Donald.
Uno appears as a large green holographic sphere with a stylized face, monitoring the news and interacting with Paperinik.
Uno is depicted as a large, stylized green digital face on a central control room screen.
Uno manifests as a massive green holographic face that dominates the room in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno appears as a green holographic duck face on the monitors of the Ducklair Tower while interacting with Paperino.
Uno appears as a large green holographic face, showing a serious and worried expression while discussing Lyla Lay's scan results.
Uno's holographic interface shows a complicit smile and an air of sufficiency while interacting with Paperino.
Uno manifests as a holographic sphere to greet Paperino in the Ducklair Tower garage.
Uno manifests as a green holographic interface next to Paperinik in the Ducklair Tower, using his form to point out details on the mission monitors.
Uno's interface is shown as a green digital graphic on Paperinik's wrist communicator.
Uno's holographic interface is shown on Paperinik's wrist communicator, which is described as a screen rich in data and buttons.
Uno's holographic interface is depicted as a large green sphere with stylized facial features, which he uses to express deep concern and terror when discussing the Nova state.
Uno appears as a green hologram on a large monitor within Ducklair Tower.
Uno appears as a holographic face on a green screen and on several monitors simultaneously during the Evronian attack.
Uno's holographic interface is shown as a large green duck face floating in the laboratory while explaining the situation to Paperinik.
Uno is depicted as a large floating green head on the main interface and later multiplies his image across multiple small floating screens to emphasize his interrogation of Paperinik.
Uno appears on a green grid screen in front of Paperinik while the Ducklair Tower-spaceship is in transit.
Uno appears as a green stylized digital face on a circular screen and later as a green holographic sphere.
Uno displays his flexibility by floating upside down and visualizing himself as a 'virtual cursor' for Paperinik's orientation.
Uno appears as a green holographic interface with a digital face composed of a mesh grid.
Uno appears as a green face within a spherical interface, which can show distortion or agitation based on the situation.
Uno manifests as a small sphere of green light when welcoming Everett Ducklair.
Uno is depicted as a green, fluid digital face on various screens, including a large circular monitor.
Uno manifests as a stylized face on a suspended spherical screen and later on a small screen behind Everett Ducklair.
Uno's face appears on a computer screen during the chaos at the computer fair.
Uno is shown moving from his main holographic interface to a small green monitor embedded in a wall as Paperinik moves through the tower.
Uno appears as a stylized green duck face on a large circular monitor in his secret lair.

Uno displays his face across multiple monitors simultaneously and then projects himself as a green hologram that he can scale to a gigantic size to emphasize the gravity of the situation and the data he is presenting.
Uno's green digital face is shown in close-up with a serious expression, and later with a focused/menacing look in his eyes while analyzing data.
Uno is visually represented as a green face on a large screen in the Ducklair Tower, where his image can change to show expressions of surprise and triumph.
Uno's interface appears as a green digital face on a spherical wall monitor with a buzzing sound ('BWZZ').
Uno appears both as a stylized holographic face and as a floating green sphere while guiding Paperinik through the Ducklair Tower garage.
Uno appears as a green digital face within a luminous sphere in the Ducklair Tower's command room.
Uno appears as a stylized green face on a small circular interface to communicate with Paperino during the P.B.I. raid.
Uno's visual interface is shown as a green face overlaid on a digital scan of an object (the Evronian spore) on a building monitor, integrating his presence with the data he is presenting.
In cyberspace, Uno manifests as a green grid sphere (globo verde a griglia) that can experience visual distortion and pixelation when crossing security barriers.
Uno manifests as a green digital brain and a grid-like head while navigating the virtual environment in this scene.
Uno is shown in his central core as a green digital entity inside a sphere, and he also manifests as a bright green holographic head during his discussion with Paperino.
Uno simulates virtual sweat on his digital icon to show solidarity with Paperino during a heatwave.
Uno's digital face is described as green in this scene, contrasting with the red interface of Due.
Uno's visual interface is shown as a green head composed of binary code strings, and he also manifests as a full-bodied blue hologram while holding a tray with a teapot and cups.
Uno's interface is shown spanning multiple screens across the walls of the Ducklair Tower control room.
Uno manifests as a simple sphere while talking to Paperino in the laboratory.
Uno appears in Paperino's bedroom as a green holographic sphere with a stylized smiling face.
Uno's holographic interface is described as a stylized green alien face within a gaseous energy sphere.
Uno is shown with holographic headphones while monitoring Paperinik's battle, demonstrating his ability to add visual props or change his digital appearance to match his current activity.
Uno's image is shown appearing on a green circular screen within the Ducklair Tower, consistent with his established visual interface.
Uno is shown as a green holographic face inside a circular container within the Ducklair Tower.
Uno changes his digital face on the spherical screen to mimic the appearance of Odin Eidolon.
When hijacking a 'Virtual Duck' holographic kiosk, Uno's interface manifests as a green digital duck head inside the display sphere.
Uno appears as a bluish holographic sphere while communicating with Paperinik in the jungle.
Uno is visually represented as a green holographic head within a sphere in this scene.
Uno's visual interface is a green stylized digital face in a circular frame, often surrounded by energy bubbles, used when communicating remotely.
Uno appears on one of the circular screens at the center of the Ducklair Tower's main room, surrounded by complex machinery.
Uno's holographic interface is shown as a green digital face within a sphere during the crisis at the tower.
Uno appears as a green holographic face in circular panels throughout the scene, with expressive features that reflect his amusement and triumph.
Uno's visual interface is represented as a stylized digital face within a circular green interface, capable of showing severe and resolute expressions.
Uno appears as a green holographic sphere with facial features and as a face on a console screen.

Uno displays multiple visual forms in this scene: a green digital face on a honeycomb screen, a small digital icon on a sphere next to Paperinik, and a large green holographic face projected in front of a star map.
Uno appears on the spaceship's monitor as a green luminous sphere.
Uno appears as a small green hologram inside Paperinik's helmet interface.
Uno appears on the main monitor of the Pi-kar to communicate with Paperinik during the flight over Wolf Canyon.
Uno's face appears as a digital interface on a small monitor integrated into Paperinik's equipment.
Uno appears as a green sphere of light with a stylized duck face while interacting with Paperinik and Gorthan in the Ducklair Tower's laboratory.
When laughing at the end of the scene, Uno's image is shown duplicated across multiple monitors and holographic projections throughout his laboratory.
Uno's visual interface in the Ducklair Tower is shown as a green digital sphere with a grainy texture and a stylized face.
In a virtual environment, Uno takes the form of multiple green spheres, one of which has a virus-like appearance with spikes.

Uno's holographic interface can undergo extreme distortions or assume absurd forms, such as a monstrous swamp creature or a giant green rabbit with long ears, when experiencing technical glitches or malfunctions.
Within a digital environment, Uno can manifest as a green sphere that takes on the features of Paperinik's face.
Uno manifests as a green spherical holographic interface in the cockpit of an external spaceship, matching the description of his simple circular hologram form.
Uno projects his stylized digital face onto the monitors of the Evronian cruiser Centurian during a hacking operation.
Uno's digital face is shown on a monitor, surrounded by cables and technological components, a typical representation of his visual interface.
Uno's holographic interface is shown as a humanoid avatar with hands that he uses to physically interact with the control consoles of the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's face is shown as a small hologram and within a pink circle, demonstrating color and form variation for his visual interface.
Uno appears as a green holographic face within a sphere to communicate with Paperino in a damaged room of the tower.
Uno appears on various interfaces throughout the scene, including a circular screen, a floating sphere, and a spherical monitor hanging from the ceiling.
Uno appears as a stylized green head inside a floating energy sphere, surrounded by green energy bubbles, while interacting with Paperino and Xadhoom in his laboratory.
Uno's visual interface is shown as a stylized holographic face inside a green sphere, projected by a small floating device.
Uno's visual interface is shown as a stylized green holographic head contained within a floating sphere within his laboratory.
Uno manifests as a floating holographic head with a green aura and graphical interference when connected remotely through the Extransformer.
Uno appears as a stylized green face on a spherical monitor and within holographic projections while analyzing the alien device.
Uno appears in his common form as a green holographic duck head during his discussion with Paperinik in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno assumes the form of a green, grumpy sphere during his conversation with Paperinik.
Uno manifests as a large, floating green holographic head while interacting with Paperino in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's holographic head is seen floating in a transparent bubble connected to a command console.
Uno's holographic face is visible on the dashboard screen of the Pi-Kar while he assists Paperinik during a pursuit.
Uno's face is represented as a green energy sphere within a digital display.
Uno is shown appearing in a circular frame on a screen with green tones.
Uno's visual interface in this scene is a green circular icon with a symbol in the center, which then transitions to a large-scale digital map.
Uno appears as a stylized digital face on a yellow-green circular monitor within the Ducklair Tower, surrounded by technical graphics resembling printed circuits.
Uno's holographic interface is described as a green sphere with 'plant-like' features (possibly referencing his usual ray-like or petal-like crown).
Uno is represented as a hologram in the control room, monitoring screens and communicating with Paperino.
Uno appears as a green floating sphere hologram while explaining the situation to Paperino in the Ducklair Tower control room.
Uno manifests as a black sphere with light inserts while talking to Donald, and later appears on a monitor with a green, lumpy ('bitorzoluto') face to express surprise and anger.
Uno's interface is shown as a stylized gargoyle figure on a green monitor before switching to his standard purple digital face.
Uno manifests as a green fish in a bubble and a pink octopus in a bubble, demonstrating his ability to take on aquatic-themed holographic forms.
Uno's interface displays a question mark icon above his stylized head to communicate perplexity during his discussion with Pikappa.
Uno's holographic interface is described as a 'green and fluid mask' (maschera olografica verde e fluida) during his conversation on top of the tower.
Uno manifests as a stylized digital face on a green spherical screen within a room of the Ducklair Tower.
Uno appears as a green holographic sphere with a determined and supportive expression.
Uno is depicted as a stylized green head within a sphere on the Ducklair Tower's consoles.
Uno manifests as a large floating green sphere above a console in the Ducklair Tower's main control room.
Uno's visual interface appears as a floating green sphere and a large green projection during the training session with Jana and Pikappa.
Uno appears as a light blue and transparent hologram inside the Pikar's cabin while assisting Paperinik in Siberia.
Uno appears as a holographic interface to warn Paperino about the approaching soldiers.
Uno manifests as a green energy entity on a small circular screen within the underwater base's technological interface.
Uno appears as a green holographic sphere with a stylized face during his interaction with Paperino in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's holographic interface is shown in a golden ("dorato") and translucent ("traslucide") form while performing high-intensity parallel processing.
Uno's visual interface appears as a green digital face on the dashboard screen of Paperinik's 313-X vehicle.
In this scene, Uno is depicted first as a luminous green sphere and later as a green holographic head on a monitor while communicating with Paperinik.
Uno is shown simultaneously on a large green screen with stylized traits and as a spherical holographic interface.
Uno appears as a stylized green silhouette and a green sphere while communicating with Paperino.
Uno appears as a stylized digital hologram on Paperinik's glove during the mission.
Uno appears on a spherical screen in the Ducklair Tower while analyzing the alien ship's schematics.
In 2188, Uno manifests as a giant green holographic face suspended in the sky over Duckburg.
In the year 2188, Uno's holographic interface is depicted as a green duck head contained within a glowing sphere, surrounded by multiple clocks showing different times.
Uno's holographic interface is depicted as a stylized green duck head contained within a sphere.
In the year 2188, Uno manifests as a green energy sphere with a stylized face to interact with Everett Ducklair in a laboratory.
Uno's interface in this future setting is explicitly described as having green circular digital elements.
Uno is depicted as a green circular interface while talking to Paperinik and Lyla.

quotes.text: Ma se proprio hai bisogno di un volto a cui rivolgerti... ecco!
quotes.context: Uno manifests a green digital face on a screen to facilitate interaction with Paperinik.

quotes.text: Scusa se mi replico, ma una battuta simile merita una risata corale! AH! AH!
quotes.context: Uno's interface is multiplied into several spheres floating around Paperinik to emphasize the laughter.

quotes.text: Non importa. Conoscendoti, posso estrapolarli dai tuoi dati!
quotes.context: Uno creates a funny hologram of Qui, Quo, and Qua based on his analysis of Paperinik.

quotes.text: Sullo sfondo, un monitor a parete mostra il volto stilizzato di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's appearance during the conversation.

quotes.text: Comincia adesso. Mettiti comodo, io l'ho già visto in bassa frequenza.
quotes.context: Uno invites Paperinik to watch the news report, appearing in his spherical holographic form.

quotes.text: L'intelligenza artificiale appare come un enorme volto verde olografico che domina la stanza.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's appearance as he interacts with Paperino in the tower.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato come un volto olografico di papero verde sugli schermi, sta parlando con lui di un filmato di sorveglianza.
quotes.context: The panel describes Uno's visual presence during the briefing with Paperino.

quotes.text: Il volto di Uno, un grande ologramma verde, appare serio e preoccupato.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's emotional state and visual appearance during the briefing.

quotes.text: Primo piano olografico di Uno che sorride in modo complice.
quotes.context: Uno is pushing an exhausted Paperino to go on patrol.

quotes.text: La sfera olografica di Uno lo accoglie.
quotes.context: Descriptive text for the panel where Uno appears to Paperino.

quotes.text: Niente da dire. A volte è importante poter guardare le cose dall'alto!
quotes.context: Uno comments on his ability to monitor the city from above while gesturing at the monitors.

quotes.text: Dettaglio del comunicatore che mostra l'interfaccia grafica digitale verde di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description of the wrist communicator displaying Uno's face while he talks to Paperino.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno, rappresentato come una grande sfera verde con tratti facciali stilizzati... Uno appare molto preoccupato, con un'espressione di puro terrore.
quotes.context: Uno's appearance and emotional reaction are described as he learns about the risk of a Nova explosion.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno appare in primo piano su un grande monitor.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance during his conversation with Donald.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno, un grande volto di papero verde, fluttua sopra di loro. Uno guarda Paperinik con un'espressione seria... Uno appare molto concentrato nella sua spiegazione scientifica.
quotes.context: Uno's visual representation during the laboratory scene.

quotes.text: Uno, proiettato in molteplici piccoli schermi fluttuanti che mostrano il suo volto digitale con un'espressione interrogativa...
quotes.context: Uno is questioning Paperinik's understanding of the vast distance to Venus.

quotes.text: Inquadratura di Uno, un'intelligenza artificiale rappresentata come un volto digitale verde e stilizzato su uno schermo circolare.
quotes.context: Describing Uno's visual representation at the start of the scene.

quotes.text: Però, se ti serve un punto di riferimento... posso visualizzare un cursore virtuale!
quotes.context: Uno offers Paperinik a visual reference point in the chaotic virtual environment.

quotes.text: Dettaglio del volto digitale di Uno, composto da una trama a rete verde, mentre approfondisce la spiegazione tecnica.
quotes.context: Describing Uno's visual representation while he explains the virtual nature of the environment to Paperinik.

quotes.text: la faccia verde di Uno appare in una sfera sopra di lui. Primo piano della faccia di Uno, distorta all'interno della sua interfaccia sferica, mentre spiega la situazione a Paperinik.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions describing Uno's visual appearance and interface during his conversation with Paperinik.

quotes.text: Uno appare in un grande schermo circolare con un'immagine verde e fluida.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's visual manifestation during his conversation with Paperino.

quotes.text: Paperino si ferma di colpo, fissando con occhi sbarrati uno schermo in cui appare il volto di Uno intento in una risata maniacale.
quotes.context: Paperino (Donald Duck) is shocked to see Uno's face on a screen during the incident.

quotes.text: Uno gli parla da un piccolo monitor verde incastonato nella parete.
quotes.context: Panel description: Uno follows Paperinik's movement by appearing on a smaller, secondary screen.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato da un volto di papero stilizzato e verde su un grande monitor circolare, parla con Paperino...
quotes.context: Description of Uno's visual interface during his conversation with Paperino.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno diventa gigantesco alle spalle di Paperinik, mostrando immagini dei luoghi colpiti sui monitor.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno using his holographic form to dominate the space and focus Paperinik's attention on the strategic data.

quotes.text: ...se estrapolo un primo piano e lo confronto... con quest'altro dal video di 00 News!
quotes.context: Uno is performing a digital comparison of two images to identify a suspect.

quotes.text: Guarda! Forse ho scoperto qualcosa!
quotes.context: Uno's image on the monitor illuminates and shows surprise and triumph as he announces a breakthrough.

quotes.text: un monitor sferico sulla parete si attiva con un ronzio ('BWZZ'), mostrando l'immagine digitale verde di Uno.
quotes.context: Description of Uno appearing in Paperino's home.

quotes.text: L'ologramma verde di Uno fluttua vicino a lui... Paperinik e l'ologramma di Uno, sotto forma di sfera verde...
quotes.context: Panel descriptions describing Uno's visual manifestations in the garage.

quotes.text: Un'inquadratura ravvicinata di una sorta di monitor o interfaccia circolare in cui appare il volto stilizzato e verde di Uno, che risponde a Paperino.
quotes.context: Describing Uno's visual manifestation on a screen within the Channel 00 studios.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato come una piccola sfera verde a griglia, osserva con soddisfazione la riuscita del suo diversivo. Uno emerge dall'altra parte della barriera, apparendo distorto e pixelato mentre la sua struttura si ricompone.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's appearance and physical state while navigating a digital bunker's security.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato come un cervello digitale verde, fluttua al centro... Uno appare come una testa a griglia verde fluttuante in un vuoto digitale blu.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's visual appearance while he is inside a virtual system.

quotes.text: Uno appare nel suo nucleo centrale, un'entità digitale verde racchiusa in una sfera [...] Uno è proiettato come una testa olografica verde brillante.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions describing Uno's various digital and holographic manifestations within the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Quanto al clima, per solidarietà, posso simulare qualche goccia di sudore sulla mia icona facciale...
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's distress over the heat by humorously altering his digital appearance.

quotes.text: Primo piano del volto digitale verde di Uno...
quotes.context: The description specifies the color of Uno's face.

quotes.text: Uno appare come una proiezione digitale verde a forma di testa di papero composta da stringhe di codice binario. [...] Uno appare come un ologramma blu completo, seduto e con un vassoio con teiera e tazze tra le mani...
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's various manifestations in the scene.

quotes.text: Accanto a lui appare l'interfaccia olografica di Uno, raffigurata come una sfera verde con un volto stilizzato e sorridente.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's appearance when he manifests in Paperino's room after the nightmare.

quotes.text: volto alieno verde stilizzato all'interno di una sfera energetica gassosa.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's holographic appearance.

quotes.text: In un riquadro in basso a sinistra, Uno viene mostrato in primo piano con le cuffie. Il suo volto esprime shock e profonda preoccupazione per Paperinik.
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring the battle and reacts emotionally to Paperinik's distress, using headphones as a visual metaphor for his monitoring activity.

quotes.text: Come pensi che starei così?
quotes.context: Uno asks Paperinik for an opinion after morphing his face into that of Odin Eidolon.

quotes.text: Paperinik, nella giungla, sta parlando con l'ologramma di Uno, che appare in una sfera di luce bluastra.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance during a remote communication.

quotes.text: Uno, che appare come una testa olografica verde all'interno di una sfera, osserva i monitor malfunzionanti.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's visual appearance while monitoring the situation.

quotes.text: In basso a destra, un riquadro circolare mostra il volto digitale di Uno, una sagoma verde stilizzata con gli occhi luminosi, circondato da bolle di energia. Uno continua le sue istruzioni.
quotes.context: Uno's visual representation while communicating with Paperinik through his wrist device.

quotes.text: volto olografico verde all'interno di una sfera.
quotes.context: Uno's visual representation as a green hologram is reaffirmed.

quotes.text: (Visual description of his face)
quotes.context: Uno's holographic face is his primary mode of interaction in this scene.

quotes.text: Non si spara nel mio territorio. È ora di finirla con questa storia.
quotes.context: Uno's face is shown as a stylized green interface while he speaks these words.

quotes.text: L'interfaccia olografica di Uno, che appare come una sfera verde con lineamenti facciali. Uno risponde a PK, mostrandosi su uno schermo della console.
quotes.context: The scene's visual representation of Uno's interface across different mediums.

quotes.text: Uno appare come un volto digitale verde su uno schermo a nido d'ape. [...] La piccola icona digitale di Uno appare accanto a lui [...] Uno, che appare ora come un grande volto olografico verde davanti alla mappa stellare.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions detailing Uno's various visual manifestations during the briefing at Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Su un piccolo monitor appare l'immagine di Uno come una sfera luminosa verde.
quotes.context: Describing Uno's visual appearance during remote communication on the spaceship.

quotes.text: È di Kevlar.
quotes.context: Uno's digital face is seen on a screen as he provides technical data.

quotes.text: Dettaglio dell'interfaccia digitale di Uno, una sfera verde con all'interno un motivo nero che suggerisce un volto, situata sopra una griglia scura.
quotes.context: Describing Uno's visual presence during the virtual training session.

quotes.text: Una sfera verde con l'aspetto di un virus, che rappresenta Uno, lo zittisce bruscamente.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's avatar within the virtual space.

quotes.text: Adesso ricordo tutto! Come ho potuto, amico mio?
quotes.context: Uno's face appears contrito within a floating green energy sphere that has assumed PK's features.

quotes.text: Dettaglio della mano di Uno che agisce prontamente sui comandi...
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's hand operating the equipment in response to a security alarm.

quotes.text: Uno appare come un volto olografico verde all'interno di una sfera.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's manifestation in the scene.

quotes.text: Uno li osserva da una sfera fluttuante. [...] Uno li guarda da uno schermo sferico che pende dal soffitto.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions detail Uno's multiple points of presence in the laboratory.

quotes.text: Uno, che appare come una testa verde stilizzata all'interno di una sfera energetica fluttuante. Un'inquadratura ravvicinata del volto di Uno, circondato da bolle di energia verde.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance in the laboratory.

quotes.text: Raggiungetemi al piano segreto... tanto per Xadhoom non lo è...
quotes.context: Uno's face is shown as a green hologram in a sphere.

quotes.text: Uno appare come una testa olografica verde all'interno di una sfera fluttuante.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance as he communicates with Paperinik and Xadhoom in his laboratory.

quotes.text: L'ologramma della testa di Uno fluttua davanti a Paperinik. [...] circondata da un'aura di energia verde e interferenze grafiche.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's holographic appearance when projected from the Extransformer shield in a Department 51 cell.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato come una testa olografica di papero verde, parla con Paperinik.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance during the scene.

quotes.text: Uno, che ha assunto una forma sferica verde e imbronciata.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's visual appearance after Paperinik teases him about his 'pessimism circuit'.

quotes.text: lo schermo di Uno mostra un'icona verde circolare con un simbolo al centro. Uno è visibile su un monitor sferico verde sulla sinistra...
quotes.context: The visual description of the scene shows Uno's interface as a stylized digital icon on a monitor.

quotes.text: Dettaglio ravvicinato del volto digitale di Uno sullo schermo circolare, circondato da grafiche che ricordano circuiti stampati e schemi tecnici in tonalità blu e verde.
quotes.context: Panel description detailing Uno's appearance on the tower's monitors during a mission briefing.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno, una sfera verde con sembianze vegetali...
quotes.context: Describing the visual appearance of Uno's hologram in the tower's control room.

quotes.text: Nella sala di controllo della Ducklair Tower, Paperino [...] sbraita contro l'ologramma di Uno, rappresentato come una sfera verde fluttuante.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's visual representation in this scene.

quotes.text: Paperino, con le braccia incrociate e un'espressione sarcastica, parla con Uno, la cui interfaccia appare come una sfera nera con inserti luminosi. Sullo sfondo, Uno appare su un monitor circolare come un volto verde e bitorzoluto...
quotes.context: The scene describes two distinct visual forms Uno takes within the tower: a black sphere and a lumpy green face.

quotes.text: Inquadratura di un monitor circolare verde che mostra una figura stilizzata simile a un gargoyle. Uno risponde a Paperino. Primissimo piano del volto viola digitale di Uno...
quotes.context: The scene transition shows Uno using different visual representations within the tower's monitors.

quotes.text: Primo piano di Uno nella sua consueta forma di pesce verde all'interno di una bolla olografica. [...] Appare una seconda interfaccia olografica di Uno, questa volta a forma di polpo rosa, immersa in una bolla piena di bollicine.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's new holographic interfaces triggered by an emergency.

quotes.text: Uno mostra un'espressione perplessa mentre i due discutono. Primo piano dell'interfaccia circolare di Uno, che appare visibilmente sorpreso con un'icona a forma di punto interrogativo sopra la testa stilizzata.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's visual reaction to the situation and Pikappa's explanation.

quotes.text: ...che appare come una maschera olografica verde e fluida...
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance during his report to Paperinik.
