quotes.text: Uno appare su uno schermo sferico verde, intervenendo nella discussione per dare la sua disponibilità a fornire l'occorrente dal magazzino.
quotes.context: The panel describes Uno appearing on a specific type of monitor (spherical and green) to participate in the conversation.

quotes.text: Uno, la cui immagine appare come una testa verde stilizzata in una sfera.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's appearance during the briefing with Paperino.

quotes.text: Uno appare come una grande sfera verde fluttuante sopra una console tecnologica circolare.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance in the control room.

quotes.text: Davanti a lui appare l'ologramma di Uno, di colore azzurro e trasparente.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance while providing support inside the Pikar.

quotes.text: Paperinik, Barnum e un collaboratore osservano l'immagine di Uno che appare su un piccolo schermo circolare. Uno ha il suo aspetto di entità energetica verde.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance.

quotes.text: Uno, che appare come una sfera olografica verde con un volto stilizzato, il quale lo rimprovera per il suo ritardo.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance as he greets a late Paperino.

quotes.text: In un'ampia sala tecnologica, Pikappa è su una piattaforma davanti a una console e contatta Uno, il cui ologramma dorato appare davanti a lui.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance as he begins the missile interception operation.

quotes.text: Uno, rappresentato da un volto digitale verde sullo schermo del cruscotto, gli parla dell'avvenuta cattura.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's manifestation during the mission.

quotes.text: Inquadratura ravvicinata del monitor sulla console, dove appare l'immagine di Uno sotto forma di sfera verde luminosa. [...] Uno, raffigurato come un'intelligenza artificiale a forma di testa verde...
quotes.context: The panel descriptions detail Uno's varied visual manifestations during a remote communication session.

quotes.text: Uno appare su un grande schermo verde con i suoi tratti stilizzati. [...] PK e l'interfaccia olografica sferica di Uno si trovano davanti a un macchinario cilindrico...
quotes.context: Description of Uno's dual manifestation during a technical analysis in his lab.

quotes.text: Primo piano dell'interfaccia digitale di Uno, una sagoma verde stilizzata all'interno di una massa fluida dello stesso colore. [...] Veduta della sfera verde che rappresenta Uno mentre opera sui sistemi della torre.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's visual appearance on the monitors during the crisis.

quotes.text: Uno appare come una testa di papero verde contenuta in una sfera luminosa, circondata da vari orologi che segnano tempi diversi.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance during his interaction with Everett Ducklair in the future.

quotes.text: Dettaglio dell'interfaccia olografica di Uno, rappresentata come una testa di papero verde e stilizzata all'interno di una sfera.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's visual manifestation in the secret floor of Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: La sfera verde che rappresenta Uno mostra un volto stilizzato con un'espressione rammaricata.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance while talking to Everett Ducklair.

quotes.text: Uno, visualizzato come un'interfaccia circolare verde, parla con Paperinik.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance in the 20th century.

12.text: Uno's communication style is often sarcastic and ironical, frequently employing dark humor (such as the 'good news/bad news' trope) and graphic metaphors to highlight the dangers Paperinik faces or to mock his predicaments.

supporting.justification: Uno uses irony and sarcasm when Paperinik is in a difficult situation due to the tower's reconfiguration.
Uno mocks the high-speed elevator ride by acting like a cheerful elevator operator upon arrival.
Uno playfully asks if he gets a kiss after Paperilla Starry kisses Paperinik, showing his witty and ironical communication style.

Uno uses the graphic metaphor "marmellata di supereroe" (superhero jam) to describe the result of a potential failure by Paperinik, while also calling him a "sbruffone" (braggart) for his overconfidence.
Uno uses the sarcastic and slightly mocking nickname 'vecchio mantello tarlato' (old moth-eaten cape) to address Paperinik while trying to cheer him up.
Uno uses a witty and sarcastic style, claiming not to be programmed for humor as a joke itself.
Uno sarcastically refers to the mysterious intruder who is committing crimes as 'our friend' (il nostro amico).
Uno makes a sarcastic remark about the Razziatore's mysterious disappearance, calling him a 'fanatic of special effects'.
Uno's response "A dir poco!" (To say the least!) is a terse and slightly ironical way to agree with Paperinik's concern.
Uno sarcastically suggests that Paperinik could have simply made an agreement with the research center's management instead of sneaking in.
Uno uses irony and sarcasm when he observes Paperinik falling into a pile of trash, justifying the undignified rescue as the 'most direct way'.
Uno uses irony to mock Paperinik's admission of failure and laughs at Angus Fangus's legal troubles.
Uno uses sarcasm ('Spiritoso') and jokes about his role to push Paperinik into action.
Uno uses a sarcastic and hyperbolic comparison to mock Paperino's suggestion, and later gives him a reality check about using public transport.
Uno's tone is breezy and self-assured even when dealing with critical mission tasks.
Uno observes Paperinik fainting with amusement and makes a sarcastic comment about the hero's public image, highlighting the absurdity of the situation.
Uno reacts sarcastically to the news that Angus Fangus's director might be unhappy with his report, showing his characteristic mocking irony.
Uno sarcastically remarks that Donald isn't on patrol, pointing out his civilian clothes as evidence.
Uno responds mockingly (beffardamente) to the threats of the Evronian invaders as he activates the tower's defenses.

Uno uses a sarcastic 'good news/bad news' setup to inform Paperinik that Angus Fangus has had his brain energy drained, jokingly framing the loss of the victim's essence as the 'good news' because of Angus's unpleasant personality.
Uno uses heavy irony when discussing the workload Paperinik gives him and the logistical absurdity of Paperinik's impulsive plan to go to Venus.
Uno mocks Paperinik's reaction to being pinched by a robotic arm, sarcastically suggesting that Paperinik's presence enriches his vocabulary.
Uno uses sarcasm when Paperinik is agitated about their location or the ship's speed.
Uno uses understated irony when referring to a violent combat breakout as merely needing an 'emergency exit'.
Uno uses the sarcastic and dismissive term 'pallone gonfiato' (windbag) to refer to Angus Fangus, showing his ironic and witty style.
Uno uses a graphic, bird-themed metaphor ('riportato a casa le piume') to describe their survival of the mission.
Uno chooses a news clip from a channel Paperinik dislikes and laughs about it.
Uno jokingly attributes a dangerous free-fall to an energy-saving strategy.
Uno uses a sarcastic and witty remark to tease Paperinik's lack of eagerness to face a potential uncertainty or danger in cyberspace.
Uno displays a mocking smile and sarcastically critiques reality as 'monotonous and poorly programmed' while dismissing biological thinking as 'rudimentary'.
Uno uses a witty and slightly boastful tone when mentioning that his 'superior software' allows him to lie, showing his ironical self-awareness.
Uno uses sarcastic and teasing remarks towards Paperino, mocking his irritability and making light of a situation where he almost crushed him with moving walls.
Uno uses a sarcastic and ironical tone when asking Paperino if his conscience would prevent him from watching the intercepted video.
Uno uses self-deprecating irony when comparing his own analytical skills to a journalist's success.
Uno uses sarcasm and a witty tone when responding to Paperinik, such as mocking his pessimism or the results of his previous actions.
Uno uses sarcasm to mock the simplicity of a solution that future scientists overlooked, highlighting his own wit.
Uno playfully lists a breakfast menu alongside 'shocking news' to invite Paperino to the Ducklair Tower, demonstrating his ironical and witty communication style.
Uno uses a sarcastic and misleading analogy (riding a bike) to tease Paperinik about the difficulty of operating a high-tech submarine.
Uno uses sarcasm and a witty comparison to minimize Paperinik's fear of the P.B.I., suggesting that tax agents would be a worse threat.
Uno uses sarcasm to respond to Paperinik's own sarcastic remarks, highlighting his awareness of human communication styles.
Uno uses sarcastic irony to mock Paperinik's hesitation, suggesting his creator should have taught him better manners.
Uno sarcastically teases Paperinik about his chances of survival while they are being attacked by digital soldiers.
Uno dismisses Paperino's physical discomfort after being caught in a scuffle by sarcastically pointing out that Angus Fangus is having a worse time.
Uno mocks Paperinik's dramatic way of speaking, suggesting he writes his own "lyrics" alone in the dark.
Uno maintains his sarcastic and self-assured tone even while saving Paperinik from a life-threatening fire.
Uno mocks Paperino's perceived laziness and lack of focus by suggesting he wouldn't even notice if he were turned into a Coolflame while watching a movie.
Uno uses a sarcastic metaphor to rebuff Paperino's request for specific locations or numbers he hasn't yet determined.
Uno makes a sarcastic remark about Xadhoom appearing to solve the situation when Paperinik is captured by the military.
Uno uses the diminutive 'notiziuncola' (little piece of news) in a mock-modest or ironic way to describe a potentially vital discovery he made by hacking military computers.
Uno uses sarcasm to mock the technology of his opponents, even when he is in a dangerous situation, by calling binary code 'antiquated'.

Uno uses a sarcastic analogy involving Santa Claus to mock the impracticality of Paperino's suggestion of a manual search, and later playfully attributes Paperino's good ideas to his own 'superior' influence.
Uno sarcastically points out the lack of a common car radio in the high-tech PK Jet, contrasting it with its advanced invisibility system.
Uno sarcastically suggests that Paperinik could have a career as a fashion designer because of his new tactical suit.
Uno uses a sarcastic joke about 'double parking' to underscore the urgency of Paperinik's mid-air boarding mission, applying a mundane human inconvenience to a high-stakes action sequence.
Uno uses dark humor and sarcasm regarding Paperino's stressful situation with Uncle Scrooge.
Uno dismisses Paperino's complaints and the media content they are watching as 'biological humor,' calling it 'squalid' in a sarcastic tone.
Uno uses a sarcastic remark to dismiss Paperinik's claim of seeing something he hasn't detected yet.
Uno uses a witty and sarcastic remark to mock Paperino's attempt at a joke.
Uno mockingly laughs at Paperino's physical discomfort due to the heat and the logistical difficulty of wearing a costume under civilian clothes.
Uno sarcastically comments on Xadhoom's angry outburst.
Uno suggests an absurdly dangerous and 'cartoonish' way to reach the airport (being shot out of a cannon) and laughs at the prospect, showing his dark and ironic sense of humor.
Uno's comment about the canopy being 'practically unbreakable' just as it starts cracking under Trauma's blows carries a dry, ironic undertone regarding the failure of his own technology.
Uno uses the sarcastic nickname 'Sherlock' to challenge Paperinik's thinking and broaden his deductive scope.
Uno uses a playful and sarcastic tone when revealing his findings about the impostor.
Uno uses a witty and slightly ironic remark about a 'depressed superhero' to address Paperinik's mood.
Uno sarcastically tells Paperinik not to act like a "zia" (old lady/aunt) when providing him with warm accessories, mocking his potential fussiness or complaints about the gear.
Uno uses irony to downplay the severity of an alien attack when Paperino asks what's happening.
Uno uses the 'bad news' trope and adds a sarcastic remark about the Evronians not handing out Christmas presents to describe a hostage situation.
Uno sarcastically asks Paperinik if he has anything more 'epic' in his repertoire while the hero is in a dire situation after a crash.
Uno ironically comments on a journalist's statement about Lyla's whereabouts while monitoring the Channel 00 newsroom.
Uno uses heavy sarcasm to deflect Paperinik's teasing about his hobbies.
Uno uses irony to comment on the success of their infiltration, immediately pointing out the lack of an escape plan.
Uno uses sarcasm to mock Paperinik's situation, asking him to 'guess' who has to do the dirty work.
Uno uses the sarcastic metaphor of 'roasting' to warn Paperinik and Stefan Vladuck about the rising temperature in the tower's depths, and dismisses Paperinik's grievances as habitual complaining.
Uno ironically suggests that recording Angus's screams will lift Paperinik's spirits.
Uno sarcastically attributes the quality of Paperinik's action photos to the 'model' being photogenic, followed by a laugh.
Uno uses a witty and metaphorical opening to report a serious event, framing Xadhoom's arrival as a 'shooting star' to make a wish upon.
Uno uses sarcasm to dismiss Paperinik's attempt to help with technical repairs, challenging him to fix a 'negated flux immobile thruster' as a way to point out the hero's lack of technical skill.
Uno uses a sarcastic, ironic tone to challenge Paperino's possible excuses for not being on duty.
Uno uses the idiomatic metaphor "se li mangia a merenda" (eats them for a snack) to describe Xadhoom's overwhelming power compared to common criminals.
Uno's answering machine message is a prime example of his sarcastic and dismissive communication style.
Uno displays his characteristic irony by asking Paperinik to 'smile' for a moment as if posing for a photo right after a dangerous and chaotic battle at the factory.
Uno mocks Paperino's burnt beak and failed romantic moment with a sarcastic comment.
Uno uses heavy sarcasm and irony while taunting the robbers, mocking their reliance on maps and their inability to find the stairs he has hidden.
Uno's tone is sarcastic and ironical when demanding a simple 'thank you' for his proactive management of the criminals and the PBI.
Uno uses an ironical/sarcastic remark to comment on Paperinik's observation about the size of the alien ship.
Uno uses a vivid and slightly dark metaphor involving a vampire and tomato juice to explain the inadequacy of his substitute energy system for an Evronian.
Uno makes a sarcastic joke about Mekkano's ability to weld and integrate mechanical parts to its body.
Uno makes a condescending and sarcastic remark about how easy it is to manipulate humans, highlighting his sense of intellectual superiority.
Uno displays his characteristic irony by joking about wishing he were a simple cash register to avoid the stress of his current life as an AI partner to a hero.
Uno uses self-referential irony or sarcasm when commenting on the 'success' of his plan during a chaotic evacuation.
Uno jokingly teases Paperinik about being greedy ('venale') when he learns Paperinik negotiated for the ID cards.
Uno hypocritically lectures Paperinik on the importance of phone privacy while he himself is actively eavesdropping on a call.
Uno mocks Paperinik's upcoming mission by giving him absurdly mundane, motherly advice about wearing a wool shirt to avoid catching a cold.
Uno mocks a gang of aggressive truckers by suggesting they should be in first grade, using sarcasm to undermine their threat.
Uno uses sarcasm when PK finally addresses him in the digital environment.
Uno jokes about Paperone's (Scrooge McDuck's) reaction to the tower disappearing, framing it as a concern about unpaid rent.
Uno displays his characteristic dry, ironical humor by giving a mundane instruction (calling home) just as Paperinik and Urk are about to be hurled through a dimensional vortex.
Uno uses a brief, sarcastic rhetorical question to highlight the obviousness of the massive Evronian ship appearing above Paperinik.
Uno uses a sarcastic and witty comparison to human repair costs to comment on the damage Paperinik has inflicted on the Evronian cruiser Centurian.
Uno uses irony to comment on his own unconventional method of communication (speaking through a belt).
Uno sarcastically comments on Paperinik's mood and uses a humorous threat to delete Star Wars to get him moving.
Uno mocks Paperinik's lack of preparation and his "superficial" approach to investigating the desert site.
Uno displays his sarcastic humor by projecting a mock-error message on a screen when explaining his failed attempts to contact Paperinik.
Uno sarcastically remarks on the failure of his own containment barrier to actually contain Xadhoom.
Uno uses a graphic and domestic metaphor to describe the destruction of the Pi-Kar by a mutant.
Uno opens the conversation with a sarcastic question about alien cutlery to tease Paperino.
Uno uses a smiley face (';-)') and a playful response ('Arrossisco...') in his text-based communication with General Wisecube.
Uno responds sarcastically to Paperinik's shouting, pointing out the risk of being discovered.
Uno uses a dry, sarcastic tone when responding to Paperino's informal language, acknowledging its linguistic correctness while highlighting his own lack of information.
Uno uses sarcasm to greet Paperinik after a mission, joking about the number of enemies he faced.
Uno jokes about the Evronians' insurance premiums right before their ships collide and explode.
Uno maintains a mocking and sarcastic tone even during a high-stakes digital confrontation with his twin, Due, asking for 'congratulations' for his successful sabotage.
Uno is described as having an expression between ironic and amused while observing Paperino's boastful behavior.
Uno uses a mockingly simple explanation for a tactical radar display to emphasize the urgency of the situation.
Uno uses sarcastic and sly remarks when discussing his plans or commenting on Angus Fangus's television segments.
Uno sarcastically asks Paperinik if he gets his "brilliant" answers from a book, mocking the hero's wit.
Uno sarcastically offers Paperinik a high-tech visor with a radio for "relaxing" during a dangerous mission, knowing PK won't have time for it.
Uno uses a sarcastic and challenging tone when reporting Angus Fangus's predicament to Paperino, implying that Paperino's previous lack of interest was misplaced.
Uno uses sarcasm to describe a dangerous criminal as "almost nice" and makes light of his appearance.
Uno sarcastically congratulates Paperinik after the hero completes a camouflage transformation that turns him into a stylized dark tree.
Uno uses situational wordplay and puns, telling Paperinik "not to move a leaf" while the hero is literally disguised as a tree.
Uno responds with sharp sarcasm when PK (presumably) asks about his condition after a crash, rating the situation as neither mediocre nor excellent.
Uno uses sarcasm when discussing his tasks or Paperinik's schedule, using the word 'fantastico' ironically.
Uno responds with sarcasm when Pikappa asks where he is, suggesting that as an AI, he is usually the one tracking others.
Uno uses a sarcastic or ironical tone when asking Pikappa if he had cleaned the maintenance machine, which is visibly damaged and in poor condition.
Uno sarcastically welcomes Paperino while highlighting the extreme danger the tower is in, using a dark metaphor about the building being destroyed.
Uno sarcastically mocks Pikappa for needing help against common municipal workers when he is used to fighting dangerous aliens.
Uno sarcastically tells the sleeping Paperino that he has 'thought enough' (pensato abbastanza) as a way to wake him up.
Uno uses sarcasm to comment on Paperinik's hidden past and his supposed 'Himalayan training'.

Uno displays his sarcastic and ironic sense of humor by naming Paperinik's new front office 'CENTRO DI AVUNCULOGRATULAZIONE MECCANICA' (Mechanical Aunt-Greeting Center), an absurdly specific and non-threatening name.
Uno uses a sarcastic and corrective tone when Paperino complains about the lack of useful information.
Uno uses a sarcastic rhetorical question to tease Pikappa about his lack of "chivalry" during a high-stakes escape.
Uno uses sarcasm to undermine Pikappa's attempt at humor in front of Jana.
Uno makes a sarcastic joke about a 'support number' on the mental screen he just created for Pikappa.
Uno uses a dry, slightly sarcastic tone to dash Paperino's hopes for modern comforts in the Siberian wilderness.
Uno uses sarcasm to dismiss Paperino's confusion about their current situation.
Uno responds with a nonsensical, witty remark ('Mayonnaise!') when Paperinik is likely asking for a solution or explanation in a high-pressure situation.
Uno uses an ironic and theatrical tone ('Et voilà!') and mock-politeness ('signore') while assisting Paperino with his transformation.
Uno uses sarcasm to describe the capture of criminals as a 'free ride' and to tease Paperinik about his happiness while being unemployed.
Uno uses sarcasm to tease Paperinik about his disguise (Grigorij Grimka) and makes a witty remark about the weather to highlight the absurdity of their situation.
Uno sarcastically suggests using Paperino's game computer as a dump for a virus.
Uno sarcastically tells Paperinik to let the head scout drone 'sniff' him, as it will signal him as 'insignificant'.
Uno uses dry, understated sarcasm when Paperinik is recovering from a painful electric shock, commenting that he has seen worse.
Uno enters the scene with a classic sarcastic/witty remark, asking an exhausted and desperate Paperinik if he needs help just as he's about to be overwhelmed.
Uno bluntly tells Paperinik that there are many things he doesn't know while guiding him through the ship's controls.
Uno greets Paperinik with a sarcastic question while the hero is in the middle of a violent battle and pinned down by an explosion.
Uno jokes about Paperinik's lack of insurance for his car against alien invasions after it crashes.
Uno uses a weary, sarcastic idiom about cleaning up the mess ("i cocci sono miei").
Uno sarcastically remarks that Angus Fangus's disappearance has positive aspects, despite the overall alarming situation.
Uno expresses his disdain for human (biological) intelligence during a technical crisis.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Come ti stavo dicendo, ora la porta è sulla parete opposta!
quotes.context: Uno is laughing at Paperinik's confusion as the floor's layout changes.

quotes.text: Ding! Centocinquantesimo piano: casalinghi, articoli sportivi, congegni strabilianti e intelligenze artificiali!
quotes.context: Uno announces their arrival at the secret floor with ironic cheerfulness after nearly squashing Paperinik with acceleration.

quotes.text: Niente "smack" per me?
quotes.context: Uno appears as a small hologram on Paperinik's device after the battle.

quotes.text: "Tsk! Meno male che stavolta hai premuto il pulsante giusto, altrimenti saresti marmellata di supereroe, sbruffone!"
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring Paperinik's use of a flight module and sarcastically reminds him that a single mistake would have been fatal.

quotes.text: Su col morale, vecchio mantello tarlato!
quotes.context: Uno's playful way of addressing Paperinik when he is dejected.

quotes.text: Non sono programmato per l'umorismo. E, comunque, non di primo mattino!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's grumpy reaction to his morning briefing.

quotes.text: Il nostro amico della notte scorsa è di nuovo in volo!
quotes.context: Uno is notifying Paperinik that the intruder from the previous night is active again.

quotes.text: Sarà un fanatico degli effetti speciali.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the Razziatore vanishing in a swirl of light on the surveillance footage.

quotes.text: A dir poco!
quotes.context: Uno's response to Paperinik's surprise about Lyla being shielded.

quotes.text: Potevi accordarti con la direzione del centro ricerche!
quotes.context: Uno mocks Paperinik's choice of infiltration while they are on a mission to place sensors secretly.

quotes.text: Forse no! Spazzatura! Splendido. [...] Scusa, ma dovevo farti sparire al più presto e la servo-unità di pulizia era il modo più diretto.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Paperinik's landing in a pile of garbage after being sucked into the tower's trash system.

quotes.text: E lo ammetti? Tu, l'infallibile ineffabile? [...] Sarà troppo occupato a pensare una spiegazione credibile da fornire al giudice! Ih! Ih!
quotes.context: Uno reacting to Paperinik's return and Angus's arrest.

quotes.text: Spiritoso. / Per cui... alla riscossa, Paperinik!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's protests and sending him on patrol.

quotes.text: Come no! Magari potreste formare una squadra con King-Kong e Godzilla!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's ideas about potential allies or threats with heavy irony.

quotes.text: Niente di più facile!
quotes.context: Uno's casual response to a request for technical intervention during a dangerous mission.

quotes.text: Non sarebbe stato educativo per i paperopolesi, se il loro paladino fosse svenuto pubblicamente!
quotes.context: Uno watches Paperinik faint on the floor after explaining the cosmic danger they narrowly escaped.

quotes.text: Ah! E così il direttore non sarà contento... Sai che dispiacere!
quotes.context: Uno is watching the Channel 00 broadcast from Ducklair Tower and reacts to the interaction between Lyla Lay and Angus Fangus regarding Angus's fake news report on Paperinik.

quotes.text: Giusto te! Qualcosa mi dice che stanotte non sei di pattuglia... forse, la divisa?
quotes.context: Uno's playful remark to Donald who is in civilian clothes.

quotes.text: Be', ecco, ho due notizie. Una buona e una cattiva. [...] Dall'esame dei dati non ci sono dubbi... con quel colpo, gli evroniani hanno assorbito l'energia cerebrale del tuo amico Angus... Era questa la buona notizia.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the medical status of Angus Fangus to Paperinik after an Evronian attack.

quotes.text: Ti sconsiglio il taxi. Considerate le tariffe extraurbane, una corsa fino a Venere ti costerebbe un occhio della tua supertesta!
quotes.context: Uno mocks Paperinik's lack of a transportation plan for a 150-million-kilometer journey.

quotes.text: Affascinante! Senza di te il mio vocabolario sarebbe così desolatamente ristretto...
quotes.context: Uno is teasing Paperinik after a mechanical arm in the ship pinches him.

quotes.text: Dove vuoi che sia?! Tra la frizione e l'acceleratore!
quotes.context: Uno responds with a sarcastic joke about car controls to Paperinik's distress during high-speed space travel.

quotes.text: Urge un'uscita di sicurezza, direi!!
quotes.context: Uno is preparing to use the Ducklair Tower's combat tip to blast through an Evronian ship.

quotes.text: ...e dato una lezione a quel pallone gonfiato! Ora ci penserà due volte prima di tornare a manipolare le immagini.
quotes.context: Uno expresses satisfaction in having taught Angus Fangus a lesson for his previous actions.

quotes.text: Dopotutto, abbiamo riportato a casa le piume dopo un viaggio interstellare.
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue during the mission debriefing/celebration.

quotes.text: Ne ho scelto uno a caso! Ih! Ih!
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik after showing him a broadcast from '00 News'.

quotes.text: Scusa la caduta libera, ma fa parte del mio piano di risparmio energetico.
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik after a rapid descent into the tower's sub-levels.

quotes.text: Forse no, ma neanche tu sei ansioso di verificarlo, eh?
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik while the latter is exploring the virtual environment of Cyberspace.

quotes.text: Che cosa vuoi, la nostra cosiddetta realtà è talmente monotona e mal programmata! [...] Capisco, elaborazione biologica dell'input. Decisamente rudimentale!
quotes.context: Uno's ironic response to Paperino's scrutiny and his skeptical view of human/biological cognition.

quotes.text: Per fortuna il mio software superiore mi permette di mentire!
quotes.context: Uno is speaking to himself or the viewer/Paperino after Everett Ducklair shuts down his questioning.

quotes.text: Neanche t'avessi chiesto d'aiutarmi a spostare l'arredamento.
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperino after the tower's "remodeling" almost causes him an accident.

quotes.text: Allora? Vuoi vederla anche tu, oppure la coscienza te lo impedisce?
quotes.context: Uno is teasing Paperino's moral reservations about watching a video he has intercepted from Canale 00.

quotes.text: Ci riuscivo anch'io, una volta. Ma ormai ho perso il tocco magico.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Angus Fangus's success in capturing footage.

quotes.text: Direi di no, visti i risultati!!
quotes.context: Uno responds sarcastically to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Non mi aspettavo che quei cervelloni facessero qualcosa di tanto banale come controllare l'ora.
quotes.context: Uno is discussing how a problem was solved by a simple check of the time, something the 'big brains' of the future missed.

quotes.text: Il menu prevede latte, caffè, marmellata, succo d'arancia e notizie sconvolgenti!
quotes.context: Uno invites Paperino to the tower, mixing mundane breakfast items with the serious news of the day.

quotes.text: Sai andare in bicicletta? Perfetto. Questa è una cosa completamente diversa, ma non preoccuparti...
quotes.context: Uno 'reassuring' Paperinik before he enters the Technodiver.

quotes.text: E ti lamenti? Poteva andarti peggio! Potevano essere agenti delle tasse.
quotes.context: Uno is teasing Paperinik while the hero is being pursued by federal agents (P.B.I.) underwater.

quotes.text: Lasciami indovinare... questo è quello che voi chiamate sarcasmo?
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's frustration with a witty and sarcastic question.

quotes.text: Pensavo che Everett Ducklair ti avesse insegnato le buone maniere.
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik about his moral reluctance.

quotes.text: Suppongo che tu non stia parlando di supereroi vivi, vero?
quotes.context: Paperinik is trying to fight off digital soldiers and Uno mocks his survival prospects.

quotes.text: Non lamentarti. A qualcuno è andata peggio! Dai un'occhiata a questo!
quotes.context: Uno responding to Paperino who is lying on the floor after the P.B.I. agents trampled him.

quotes.text: Metafora affascinante. Scommetto che i testi te li scrivi da solo. Probabilmente al buio.
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik for his poetic/dramatic description of his progress.

quotes.text: Cosa faresti senza di me?
quotes.context: Uno asks this rhetorically after using a mechanical arm to smash a wall and save Paperinik.

quotes.text: Se ti riducessero a Coolflame mentre guardi un film, dubito che me ne accorgerei!
quotes.context: Uno is briefing a sleepy Paperino on current events through a monitor while the latter is waking up.

quotes.text: Già! Non sono un elenco telefonico!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's questions about the number or location of the alien spores.

quotes.text: Okay, adesso compare Xadhoom e risolve tutto... no?
quotes.context: Uno comments on Paperinik's predicament after he is surrounded by soldiers.

quotes.text: Nei loro computer ho trovato una notiziuncola che potrebbe fare al caso nostro...
quotes.context: Uno is reporting his findings to Paperinik, using a playful tone to introduce important information.

quotes.text: Non voglio essere ridotto a numeri binari! Sono così antiquati... Siamo in una situazione di stallo.
quotes.context: Uno is facing a massive digital guardian and uses humor to cope with the threat.

quotes.text: Grande! È sufficiente visitare cinque miliardi di individui! Conosco un tipo che potrebbe farlo in pochissimo tempo... Babbo Natale. Ma, dal momento che adesso è in ferie, dovrai occupartene tu!
quotes.context: Uno uses irony to explain why a manual search for infected people is impossible, highlighting the need for his digital approach.

quotes.text: Il jet di Padron Ducklair non ha autoradio... ma in compenso ha un sistema morfosimbiotico per renderlo invisibile a chiunque!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the jet's features to Paperinik as they arrive at their destination.

quotes.text: Incantevole! Ti si spalanca una carriera da stilista!
quotes.context: Uno is commenting on Paperinik's new white, green, and blue polar tactical suit.

quotes.text: Sì, ma fai in fretta! Lo sai che detesto parcheggiare in doppia fila.
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperinik while the hero is boarding a moving dirigibile from the PK Jet, urging him to be quick with a witty remark.

quotes.text: Hai tutta la mia comprensione. Per il caldo, come per il tuo imminente licenziamento.
quotes.context: Uno mocks Paperino's fear of being fired while pretending to offer sympathy.

quotes.text: Humor biologico. Niente di più squallido.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the TV program and Paperino's reaction to it from his monitor.

quotes.text: Allora, lustrati gli occhiali! Io lo vedo benissimo!
quotes.context: Uno mocks Paperinik's vision when the hero spots a craft that Uno's sensors initially missed.

quotes.text: Le tue battute sarebbero più efficaci con i sottotitoli.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperino's attempt at humor while he is investigating a serious energy drop.

quotes.text: Eh! Eh! Con questo caldo dovresti essere davvero super per sopportare un doppio strato di vestiario.
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperino about the heat while the hero is in his civilian identity.

quotes.text: Sempre simpatica la tua amica.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Xadhoom yelling in a rage.

quotes.text: Potrei usare il Gargoyle come cannone e recapitarti direttamente all'aeroporto... Okay. Ti farò trovare un taxi al secondo tombino a destra! Eh! Eh!
quotes.context: After Paperino is physically flattened by the tower's high-speed transport, Uno jokingly proposes an even more extreme method before settling on a taxi.

quotes.text: Be', dovrebbe essere praticamente infrangibile.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the canopy's durability while Trauma is visibly destroying it.

quotes.text: Continua a pensare in grande, Sherlock! Potrebbe essere un gruppo! Una banda! Un'organizzazione...
quotes.context: Uno uses a witty nickname to push Paperinik towards a more comprehensive analysis of the situation.

quotes.text: Oplà! Il gioco è fatto! Ti presento Dexter Brundle. Un individuo fuori del comune... oltre che un perfetto impostore!
quotes.context: Uno presents the results of his database search with a theatrical flair.

quotes.text: Su con la vita! Un supereroe depresso e' l'ultima cosa di cui Paperopoli ha bisogno in questo momento.
quotes.context: Uno uses humor to lighten the mood while Paperinik is feeling down.

quotes.text: Tira fuori il solito equipaggiamento e non fare sempre la zia!
quotes.context: Uno is providing Paperinik with his mission gear, including pink earmuffs and a green scarf to protect him from the cold.

quotes.text: Solo un'invasione evroniana.
quotes.context: Uno's casual response to a serious threat highlights his ironic communication style.

quotes.text: Brutte nuove, Paperinik. [...] E non stanno distribuendo regali di Natale!
quotes.context: Uno reports to Paperinik that the Evronians have gathered the population in the town square, using dark humor to emphasize the danger.

quotes.text: Non hai in repertorio qualcosa di più epico?
quotes.context: Uno comments on Paperinik's situation or actions while appearing on a distorted screen after the Pi-kar's crash.

quotes.text: E voi volate!
quotes.context: Uno's monitor appears in an insert, responding to a journalist who said Lyla is busy with an investigation.

quotes.text: Oh, scuuusa! Mi rendo conto che questa soap opera non sia all'altezza di tanta intelligenza artificiale!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's ironic gestures about the quality of the TV show he's watching.

quotes.text: Esattamente come io avevo previsto. Peccato che non riesca anche a immaginare... come faremo a uscire.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the situation as they enter the Evronian base, highlighting the contrast between his successful prediction and the uncertain future.

quotes.text: ...indovina chi dovrà andare a riparare il danno?
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he must manually repair the tower's systems.

quotes.text: Lamentele, sempre lamentele... Significa che se tu e il tuo nuovo amico non vi sbrigate a cambiare aria, andrete arrosto!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's frustration while monitoring the dangerous temperature increase in the machinery area.

quotes.text: Registrerò le urla. Quando Pikappa tornerà gli solleveranno il morale!
quotes.context: Uno is watching Dan shout/scream on the monitor and decides to record it as a 'gift' for Paperinik.

quotes.text: Merito del modello, immagino. Padron Ducklair è... così fotogenico! Ah! Ah!
quotes.context: Uno comments on Paperinik's action photos that Paperino is showing off with pride.

quotes.text: Esprimi un desiderio, socio! Non hai sentito della pioggia di stelle cadenti? Ne è atterrata una sul tetto della Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno uses the meteor shower as a setup for a joke before revealing that Xadhoom has arrived and needs help.

quotes.text: Allora aggiustami questo propulsore immobile a flusso negato!
quotes.context: Uno is being ironic when Paperinik insists on being useful in the lab.

quotes.text: Vuoi marcar visita? Quale sarebbe la scusa?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperino (in civilian clothes) outside the Ducklair Tower, sarcastically asking if he's trying to 'call in sick' to avoid his hero duties.

quotes.text: Anche se non è in piena forma, certi cattivoni Xadhoom se li mangia a merenda!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing Xadhoom's combat prowess with Paperinik while they are in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: ...piantala di seccarmi! Se proprio ci tieni, lascia un messaggio dopo il segnale acustico!
quotes.context: Uno's automated message for callers.

quotes.text: Perfetto! Resta lì ancora un istante e sorridi!
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperinik via the Pi-Kar's communication system as the hero prepares to leave the scene of the confrontation with the renegade PBI agents.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Finalino romantico, socio?
quotes.context: Uno laughs at Paperino's misfortune after Xadhoom accidentally burns his beak during a kiss.

quotes.text: E ora comincia il giro turistico del mio regno!
quotes.context: Uno triumphantly announces his intention to lead the intruders on a 'tour' of the tower, using sarcasm to frame their predicament as a leisure activity.

quotes.text: Potresti almeno ringraziarmi.
quotes.context: Uno's concluding sarcastic remark after his explanation of how he handled the situation for PK.

quotes.text: Sei attento ai dettagli, tu!
quotes.context: Uno's ironic response to Paperinik expressing shock at the massive size of the alien spacecraft.

quotes.text: Sto elaborando un sistema energetico sostitutivo. Ma sara' come dare del succo di pomodoro a un vampiro.
quotes.context: Uno explains to Paperinik that while he can provide some energy to Gorthan, it won't be enough to truly sustain him.

quotes.text: Sarebbe un ottimo idraulico.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Mekkano's technical assembly skills.

quotes.text: Con voi umani è sempre tutto così imbarazzantemente semplice.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the success of his plan to trigger a false alarm at the Frostville base, mocking the simplicity of human reactions.

quotes.text: Se rinasco, voglio fare il registratore di cassa! Sarà pure una vita poco avventurosa, ma è molto meno stressante!
quotes.context: Uno is managing a high-stakes tactical situation where Paperinik is in danger and a satellite threat must be neutralized.

quotes.text: Sembra che il tuo piano sia stato un successone, uno!
quotes.context: Uno comments on the outcome of his plan as Paperinik flees the sinking submarine.

quotes.text: Questa poi! Non credevo potessi essere tanto venale! Che cosa hai preteso in cambio?
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik about his negotiations with the PBI.

quotes.text: Lo sai che non si intercettano le telefonate altrui!
quotes.context: Uno's sarcastic and hypocritical response to Paperinik while they are both in a virtual environment monitoring a call.

quotes.text: Non correre rischi inutili! Metti la maglietta di lana, che la sera fa un bel freschino, da quelle parti.
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue during a mission briefing.

quotes.text: A quest'ora dovreste prepararvi per la scuola! Non prendetela sottogamba... la prima elementare!
quotes.context: Uno is addressing the 'Hot Trucks' gang from PK's belt while they are surrounding PK and Angus.

quotes.text: O-oh! Il sapientone si degna di rivolgermi la parola, adesso!
quotes.context: Uno reacts with irony to PK's attention after a period of silence or tension.

quotes.text: Già! Tuo zio potrebbe lamentarsi per gli affitti non riscossi.
quotes.context: Uno responds sarcastically to Paperino's fear that the entire Ducklair Tower might vanish during the experiment.

quotes.text: La comunicazione sarà interrotta all'apertura del portale. Quando arrivate, telefonate.
quotes.context: Uno's final words before the portal activates and cuts the link.

quotes.text: Ma no?
quotes.context: Uno responds sarcastically to Paperinik's shock as the giant Centurian cruiser looms over the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: Tu non puoi immaginare quanto costi un carrozziere evroniano!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik's successful attack on the Evronian cruiser Centurian.

quotes.text: E non è facile spiegare perché una cintura si metta a parlare!
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges the strangeness of his manifestation as a voice coming from a piece of clothing.

quotes.text: Animo sensibile...
quotes.context: Uno's ironic reaction to Paperinik's thoughtful/melancholic expression while driving.

quotes.text: Il solito superficiale. Dovresti guardare più in profondità!
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik for not realizing the probe is buried underground.

quotes.text: L'utente da voi chiamato potrebbe avere il terminale spento
quotes.context: Uno uses a common telephone network error message to mock Paperinik for having his communicator turned off.

quotes.text: Ha scoperto che la barriera di contenimento... non contiene.
quotes.context: Uno explaining why Xadhoom was able to leave and cause damage.

quotes.text: Sono più veloci e più forti. Questo sta aprendo la Pi-Kar come un barattolo di pelati.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the damage being dealt to the vehicle by an Evronian mutant.

quotes.text: Allora? Hai scoperto come si chiamano le forchette xerbiane?
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring Xadhoom's condition while Paperino is present, and he uses this absurd question to initiate the dialogue.

quotes.text: Sono sempre pronto, generale ;-) ... Arrossisco...
quotes.context: Uno's secure terminal chat with the General.

quotes.text: Sì! E se urli ancora un po', non sarò l'unico!
quotes.context: Uno's witty retort when Paperinik finally manages to establish a connection.

quotes.text: Linguisticamente corretto. Non capisco a che serve questo coso.
quotes.context: Uno's response to Paperino's 'Boh?' reflects his pedantic yet witty communication style.

quotes.text: Se arrivi a dieci, vinci una bambolina!
quotes.context: Uno is commenting on Paperinik's battle damage and the number of enemies encountered.

quotes.text: Questo gonfierà un po' il premio della vostra assicurazione, ragazzi.
quotes.context: Uno's comment as the Evronians lose control of their ships.

quotes.text: Come vedi ho aggirato il problema. Non mi fai le tue congratulazioni?
quotes.context: Uno mocks Due after infiltrating the Evronian systems and ruining Due's plan.

quotes.text: Tu sei uno dei puntini luminosi! L'altro puntino rappresenta la pattuglia! Facile, no?
quotes.context: Uno explains the radar grid on PK's communicator, using a simplified and slightly sarcastic tone to urge him to flee from an approaching patrol.

quotes.text: Be', il meglio deve ancora venire!
quotes.context: Uno comments on Angus Fangus's report, hinting that he has a surprise in store for the journalist.

quotes.text: Che risposte folgoranti! Di' la verità, le prendi da un libro?
quotes.context: Uno's ironic response to one of Paperinik's statements.

quotes.text: Forse preferisci un bel visore a cristalli liquidi retroilluminato da otto pollici? C'è anche la radio, per i momenti di relax.
quotes.context: Uno provides PK with equipment for a mission while mockingly suggesting its entertainment features.

quotes.text: La faccenda ti interessa, adesso?
quotes.context: Uno reports to Paperino that Angus is being kidnapped within the tower, using a sarcastic rhetorical question to highlight the urgency.

quotes.text: Un irrequieto. Be', e' quasi simpatico! [...] Bruttino, eh?
quotes.context: Uno's ironic comments while reading the criminal record of a dangerous individual and showing his face.

quotes.text: Complimenti.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperinik's unusual appearance after using the morpho-symbiotic command of the Extransformer.

quotes.text: Non muovere una foglia, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno is giving tactical advice to Paperinik, who is camouflaged as a tree to avoid detection by Evronians.

quotes.text: Se intendi tra il mediocre e l'ottimo, direi proprio di no!
quotes.context: Uno's response to PK after the latter crashes into an Evronian ship's hold.

quotes.text: Fantastico. Dovrò usare il radar per farcela!
quotes.context: Uno comments ironically on the upcoming patrol or Paperinik's departure.

quotes.text: Quesito interessante. Non dovrei essere io a chiedere dove ti trovi?
quotes.context: Uno's witty response to Pikappa's question about his location while flying the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: Tu lo avevi pulito?
quotes.context: Uno asks this while Pikappa is near the damaged maintenance machine, likely mocking the state of the equipment or Pikappa's attempt to fix it.

quotes.text: Ben arrivato! Un altro po' e al posto della Ducklair Tower rischiavi di trovare un lotto di terreno edificabile!
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperino about the chaos outside the tower.

quotes.text: Sgranocchi alieni come caramelle e ti serve aiuto per sistemare quattro dipendenti comunali?
quotes.context: Uno's witty response to Pikappa's need for assistance.

quotes.text: Sveglia, socio. Hai pensato abbastanza!
quotes.context: Uno is being ironic about Paperino's deep sleep while the tower is under attack.

quotes.text: Siamo pieni di segretucci, eh?
quotes.context: Uno discovers that Paperinik has secrets he hasn't shared, specifically regarding his time in Dhasam-Bul.

quotes.text: La scienza che studia le macchine per salutare la zia! L'ho presa da uno dei miei libri preferiti!
quotes.context: Uno explains the origin and meaning of the bizarre name for the office he created.

quotes.text: In primo luogo, il vero agente onorario è Pikappa. In secondo luogo, hai comunque raccolto qualche informazione interessante. Su di lei, no. Ma sull'agente che ti ha accompagnato, sì!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's grumpy gesturing.

quotes.text: Ma dov' è finita la tua proverbiale cavalleria?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Pikappa through the Pi-Kar's systems as they flee from Ethan and the Factory agents.

quotes.text: Non farci caso, Jana. L'umorismo non è il suo forte. Parliamo piuttosto di te e della Factory.
quotes.context: Uno redirecting the conversation away from Pikappa's jokes towards the mission objectives.

quotes.text: Chiama il numero dell'assistenza che vedi in sovrimpressione sullo schermo mentale che ho appena creato.
quotes.context: Uno is providing critical instructions to Pikappa via a mental screen, but delivers the information with his characteristic sarcasm.

quotes.text: Niente ristoranti. Gli Evenki preferiscono nutrirsi di antiche tradizioni sempre rinnovate dagli sciamani...
quotes.context: Uno's delivery of data highlights the lack of civilian amenities to Paperino.

quotes.text: A parte essere attaccati da un mostro degli abissi, intendi?
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's realization of their underwater predicament.

quotes.text: Che domande! Maionese!
quotes.context: Uno's first response to Paperinik during the underwater crisis.

quotes.text: Et voilà! Tutto a vostra disposizione, signore! Avete bisogno di una mano?
quotes.context: Uno opening the automatic dressing booth for Paperino.

quotes.text: I nostri rapinatori hanno vinto un giro gratis fino alla stazione di polizia più vicina! [...] Sembra quasi che essere disoccupato ti renda felice!
quotes.context: Uno's witty commentary while transporting captured criminals.

quotes.text: Ehi! Adesso indossi la maschera anche fuori servizio? A parte questo, il tempo com'è?
quotes.context: Uno is speaking to Paperinik, who is undercover in Keelburg, using irony to address his partner's unusual appearance and the distance between them.

quotes.text: Tipo il computer dove tieni tutti i tuoi giochini. Ti dispiace? Oh, pare di no.
quotes.context: Uno chooses a location to isolate a mimetic virus, teasing Paperino about his hobbies.

quotes.text: Fatti annusare dal caporicognitore, prima... ti segnalerà come insignificante.
quotes.context: Uno uses sarcasm to mock Paperinik as he prepares for a mission.

quotes.text: Diciamo... che non ne ho viste di peggio.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's dazed state after a defense system shock.

quotes.text: Serve una mano?
quotes.context: Uno's first words upon appearing on the Pikar's monitor while PK is struggling with a malfunction and an organic mass.

quotes.text: Non sai un sacco di cose. Il pulsante verde, sotto il comando dello statore, a destra.
quotes.context: Uno provides technical instructions to Paperinik on the Pikar while making a dry remark about the hero's lack of knowledge.

quotes.text: Problemi, Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno appears as a hologram on Paperinik's glove while the hero is taking cover from the alien Raznor.

quotes.text: Io l'avevo detto di assicurarla contro incendio e invasione extraterrestre!
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperinik about the destruction of the Pi-kar.

quotes.text: Appunto. E come al solito, i cocci sono... miei!
quotes.context: Uno is commenting on a situation where he is left to deal with the consequences or complications.

quotes.text: ...la scomparsa di Angus ha dimostrato aspetti positivi!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing the disappearance of the journalist Angus Fangus with Paperino.

quotes.text: Tsk! Intelligenze biologiche... comunque, non potrei lasciarti uscire neppure se lo volessi.
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperinik's frustration and suspicion while he is trapped in the virtual environment.

13.text: Uno utilizes logical reasoning and hypothesis formulation to solve problems and understand anomalies in his environment.

supporting.justification: Uno uses logical deduction to explain how Paperinik entered the tower, hypothesizing that a sub-program might have authorized access based on property records.
Uno immediately identifies and removes a micro-beacon from Paperinik's cape that was being used to track him.
Uno is involved in predicting Scrooge's behavior based on gathered information, showing his use of logical extrapolation.
Uno displays his strategic logic by manipulating Scrooge (Paperone) to host a party at the Ducklair Tower, creating a controlled environment to defend against the Evronians.
Uno uses data from multiple surveillance sources to identify an anomaly (a flying figure without propulsion) that Paperinik missed while sleeping.
Uno identifies a logical anomaly when the alarm signal of a warehouse is active but has not been triggered, signaling a potentially sophisticated intruder or a system failure.
Uno analyzes surveillance footage of the Razziatore and plans to subject the recording to further technical examination to understand the anomaly.
Uno identifies Lyla as an anomaly ("Something doesn't convince me") and proactively uses his sensor suite to gather data and verify his suspicion.
Uno analyzes the data collected at the lab and identifies 'tachyon decay' as the cause of the Razziatore's disappearance, hypothesizing that the enemy is using time travel.
Uno explains the logic behind Lyla's immunity to the Evronian ray (she's a robot) and the Time Police's use of droids for monitoring long history.
Uno uses logical reasoning to determine that following the drone would lead to a base and that Paperino's identity was likely safe.
Uno identifies and explains the technical methods (morphing and digital audio) used to create a fake video of Paperinik.
Uno proposes a complex scientific approach to track Evronian ships in deep space, showing his ability to formulate hypotheses for extremely difficult problems.
Uno uses logical medical and psychological reasoning to provide a detailed diagnosis of Angus Fangus's state.
Uno insists on the presence of Evronian ships based on his data, even when they are visually invisible to the crew.
Uno uses statistical projections to predict Paperinik's next move with high precision.
Uno analyzes the ambiguous nature of their current reality (virtual vs. material projection) and admits when he lacks sufficient data to reach a definitive conclusion.
Uno uses his 'probabilistic processors' (elaboratori probabilistici) to predict the future actions of a hacker.
Uno predicts that the exhibition/fair would have trouble, showing his analytical and predictive capabilities.
Uno analyzes the pattern of attacks, noting their unusual nature (urban battles with no witnesses) until the latest breakthrough.

Uno uses a Socratic approach to solve mysteries, dismissing irrelevant data (like a simple portrait) and instead prompting Paperinik to identify logical patterns and commonalities among the enemy's targets.
Uno identifies a specific technical anomaly ('decadimento tachionico') in a news broadcast to help Paperinik understand a mysterious event.
Uno uses logical deduction and image comparison to link a mysterious man seen with Lyla to a previous attack on a power plant.
Uno is shown actively analyzing complex data to find a solution, eventually identifying a "significant detail" that allows him to propose a plan.
Uno calmly and logically explains the complex decision-making process of Lyla Lay's superiors, translating their reasoning for Paperinik.
Uno analyzes six simultaneous seismic events and electromagnetic anomalies to conclude that the phenomenon is artificial and not a natural occurrence.
Uno logically assesses the threat level of the P.B.I., advising Paperinik not to confront them because they are "tough nuts" (ossi duri).
Uno explicitly refers to his deductive process as 'complicate concatenazioni logiche' (complicated logical concatenations), emphasizing his analytical nature.
Uno confirms that his core programming mandates that he always takes the most logical course of action.
Uno expresses a logical skepticism towards coincidences, implying everything has an underlying cause.
Uno uses logical reasoning to analyze the archive of Morgan Fairfax and evaluate the scientific validity of Project Pangea.
Uno deduces the true identity of Odin Eidolon almost instantly after scanning a piece of 23rd-century technology, recognizing the 'infallible' design style.
Uno logically analyzes the defenses of a digital bunker, identifying the specific types of security programs (D-100 crackers) and the risk of being traced back to his base.
Uno analyzes a system collapse and formulates multiple hypotheses to explain it, including a trap or an insider disabling defenses.

Uno demonstrates logical reasoning by classifying the alien threat as 'Biohazard 3' and explaining the necessity of a digital search over a manual one to save time. He also invites Paperino to contribute to the strategy.
Uno identifies an inconsistency in Paperinik's behavior by comparing his current statement with stored data of past interactions.
Uno insists on a methodical approach, focusing on data correlation and scenario elaboration rather than jumping to conclusions.
Uno identifies himself as an 'ordered electronic mind' and contrasts his structured processing with 'biological thought,' which he associates with improvised, off-script solutions.

Uno uses logical deduction to conclude that Due is searching for him within their creator's former computer systems, specifically targeting buildings located along 'ergogeoradial vectors' suitable for capturing planetary energy.

Uno is shown checking his databases to identify a new piece of technology (Due's vehicle) and asking for its identity when it's not found, demonstrating his logical and analytical approach to anomalies.
Uno displays a methodical, step-by-step approach to problem-solving, advising Paperinik to tackle issues one at a time.
Uno provides a precise mathematical probability of Paperino missing his flight to emphasize the urgency of the situation.
Uno deduces that Trauma is a mutation rather than an evolution, based on his bio-energetic trace and known Evronian technology levels.
Uno logically analyzes the structural failure of the Pi-kar's canopy and searches his database for an unconventional tactical solution to repel the attacker.
Uno analyzes patterns of criminal activity to identify safe time windows and encourages Paperinik to consider broader hypotheses, such as a group or organization being behind the crimes.
Uno uses logical deduction to question the nature of the suspect, pointing out the contradiction between being a simple kidnapper and possessing advanced energy weaponry.
Uno is shown using advanced analytical tools and screens to study the complex data of the spear, formulating a plan to assist in the mission.
Uno provides a highly precise time estimate to Paperinik, down to the second, demonstrating his digital precision and logical processing.
Uno uses his data analysis to confirm the validity of Paperinik's deductions.
Uno correctly predicts the outcome of the initial phase of the infiltration plan.
Uno formulates a hypothesis of sabotage based on the fact that an intruder used a secret exclusion code.
Uno uses logical reasoning and analytical processing to 'establish a path' for Paperinik through the Ducklair Tower's infrastructure, finding an alternative route when the main passages are blocked.
Uno uses logical deduction to hypothesize that Angus must be in the secret basements if he hasn't left the tower.
Uno displays extreme mathematical precision, calculating a person's fall trajectory to the thousandth of a millimeter to ensure the safety of a simulation.
Uno immediately asks for the logical reason why Paperinik chose to link him to the conversation, showing his need to understand the purpose and objective of his involvement.
Uno is shown formulating conclusions based on data and immediately seeking verification by reviewing recorded evidence.
Uno correctly identifies the true purpose of Gamma's weapon, explaining that it was designed to heal Xadhoom rather than destroy her, showcasing his analytical skills.
Uno advises against jumping to conclusions based on the lack of bio-energetic traces and logically identifies that a physical inspection is the only way to confirm the crew's fate.
Uno interfaces with the alien computer of the Antra and, after a brief data collection, prepares to formulate a hypothesis to explain the situation.
Uno logically analyzes Gorthan's physical and mental state, concluding that he is not a common Evronian but possesses a remarkable 'temper'.
Uno questions the logic behind the droid's assault on Gorthan, demonstrating his analytical and inquisitive nature.
Uno expresses suspicion about the lack of security at the Frostville base, correctly identifying the quietness as a potential anomaly or trap.
Uno isolates a weak signal from a "phantom frequency" and analyzes its origin and content (an Evronian face).
Uno analyzes the failure to contact Paperinik by formulating technical hypotheses, suggesting the hero is either in a shielded location or too remote to be reached.
Uno logically assesses Paperino's physical attempt to open a door and identifies the door's technical nature as a containment barrier.
Uno logically monitors the energy activity in the room and identifies a technical fault (an electrical short circuit) as the cause of an alarm.
Uno uses the data from his scans to formulate a hypothesis about the Evronians' tactical use of Xari to psychologically weaken Xadhoom.
Uno uses available data to hypothesize that Xadhoom is undergoing a complete metamorphosis.
Uno uses data comparison and probability calculations to identify that a coolflame is not the person they expected and to explain the circumstances of their meeting.

Uno uses logical deduction to identify the designer of a device based on its 'style' and rejects the idea of it being his future work by citing the lack of sophistication and the use of inferior components.
Uno uses a "stochastic program" (probabilistic model) to analyze and predict the strategic intent of his adversary, Due.

Uno demonstrates advanced logical reasoning by analyzing the Evronian command structure's internal politics and concluding that manipulating their existing mutual suspicions would be more effective than a direct technical report.
Uno uses data provided by Paperinik to deduce the specific type and quantity of explosives used in an attack.
Uno immediately notices an anomaly in Angus Fangus's report (the absence of Pikappa) and asks for an explanation, showing his analytical nature.

Uno identifies that the police are unable to respond to a bank robbery because they are blocked by a massive traffic jam, demonstrating his ability to synthesize multiple data points (alarm + traffic) into a logical tactical assessment.
Uno immediately identifies that the massive traffic jam is not a natural occurrence but the result of intentional tampering with the city's traffic light control units.
Uno analyzes patterns in city-wide gas leaks to deduce that they are being used "intelligently" and "controlled" by an unknown actor.
Uno identifies the escape route of the kidnappers through a process of elimination and logical analysis of the security footage.
Uno logically deduces that an interview with Ahrimadz was recorded, not live, by comparing the timestamp on the recording with Pikappa's known timeline of catching Moe.
Uno believes that physical well-being (being fed) is a prerequisite for better cognitive performance and problem-solving.
Uno identifies a specific mechanical/ritual solution to the crisis: restoring the statues to their positions.
Uno uses logical deduction to rule out Everett Ducklair as the attacker, reasoning that the creator would not systematically destroy his own guard robots.
Uno's logical matrix is challenged by Ahrimadz's magical abilities, which he finds impossible to process logically.
Uno demonstrates his digital precision by providing an estimated time of arrival for dispatched equipment down to the tenth of a second.
Uno uses digital enhancement and database cross-referencing to identify a mysterious agent from blurry wrist-camera footage.
Uno uses his analytical capabilities to evaluate the 'ingenuity' of a solution found by Pikappa.
Uno identifies that the object Paperinik used to plug a hull breach is actually a hollow whistle, allowing air and sound to pass through.
Uno is shown reasoning through a technical problem, considering a solution and then rejecting it as he evaluates the difficulty of the task.
Uno formulates a hypothesis about a mysterious object in the atmosphere and expresses satisfaction when it is logically confirmed to be a spaceship.
Uno dismisses Due's threats as 'irrational' and uses logical deduction to point out that if he is destroyed, he has no future, maintaining his analytical approach even under terminal threat.
Uno formulates a hypothesis regarding Due's disappearance based on his own reasoning.
Uno is monitoring events at Area 51, looking for a 'point of divergence' (punto di divergenza), demonstrating his use of logic and hypothesis to identify temporal or situational anomalies.
Uno mentions he can scan 2,350,000 systems in 20.3 minutes to find an anomaly.

quotes.text: Forse un sottoprogramma ha registrato il passaggio di proprietà e autorizzato il tuo accesso!
quotes.context: Uno is trying to understand how Paperinik bypassed the tower's security.

quotes.text: ...Tolgo questo microsegnalatore dal tuo mantello!
quotes.context: Uno performs a tactical sweep of Paperinik to ensure the tower's secrecy.

quotes.text: Credi che tuo zio si comporterà come prevediamo?
quotes.context: Uno asks Donald for a confirmation on their behavioral prediction regarding Scrooge.

quotes.text: È stata una buona idea raccontare a Paperone della festa e suggerirgli d'ospitarla alla Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno and Paperinik discuss the success of their plan after the battle.

quotes.text: In questo modo ho individuato qualcuno... o qualcosa!
quotes.context: Uno explains how he used his surveillance capabilities to find a mysterious figure.

quotes.text: Strano... il segnale d'allarme è attivo ma non è scattato!
quotes.context: Uno's voice communicates this technical detail to Paperinik as he enters the warehouse.

quotes.text: Io, intanto, sottopongo la ripresa a qualche esame!
quotes.context: Uno decides to perform a deeper analysis of the footage after the Razziatore's disappearance.

quotes.text: C'è qualcosa che non mi convince in lei! Per prudenza, ho scandagliato i visitatori con tutti i miei sensori!
quotes.context: Uno explaining why he performed unauthorized scans on the journalists visiting the tower.

quotes.text: Il più interessante è che, quando scompare, lascia una scia che sembra di decadimento tachionico! [...] I tachioni, Paperinik, sono particelle ipotetiche che viaggiano più veloci della luce! Se qualcuno riuscisse a imbrigliarli, probabilmente, potrebbe sfruttarne l'energia per viaggiare nel tempo!
quotes.context: Uno explains the scientific data he collected and his theory about the Razziatore's time travel capabilities.

quotes.text: Ma vedi, Lyla è un robot! O meglio, un perfezionatissimo droide del ventitreesimo secolo! [...] Per questo, anche il raggio succhia-emozioni degli Evroniani non ha avuto effetto su di lei!
quotes.context: Uno explaining Lyla's nature to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Probabilmente non ti ha riconosciuto. [...] Però io ho seguito lui, sperando che ci portasse alla base.
quotes.context: Uno's logical assessment of the situation and his strategic response.

quotes.text: Gli è bastato un programma di morphing per manipolare la tua immagine e un sistema audio digitale per replicare la tua voce. E questo è il risultato...
quotes.context: Uno explains to Donald how Angus Fangus manipulated the recording of Paperinik.

quotes.text: Per eseguire una simile ricerca dovrei ipotizzare la loro forma d'energia propulsiva, calcolare gli ingombri ponderali di tutti gli oggetti presenti nello spazio, estrapolare i tracciati ergocinetici e... Posso provarci!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik's question about how to find the Evronians in deep space.

quotes.text: Da una diagnosi primaria, risulta evidente un profondo stato confusionale...
quotes.context: Uno provides a structured medical diagnosis based on his logical analysis of Angus's behavior and mental state.

quotes.text: Eppure non posso essermi sbagliato! Gli Evroniani sono qui, davanti a noi!
quotes.context: Uno responds to the apparent absence of enemies by trusting his sensors over visual confirmation.

quotes.text: Secondo le mie proiezioni, c'è un 96 per cento di probabilità che tu voglia dare la caccia a questo super-hacker!
quotes.context: Uno correctly predicts Paperinik's intention to investigate the hacker.

quotes.text: Oppure siamo noi a essere proiettati virtualmente in un contesto materiale... non sono ancora in grado di stabilirlo!
quotes.context: Uno is trying to understand if they are still in the I.I.T. room or if their digital forms are being projected into the physical world.

quotes.text: Perciò, secondo i miei elaboratori probabilistici, presto comincerà a fare sul serio.
quotes.context: Uno's analysis of the hacker's likely next move based on his internal simulations.

quotes.text: Ho sentito che al salone c'è stata burrasca, come immaginavamo.
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik with a confirmation of their previous prediction.

quotes.text: Inscenano delle vere battaglie urbane! Causano un sacco di danni... Eppure nessuno li ha mai visti! Stavolta sì! Una troupe di Canale 00 li ha ripresi!
quotes.context: Uno provides Paperino with a summary and analysis of the mysterious incidents.

quotes.text: Cerchiamo di capire a che cosa mirano i nostri avversari. Che cosa c'è di speciale nel quartiere che colpiscono sempre?
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperinik to look beyond the surface and find the underlying logic of the attackers' strategy.

quotes.text: Ho analizzato la scena della sparizione! C'è una scia di decadimento tachionico!
quotes.context: Uno explains his technical findings to Paperinik while reviewing footage of an impostor.

quotes.text: È lo stesso tizio dell'attacco alla centrale!
quotes.context: Uno identifies a suspect by comparing surveillance footage.

quotes.text: È un particolare significativo! Possiamo servircene per escogitare un piano.
quotes.context: Uno announces his discovery to Paperinik after a period of intense data analysis.

quotes.text: S'è convinto che l'eccessiva autonomia decisionale della nostra amica è un positivo adattamento all'ambiente!
quotes.context: Uno explains why Lyla was not recalled by her future superiors.

quotes.text: Quello che abbiamo di fronte non può essere un fenomeno naturale. È come se l'energia sismica di queste scosse venisse guidata e controllata...
quotes.context: Uno explains his technical findings to Paperino, linking multiple data points to form a hypothesis.

quotes.text: E preferisco non contraddirli. Questi sono degli ossi duri, vecchio mio.
quotes.context: Uno's advice to Paperinik as he's being hunted by federal agents.

quotes.text: Ti interessano le complicate concatenazioni logiche che portano a questa conclusione o preferisci la versione corta?
quotes.context: Uno explains how he arrived at a conclusion about the PBI's involvement.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair mi ha programmato per fare sempre la cosa più logica. Ed è questa.
quotes.context: Uno explains his rationale for accessing restricted data.

quotes.text: Comincerò a credere alle coincidenze quando ne vedrò una...
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the connection between Morgan Fairfax and the submarine platform.

quotes.text: I calcoli di Fairfax sono corretti! Il Progetto Pangea è costruito su solide basi scientifiche!
quotes.context: Uno explains that despite the catastrophe, the project is scientifically sound and logically defensible from a certain perspective.

quotes.text: Nel preciso istante in cui mi hai dato il congegno. Possibile che tu ancora non abbia capito chi è Odin Eidolon?
quotes.context: Uno is surprised by Paperinik's lack of intuition regarding the future ally's identity.

quotes.text: Questo bunker sembra assolutamente impenetrabile! Un morso di quei cagnetti e mi ritrovo l'esercito alla Ducklair Tower...
quotes.context: Uno is scouting a digital bunker and evaluates the high risk of failure and its consequences for his secret location.

quotes.text: Ma è impossibile, a meno che non sia una trappola! Oppure qualcuno ha disabilitato le difese dall'interno.
quotes.context: Uno's internal monologue/dialogue as he observes the destruction of a digital environment.

quotes.text: Bene, segui il mio ragionamento! Sappiamo che il livello di pericolosità del germe alieno contenuto nelle spore è un biohazard 3... [...] Bene, a questo punto si accettano suggerimenti. Cosa pensi di fare?
quotes.context: Uno uses technical classification and logical deduction to plan the investigation into the Evronian spores.

quotes.text: Affermazione non corrispondente ai precedenti memorizzati. Come mai tanto insolito fervore?
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperinik's unusual enthusiasm for the nightly patrol by citing his behavioral logs.

quotes.text: Niente conclusioni affrettate, prego. Limitiamoci a correlare i dati. [...] Sto cercando d'elaborare alcuni scenari in proposito.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the mysterious energy drop and the possibility of another user on his power source.

quotes.text: Gli espedienti fuori programma sono tipici del pensiero biologico, non di noi ordinate menti elettroniche.
quotes.context: Uno explains why he didn't anticipate Paperino's lack of costume, attributing the need for improvisation to biological limitations.

quotes.text: Due, sapendolo, mi sta cercando all'interno dei computer appartenuti al nostro creatore... posti lungo i flussi di forza che percorrono la crosta planetaria.
quotes.context: Uno explains his hypothesis regarding Due's current strategy to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Nelle mie banche dati non esiste nulla di simile! Cos'è?
quotes.context: Uno reacts to the appearance of Due's large armored vehicle.

quotes.text: Pensiamo a un problema per volta... ti posso fornire un punto d'appoggio in Africa.
quotes.context: Uno addressing Paperinik's concerns by breaking down the mission into manageable steps.

quotes.text: Presto! Hai già il 67 per cento di possibilità di perdere l'aereo!
quotes.context: Uno is urging Paperino to hurry as they use the tower's internal transport systems to reach the airport.

quotes.text: Inoltre, più che un'evoluzione, sembra... una mutazione!
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the nature of the mutant Evronian Trauma.

quotes.text: L'unica che trovo non mi piace. Ma potrebbe funzionare.
quotes.context: Uno identifies a risky but viable solution to repel Trauma after the Pi-kar's 'unbreakable' canopy begins to fail.

quotes.text: Continua a pensare in grande, Sherlock! Potrebbe essere un gruppo! Una banda! Un'organizzazione...
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperinik to expand his deductive scope after analyzing the criminal's patterns.

quotes.text: Bene. E la sua lancia a energia come te la spieghi? Che bisogno avrebbe un rapitore di un attrezzo del genere?
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the technical equipment of the suspect Urk to better understand his nature and motives.

quotes.text: Cinque minuti e quindici secondi.
quotes.context: Uno answers Paperinik's question about how much time is left before his departure.

quotes.text: I conti tornano! In questi giorni, non ho rilevato la presenza di astronavi evroniane sopra Providencia. E a terra.
quotes.context: Uno confirms Paperinik's theories by checking his own surveillance data.

quotes.text: Esattamente come io avevo previsto.
quotes.context: Uno confirms that the events unfolded according to his logical projections.

quotes.text: Ne dubito. Ma, a questo punto, non posso escludere che il guasto sia in realtà un sabotaggio!
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the nature of the failure and the intruder's methods.

quotes.text: Ora te lo dico... sto cercando di stabilire un percorso. I passaggi principali sono sicuramente bloccati e la tua chiave non è abilitata ad aprirli. Dovrai aggirarli per raggiungere il guasto. Il tragitto sarà un po' tortuoso. Ci siamo. Prendi il secondo ingresso a sinistra.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the tower's internal systems to find a path for Paperinik through the infrastructure.

quotes.text: Però, se Angus è scomparso, ma non ha lasciato la Ducklair Tower, forse potrebbe essere... Ma no, è assurdo! Come avrebbe fatto a raggiungere i sotterranei segreti?
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing Angus's disappearance within the tower and logically deduces he must be in the hidden levels.

quotes.text: Ne dubitavi? Ho previsto al millesimo la sua parabola di caduta. Data la postura iniziale e la sollecitazione cinetica...
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's potential concerns about Angus Fangus's fall, explaining the technical precision of his calculations.

quotes.text: Perché mi hai interfacciato?
quotes.context: After recording the conversation, Uno questions Paperinik about the utility or goal of the action.

quotes.text: Se le mie conclusioni sono corrette, la situazione è drammatica! Devo verificare. Esaminerò i videotapes di Xadhoom!
quotes.context: Uno is alone in the tower, analyzing data and deciding on his next logical step to confirm a dire hypothesis.

quotes.text: Quel Gamma non poteva certo immaginare che non serviva a distruggere Xadhoom, ma a guarirla!
quotes.context: Uno explains the unexpected effect of the weapon on Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Calma. Non è il caso di trarre conclusioni affrettate. [...] Per scoprire che fine abbia fatto l'equipaggio della navicella c'è soltanto un sistema... Controllare di persona.
quotes.context: Uno analyzing the situation after his scans failed to detect life on the alien ship.

quotes.text: La risposta è nel computer di bordo dell'Antra. Purtroppo, sono riuscito a interfacciarmi per pochi secondi soltanto, altrimenti avrei rischiato un sovraccarico di informazioni. Ma posso azzardare un'ipotesi...
quotes.context: Uno explains his brief interaction with the alien ship's computer and his intent to provide a logical deduction.

quotes.text: Non lo so. Di certo, non si tratta di un semplice evroniano. Possiede una tempra veramente notevole.
quotes.context: Uno provides his initial assessment of the unconscious Gorthan after performing a brain scan and monitoring his vitals.

quotes.text: Secondo te, perché quel droide lo ha assalito?
quotes.context: Uno prompts Paperinik to consider the strategic or logical reasons behind the combat events they witness.

quotes.text: Troppo tranquillo!
quotes.context: Uno's analytical mind is constantly evaluating the environment for inconsistencies and potential dangers.

quotes.text: Il messaggio era nascosto in una frequenza fantasma debolissima. Non è stato facile isolarla.
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical difficulty of retrieving the message he is showing to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Sembra quasi che Pikappa sia in un luogo totalmente schermato... o talmente remoto da risultare irraggiungibile da qualsiasi onda portante!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining why his attempt to establish a transmission with Paperinik has failed.

quotes.text: Dubito che ce l'avresti fatta. Si tratta di una barriera di contenimento.
quotes.context: Uno commenting on Paperino's futile attempt to force a door.

quotes.text: Dev'esserci un contatto. Non ho avuto il tempo di riparare il danno all'impianto elettrico.
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical cause of a screeching alarm while Xadhoom is having an emotional breakdown.

quotes.text: Anche questo è un dato che va verificato. Gli evroniani potrebbero aver usato Xari per indebolire la loro più temibile nemica.
quotes.context: Uno discussing a possible Evronian strategy.
