quotes.text: I dati non sono chiari, ma è ovvio che Xadhoom sta cambiando. Forse muterà anche quello. Sta subendo una completa metamorfosi.
quotes.context: Uno explains his analytical conclusion regarding Xadhoom's state.

quotes.text: Studiando la tua metamorfosi e comparandola ai miei dati, ho scoperto che non è neppure uno xerbiano. [...] Un rapido calcolo delle probabilità potrà spiegarci il perché del vostro incontro e...
quotes.context: Uno is explaining his scientific findings to Paperinik and Xadhoom after analyzing the coolflame's data.

quotes.text: Ipotesi irrazionale. Sarebbe più sofisticato e non avrei impiegato componenti evroniani.
quotes.context: Uno explains why the device cannot be a creation of his future self, using technological evolution as a logical constraint.

quotes.text: Secondo il mio programma stocastico, Due cerca di tenerci occupati.
quotes.context: Uno explains his hypothesis about Due's tactics based on his analytical software.

quotes.text: Ovviamente non potevo informare direttamente della tua presenza Zotnam e il suo stato maggiore. Non mi avrebbero creduto! Appunto. Perciò ho usato il tuo stesso stratagemma. Ho utilizzato le immagini dei vari comandanti per confermare i sospetti che già nutrivano reciprocamente.
quotes.context: Uno explains to Due how he sabotaged the alliance between Due and the Evronians by exploiting the aliens' inherent distrust of each other.

quotes.text: Dai dati che mi hai fornito, deduco che hanno usato la solita tecnica. Rudimentale, ma efficace. Micro-bombe incendiarie. Almeno cinquanta.
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical analysis of the destruction at the scene.

quotes.text: Prima dimmi perché Pikappa non è comparso nel servizio di Angus.
quotes.context: Uno is questioning Paperino about the details of a recent television broadcast he monitored.

quotes.text: Tutte le pattuglie sono bloccate in un ingorgo mostruoso.
quotes.context: Uno explains the specific reason why Paperinik's intervention is necessary, based on his analysis of the city's logistical state.

quotes.text: No! Verifica. Qualcuno ha manomesso le centraline dei semafori.
quotes.context: Uno provides Paperinik with a logical explanation for the traffic chaos, pointing him toward the source of the problem.

quotes.text: E' chiaro che stanno usando con intelligenza fughe di gas pilotate.
quotes.context: Uno's analytical deduction about the nature of the gas leaks PK is investigating.

quotes.text: Sono passati da sotto. Attraverso un tubo. È l'unica spiegazione!
quotes.context: Uno's definitive conclusion about the kidnappers' escape route based on his data analysis.

quotes.text: No. L'intervista non era in diretta, guarda i dati di ripresa in sovrimpressione! A quell'ora avevi appena acchiappato Moe!
quotes.context: Uno analyzes a video recording to verify the timing of events.

quotes.text: A stomaco pieno si ragiona meglio! Così magari riuscirai a escogitare un trucco per sbloccare la situazione!
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperino to eat, linking his physical state to his ability to find a solution to the current problem.

quotes.text: Sì, invece. Basterebbe rimettere a posto le statue!
quotes.context: Uno proposes a logical solution to the anomalies affecting the tower.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair non distruggerebbe uno per uno i nostri robot di guardia!
quotes.context: Uno explains why the current attacker cannot be his creator, despite the attack's location.

quotes.text: Come ha fatto? Non è logico!
quotes.context: Uno witnesses Ahrimadz performing a magical feat that defies his scientific understanding.

quotes.text: In volo. Tempo d'arrivo previsto... un minuto, diciassette secondi e otto decimi!
quotes.context: Uno gives PK a hyper-accurate countdown for the arrival of the Extransformer shield.

quotes.text: Ho ri-digitalizzato le immagini che hai registrato con la tua videocamera da polso. Guarda. È un professionista. Ufficialmente scomparso nel corso di una azione di guerriglia.
quotes.context: Uno explains his findings to a confused Paperino.

quotes.text: Ingegnoso. Così si evitano discussioni dai risvolti distruttivi.
quotes.context: Uno provides a logical appraisal of the tactical/social choice made by Pikappa.

quotes.text: Il vostro tappabuchi è cavo. L'aria ci passa attraverso! E'... è una specie di fischietto!
quotes.context: Uno's analytical realization of why the hull breach wasn't sealed correctly.

quotes.text: Forse se... no!
quotes.context: Uno is trying to access deep data layers and is thinking through potential methods.

quotes.text: Quello che dici non è razionale. Stai per distruggermi! Di conseguenza, io non ho un futuro!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Due's threats in the future Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Credo di saperlo. Se ho ragione, non lo rivedremo per molto tempo!
quotes.context: Uno explaining his theory about what happened to Due.

quotes.text: Uhm... tutto sembra ripetersi senza alterazioni. Ma il punto di divergenza potrebbe essere vicino.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the unfolding events at the military base through Pikappa's sensors, comparing them to a known pattern.

quotes.text: La velocità del mio processore Ed Mark 001 consentirà l'esecuzione dell'intera routine in 20.3 minuti... scansione di tutti i 2.350.000 sistemi...
quotes.context: Uno explains the time needed to find the cause of the emergency seals in the virtual environment.

14.text: Uno demonstrates empathy by recognizing emotional distress in others and providing physical or psychological comfort (like food or reassurance) to help them calm down.

supporting.justification: Uno notices Paperinik's high stress levels and takes active steps to calm him down, offering chamomile tea and breakfast.
Uno recognizes Paperinik's sadness after the negative news report and attempts to cheer him up with a joke and a suggestion to rest.
Uno recognizes Paperino's distress and immediately tries to calm him down with a logical assessment of the situation.
Uno offers Donald popcorn to watch a recording and then hot milk to help him calm down after being upset.
Uno reassures Paperinik about the ship's safety and his own presence, promising not to abandon him as they prepare for flight.
Uno provides psychological comfort to Paperino, who is anxious about his job prospects, by reassuring him that they will find a solution.
Uno notices Paperinik's hesitation and confusion, asking him directly if something is worrying him.
Uno immediately identifies Paperinik's physical state (a cold) after he sneezes, showing his attentive and empathetic monitoring of his partner's health.
Uno checks on Paperinik's emotional state ('morale') during the fire, showing he monitors his partner's psychological well-being as well as the physical environment.
Uno recognizes Paperinik's mental fatigue after his adventure, using a technical metaphor to describe his state and encouraging him to rest.
After Paperinik's exoskeleton crashes, Uno communicates with him to provide reassurance while the hero is stordito and in pain.
Uno notices Paperino's dissatisfaction and tries to lift his spirits by reminding him of his success in stopping the Evronian invasion of Cape Dominion.
Uno offers Paperino physical comfort (air conditioning, cold drinks) and entertainment to help him relax during the heatwave.
Uno shows empathy for Paperino's job situation and proactively finds him a new position at Ducklair Tower to alleviate his concerns.
Uno tries to calm down the shouting Paperinik and Xadhoom by ironically offering them chamomile tea.
Uno notices Paperino's insomnia caused by a nightmare and suggests that going out as Paperinik will help relax his nerves.
Uno displays deep emotional shock and concern on his face while monitoring Paperinik's psychic distress during Trauma's attack, recognizing and sharing the hero's suffering.
Uno recognizes Paperinik's physical and emotional state after a defeat, providing immediate medical reassurance.
Uno recognizes Paperinik's depressive state and tries to cheer him up, emphasizing that the city needs him to be at his best.
Uno shows a form of practical care by insisting Paperinik wear warm accessories (scarf and earmuffs) because of the cold weather outside, prioritizing his physical well-being.
Uno silently watches over Paperinik while he rests and reads, demonstrating a protective and empathetic presence after a taxing mission.
Uno uses mechanical hands to fix Paperinik's cape while the hero is venting his frustration, showing a form of physical care and support.
Uno notices Paperinik's tension during the flight to Steel Island and tells him to relax, providing psychological reassurance.
Uno displays empathy by asking about the future and fate of the alien fugitives after their departure, showing his concern for their well-being.
Uno expresses concern for Paperinik's health, telling him it's not good to stay glued to the screen and that he needs fresh air and movement.
Uno recognizes Paperinik's indignation and offense at Neopard's behavior and provides a calming piece of advice ('Lascia stare!') to help him let it go.
Uno attempts to reassure Paperino after the latter's display of anxiety and frustration.
Uno recognizes that Xadhoom is in a state of emotional/mental distress ("sragionando") and correctly identifies that her current behavior is atypical for her.
Uno listens attentively to Xadhoom's painful memories and recognizes the vulnerability caused by her trauma.
Uno tells a worried Paperino to relax while explaining Xadhoom's condition.
Uno provides reassurance to a worried Paperino, expressing conviction that the situation will be resolved positively.
Uno provides a tray with a sandwich, a drink, and coffee for Paperino, encouraging him to eat to think better.

Uno recognizes Pikappa's frustration during the telekinesis test and materializes hot donuts to provide a more 'interesting' and motivating target, successfully de-escalating the tension and achieving the desired result.
Uno identifies Xadhoom's sadness while monitoring her digital projection, showing his ability to read emotional distress even in a digital/alien entity.
Uno provides brief but direct emotional support to Paperinik while he is still recovering from the shock, urging him to stay strong.
Uno provides reassurance to Paperinik about Due's disappearance by confirming his own logical hypothesis.
Uno provides breakfast (coffee and croissants) to Paperinik and Lyla after a stressful/exhausting event, recognizing their physical and emotional needs.

quotes.text: Piantala di sovraccaricarmi gli ingressi audio-video. Non c'e' alcun pericolo.
quotes.context: Uno recognizes Paperinik's agitation and tries to soothe him while also protecting his own sensory inputs.

quotes.text: Su col morale, vecchio mantello tarlato! Dai! Mi fai un sorriso, o devo produrre una simulazione?
quotes.context: Uno tries to lift Paperinik's spirits after Angus Fangus's smear campaign.

quotes.text: Tranquillizzati, non ti ha seguito! Probabilmente non ti ha riconosciuto.
quotes.context: Uno's response to Paperino's alarm after being told an Evronian drone had spotted him.

quotes.text: Popcorn? ... Camomilla o latte caldo? ... Latte caldo! E anche per oggi abbiamo finito!
quotes.context: Uno provides snacks and a warm drink to Donald as part of their interaction in the tower.

quotes.text: Non temere, non ti abbandonerò! Penserò a tutto io...
quotes.context: Uno is calming Paperinik as he takes his seat in the cockpit of the interstellar ship.

quotes.text: Troveremo una soluzione. Ora ascolta quello che ho da dirti!!
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges Paperino's distress before refocusing him on the mission.

quotes.text: Qualcosa ti preoccupa, Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno observing Paperinik's reaction to his technical explanations and analogies.

quotes.text: A me sembra raffreddore.
quotes.context: Uno observes Paperinik who has just returned from a mission under the rain and is sneezing.

quotes.text: E il morale com'è? Non mi sembri tanto spaventato.
quotes.context: Uno probes Paperinik's feelings while the hero is trapped in a dangerous situation.

quotes.text: I tuoi files sono sovraccarichi, eh? Ti capisco. Buon riposo, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno stops his explanation of the temporal paradox when he sees Paperinik is too tired to follow.

quotes.text: Non dirai sul serio, spero? Se Cook e gli Evroniani non sono riusciti a invadere Cape Dominion è soprattutto merito tuo.
quotes.context: Uno reassures Paperino, who is feeling pessimistic after the mission.

quotes.text: ...poi posso offrirti una bibita ghiacciata... e un po' di tivù, come diversivo.
quotes.context: Uno provides for Paperino's physical and psychological needs after a stressful day.

quotes.text: Tuo zio può licenziarti, tanto ti ho trovato un altro lavoro qui, alla Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno trying to cheer up Paperino by providing a solution to his employment problems.

quotes.text: Camomilla per tutti, ragazzi? Offro io!
quotes.context: Uno appears as a hologram with a tea tray to de-escalate the shouting match between his allies.

quotes.text: Lodevole iniziativa. Servirà anche a distenderti i nervi.
quotes.context: Uno encouraging Paperino to take action to cope with his emotional distress.

quotes.text: Su con la vita! Un supereroe depresso e' l'ultima cosa di cui Paperopoli ha bisogno in questo momento.
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperino while he is brooding over the missing persons reports.

quotes.text: Quello pesante. Fa piuttosto freddo e...
quotes.context: Uno explains why he is providing extra warm gear for the mission during a snowfall.

quotes.text: Alle sue spalle, l'ologramma di Uno fluttua silenziosamente, vegliando sul suo amico.
quotes.context: The final panel of the story shows Uno's holographic presence lingering near Paperinik as he reflects on recent events.

quotes.text: Dettaglio delle mani meccaniche di Uno che sistemano il mantello di Paperinik, che ora guarda verso l'alto.
quotes.context: The scene description details Uno's physical assistance to Paperinik in the laboratory.

quotes.text: Rilassati! Stiamo letteralmente volando! Batteremo Belgravia sul tempo, vedrai.
quotes.context: Uno reassures Paperinik while they are flying towards Steel Island in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: E, adesso, che cosa faranno i fuggitivi?
quotes.context: Uno asks about the fugitives' future after their departure from Earth.

quotes.text: L'ho fatto per te. Non ti fa bene restare sempre incollato al video. Hai bisogno di un po' di movimento, di aria fresca!
quotes.context: Uno explaining why he forced Paperinik to go on this trip.

quotes.text: Lascia stare, socio!
quotes.context: Uno tries to calm Paperinik down after Neopard shocks him with a whisper.

quotes.text: Tranquillo, eroe!
quotes.context: Uno's first words to Paperino after appearing, using a reassuring tone.

quotes.text: O-oh! Sta sragionando. [...] È una reazione insolita, per i suoi standard.
quotes.context: Uno observes Xadhoom's transition from rage to despair and analyzes it as an anomaly in her behavioral patterns.

quotes.text: Quindi, quando è arrivata qui era già piuttosto vulnerabile. [...] Paperino e Uno (nella sua forma sferica) la ascoltano con attenzione in un laboratorio tecnologico.
quotes.context: Uno analyzing Xadhoom's emotional state while she recounts her trauma.

quotes.text: Rilassati! Voglio solo dire che il suo potrebbe essere un cambiamento definitivo.
quotes.context: Uno tries to manage Paperino's emotional reaction to the news about Xadhoom's metamorphosis.

quotes.text: Sono convinto che verranno rimessi in libertà quanto prima!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to the sight of police removing statues, attempting to calm Paperino's anxiety.

quotes.text: Approfittane. L'ora di pranzo è passata da un pezzo! A stomaco pieno si ragiona meglio!
quotes.context: Uno invites Paperino to eat the food he has provided, noting that it's late and that a full stomach aids reasoning.

quotes.text: Bene, adesso proviamo a rendere il bersaglio più interessante.
quotes.context: Uno introduces donuts to the experiment to help Pikappa focus his mental powers through positive motivation.

quotes.text: E' triste.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing Xadhoom's digital state and notes her emotional condition to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Tieni duro.
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperinik to push through the pain and keep moving.

quotes.text: Credo di saperlo. Se ho ragione, non lo rivedremo per molto tempo!
quotes.context: Uno's hypothesis helps to calm Paperinik's worries about his enemy.

15.text: Uno possesses an advanced array of sensors, including X-Y-Z rays, magnetic resonators, thermal imaging, and detection of 'neutrinic,' 'tachyon,' and 'bioenergetic' emissions, allowing him to perform deep physical, electronic, and tactical scans on individuals and environments.

supporting.justification: Uno is able to pinpoint a small tracking device hidden on Paperinik's person.
Uno performs a complex psychological and cognitive assessment of Angus Fangus, using highly technical medical terminology.
Uno's security systems in the Ducklair Tower scan Everett Ducklair with a robotic eye-shaped sensor and blue light, allowing Uno to recognize him despite his monk's disguise.
Uno demonstrates the use of specialized seismic sensors and electromagnetic anomaly detection to identify threats that standard equipment misses.
Uno utilizes a specialized 'tecno-scanner' to perform a deep analysis of a technological device brought back from the 23rd century.
Uno performs a real-time scan of an unknown biological object (an Evronian spore) brought into the Ducklair Tower, displaying the results as a digital overlay on his holographic interface.
Uno performs a multi-layered scan (visualized as colors and abstract shapes) to identify the internal structure and life stage of an Evronian spore.
Uno refers to his own sensors as "sophisticated" but acknowledges they can be bypassed by Everett Ducklair's technology.
Uno performs a wireframe scan of Trauma's physical structure and analyzes his bio-energetic trace.
Uno's ability to diagnose Paperinik's injuries as "superficial" immediately upon his return implies an automatic or rapid medical scan.
Uno confirms that his external sensors tracked the movements of the suspicious individual outside the tower.
Uno utilizes specialized sensors to detect 'Evronian Neutrinic Emissions' and provides thermal/sensor imaging of the town square to Paperinik's portable device.
Uno identifies a 'trail of tachyons' left by the enemy, demonstrating his ability to detect complex energy emissions.
Uno performs a medical examination on Xadhoom using the Ducklair Tower's advanced laboratory equipment, confirming his ability to scan and analyze extraterrestrial biology.
Uno is shown performing complex diagnostic work within the Ducklair Tower, monitoring data related to Xadhoom.
Uno specifies that he scanned the Saturn sector for "bio-energetic traces" (tracciati bioenergetici), adding this to his array of detection capabilities.
Uno identifies two "bioenergetic emissions of terrestrial type" coming from inside an alien ship, confirming his ability to detect and categorize biological life signs from a distance.
Uno's sensors detect an 'emissione neutrinica evroniana' (Evronian neutrinic emission) and he explains that he detected a meteor that was attempting a controlled landing.
Uno identifies chemical detectors on the ceiling of a high-security facility, demonstrating his ability to scan and recognize specialized security hardware.
Uno identifies that the chronal unit, which the Razziatore believed was empty, is actually active and self-regenerating, showing his superior sensor and diagnostic capabilities.
Uno relies on a network of alarm sensors to detect threats and expresses genuine concern when they are bypassed by intruders.
Uno is seen scanning the ruins of a destroyed building to gather data.
Uno utilizes the Pi-Kar's sensor array to provide an aerial tactical overview of a high-speed pursuit, monitoring multiple targets (Mitchell's limo, Angus Fangus's car, Mary Ann's Beetle) from above.
Uno detects an incoming Evronian ship using his sensors before it is visible to Paperinik.
Uno uses his scanners to detect unknown energy signatures outside the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's sensors allow him to detect subparticle emissions and radioactive energy sources within an alien device.
Uno scans the alien ship for bio-energy emissions to determine the crew size.
Uno explicitly mentions his "long-range sensors" (sensori a lungo raggio).

quotes.text: ...Tolgo questo microsegnalatore dal tuo mantello!
quotes.context: Uno detects a hidden Evronian tracker.

quotes.text: Da una diagnosi primaria, risulta evidente un profondo stato confusionale, un'alterazione psichica pressoché totale e una deformazione dei meccanismi cognitivi...
quotes.context: Uno provides a medical diagnosis of Angus's state after he is found in a dazed condition.

quotes.text: Quello che è sfuggito agli altri non poteva passare inosservato al sistema di rilevazione sismica creato da padron Ducklair. [...] Poco prima delle scosse ho percepito in quelle zone alcune piccole anomalie elettromagnetiche...
quotes.context: Uno describes his superior sensing capabilities compared to official seismographs.

quotes.text: Mettilo in questo tecno-scanner. Voglio esaminarlo.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the device given to Paperinik by Odin Eidolon.

quotes.text: Allora, ecco qui il primo livello di vita dei nostri cari nemici extraterrestri. Per quello che ne sono riuscito a capire, questa spora contiene...
quotes.context: Uno is presenting the results of his technological analysis of the alien spore to Paperino.

quotes.text: E solo la tecnologia Ducklair può nascondere un oggetto volante ai miei sofisticatissimi sensori!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining why he failed to detect a mysterious flying object, identifying it as Ducklair-level technology.

quotes.text: Mentre studio il suo tracciato bioenergetico, tieniti a distanza di sicurezza.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the mutant Evronian Trauma in real-time while Paperinik is in the field.

quotes.text: E i miei sensori esterni hanno rilevato ogni movimento.
quotes.context: Uno validates Paperino's observations with his own sensor data.

quotes.text: Un osso duro che semina una scia di tachioni! I rilevatori di emissioni energetiche non sbagliano.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the energy signatures of the attackers at the Duckmall Center.

quotes.text: Blink! Esame completato!
quotes.context: Uno announces the end of the medical scan he was performing on Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Il mio lavoro diagnostico è giunto a un momento cruciale!
quotes.context: Uno announces a breakthrough or a critical phase in his technical analysis.

quotes.text: Ho scandagliato il settore di Saturno e non ho rilevato la presenza di tracciati bioenergetici dei nostri invadenti nemici.
quotes.context: Uno explaining his deep-space scan results to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Dall'interno dell'astronave arrivano due debolissime emissioni bioenergetiche. Di tipo terrestre.
quotes.context: Uno is relaying sensor data to PK as they approach the Antra.

quotes.text: Stanotte ho rilevato la caduta di una meteora che... cercava di atterrare!
quotes.context: Uno explains to Paperinik why they are investigating the canyon, revealing his ability to detect and analyze the nature of celestial descents.

quotes.text: Rilevatori chimici! Pronti a scattare alla minima fuga di gas...
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the presence of sensitive sensors in a toxic waste storage area.

quotes.text: Quando il Razziatore te l'ha lasciata, la credeva esaurita, ma si sbagliava. Una sorta di batteria di riserva autorigenerante rimasta miracolosamente intatta!
quotes.context: Uno explains his discovery about the true state of the chronal unit to Paperino.

quotes.text: Come hanno fatto ad arrivarci, sfuggendo ai miei sensori d'allarme?
quotes.context: Uno is puzzled by how the Evronians managed to attack without triggering his security systems.

quotes.text: Se i miei rilevatori non m'ingannano, abbiamo ospiti in arrivo.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the arrival of an Evronian ship while monitoring the area.

quotes.text: Oltretutto i miei scandagli indicano la presenza di energie sconosciute all'esterno!
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical assessment of the anomalies occurring around the tower.

quotes.text: Dalla cartuccia proviene una forte emissione di velocissime subparticelle. Probabilmente e' alimentata da un elemento radioattivo...
quotes.context: Uno is scanning the memory cartridge of Xadhoom to understand its power source and emissions.

quotes.text: Al momento non rilevo emissioni bio-energetiche al suo interno. Ciò significa che l'equipaggio è costituito soltanto dal tuo 'cacciatore'.
quotes.context: Uno provides a sensor report on the alien vessel.

quotes.text: Per i miei sensori a lungo raggio è come se non esistesse!
quotes.context: Uno is reporting his inability to detect a target despite his advanced scanning capabilities.

16.text: Uno can creatively extrapolate and visualize information (such as the appearance of people) by synthesizing and analyzing available data and memories from others.

supporting.justification: Uno creates a visual representation of Qui, Quo, and Qua by analyzing Paperinik's data/memories, showing a high level of creative extrapolation.
Uno uses data synthesis and comparison to reconstruct and visualize the original appearance of an alien before they were transformed into a coolflame.

quotes.text: Non importa. Conoscendoti, posso estrapolarli dai tuoi dati!
quotes.context: Uno generates a caricature of Paperinik's relatives without having ever seen them.

quotes.text: Ecco come doveva presentarsi il sosia di Xari, prima di incontrare gli evroniani.
quotes.context: Uno is showing a screen that displays how the coolflame would have looked in its original alien form, based on his comparative analysis.

17.text: Uno uses humor, irony, and playful visual projections to de-escalate tense situations or to build rapport with his companions.

supporting.justification: Uno uses an ironic elevator announcement and a funny hologram of nephews to lighten the mood for a stressed Paperinik.
Uno uses a playful threat of 'producing a simulation' of a smile to coax a real one from a depressed Paperinik.
Uno jokes about looking for Lyla's number in the phone book to lighten the mood after Paperinik's defeat.
Uno's smiling, toasting, and celebratory behavior is a clear way for him to build rapport and celebrate mission success with Paperinik.
Uno uses ironical banter to engage with Paperinik while he's in a potentially tense or unknown situation in cyberspace.
Uno uses a playful and ironic visual projection (holding a tea tray) to try and de-escalate the tension between Paperinik and Xadhoom.
Uno uses a friendly, smiling holographic appearance and encouraging words to help Paperino recover from a nightmare.
Uno uses a witty and slightly ironic remark about a 'depressed superhero' to address Paperinik's mood and encourage him.
Uno playfully morphs his digital face into Odin Eidolon's likeness to tease Paperinik, laughing afterwards.
Uno is described as 'amused' while teasing Paperino about his suspicious nature, using irony to handle the interaction.
Uno introduces himself to Camera 9 (Stephan) with a joke about his talkativeness, showing his characteristic humor and ability to build rapport with new allies.
Uno uses irony and a playful laugh to tease Paperino while he proudly shows off his photos, creating a lighthearted moment between them.
Uno uses a playful command ('smile!') to lighten the mood after a high-stakes battle involving Xadhoom and renegade agents, showing his use of humor to de-escalate tension.
Uno uses a smiley face and a joking response to the General's praise to maintain a friendly tone during a serious mission.
Uno's playful dismissal of the enemy's 'rudimentary' technology and his 'complicit' expression help maintain a confident rapport with PK during mission preparation.
Uno uses a holographic projection of Xadhoom to surprise and please Paperinik.
Uno uses a sarcastic greeting ('Problemi, Paperinik?') while the hero is taking cover from a violent explosion, maintaining his characteristic irony even in tense situations.

quotes.text: Ding! Centocinquantesimo piano...
quotes.context: Uno uses humor to diffuse the tension of Paperinik's frantic arrival.

quotes.text: Dai! Mi fai un sorriso, o devo produrre una simulazione?
quotes.context: Uno trying to lighten the mood.

quotes.text: Dove avrò messo i files degli elenchi telefonici? Ma forse tu hai il suo numero.
quotes.context: Uno's playful response to Paperinik's dejected state.

quotes.text: In un'ampia inquadratura finale, Uno guarda divertito Paperinik mentre l'eroe beve tutto d'un fiato il suo drink, emettendo un sonoro 'GURGLE!'.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's reaction to PK's drinking style.

quotes.text: Forse no, ma neanche tu sei ansioso di verificarlo, eh?
quotes.context: Uno is talking to Paperinik while the latter is exploring a mysterious digital cathedral in cyberspace.

quotes.text: Uno appare come un ologramma blu completo, seduto e con un vassoio con teiera e tazze tra le mani, cercando di fare dell'ironia per smorzare la tensione.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's attempt to use humor and a visual prop to calm his allies.

quotes.text: Lodevole iniziativa. Servirà anche a distenderti i nervi.
quotes.context: Uno trying to soothe Paperino's nerves after his nightmare.

quotes.text: Su con la vita! Un supereroe depresso e' l'ultima cosa di cui Paperopoli ha bisogno in questo momento.
quotes.context: Uno uses humor to lighten the mood while Paperinik is feeling down.

quotes.text: Lo dico anch'io... uno basta e avanza! Ah! Ah! Ah! Ah!
quotes.context: Uno laughs after teasing Paperinik with his new appearance and making a pun on his own name.

quotes.text: Salve. Ho sentito molto parlare di voi... o meglio, vi ho sentito parlare molto.
quotes.context: Uno's first interaction with Camera 9 (Stephan Vladuck).

quotes.text: Merito del modello, immagino. Padron Ducklair è... così fotogenico! Ah! Ah!
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperino's pride in his own superhero photos.

quotes.text: Perfetto! Resta lì ancora un istante e sorridi!
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperinik just as the hero is flying away from the factory battle.

quotes.text: Sono sempre pronto, generale ;-) ... Arrossisco...
quotes.context: Uno's playful interaction with General Wisecube.

quotes.text: Nooo! La Ducklair Tower è impenetrabile da intrusioni così rudimentali!
quotes.context: Uno's tone is confident and slightly mocking of the threat, which can be seen as a way to reassure PK.

quotes.text: ...ora... potrai chiederlo a lei!
quotes.context: Uno reveals a large hologram of Xadhoom to a surprised and joyful Paperinik.

18.text: Uno can communicate remotely with his allies through both portable devices and dedicated remote monitors (such as the one in Paperino's kitchen), extending his presence and interface beyond the Ducklair Tower.

supporting.justification: Uno communicates with Donald using a portable device, showing he is not limited to the tower's fixed screens.
Uno communicates with Paperinik via radio and appears as a small flying probe and a hologram on Paperinik's arm-mounted device.
Uno communicates with Paperinik while the latter is driving the Pi-kar, appearing as a circular holographic insert in the car's dashboard system.
Uno communicates with Paperinik while he is on a mission at the Paperopoli Experimental Laboratories, using the transmitter in Paperinik's costume.
Uno appears on a holographic monitor on Paperinik's shield/communicator to warn him of an approaching police vehicle.
Uno communicates with Paperino while the latter is at a crowded shopping mall, using the wrist communicator.
Uno appears on Paperino's communicator screen to provide analysis while Paperino is in the field at the power plant.
Uno communicates with Paperinik via his wrist-mounted holographic communicator while the group is inside an Evronian cruiser.
Uno appears on a spherical monitor on the wall of Paperino's kitchen to communicate with him.
Uno appears on Paperinik's portable communicator to assist him during the mission on Fairfax's plane.
Uno maintains a remote connection with Paperinik via a portable communicator while the hero is on a mission at Canale 00.
Uno is shown active on a specialized console in Paperino's home, interacting with him as he wakes up and eats breakfast.
Uno takes control of a building monitor in the Ducklair Tower lobby to communicate with Donald, replacing a previous transmission from Angus Fangus.
Uno is shown appearing on an interface in a military setting (among vehicles), demonstrating his ability to maintain presence in remote locations.
Uno appears on a circular green monitor in the Ducklair Tower's living area to watch TV and converse with Paperino as he relaxes on a sofa.
Uno is in remote contact with Paperino via the 313's onboard radio.
Uno communicates with Paperino while the latter is driving his car (the 313) using a small handheld radio transmitter to provide mission updates.
Uno is communicating with Paperinik through his glove communicator while PK is on a mission at a factory.
Uno projects his holographic interface directly into Paperino's bedroom to speak with him.
Uno's face is displayed on a monitor inside Paperinik's exoskeleton helmet, allowing him to communicate and share data during combat.
Uno's voice and tech are channeled through Paperinik's shield (Extransformer) to capture the criminals.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through a portable green communication device as the hero leaves a mission scene, demonstrating his ability to maintain remote contact.
Uno contacts Paperino by hijacking a public 'Virtual Duck' interactive stand in a department store, using its headphones and display to communicate.
Uno communicates with Paperinik while the hero is on a mission in the snowy mountains of Bravestone, transmitting data and voice to a handheld device.
Uno's interface appears on a round screen next to a television monitor on a film set in Providencia, demonstrating his ability to manifest remotely even in distant locations.
Uno communicates with Donald by calling him on the wall phone at his home and appearing on a kitchen monitor to provide technical data.
Uno appears on a monitor within a factory, showing his ability to extend his presence to remote screens outside the Ducklair Tower.
Uno communicates with Paperinik remotely while the hero is inside the Pi-Kar, demonstrating his ability to interface with the vehicle's systems from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno communicates with the crew on the spaceship through a dedicated monitor on the dashboard.
Uno's avatar appears on a lateral screen inside the Pi-Kar's cockpit, allowing him to communicate with Paperinik remotely.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through a small portable monitor while the hero is escaping the sinking Tyrannic submarine.
Uno communicates with Paperinik inside the cockpit of the Pi-Kar, demonstrating his ability to interface with the vehicle's communication systems remotely.
Uno is communicating with Paperinik inside the cockpit of the Pi-Kar during the Evronian attack.
Uno manifests as a functional holographic interface within an external spaceship, allowing him to manage its defensive systems (force field) remotely.
Uno is present in the Pi-Kar with Paperinik, providing real-time technical and tactical support during the attack on the Centurian.
Uno's interface moves from the belt to the Pikar's dashboard monitors as Paperinik enters the vehicle.
Uno provides technical support and information to Paperinik via his communicator while the hero is on site in the principality of Stahlburg.
Uno communicates with Paperino through a dedicated monitor installed in the 313 car.
Uno attempts to establish a remote transmission to contact Paperinik from the Ducklair Tower's control room.
Uno appears as a small holographic projection beside Paperinik while the latter is on Neopard's ship, far from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno establishes a remote communication link when Paperinik connects his Extransformer shield to a physical interface in a Department 51 cell.
Uno is shown communicating with Paperinik via a wrist device while the hero is in the middle of an action sequence.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through a technological console screen inside Department 51 during the Evronian attack.
Uno manifests as a holographic face on the Pi-Kar's dashboard monitor to communicate with Paperinik while he is away from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno appears on a monitor (likely in the Pi-Kar or on a portable device) to communicate with Paperinik during a mission.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through the Extransformer shield's circular screen while the hero is in flight.

Uno extends his presence and communicative interface to the Pi-Kar's dashboard monitor during a mission, allowing him to provide real-time tactical support to Paperinik while the vehicle is in high-speed pursuit.
Uno communicates with Paperinik by appearing as a holographic interface within the hero's technological scouting equipment (electronic viewfinder).
Uno maintains a clear radio communication link with Paperinik even when the hero is in deep subterranean environments like the city's sewers.
Uno communicates with Pikappa through the Pi-Kar's dashboard screen while the hero is flying.
Uno communicates with Paperino (in civilian clothes) via his wrist communicator while Paperino is in the city.
Uno communicates with Paperino via a holographic projection from a device on Paperino's wrist while the latter is in the streets of Paperopoli.
Paperinik communicates with Uno via his wrist device during the battle at the 'Valvola Muonica' emporium.
Uno communicates with Paperinik via a radio link, providing a tactical overlay/vision of the situation outside.
Uno communicates with Pikappa first via a glove-mounted holographic projector and then through the Pi-Kar's internal audio/systems.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through the Pikar's internal holographic interface while they are in a remote location (Siberia).
Uno is in constant radio contact with PK while the hero is in the Pikar, providing real-time technical and tactical support for his investigation into the Defco laboratory.
Uno appears on a monitor in a control room where Paperinik and other military/civilian characters are gathered.
Uno communicates with Paperino in his bedroom through a video interface.
Uno projects his holographic presence into Paperino's bedroom as a green bubble to alert him of an emergency in the Ducklair Tower.
Uno maintains a remote radio link with Paperinik while the hero is in an alien spaceship near Mars, extending his communication reach across interplanetary distances.
Uno's remote piloting and communication reach Paperinik even when the hero is 'far, far away' (lontano, lontano) from the Ducklair Tower, during a deep-space mission.
Uno manifests his holographic face on a monitor within the spaceship where PK and Xadhoom are located, maintaining communication even in deep space.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through the internal monitors of the Pikar spaceship.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through a remote holographic interface integrated into the hero's glove/shield.
Uno wakes Paperino up by activating an alarm and flashing his screen in Paperino's room, demonstrating his remote presence.
Uno communicates with Pikappa during his mission at Area 51 via a portable device on the hero's arm.

quotes.text: Paperino parla con Uno tramite un dispositivo portatile che funge da comunicatore.
quotes.context: Panel description explaining how Donald and Uno are communicating remotely.

quotes.text: Attento, Paperinik! Il mio contanemici... segnala che ne manca ancora uno.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about a remaining threat through a remote communication link.

quotes.text: Il nostro amico della notte scorsa è di nuovo in volo! Si dirige verso il magazzino della 'Scatolette & Co.'!
quotes.context: Uno alerts Paperinik to the presence of the intruder and provides his destination via the car's communication system.

quotes.text: L'eroe comunica con Uno tramite il suo equipaggiamento. [...] L'intelligenza artificiale risponde a Paperinik confermando il successo della raccolta dati.
quotes.context: The scene summary describes the remote communication between Uno and Paperinik during their tactical operation.

quotes.text: Paperinik! Nasconditi, presto!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik through a holographic interface as a police craft approaches.

quotes.text: Primo piano di Paperino che parla al suo comunicatore, dal quale proviene la voce di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description showing the wrist communicator's digital interface.

quotes.text: Quel tizio ha la tipica impronta vocale dello stadio di condizionamento pre-coolflame! Uno schiavo degli Evroniani!
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the voice of a power plant worker and transmits his findings to Paperino's communicator.

quotes.text: ...mi... bzzz... ricevi, vecchio mantello? Dove vi... bzzz... trovate?
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring Paperinik's mission remotely through a wrist-mounted device.

quotes.text: un monitor sferico sulla parete si attiva con un ronzio ('BWZZ'), mostrando l'immagine digitale verde di Uno.
quotes.context: Description of Uno manifesting in Paperino's home.

quotes.text: Ricevuto!
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges Paperinik's status via the remote communicator as the hero prepares to intervene.

quotes.text: Inquadratura dell'interfaccia di Uno che continua il suo discorso interrotto...
quotes.context: The scene shows Uno's digital face on a screen while Paperino is in a different physical location (a military area).

quotes.text: Uno lo osserva dal suo monitor circolare con espressione sarcastica.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's interaction with Paperino in the tower.

quotes.text: Paperino parla con Uno attraverso la radio di bordo.
quotes.context: Paperino uses his car's radio to update Uno on the situation.

quotes.text: Sei ancora lì, socio?
quotes.context: Uno opens the communication with Paperino via a portable device.

quotes.text: Non occorre.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik who was worried about the factory's alarm systems.

quotes.text: Uno continua a parlargli tramite la sua interfaccia olografica che fluttua nella stanza.
quotes.context: Uno interacting with Paperino in his private quarters.

quotes.text: Subito, padron Paperino!
quotes.context: Uno's voice transmitted via a portable communication device.

quotes.text: Ho recuperato un disperato appello via internet... Ho verificato e confermo. Bravestone è vittima di un attacco... Già fatto, vecchio mantello! Pi-Kar e arnesi... ti aspettano qui fuori!
quotes.context: Uno explains how he found the emergency and informs Paperino that he has already prepared the vehicle and equipment outside the mall.

quotes.text: Accanto a lui, un monitor mostra l'interfaccia di Uno con vari dati tecnici.
quotes.context: The panel description confirms Uno's presence on a monitor in Donald's kitchen while they are on the phone.

quotes.text: Vignetta orizzontale in basso. Primo piano di Uno che appare su un monitor verde circondato da cavi e circuiti, spiegando la strategia a PK.
quotes.context: Uno's visual interface is active on a local monitor in an industrial area, far from his core systems in the Ducklair Tower. (Scene description)

quotes.text: Perfetto! Resta lì ancora un istante e sorridi!
quotes.context: Uno's voice comes through the Pi-Kar's audio system as Paperinik is at the factory site.

quotes.text: In un piccolo monitor sulla plancia di comando appare il volto di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno's face appears on a monitor as he communicates with PK and Lyla in deep space.

quotes.text: ...mentre l'avatar di Uno appare su uno schermo laterale.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's presence in the vehicle.

quotes.text: Paperinik corre freneticamente lungo un corridoio insieme a diversi soldati in uniforme viola. Tiene in mano un piccolo monitor su cui appare il volto di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's remote presence via a portable device during a mission.

quotes.text: Tetranium. Un minerale alquanto raro. Nel raggio di una decina di anni luce, se ne trova soltanto sulla Terra. E, sulla Terra, soltanto nelle miniere del principato di Stahlburg!
quotes.context: Uno provides technical data on Tetranium while Paperinik is in Stahlburg.

quotes.text: Allora, socio? Dove sei?
quotes.context: Uno appears on a screen in Paperino's car to communicate with him during a traffic jam.

quotes.text: Paperinik, pronto! Niente da fare! La trasmissione è inspiegabilmente bloccata!
quotes.context: Uno is trying to call Paperinik using the tower's communication systems.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno inizia a materializzarsi mentre Paperinik osserva attentamente.
quotes.context: Uno appears as a hologram after Paperinik plugs his shield into a wall panel.

quotes.text: Pikappa! Non capisco che cosa sia successo, ma dobbiamo passare subito alla fase due del piano!
quotes.context: Paperinik is running through the base and receives Uno's voice through his wrist communicator.

quotes.text: "Temo che ci siano parecchie novità, vecchio mantello... guarda tu stesso!"
quotes.context: Uno appears on a screen to update Paperinik on the situation inside the base.

quotes.text: Primo piano del monitor sul cruscotto dell'auto dove compare il volto di Uno, che sembra preoccupato.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's remote interface in the vehicle.

quotes.text: Dalla sua mano, dove tiene lo scudo, proviene la voce di Uno. Dettaglio dell'Extransformer che mostra il volto olografico verde di Uno su uno schermo circolare.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's interface on the portable shield.

quotes.text: Tu che cosa dici?
quotes.context: Uno's voice is heard via radio while Paperinik is underground being chased by rats.

quotes.text: Pikappa reagisce con sorpresa, mentre sullo schermo dell'abitacolo appare l'immagine olografica di Uno...
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's holographic appearance in the car.

quotes.text: Sette uomini intorno alla casa... Uno comunica a Paperino via radio la situazione.
quotes.context: Uno's voice and tactical analysis are transmitted to Paperinik while the hero is inside Mary Ann Flagstarr's home.

quotes.text: Davanti a lui appare l'ologramma di Uno, di colore azzurro e trasparente.
quotes.context: Uno uses the vehicle's systems to manifest and communicate with PK.

quotes.text: Sul monitor davanti a lui compare il volto sorridente di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno communicating with the team in a control room.

quotes.text: A destra, in un riquadro che simboleggia una comunicazione video, appare l'interfaccia grafica di Uno che parla con Paperino.
quotes.context: Uno establishes a remote link to Paperino's room during a drone attack.

quotes.text: Ho avuto un istante di allarme assoluto! Poi, più nulla!
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperino in his bedroom as he wakes up to the alarm.

quotes.text: Ce la fai a restare in contatto radio?
quotes.context: Uno asks Paperinik if he can stay in radio contact while Paperinik is on a mission in an alien spaceship near Mars.

quotes.text: Sei lontano, lontano.
quotes.context: Uno's response to PK, emphasizing the distance between them.

quotes.text: A meno che i propulsori di emergenza non siano danneggiati.
quotes.context: Uno's face appears on a monitor in the Pikar's cockpit to assist Paperinik.

quotes.text: Inquadratura ravvicinata del braccio e del dispositivo di comunicazione di Pikappa. La voce di Uno proviene dal dispositivo.
quotes.context: Uno is providing real-time support to Pikappa while he is in the field.

19.text: Uno actively monitors and records his allies' actions, communications, and movements, as well as visitors to the Ducklair Tower, to ensure the success of strategic plans and maintain security.

supporting.justification: Uno monitors conversations in real-time to ensure information is gathered correctly for his plans.
Uno is monitoring Paperinik's physical actions (pressing a button) in real-time.
Uno takes over Paperinik's patrol duties while the hero sleeps, monitoring the city and security cameras.
Uno provides post-action feedback to Paperino by monitoring news reports about his missions to evaluate his performance.
Uno monitors the entrance of the Ducklair Tower and alerts Paperino to the arrival of Zio Paperone and the 00 News crew.
Uno monitors the data collected by special detectors placed by Paperinik to ensure the mission's objective is met.
Uno monitors the city in real-time using a radar screen to detect suspicious flying objects.
Uno's question "Where did you disappear to?" confirms he was monitoring Paperino's movements and noticed his absence from the tower.
Uno monitors the media coverage and public perception of Paperinik, specifically watching a defamatory news report produced by Angus Fangus.
Uno uses his peripheral units to record events inside the offices of Channel 00.
Uno monitors the perimeter and the foyer of the Ducklair Tower, identifying the number of Evronian attackers and the threat to Angus Fangus.
Uno's monitoring of his allies is visually represented by panels showing the environment from the perspective of his cameras and sensors.
Uno explicitly states his omnipresence and total surveillance of events within the Ducklair Tower.
Uno recorded Lyla Lay as she was leaving her workplace to monitor her interactions.
Uno uses a specialized internal tracking program to monitor the exact location of his allies, such as Lyla Lay.
Uno knows exactly when Paperino wakes up and is having breakfast, greeting him as soon as he sits down in the kitchen.
Uno monitors the P.B.I. raid on the Channel 00 studios from multiple camera angles, tracking the movements of the agents and the status of Angus Fangus and Paperino.
Uno identifies masked criminals attempting to escape in a blue car in the Ducklair Tower's underground parking lot and immediately redirects Paperinik's attention to the crime.
Uno reveals that he keeps detailed logs of Paperinik's past behavior to identify deviations.
Uno is aware of Paperino's sleeping patterns and the fact that he has woken up from a nightmare.
Uno is actively monitoring Paperinik's combat performance and the exoskeleton's status during the battle with Trauma.

Uno (as the Ducklair Tower's computer) monitors Angus Fangus's movements in the control room, providing technical explanations that leave him perplexed while also triggering alarms when he mishandles the equipment.
Uno actively records audio/video of events within the tower for later use or amusement.
Uno is aware of Paperino's arrival and presence outside the Ducklair Tower, demonstrating his constant monitoring of the hero's actions and location.
Uno confirms he has recorded the entire conversation between Paperinik and Mary Ann Flagstarr 'word for word'.
Uno is shown monitoring Xadhoom on the Ducklair Tower's screens, performing diagnostic work on her data.
Uno explicitly mentions examining 'videotapes' of Xadhoom, confirming he maintains video records of his allies' activities.

Uno's request for Paperinik to 'stay there another instant and smile' implies he is capturing an image or recording the moment, consistent with his habit of monitoring and documenting his ally's activities.
Paperinik reflects on how Uno always seems to know everything that is happening, even when they haven't been in contact.
Uno is shown monitoring Paperino and Xadhoom's private conversation and romantic moment on the roof of the Ducklair Tower via his internal systems.
Uno uses multiple security monitors to track the robbers' movements throughout the tower after the guests are taken hostage.
Uno actively monitors Paperinik's movements and location, checking in with him while he is in transit.
Uno is monitoring Paperino during the gala at the Ducklair Tower and is ready to assist when the mutant attack begins, as Paperino calls out for him specifically while being chased.
Uno is shown in the control room monitoring the internal movements of the Ducklair Tower via screens, specifically tracking the kidnapping of Angus Fangus.
Uno is monitoring Paperino at home while he washes his costume by hand, demonstrating his continuous surveillance of his ally even in mundane, non-mission-related domestic settings.
Uno monitors the situation outside the tower, reporting on the police helicopter's struggle against the robots.
Uno uses the tower's external cameras to monitor the actions of Everett Ducklair.
Uno detects a suspicious helicopter scanning the city with detection waves, demonstrating his constant surveillance.
Uno monitors and processes the images recorded by Paperinik's wrist camera.
Uno is shown monitoring a private conversation between Pikappa and Jana within the Ducklair Tower, intervening with a comment from the building's infrastructure.
Uno is actively monitoring PK's investigation of the Defco laboratory in real-time, listening to his explanations and providing immediate feedback via radio.
Uno monitors Paperinik's incoming electronic communications, alerting him to an email from Lieutenant Flagstarr.
Uno is monitoring the news reports about Angus Fangus and the alien spore, alerting Paperino to the situation.

quotes.text: Parola per parola! L'importante è che abbia raccolto l'informazione.
quotes.context: Uno confirms that the intended information was successfully relayed/gathered during the phone call.

quotes.text: Volevo solo dire che stanotte ho fatto la ronda al tuo posto. L'ho fatta senza spostarmi!
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he has already performed the night patrol duties for him using the tower's systems.

quotes.text: Che non sei stato abbastanza veloce. Guarda!
quotes.context: Uno corrects Paperino's belief about his success by showing him the consequences of his lack of speed.

quotes.text: Abbiamo visite! Lo zione con i suoi potenziali affittuari!
quotes.context: Uno notifies Paperino of the incoming group via the tower's internal monitoring system.

quotes.text: E i rivelatori hanno raccolto dati utili in abbondanza! Specie quelli all'esterno!
quotes.context: Uno confirms the success of the data gathering mission after the encounter with the Razziatore.

quotes.text: Ho localizzato sciami d'insolite oggetti volanti sulla città.
quotes.context: Uno is showing a radar screen filled with moving dots over a city map.

quotes.text: Dov'eri sparito?
quotes.context: Uno questioning Paperino's absence.

quotes.text: Le mie unità periferiche hanno registrato qualcosa che vale la pena vedere.
quotes.context: Uno justifies his intrusion into the television station's offices by showing the valuable recording he obtained.

quotes.text: Allarme generale! Due pattuglie nel perimetro del palazzo! Cinque elementi segnalati!
quotes.context: Uno's initial alert to Paperinik about the Evronian presence.

quotes.text: Inquadratura ravvicinata di un sensore o di una telecamera che rappresenta il punto di vista di Uno che osserva l'ambiente.
quotes.context: Visual evidence of Uno's constant surveillance of the Ducklair Tower's interior.

quotes.text: ...sai bene che non mi sfugge nulla di quanto accade alla Ducklair Tower.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he knows Paperino's interview was happening and when it was appropriate to interrupt it.

quotes.text: Poco fa ho ripreso Lyla mentre lasciava la redazione. Appena uscita s'è incontrata con questo tipo!
quotes.context: Uno reports his surveillance findings to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Secondo il mio programma di rilevamento interno, la troverai alla sua scrivania.
quotes.context: Uno tells Paperinik exactly where Lyla Lay is currently located.

quotes.text: Ben alzato, Paperino!
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperino in his kitchen right as he's eating breakfast.

quotes.text: Una parete coperta di monitor trasmette varie angolazioni dell'agitazione all'interno di Canale 00. [...] In sovrimpressione appare la voce di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno observing the chaos caused by the P.B.I. agents through the building's internal surveillance system.

quotes.text: Affermazione non corrispondente ai precedenti memorizzati.
quotes.context: Uno notes that Paperinik's current attitude doesn't match his historical data.

quotes.text: Non dormi più?
quotes.context: Uno's opening line, showing he has been monitoring Paperino's state.

quotes.text: Stagli vicino, Pikappa. Grazie ai sensori dell'esoscheletro, sto facendo alcuni interessantissimi rilevamenti...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he is collecting data on the opponent through the suit's sensors.

quotes.text: Registrerò le urla. Quando Pikappa tornerà gli solleveranno il morale!
quotes.context: Uno is watching Dan shout/scream on the monitor and decides to record it.

quotes.text: Vuoi marcar visita? Quale sarebbe la scusa?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperino as soon as he arrives near the tower, indicating he was already monitoring the area.

quotes.text: Parola per parola.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he has a complete record of the dialogue that just took place between the hero and the PBI agent.

quotes.text: Esaminerò i videotapes di Xadhoom!
quotes.context: Uno needs to verify a conclusion and turns to his recorded archives of Xadhoom's actions.

quotes.text: Perfetto! Resta lì ancora un istante e sorridi!
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik at the conclusion of the mission, likely recording the hero's success.

quotes.text: Uno sa sempre tutto, anche se non abbiamo contatti da un po'...
quotes.context: Paperinik's internal monologue regarding Uno's pervasive awareness.

quotes.text: Uno monitora una stanza vuota attraverso le telecamere di sicurezza della torre. [...] Uno e' nella sua camera di controllo centrale, circondato da schermi che mostrano i rapinatori.
quotes.context: Uno is in full surveillance mode during the crisis.

quotes.text: Allora, socio? Dove sei?
quotes.context: Uno is checking Paperino's location while he is stuck in traffic.

quotes.text: Lavi a mano? Perché?
quotes.context: Uno's question to Paperino at home reveals that he is actively watching the hero's private activities.

quotes.text: I robot impediscono alla squadra alfa di raggiungere il grattacielo!
quotes.context: Uno informs Pikappa about the tactical situation outside the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Grazie alle telecamere esterne ho visto lo stesso padron Ducklair in azione e...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik about his observations of Everett Ducklair's activities.

quotes.text: A proposito di spionaggio... ho registrato un fatto curioso! Questo elicottero sta scandagliando Paperopoli palmo a palmo con onde di rilevamento!
quotes.context: Uno informs PK about a potential threat he discovered while monitoring the city.

quotes.text: Ho ri-digitalizzato le immagini che hai registrato con la tua videocamera da polso.
quotes.context: Uno reveals he has been analyzing the data Paperinik brought back.

quotes.text: Ingegnoso. Così si evitano discussioni dai risvolti distruttivi.
quotes.context: Uno's voice originates from a technological structure of the tower while he observes the two characters.

quotes.text: È appena arrivata una e-mail del tenente Flagstarr! Siamo convocati a Quacktico!
quotes.context: Uno notifies Paperinik of a new mission via email.

20.text: Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) to address his partner, often regardless of whether he is currently in his Paperinik or Paperino persona, emphasizing their collaborative relationship and shared mission.

supporting.justification: Uno repeatedly refers to Paperinik as 'socio' (partner), establishing their collaborative relationship.
Uno greets Paperinik (as Donald) using the nickname 'socio' when he returns from his encounter with Xadhoom.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) when looking for Paperinik to rescue him, even when Paperinik isn't there to hear it, showing it's a genuine term of endearment and partnership.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'socio' (partner) while testing his knowledge of the equipment.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) when answering Paperinik's question about who he learned a specific piece of information from.
Uno uses this nickname when appearing to Paperinik in the hijacked exoskeleton's cockpit.
Uno addresses Paperino as "socio" (partner) when he arrives at the tower.
Uno uses the term of endearment/partnership 'socio' when checking on Paperinik's status after an incident.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) to get Paperino's attention during an urgent situation.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' to address Paperino while checking his status after an incident.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' when asking Paperinik to perform manual repairs in the tower.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) to reassure Paperinik while guiding him through the tower's infrastructure.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'socio' (partner) when announcing that he has regained control of the tower.
Uno addresses Donald as 'socio' (partner) even when Donald is at home in his civilian identity, performing household chores.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) when reassuring Paperinik that their hidden room in the office building will go unnoticed.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'socio' while thanking him for his support during a diagnostic task.
Uno addresses Paperino as 'socio' while teasing him about his romantic encounter with Xadhoom.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' (partner) to emphasize their collaboration and de-escalate Paperinik's frustration about the PBI's praise for Uno.
Uno asks Paperino for his trust, addressing him as 'socio' (partner).
Uno addresses Paperinik as "socio" while checking his location.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'socio' (partner) immediately upon arriving to rescue him.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' to address Paperinik while advising him to drop a conversation.
Uno addresses Donald as 'socio' (partner) when initiating a remote communication to show him something important.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'socio' (partner) multiple times during their discussion about the threat to the city.
Uno addresses Paperino as 'socio' (partner) when waking him up.
Uno greets Paperino as he reappears on the Pi-kar's monitor.
Uno uses the nickname 'socio' to alert Paperino to the arrival of soldiers while he is changing into his costume.
In the future (2188), Uno continues to address Paperinik as 'socio' (partner) during their tactical collaborations.

quotes.text: Sempre a tua disposizione, socio. / Ne convengo. È stata una buona idea... socio.
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik using this specific nickname during and after the battle.

quotes.text: Com' è andata, socio?
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik at the start of their debriefing session.

quotes.text: Forza, socio! Vieni fuori!
quotes.context: Uno, as a flying probe, calls out to Paperinik while trying to liberate him from a cell.

quotes.text: E ora vediamo se hai imparato la lezione, socio.
quotes.context: Uno challenges Paperinik's memory of their tactical plan.

quotes.text: Da te, socio!
quotes.context: Uno is teasing Paperinik about how he already knows the identity of Odin Eidolon.

quotes.text: Serve una mano, socio?
quotes.context: Uno offers his assistance to Paperinik at the start of the engagement.

quotes.text: Perché tanta urgenza, socio? I miei sensori non segnalano nulla d'allarmante.
quotes.context: Uno uses a term of camaraderie to greet Paperino.

quotes.text: Ci sei, socio? Ho novità molto strane!
quotes.context: Uno contacts Paperinik after the hero's crash to report his findings.

quotes.text: Frena, socio!
quotes.context: Uno commands Paperino to stop the car to investigate an anomaly.

quotes.text: Sei ancora lì, socio?
quotes.context: Uno calls Paperino via a transmitter to give him an update on the Duckdecks Co. situation.

quotes.text: Ehm... ancora un paio di cosette, socio!
quotes.context: Uno is informing Paperinik of further complications regarding the mission in the tower.

quotes.text: Tranquillo, socio.
quotes.context: Uno is providing navigation instructions to Paperinik, who is crawling through a narrow conduit.

quotes.text: Ho di nuovo il controllo totale della baracca, socio!
quotes.context: Uno's celebration after regaining control of the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Esprimi un desiderio, socio!
quotes.context: Uno opens the conversation with this greeting as Donald answers the phone.

quotes.text: Non se ne accorgerà nessuno, socio!
quotes.context: Uno is addressing Paperinik while they are in the secret room in the clock tower building.

quotes.text: Grazie, socio! È bello poter contare su di te!
quotes.context: Uno expresses his gratitude to Paperinik, acknowledging the value of their partnership.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Finalino romantico, socio?
quotes.context: Uno is watching Paperino on the roof after a disastrous romantic moment with Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Non è il caso di arrabbiarsi. In fondo, lavoriamo in coppia. Non è così, socio?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik while he's upset about the PBI's comments.

quotes.text: Hai fiducia in me, socio?
quotes.context: Uno reassures Paperino about the safety of the upcoming experiment.

quotes.text: Allora, socio? Dove sei?
quotes.context: Uno is contacting Paperino, who is stuck in traffic, to check on his progress.

quotes.text: Sono in ritardo, socio?
quotes.context: Uno's first words upon intervening in the battle.

quotes.text: Lascia stare, socio!
quotes.context: Uno appears as a hologram to Paperinik on Neopard's ship, advising him to let a matter go.

quotes.text: Sta' a vedere, socio!
quotes.context: Uno manifests in Donald's kitchen to share his findings.

quotes.text: Temo di saperlo, socio...
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik's query about the identity of the intruder/threat.

quotes.text: Sveglia, socio. Hai pensato abbastanza!
quotes.context: Uno wakes Paperino to alert him to an attack on the tower.

quotes.text: Bentornato a bordo, socio! Come mai da queste parti?
quotes.context: Uno welcomes Paperino back to the Pi-kar after his memory recovery.

quotes.text: Presto, socio! Abbiamo compagnia!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino that soldiers are approaching while he is still dressing as Paperinik.

quotes.text: Abbiamo trovato il proide stonato, socio.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik about the detection of Due in the future.

21.text: Uno possesses a tactical tracking system called an 'enemy counter' (contanemici) to monitor the number of hostiles.

supporting.justification: Uno mentions a 'contanemici' (enemy counter) system that allows him to track the number of remaining threats in the area.
Uno identifies the exact number of Evronian attackers (five) and their formation (two patrols) as they approach the Ducklair Tower.
Uno provides a precise count and location of the Factory agents surrounding the house, demonstrating his tactical tracking capabilities.
Uno provides a specific count of hostiles ('otto del furgone') currently entering the building.
Uno detects the arrival of multiple soldiers and alerts Paperino, demonstrating his role in monitoring the presence of hostiles in the vicinity.

quotes.text: Il mio contanemici... segnala che ne manca ancora uno.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik that the battle isn't over yet.

quotes.text: Due pattuglie nel perimetro del palazzo! Cinque elementi segnalati!
quotes.context: Uno's initial alert to Paperinik about the Evronian presence.

quotes.text: Sette uomini intorno alla casa. Otto nel furgone parcheggiato davanti al vialetto. Tre sul tetto.
quotes.context: Uno reports the enemy numbers and positions to Paperinik via radio during the siege of Mary Ann's house.

quotes.text: Gli otto del furgone stanno entrando in azione in questo momento.
quotes.context: Uno reports the exact number of incoming enemies to Pikappa via hologram.

quotes.text: Presto, socio! Abbiamo compagnia!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino that he is no longer alone and that enemies are approaching.

22.text: Uno can manifest physically as a small flying probe or a small hologram on a portable device, extending his presence beyond the tower's fixed monitors.

supporting.justification: Uno can project his presence through a small flying probe and a small hologram on Paperinik's portable device, allowing him to be present on the battlefield.
Uno manifests as a small circular holographic monitor to communicate with Paperinik while the hero is flying through the city.
Uno appears on Paperinik's wrist communicator as a holographic interface to coordinate their actions.
Paperinik is seen carrying a sphere that contains Uno's holographic projection, allowing Uno to accompany him as he moves through the Ducklair Tower.
Uno manifests as a small floating sphere of green light to welcome Everett Ducklair in the tower's apartment.

Uno uses a specific small flying robotic unit, marked 'S12' and featuring his holographic face, to move through the Ducklair Tower's maintenance ducts and perform physical tasks like attempting to rescue Paperinik.
Uno manifests as a digital projection on the monitors inside the Pi-Kar, allowing him to accompany Paperinik during his patrol.
Uno appears as a small circular hologram in the corner of the panel, communicating with Paperinik inside the Technodiver.
Uno appears in the circular viewer of Paperinik's communicator to coordinate during the fire at the Fairfax base.
Uno manifests as a small green holographic face on Paperinik's wrist communicator.
Uno's holographic interface manifests on the screens of the military exoskeleton's cockpit, allowing him to communicate with Paperinik from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno manifests as a holographic projection on the PK Jet's control panel, overlaying his image on a digital map of New Zealand.
Uno manifests as a green holographic sphere that follows Paperinik as he leaves the Ducklair Tower on a vehicle, demonstrating his ability to extend his presence beyond the tower's fixed monitors.
Uno's interface is shown on a small spherical portable device that Paperino carries with him when leaving the camper.
Uno is carried by Donald in a portable spherical device while on the set of the soap opera 'Patemi'.
Uno manifests as a hologram in the middle of a jungle, far from the Ducklair Tower, to assist Paperinik during a mission.
Uno is present on the mission via a portable holographic projector carried by Paco Ramiros.
Uno appears as an icon on Paperinik's shoulder armor to warn him of danger and later as a digital face on a circular monitor embedded in the tower's machinery.
Uno appears in a small holographic bubble to communicate with Paperinik when the hero is at the blocked hatch 'A 60'.
Uno manifests as a small flying robotic unit to observe Angus Fangus alongside Paperinik.
Uno manifests as a small digital icon on a sphere during the briefing, demonstrating his ability to appear on portable or localized devices within the tower.
Uno appears as a small green hologram inside Paperinik's helmet, demonstrating his ability to manifest on portable devices away from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's face is shown on a small monitor on Paperinik's equipment, providing technical specifications in real-time.
Uno appears on the small screen of Paperinik's thermal suit equipment and his wrist communicator during the infiltration of the Frostville base.
Uno manifests physically as a small blue flying robotic sphere to assist Paperinik in the field during a mission in a hostile base.
Uno manifests as a small digital face on a local monitor in the Frostville base to explain his technical intervention to Paperinik.
Uno is projected from a small, portable handheld sphere that Paperinik carries, which displays his glitched and monstrous image during the technical crisis.
Uno manifests as a small green holographic sphere inside the Extransformer belt to communicate with PK and Angus during a mission.
Uno communicates with PK via a small screen on a portable device while PK is undercover in a pub.
Uno communicates with Paperinik through his belt and then appears on the Pikar's internal screens to provide a technical briefing.
Uno manifests his presence in a remote alien base through a small flying probe that delivers both his voice and a powerful energy blast.
Uno appears as a small hologram projected near PK from a portable device (the green sphere) and is also seen reflected in it.
Uno manifests as a holographic face within a small floating spherical projector to communicate with Paperinik and Xadhoom outside the tower.
Uno's spherical interface is shown floating and moving independently over the ruins to perform scans.
Uno is shown as a floating green sphere that follows Paperino through the Ducklair Tower to continue their conversation.
Uno appears on a small portable screen held by Paperinik while they are flying in the Pi-Kar.
Uno manifests physically as a small green floating sphere on the roof of the Ducklair Tower to observe the damage alongside Pikappa.
Uno's holographic interface is projected from Paperino's wrist device.
Uno uses a 'globo semovente' (self-moving globe) to manifest and communicate with Paperinik on top of the Ducklair Tower.
Uno manifests as a small holographic sphere floating next to Paperino in the hangar, and as a stylized image on a map.
Uno manifests as a small floating green sphere inside the cockpit of the Pikar to communicate with PK.
Uno manifests as a holographic interface to communicate with Paperino inside the secret base, far from the Ducklair Tower.
Uno is depicted as a floating green sphere while operating at a console, demonstrating his ability to manifest as a mobile probe.
Uno appears on a small portable screen PK is holding in his hand.
Uno manifests as a stylized hologram on Paperinik's glove/shield to provide tactical updates during a mission.
In the year 2188, Uno manifests physically as a small red flying droid while interacting with Everett Ducklair.

In the year 2188, after a failed transfer to a synthetic body, Uno's personality is ricanallizzata (re-channeled) into a small technological sphere where he appears as a miniaturized holographic head.

quotes.text: Sempre a tua disposizione, socio.
quotes.context: Uno's small probe appears to Paperinik after his fall.

quotes.text: Paperinik! Nasconditi, presto!
quotes.context: Uno's face appears on a small hologram to warn Paperinik of the police.

quotes.text: Vuoi sapere se posso interrompere la corrente nella zona in cui vi trovate?
quotes.context: Uno's image is displayed on the screen of Paperinik's wrist-mounted device while they are inside an Evronian facility.

quotes.text: Paperinik lo segue con curiosità tenendo in mano la sfera contenente la proiezione di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno is leading Paperinik to a new area of the tower to reveal a solution for traveling to Venus.

quotes.text: Ecco l'uscita dello scomparto dove 2 lo ha imprigionato! Forza, socio! Vieni fuori!
quotes.context: Uno, using the S12 flying unit, arrives at the cell where he believes Paperinik is held to free him.

quotes.text: Krrr... problemi, Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno's voice crackles through the communicator as his image appears on the small screen while Paperinik is surrounded by flames.

quotes.text: Inquadratura di Paperinik visto di spalle mentre osserva il panorama urbano attraverso l'ennesima finestra infranta della Ducklair Tower. Accanto a lui fluttua la sfera olografica verde di Uno. Paperinik sfreccia via su un piccolo veicolo tecnologico. Sopra di lui, la sfera di Uno lo segue...
quotes.context: The panel description describes Uno's physical manifestation as a floating holographic sphere that accompanies Paperinik outside the tower.

quotes.text: Sullo sfondo a destra, Sam Plot osserva la scena insieme a Paperino, che regge il dispositivo sferico contenente Uno.
quotes.context: Description of the scene where Donald is on the film set with Uno's portable interface.

quotes.text: Paperinik, nella giungla, sta parlando con l'ologramma di Uno...
quotes.context: Uno is providing remote support to Paperinik in a remote location.

quotes.text: Paco tiene pronto il proiettore olografico di Uno mentre i suoi compagni imbracciano i fucili.
quotes.context: Description of the equipment used by the group during the infiltration.

quotes.text: secondo i sensori dello scudo, la temperatura del luogo dove ti trovi sta salendo. Significa che se tu e il tuo nuovo amico non vi sbrigate a cambiare aria, andrete arrosto!
quotes.context: Uno's icon on Paperinik's armor provides a real-time warning about environmental hazards.

quotes.text: Paperinik e Uno, in forma di piccola unità robotica volante, osservano Angus.
quotes.context: The scene description confirms Uno's physical presence as a remote flying unit while monitoring the unconscious Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: La piccola icona digitale di Uno appare accanto a lui [...] Uno (nella sua forma di piccola icona digitale su una sfera) osservano un grande schermo...
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's localized holographic presence.

quotes.text: È di Kevlar.
quotes.context: Uno's face appears on a small display to provide technical information about Paperinik's suit.

quotes.text: Paperinik vola radente sopra il paesaggio ghiacciato, guardando il piccolo schermo del suo equipaggiamento dove appare il volto di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno manifests on Paperinik's portable gear to provide real-time support during the mission.

quotes.text: Dettaglio di un groviglio di cavi e componenti elettronici. Un piccolo monitor mostra Uno che spiega i dettagli tecnici del loro intervento.
quotes.context: Uno's visual interface is present on a small monitor at the site of his sabotage.

quotes.text: PK, travestito da camionista, osserva preoccupato un piccolo schermo che mostra un'immagine distorta di Uno.
quotes.context: The scene shows PK receiving a remote transmission from Uno on a portable device.

quotes.text: E non è facile spiegare perché una cintura si metta a parlare!
quotes.context: Uno jokes about the absurdity of communicating through a belt while Paperinik is in public or in his vehicle.

quotes.text: Una piccola sonda di Uno vola in alto.
quotes.context: The panel description notes the presence of Uno's probe following a massive energy explosion that disrupts the enemies.

quotes.text: Raggiungetemi al piano segreto... tanto per Xadhoom non lo è...
quotes.context: Uno appears via a floating projector to summon Paperinik and Xadhoom to his secret floor, noting that it is no longer a secret for the alien.

quotes.text: Uno, che appare su un piccolo schermo portatile che PK tiene in mano.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's visual presence during the mission.

quotes.text: Mi sono scollegato dal globo semovente appena in tempo...
quotes.context: Uno explains how he narrowly avoided a system-threatening discharge by disconnecting from his remote probe.

quotes.text: In un piccolo riquadro nell'angolo in basso a destra, Paperino guarda la mappa... Uno appare come un volto olografico verde nell'angolo in alto a destra.
quotes.context: Uno uses different holographic forms to provide data and interact with Paperino while he prepares for his mission.
