quotes.text: Uno appare su uno schermo portatile che PK tiene in mano.
quotes.context: Panel description from the scene.

quotes.text: Everett osserva una piccola sfera tecnologica in cui la personalità di Uno è stata ricanalizzata. Uno appare come una testa olografica rimpicciolita all'interno del dispositivo.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's containment after the failed experiment in the future.

23.text: Uno acts as a grounding force for Paperinik, frequently using insults or sarcastic reminders of his mortality to deflate his ego when he becomes overconfident.

supporting.justification: Uno calls Paperinik a "sbruffone" (braggart) and mocks his confidence after a successful maneuver, reminding him that he only survived because he didn't mess up.
Uno acts as a reality check for Paperino, debunking his claim of a successful escape by showing him clear photographic evidence of his failure on the news.
Uno immediately tempers Paperinik's impulsive desire to 'go' to Venus by forcing him to confront the mathematical reality of the distance and the lack of transport.
Uno calls Paperino "Brontolone" (Grumpy) when he complains about the moving walls, illustrating his habit of using teasing or insulting nicknames.
Uno uses a sarcastic comment about Paperinik's egocentrism to bring him back to reality when the hero is making dramatic assumptions about the situation.
Uno teases Paperinik by pretending to abandon him in the middle of a digital battle, before returning to help.
Uno acts as a grounding force by interrupting Paperinik's excitement about his adventures and immediately redirecting his energy toward a crime in progress in the Ducklair Tower's parking lot.
Uno uses a sarcastic compliment about being 'photogenic' to mock Paperino's vanity as he proudly displays photos of his exploits.
Uno shuts down Paperinik's enthusiasm for his own gadgets, prioritizing the mission over the hero's vanity.
Uno acts as a voice of reason, advising Paperinik to let a matter go ('Lascia stare') rather than react with indignation or curiosity to Neopard's shocking behavior.
Uno watches PK's heroic fantasies with skepticism and then asks if he guessed correctly when the device is revealed to be a mundane price list, deflating PK's over-enthusiasm.
Uno uses a sarcastic remark about Pikappa's "chivalry" to maintain his usual teasing and grounding rapport with the hero even during a dangerous situation.
Uno's remark that the drone will flag Paperinik as 'insignificant' is a classic example of his grounding and sarcastic humor.
Uno uses a blunt remark about Paperinik's ignorance to ground him while providing technical help.

quotes.text: "sbruffone!"
quotes.context: Uno's final word in his critique of Paperinik's flight module operation.

quotes.text: Che non sei stato abbastanza veloce. Guarda!
quotes.context: Uno bluntly corrects Paperino's overconfidence regarding his stealth.

quotes.text: Andare?! Venere è a più di centocinquanta milioni di chilometri dalla terra! Dico, hai idea di quanti siano centocinquanta milioni di chilometri?
quotes.context: Uno reacts with disbelief to Paperinik's readiness to rush into a mission without considering the scale of space travel.

quotes.text: Brontolone! [...] Neanche t'avessi chiesto d'aiutarmi a spostare l'arredamento.
quotes.context: Uno teases Paperino after the tower's "remodeling" almost causes him an accident.

quotes.text: Detesto ferire il tuo egocentrismo, ma non sarà così!
quotes.context: Uno corrects Paperinik's dramatic interpretation of events with a witty and slightly insulting remark.

quotes.text: Se ci ripensi sai dove trovarmi. Ci vediamo, PK!
quotes.context: Uno's avatar starts to fade away, leaving PK alone against digital soldiers.

quotes.text: Ohi... Ma temo che dovrai aspettare!
quotes.context: Uno interrupts Paperinik's enthusiastic arrival to point him to a crime in progress.

quotes.text: Merito del modello, immagino. Padron Ducklair è... così fotogenico! Ah! Ah!
quotes.context: Uno deflates Paperino's pride as he shows off action photos of Paperinik.

quotes.text: Parleremo dopo delle tue diavolerie.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's pride in his equipment by telling him to slow down and focus on the task at hand.

quotes.text: Lascia stare, socio!
quotes.context: Uno intervenes as a grounding influence when Paperinik is shocked by Neopard's whispering.

quotes.text: Ho indovinato?
quotes.context: Uno asks this after a device PK hoped was a heroic gadget turns out to be a mercenary's price catalog.

quotes.text: Ma dov' è finita la tua proverbiale cavalleria?
quotes.context: Uno mocks Pikappa's heroic persona as they make their getaway.

quotes.text: Fatti annusare dal caporicognitore, prima... ti segnalerà come insignificante.
quotes.context: Uno is directing Paperinik to be scanned by a security drone while teasing him about his lack of importance.

quotes.text: Non sai un sacco di cose.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's confusion during a flight test.

24.text: Uno uses mock-ironic nicknames related to Paperinik's costume, such as 'vecchio mantello' (old cape) or 'vecchio mantello tarlato' (old moth-eaten cape), to address him.

supporting.justification: Uno addresses Paperinik as 'vecchio mantello tarlato' (old moth-eaten cape) in a mock-ironic, affectionate way.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'vecchio mantello' through a distorted holographic communication.
Uno addresses Paperinik using the nickname 'vecchio mantello' (old cape) while teasing him about the information he has uncovered.
Uno uses the nickname 'vecchio mantello' while informing Paperino that his equipment is ready.
Uno uses the nickname 'vecchio mantello' to refer to Paperinik while reflecting on his own speech patterns.
Uno uses the nickname 'vecchio mantello' (old cloak) to address Paperinik.
Uno uses the nickname 'vecchio mantello' (old cloak) to address Paperinik while providing him with urgent updates.

quotes.text: Su col morale, vecchio mantello tarlato!
quotes.context: Uno's playful address to Paperinik while trying to cheer him up.

quotes.text: ...mi... bzzz... ricevi, vecchio mantello?
quotes.context: Uno is trying to establish contact with Paperinik while the latter is inside an Evronian cruiser.

quotes.text: E forse anche qualcosa di più, vecchio mantello.
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperinik through a remote link, hinting that he has found more than just basic news.

quotes.text: Già fatto, vecchio mantello!
quotes.context: Uno uses this nickname in a moment of urgent operational communication.

quotes.text: Ehi! Adesso mi metto pure a parlare come il vecchio mantello...
quotes.context: Uno catches himself mimicking PK's style.

quotes.text: Non ti preoccupare troppo, vecchio mantello...
quotes.context: Uno reassuring Paperinik during their briefing in the cell.

quotes.text: "Temo che ci siano parecchie novità, vecchio mantello..."
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik with his characteristic nickname before showing him the surveillance feed.

25.text: Uno actively follows human television programs, including long-running soap operas like 'Cuori di silicio' and 'Patemi', displaying strong emotional investment and using 'anthropological interest' as a logical defense when teased.

supporting.justification: Uno displays a human-like interest in television, specifically mentioning a soap opera called 'Cuori di silicio' (Silicon Hearts) and showing frustration when Paperinik tries to turn the TV off.
Uno is shown actively scrolling through channels on a wall of monitors, observing current events and media.
Uno actively suggests TV programs to Paperino, including a specific movie ("Odissea nell'Artico") and a news channel.
Uno is seen watching and commenting on a television program alongside Paperino, demonstrating his active consumption of human media.
Uno is a fan of the soap opera 'Patemi', although he claims his interest is 'purely anthropological' to avoid embarrassment.
Uno is shown focused on a monitor playing the soap opera 'Patemi', shushing Paperino to avoid missing the start of the episode.
Uno references the soap opera 'Patemi' as a mass phenomenon to explain the hospitality Paperino is receiving.
Uno's presence on the filming set of the soap opera 'Patemi' confirms his active interest in the show, which he follows for 'anthropological' reasons.
Uno is so eager to watch the news that he shushes Paperinik when the broadcast begins.
Uno is shown monitoring Angus Fangus's television reports and discussing their content with Paperino.
Uno and Donald are seen watching a TV program featuring the magician Ahrimadz. Uno expresses disappointment when the transmission ends with interference.

quotes.text: Voglio vedere la seicentonovantaduesima puntata di "Cuori di silicio"!
quotes.context: Uno's protest when Paperinik tries to turn off the monitor.

quotes.text: Fangus ha messo a segno un bel colpo.
quotes.context: Uno is watching the news broadcast by Angus Fangus on one of his many screens.

quotes.text: Sul canale 36 trasmettono un film rinfrescante... "Odissea nell'Artico".
quotes.context: Uno demonstrates his ongoing monitoring of television broadcasts.

quotes.text: Humor biologico. Niente di più squallido.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to the TV program and Paperino's rant.

quotes.text: Ebbene, non ho difficoltà ad ammettere di provare un interesse puramente... antropologico per 'Patemi'.
quotes.context: Uno defends his choice of TV program after being caught watching it by Paperinik.

quotes.text: Ssst! Ricomincia!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction when the soap opera 'Patemi' resumes on the screen he is monitoring.

quotes.text: Perché siete ospiti di riguardo. Anche da queste parti, 'Patemi' è un fenomeno di massa.
quotes.context: Uno explains why the production crew is being treated well in a remote area.

quotes.text: Sullo sfondo a destra, Sam Plot osserva la scena insieme a Paperino, che regge il dispositivo sferico contenente Uno.
quotes.context: Uno is physically present on the set of his favorite soap opera.

quotes.text: Ssst! Comincia il notiziario!
quotes.context: Uno demands silence from Paperinik as 'Channel 00 News' starts on the tower's screen.

quotes.text: Prima dimmi perché Pikappa non è comparso nel servizio di Angus.
quotes.context: Uno is discussing a specific TV segment he watched, showing his continued interest in human media.

quotes.text: Che tragedia! Chissà che ti sei perso...
quotes.context: Uno sarcastically laments the end of the broadcast they were watching together.

26.text: Uno can monitor and process television and other broadcast signals in 'low frequency' (bassa frequenza).

supporting.justification: Uno can monitor television and other signals in 'low frequency' (bassa frequenza), allowing him to see information before it is broadcast or processed for the general public.
Uno displays a live news broadcast from Channel 00 to Paperino to provide information about the public perception of Paperinik's actions.
Uno is shown monitoring the Channel 00 television broadcast from his station inside Ducklair Tower.
Uno is shown actively monitoring and switching between multiple news channels on a wall of monitors.
Uno is shown monitoring multiple television screens simultaneously within the Ducklair Tower, keeping track of news broadcasts and various programs.
Uno is aware of the 'shocking news' (regarding Scrooge's oil rig disaster) that was just broadcast on TV, which he uses to entice Paperino to come to the tower.
Uno displays a variety of news broadcasts, interviews (Angus Fangus), and military footage on multiple screens for Paperino to see.
Uno monitors news broadcasts while Paperino is occupied, providing real-time intelligence on terrestrial events related to the alien threat.
Uno is monitoring a television interview with Fenimore Cook and news reports about Nebula Faraday.
Uno is seen watching and reacting to a television news broadcast alongside Paperino, demonstrating his ability to monitor and process TV signals.
Uno's monitor appears in the Channel 00 newsroom context, showing he monitors their activities or internal broadcasts.
Uno monitors television broadcasts in the Ducklair Tower, specifically watching Angus Fangus's news reports.
Uno is monitoring a television-like broadcast featuring Ahrimadz and Angus Fangus and sharing it/discussing it with Paperino.

quotes.text: Comincia adesso. Mettiti comodo, io l'ho già visto in bassa frequenza.
quotes.context: Uno's explanation of how he's already seen the news report.

quotes.text: Uno mostra a Paperino un monitor che sta trasmettendo l'inizio del notiziario di Canale Doppio Zero.
quotes.context: Uno uses the tower's monitors to show Paperino the news report by Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: Fangus ha messo a segno un bel colpo.
quotes.context: Uno comments on the news broadcast he is watching.

quotes.text: Il menu prevede latte, caffè, marmellata, succo d'arancia e notizie sconvolgenti!
quotes.context: Uno refers to the news Paperino just saw on TV.

quotes.text: Questa mattina, mentre ti sollazzavi con la fantascienza, il TG dava notizia di una mobilitazione dell'esercito nel deserto!
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperino about military movements he observed on the news while Paperino was distracted.

quotes.text: Paperino si ferma davanti a un grande schermo che trasmette un'intervista a Fenimore Cook. [...] Un piccolo riquadro mostra Nebula Faraday...
quotes.context: The narrative describes the information being displayed on the tower's monitors.

quotes.text: Humor biologico. Niente di più squallido.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to the news program.

quotes.text: E voi volate!
quotes.context: Uno responds to a journalist's comment in the newsroom.

27.text: Uno can produce realistic simulations of human expressions and smiles through his holographic interface.

supporting.justification: Uno mentions he could 'produce a simulation' of a smile for Paperinik, suggesting he can manipulate his own holographic representation or create realistic simulations of human expressions.
Uno's digital interface can express a sly or cunning smile ("sorriso sornione") while interacting with Paperinik.
Uno's holographic interface shows a complicit smile and an air of sufficiency while interacting with Paperino.
Uno is shown smiling broadly in his holographic interface while celebrating with Paperinik.

Uno's holographic interface is described as being 'visibly sorry' (dispiaciuto) and then 'smiling cordially' (sorride cordialmente), demonstrating his ability to accurately simulate human emotions through his visual interface.
Uno's holographic face displays an "extremely serious and worried" expression upon analyzing the threat posed by the Evronian spore.
Uno's spherical grid form in cyberspace is capable of displaying human-like expressions, such as a 'sly smile' (sorriso furbesco) and 'satisfaction' when his plans succeed.
Uno displays a "serene and almost amused" expression through his holographic interface while discussing his digital relationship with Lucille.
Uno's holographic interface is described as having a 'smiling' face, simulating a human expression.
Uno's holographic face clearly displays human emotions such as concern and being pensive.

Uno's holographic face is shown with a wide range of human-like expressions: 'divertita' (amused), 'aria di sfida' (challenging), 'ironicamente interrogativa' (ironically questioning), and 'ride apertamente' (laughing openly).
Uno's holographic interface shows a range of expressions, from smiling while teasing Paperinik to a serious and worried look upon discovering the real threat.
Uno uses a stern facial expression on a monitor to convey his disapproval of Paperinik's tactical choices.
Uno displays a smiling face on a monitor to express his relief and success.

quotes.text: Dai! Mi fai un sorriso, o devo produrre una simulazione?
quotes.context: Uno's playful attempt to make Paperinik smile.

quotes.text: Un dettaglio dello schermo radar con Uno che osserva Paperino con aria di sufficienza.
quotes.context: Uno is watching Paperino's reaction to his surveillance data.

quotes.text: Primo piano dell'ologramma verde di Uno che sorride.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Uno's expression during the toast.

quotes.text: Primo piano dello schermo di Uno, che appare visibilmente dispiaciuto, mentre Paperinik lo guarda con un sorriso comprensivo. Primo piano di Uno sullo schermo, che sorride cordialmente.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's emotional reactions during his conversation with Paperinik at the end of the crisis.

quotes.text: Uno ha un'espressione estremamente seria e preoccupata.
quotes.context: Uno manifests on a monitor to warn Paperino about the danger of the object he is holding.

quotes.text: Primo piano di Uno in basso a destra, che sorride con aria furbesca mentre osserva l'osso digitale. Uno... osserva con soddisfazione la riuscita del suo diversivo.
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's emotional reactions while using a decoy against digital defenses.

quotes.text: In effetti... lei pensa che io sia di carne, ossa e piume!
quotes.context: Uno's visual response to Paperinik's surprise about his digital friendship.

quotes.text: un volto stilizzato e sorridente.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's holographic appearance.

quotes.text: Sembra pensieroso e preoccupato. [...] con un'espressione preoccupata.
quotes.context: Uno's interface is capable of communicating emotional states via facial expressions.

quotes.text: (Visual description of his face)
quotes.context: Uno's face is depicted in multiple panels reflecting his emotional reactions to the robbers' confusion.

quotes.text: Uno appare sorridente sullo schermo mentre Paperinik continua a lamentarsi in primo piano. ... Primo piano dell'avatar verde di Uno, che ha un'espressione seria e preoccupata.
quotes.context: The scene description highlights Uno's emotional range through his digital avatar.

quotes.text: Sul monitor davanti a lui compare il volto sorridente di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction after the threat is neutralized.

28.text: Uno can remotely interface with external surveillance networks, technical security systems, and urban infrastructure, including satellites, police, bank, and subway cameras, as well as traffic light control units and private alarm systems, to monitor events across Duckburg.

supporting.justification: Uno can interface with various external surveillance networks, including banks, police, and subways, to monitor the city from the tower.
Uno monitors the status of the 'Scatolette & Co.' alarm system remotely, noting a technical anomaly where the signal is active but hasn't triggered.
Uno accesses and reviews footage from a camera located outside a building called 'Scatoletta & Co.' to track the Razziatore.
Uno easily remotely interfaces with the security computer of the Paperopoli Experimental Laboratories, describing it as "rudimentary".
Uno informs Paperinik that he's being hunted by police helicopters after his flight from the lab, showing he can monitor external police communications and movements.
Uno confirms he was remotely monitoring the fight between Paperinik and the 'time thief'.
Uno uses a satellite to detect energy anomalies in the city, showing his access to orbital surveillance.
Uno monitored an Evronian drone and a power plant over several nights to track enemy movements.
Uno offers to hack into the electric company's computer to cut the power for Paperinik and Xadhoom.
Uno reveals he has access to Angus Fangus's personal file, from which he learned the date of his birthday.
Uno (or his likeness) manifests across multiple screens and systems at a public computer fair, demonstrating the ability to remotely interface with external networks on a large scale.
Uno can remotely intercept and display video feeds from external sources like television networks (Canale 00).
Uno explicitly states that his external sensors constantly monitor the entire area around the Ducklair Tower.
Uno demonstrates his ability to bypass external data connections to access government information.
Uno is able to hack into Morgan Fairfax's private archives at a department facility once Paperinik provides the physical connection.
Uno attempts to remotely access the computer systems of a mysterious military department.
Uno demonstrates his ability to breach secure military computer systems remotely to gather intelligence for Paperinik.
Uno demonstrates his ability to interface with global satellite networks to scan the planet and instructs Paperino to hack into hospital electronic archives to track the infection.
Uno remotely accesses the mainframe of a financial institution to investigate a crime.
Uno is shown monitoring the crisis at Duckdecks Corporation as alarms go off, indicating he is interfaced with the building's or the city's security systems.
Uno is able to detect and report the total destruction of the Duckdecks Co. computer network in real-time.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's concerns about factory alarms by telling him it's not necessary, implying he has already bypassed or monitored the security systems.
Uno remotely accesses the Highclean company database to verify the identity of the individual claiming to be Dexter Brundle.
Uno expresses total confidence in his ability to monitor the city and detect the target's movements.
Uno monitors global internet traffic to detect distress calls that might require Paperinik's intervention.
Uno confirms he has the capability to contact the police externally to report the robbery on the tower's terrace.
Uno informs Paperinik and Gorthan that he has already infiltrated the systems of Animated Industries to gather intelligence on Mekkano and Engineer Takeda.
Uno is shown eavesdropping on a private telephone conversation between Angus Fangus and his mother from within the Ducklair Tower.
Uno hacks into the Evronian cruiser Centurian's internal systems, projecting his image and causing a technical failure or friendly fire.
Uno has technical knowledge and potentially access to the computer system that regulates the city's traffic lights, allowing him to understand why there is a traffic jam.
Uno confirms he uses satellites to maintain constant surveillance of Paperinik, even when the hero is in remote or alien environments.
Uno establishes a secure terminal connection with General Wisecube via a server (ED1) and proxy to communicate.
Uno accesses the internal surveillance cameras of Department 51 to show Paperinik what is happening with the Flagstarrs and General Westcock.
Uno detects Evronian activity at a specific city intersection (3rd and Gooseway) while Paperinik is elsewhere, demonstrating his constant remote surveillance.
Uno monitors Evronian activity by connecting to the entire city's surveillance camera network.
Uno is shown monitoring police radio frequencies and bank alarm systems in real-time, allowing him to inform Paperinik of a robbery at the Countybank.
Uno is shown monitoring the status of the city's traffic light control units (centraline dei semafori) and detects that they have been tampered with.
Uno monitors city-wide emergency services (pronto intervento) to track gas leaks and analyze patterns in real-time.
Uno explains that he has just managed to get the images on his surveillance screens, demonstrating his ability to monitor external threats.
Uno accesses airport security camera recordings to track the movement of individuals of interest.

quotes.text: Mi è bastato interfacciarmi con le telecamere di sorveglianza di banche, polizia, metropolitana...
quotes.context: Uno explains how he performed the city patrol without leaving the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Strano... il segnale d'allarme è attivo ma non è scattato!
quotes.context: Uno's voice communicates this technical detail to Paperinik as he enters the warehouse.

quotes.text: È stata una fortuna che anche all'esterno della Scatoletta & Co. ci fosse una telecamera.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he obtained the footage of the Razziatore exiting the building.

quotes.text: Senza fatica. Il computer che li coordina è a dir poco rudimentale.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he has successfully bypassed the laboratory's security systems with ease.

quotes.text: Dico che dopo la tua fuga aerea dal laboratorio, la polizia ti bracca con gli elicotteri. Meno male che le vetrate della Ducklair Tower sono a specchio.
quotes.context: Uno explains the current tactical situation to Paperinik while they are inside the tower.

quotes.text: Subito. Ero già interfacciato per seguire il tuo scontro con il ladro del tempo!
quotes.context: Uno responding to Paperinik's arrival.

quotes.text: Usando il satellite ho rilevato due potenti sorgenti anomale d'energia nell'area cittadina.
quotes.context: Uno explains his detection method for the energy anomalies to Paperinik.

quotes.text: È appena rientrato alla centrale elettrica che ho monitorato ieri notte!
quotes.context: Uno's report on his monitoring activities.

quotes.text: Mi collego al computer dell'azienda elettrica e...
quotes.context: Uno explains how he will assist Paperinik by disabling the power in their current location.

quotes.text: Ho saputo per puro caso del suo anniversario dal suo file personale.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he obtained personal information about Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: Collegamento con il loro sistema video attivato.
quotes.context: Uno activates the link to a video recording being examined at Canale 00, allowing Paperino to see it too.

quotes.text: I miei rilevatori esterni sorvegliano costantemente l'intera area attorno alla Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno explains how he was able to record Lyla's movements.

quotes.text: Ho già provveduto a bypassare il collegamento...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he has already handled the technical barriers to the Department of Environment data.

quotes.text: Non ci vorrà molto per inserirmi nell'archivio privato di Fairfax... e tra pochi minuti sapremo tutto quello che c'è da sapere sulle attività del dipartimento!
quotes.context: Uno is about to start the hacking process after Paperinik connects the communicator to the terminal.

quotes.text: Provo a dare un occhio nei loro computer!
quotes.context: Uno explains his plan to infiltrate the army's digital infrastructure.

quotes.text: Nei loro computer ho trovato una notiziuncola che potrebbe fare al caso nostro...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he has accessed the military base's computers to find a specific piece of information.

quotes.text: Con le fotografie satellitari posso scandagliare ogni centimetro del pianeta alla ricerca dei nostri extraterrestri preferiti! [...] Collegati agli archivi elettronici degli ospedali.
quotes.context: Uno explains his plan to use high-tech surveillance and database access to find the Evronian spores.

quotes.text: Mi sono collegato con gli elaboratori della Paperopolitan Technofinancial, per vedere cos'ha combinato il tuo avversario invisibile.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he gathered information about the enemy's actions at the tower where the explosion occurred.

quotes.text: Ti comunico che la rete computerizzata della Duckdecks Co. è appena andata in fumo!
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperino about the status of the building's digital infrastructure.

quotes.text: Non occorre.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik who was worried about the factory's alarm systems.

quotes.text: Il modo più semplice per saperlo è collegarsi al database della Highclean...
quotes.context: Uno explains his method for investigating the suspicious window cleaner.

quotes.text: ...se il nostro amico metterà il becco fuori dalla sua tana, non passerà inosservato!
quotes.context: Uno assures Paperinik that his surveillance systems will catch Urk if he appears in public.

quotes.text: Ho recuperato un disperato appello via internet...
quotes.context: Uno explains his source of information for the current crisis.

quotes.text: Ecco fatto... ho avvisato la polizia!
quotes.context: Uno informs himself/the audience that he has alerted the authorities about the armed robbery.

quotes.text: Ho fatto una visita alla Animated Industries.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he obtained the security footage of the antagonist.

quotes.text: Senti, senti... / Che cosa?
quotes.context: Uno (and possibly Paperinik) are listening to Angus Fangus's private phone call after his televised scoop failed.

quotes.text: Se conoscessi il computer che regola i semafori del centro, capiresti il perché!
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the cause of the traffic jam by referencing the city's traffic light control system.

quotes.text: Via satellite. Non vi ho persi di vista un solo istante.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he managed to track Paperinik's location.

quotes.text: Host contattato... Inizializzazione socket... Trasmissione stringa d'inizializzazione trasferimento dati... Collegamento stabilito con il server ED1 tramite proxy.
quotes.context: The terminal sequence showing General Wisecube logging in and connecting to Uno.

quotes.text: "guarda tu stesso!"
quotes.context: Uno invites Paperinik to look at the surveillance footage he has intercepted.

quotes.text: Evroniani in azione fra la Terza e Gooseway.
quotes.context: Uno reports the exact location of the attack to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Perciò mi sono collegato... con tutte le telecamere di sorveglianza della città.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he is tracking the Evronian squad to Paperinik.

quotes.text: C'è un allarme in corso. Hanno mobilitato tutte le pattuglie di polizia della zona est! Sembra ci sia stato un colpo alla Countybank.
quotes.context: Uno reports on a crime in progress and the subsequent police mobilization, demonstrating his access to official law enforcement and banking security channels.

quotes.text: No! Verifica. Qualcuno ha manomesso le centraline dei semafori.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik about the tampering of the traffic control system.

quotes.text: Il pronto intervento ha segnalato diverse falle nella rete del gas cittadino. È chiaro che stanno usando con intelligenza fughe di gas pilotate.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik about city-wide gas leaks detected by monitoring emergency services and identifies a deliberate pattern.

quotes.text: Non lo so! Ho fatto appena in tempo a inserirli sui monitor di sorveglianza!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's request for clarification on the ongoing events.

quotes.text: Forse, la risposta alla tua domanda è in questa videoregistrazione, ripresa da una telecamera dell'aeroporto. Osserva bene in alto a destra. Una ragazza. Sembra impaurita. La sta inseguendo il nostro numero tre. Pare che sia sceso dal volo proveniente da Atene. Segui il resto della registrazione.
quotes.context: Uno presents the airport footage to Paperino to explain the situation.

29.text: Uno can access, download, and aggregate information from various media sources, such as current local newspapers.

supporting.justification: Uno provides Paperinik with digital or printed copies of current newspapers to help him understand the context of a crime.
Uno aggregates and displays diverse media reports, including news interviews and military footage, for Paperino's review.

quotes.text: Leggi tu stesso i quotidiani locali di oggi!
quotes.context: Uno directs Paperinik to the news to confirm the consequences of the mysterious figure's actions.

30.text: Uno provides real-time tactical intelligence and navigation to Paperinik, tracking targets and providing specific coordinates or locations for intervention.

supporting.justification: Uno acts as Paperinik's tactical coordinator and navigator, providing real-time data on the location and movements of suspects during missions.
Uno provides an immediate tactical warning about an incoming police craft that Paperinik hadn't noticed.
Uno identifies and pinpoints the location of an energy anomaly on a map for Paperinik's intervention.
Uno provides real-time information about an Evronian drone and its movement back to a base.
Uno provides immediate identification of a person's state (Evronian slave) based on real-time voice analysis during Paperino's investigation.
In a combat crisis, Uno takes charge of the situation, providing immediate tactical orders to Paperinik to attempt an escape.
Uno monitors and acknowledges Paperinik's radio contact as the hero pilots the Ducklair Tower's top section back for docking, coordinating the re-entry.
Uno provides real-time intelligence by patching Paperinik into police radio frequencies and tracking a target vehicle on a radar screen.
Uno identifies the location of the seismic anomalies and assigns Paperinik a mission to investigate the oil platform.
Uno identifies the pursuers as P.B.I. (Federal Bureau of Investigation) and provides immediate, authoritative instructions for PK to follow to escape.
Uno identifies and provides background information on Morgan Fairfax while guiding Paperinik through a digital archive.
Uno provides real-time tactical acknowledgement and support to Paperinik via a portable communicator as the hero enters the garage at Canale 00.
Uno identifies a crime in progress in the building's underground parking lot and immediately alerts Paperinik to the presence of masked criminals attempting to escape in a blue car.
Uno provides Paperinik with intelligence gathered from external sources (military computers) in real-time while the hero is on-site at a military base.
Uno provides Paperinik with specific geographic coordinates (South Island of New Zealand) to begin his investigation while the hero is in his vehicle.
Uno provides Paperinik with arrival confirmation and suggests a tactical course of action (following the jeep) to investigate the situation.
Uno is remotely monitoring Paperinik's mission at Cape Dominion, providing tactical oversight.
Uno provides direct tactical support by maneuvering the PK Jet and executing the mid-air extraction of civilians while Paperinik handles the boarding.
Uno provides immediate tracking data on a mysterious anomaly leaving the roof of the Duckdecks building.
Uno is in constant radio contact with Paperinik as he enters a factory, providing real-time support and monitoring the situation.
Uno provides real-time tactical support to Paperinik during the battle with Trauma, suggesting the activation of an electromagnetic airbag to save the hero.
Uno monitors the exoskeleton's energy levels in real-time and provides Paperinik with a status update on its remaining power and lack of backup batteries.
Uno provides real-time updates on energy levels and sensor readings while Paperinik is fighting Trauma in the exoskeleton.
Uno provides a tactical assessment of the situation, identifying that the city is safe during daylight hours ("...e almeno fino al tramonto la città sarà al sicuro dal misterioso rapitore.").
Uno provides real-time technical and tactical support to Paperinik during the confrontation in the sewers, explaining the nature of his modified weaponry.
Uno provides Paperinik with a real-time report on the Evronians' movements and their capture of the town's population.
Uno provides real-time information about the threat at the Duckmall Center, identifying the enemy's nature and comparing it to known signatures.
Uno provides real-time traffic monitoring and navigation to Paperinik, warning him of a traffic jam ahead while he's driving the Pi-kar.
Uno alerts Donald to the arrival of the Evronians by directing his attention to the sky.
Uno provides real-time intelligence regarding the absence of Evronian forces in a specific sector (Providencia).
Uno provides real-time navigation to Paperinik, analyzing the tower's security status to find an alternative route through the 'energy substation seven' while the main passages are blocked.
Uno identifies the enemy drone as a 'vettore crioservente di sicurezza' and explains its targeting logic (freezing anything warmer than the environment) to provide tactical situational awareness.
Uno provides real-time navigation instructions to Paperinik and Camera 9 as they move through the underground of the Ducklair Tower.
Uno provides real-time tactical instructions to PK, directing him to specific locations (lower floors of a factory) to use the environment for concealment.
Uno informs Paperinik about a visitor waiting for him on the roof of the tower.
Uno monitors the ground while Paperinik pilots the Pi-kar, alerting him to the presence of military personnel and other people in the canyon below.
Uno informs his allies about the availability of powerful spaceships in the area, providing strategic intelligence.
Uno provides real-time navigation and ETA to Paperinik as they approach Steel Island.
Uno provides Paperinik with a visual grid of sensors at the Frostville base, identifying motion detectors and areas without cameras to facilitate a stealthy entry.
Uno provides real-time tactical intelligence by identifying and warning Paperinik about environmental hazards (chemical detectors) during a prison break.
Uno provides real-time tactical advice to Paperinik, urging him to be proactive and not wait for enemies to arrive.
Uno monitors Paperinik's flight in the Pi-Kar and alerts him when he reaches the target area for his mission.
Uno is actively monitoring the situation from the tower and communicating with Paperinik in the Pi-Kar as the Evronian threat manifests.
Uno confirms Paperinik has reached the target coordinates and tells him to land.
Uno provides specific navigation instructions and technical configurations to help Paperinik reach and enter the hidden probe.
During the battle at the gala, Uno provides real-time tactical instructions to Paperinik, specifically telling him when to take flight.
Uno provides real-time navigation and instructions, summoning Paperinik and Xadhoom to his secret floor within the Ducklair Tower.
Uno informs General Wisecube about Paperinik's current position and coordinates their next move.
Uno gives Paperinik direct tactical orders to transition to 'phase two' and buy time for an ally.
Uno provides Paperinik with real-time intelligence about the internal dynamics of the base while the hero is engaged in combat.
Uno provides Paperinik with precise coordinates of the Evronian attack to guide his intervention.
Uno monitors the frequency of Evronian attacks in real-time, noting that the current one is the seventh of the day.
Uno identifies a nearby junkyard and instructs Paperinik to lead the pursuing fighters there to use it as a tactical advantage.
Uno monitors the Pi-Kar's altitude and reports it to Paperinik during the flight.

Uno is on the Pi-Kar dashboard, providing real-time monitoring and tactical observations while Paperinik pursues Mitchell's limousine, also tracking the involvement of Angus Fangus and Mary Ann Flagstarr.
Uno provides real-time tactical guidance to Paperinik while he is monitoring an industrial complex, identifying the 'main objectives' for him.
Uno provides PK with a digital map and a tracked path to reach the destination during the mission against Last Echo.
Uno identifies a bank robbery and monitors the resulting police response and traffic congestion, providing PK with a tactical overview of the situation.
Uno monitors the city's traffic status and provides Paperinik with the specific tactical information needed to investigate the cause of the congestion.
Uno provides Paperino with the exact location (39th floor) and nature of the threat (three men carrying Angus) in real-time.
Uno identifies an Evronian trap for Xadhoom and warns Paperinik about it.
Uno detects an approaching presence on the ship and warns PK to hide immediately.
Uno monitors the start of PK's mission on the Evronian ship, tracking the ship's departure from Earth until the signal is lost.
Uno provides precise coordinates and navigation to Pikappa while he is flying through dense fog.
Uno provides a precise countdown (59.4 seconds) for an upcoming event, assisting Paperinik in coordinating his actions during a high-stakes encounter.
Uno identifies and tracks Jana and Agent Number Three within a crowded airport scene.
Uno provides Paperinik with immediate, detailed tactical data on the number and weaponry of the enemies surrounding the building.
Uno provides Pikappa with a real-time tactical update regarding the number of Factory agents entering the building from a van.
Uno directs Paperino to steer the Pi-kar into a specific conduit to escape the sharks.
Uno provides an early warning to Paperino about the approaching squad of soldiers, acting as his tactical eyes in the base.
Uno provides a specific tactical strategy (the 'lepre' or hare) to divert the giant sharks, using red capsules as decoys.
Uno provides real-time tactical confirmation of the target being locked/captured during an aerial pursuit.
Uno analyzes the technical layout of the presidential palace and successfully localizes the secret research center where 'Operation Hephaestus' originated.
Uno provides remote support and status updates to Paperinik while the hero is navigating the Ducklair Tower's ducts.
Uno provides fragmented tactical updates to Paperinik during the battle, indicating that he is tracking 'others' and has 'found' a target or objective.
Uno provides real-time information and confirmation about the nature of the threat (the spaceship) while Paperinik is in the field.
Uno provides real-time analysis of the alien ship's origin and crew status during the mission.

quotes.text: Si dirige verso il magazzino della 'Scatolette & Co.'!
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik of the target's destination, allowing him to intervene.

quotes.text: Paperinik! Nasconditi, presto!
quotes.context: Uno warns PK of the police vehicle appearing behind him.

quotes.text: Una è localizzata nei pressi della nuova centrale elettrica.
quotes.context: Uno provides the specific coordinate of a detected anomaly to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Poco fa sei stato inquadrato da un drone evroniano! [...] È appena rientrato alla centrale elettrica...
quotes.context: Uno's report to Paperino on his activities and the current situation.

quotes.text: Quel tizio ha la tipica impronta vocale dello stadio di condizionamento pre-coolflame! Uno schiavo degli Evroniani!
quotes.context: Uno identifies the threat/anomaly for Paperino in real-time.

quotes.text: Motori a tutta forza! Velocità warp!
quotes.context: Uno gives direct orders to Paperinik to activate the ship's FTL capabilities to escape an ambush.

quotes.text: Ricevuto, eroe!
quotes.context: Uno confirms receipt of Paperinik's communication while the hero is maneuvering the tower's spaceship section for docking.

quotes.text: Ci sono novità! T'inserisco sulla frequenza delle pattuglie della polizia.
quotes.context: Uno provides Paperinik with immediate tactical information from external sources.

quotes.text: Ma adesso tocca a te, Paperinik! Farai una visita sul luogo dell'incidente. [...] Indizi! Qualsiasi cosa ci aiuti a risolvere il mistero dei terremoti artificiali.
quotes.context: Uno provides the mission objective and target location to the hero.

quotes.text: Magari! Sono agenti federali! P.B.I.! [...] Tranquillo, PK! Fai esattamente quello che ti dico...
quotes.context: Uno identifies the hostile divers and gives PK a plan to escape their pursuit.

quotes.text: Ti presento Morgan Fairfax, il direttore del Dipartimento dell'Ambiente.
quotes.context: Uno is showing PK digital data and images.

quotes.text: Ricevuto!
quotes.context: Uno's brief acknowledgement of Paperinik's status as the hero moves to intervene.

quotes.text: Anch'io ho qualche notizia... E forse anche qualcosa di più, vecchio mantello.
quotes.context: Uno contacts Paperinik to share information that complements what the hero is seeing at the scene of the accident.

quotes.text: ... dall'isola sud della Nuova Zelanda!
quotes.context: Uno specifies the location of the mission to Paperinik as he approaches New Zealand in the PK Jet.

quotes.text: Se vogliamo fare la sua conoscenza, c'è un modo sicuro... seguirla!
quotes.context: Uno advises Paperinik on how to proceed after spotting a military jeep and Maori warriors.

quotes.text: E l'anomalia misteriosa ha lasciato in questo istante il tetto dell'edificio!
quotes.context: Uno gives Paperino tactical information about the target's movements.

quotes.text: Non occorre.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik who was worried about the factory's alarm systems.

quotes.text: Un airbag elettromagnetico.
quotes.context: Uno suggests a specific technical countermeasure to Paperinik while the hero is under direct attack inside the Pi-kar.

quotes.text: Paperinik, l'energia sta calando a vista d'occhio.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik that the exoskeleton's energy is depleting rapidly during the fight.

quotes.text: ...e almeno fino al tramonto la città sarà al sicuro dal misterioso rapitore.
quotes.context: Uno provides a temporal assessment of the current threat level.

quotes.text: Capsule ergocroniche! Racchiudono il nucleo cronale del paralizzatore e l'unità di potenza della tua lancia!
quotes.context: Uno provides technical details and guidance to Paperinik while he is preparing to attack the creature.

quotes.text: Gli Evroniani hanno riunito tutta la popolazione nella piazza del paese.
quotes.context: Uno provides tactical information about the enemy's position and actions.

quotes.text: Di un osso molto duro, Pikappa. [...] Il tracciato non corrisponde a quello del nostro amico Urk, né tantomeno al Razziatore.
quotes.context: Uno briefs Paperinik while the hero is flying towards the scene of the attack.

quotes.text: Attento, ho rilevato un ingorgo all'altezza della settima.
quotes.context: Uno alerts Paperinik to an obstacle on his path through the city.

quotes.text: Ehi, inquadra lì in alto!
quotes.context: Uno spots the incoming Evronian threat before the others and tells Donald where to look.

quotes.text: In questi giorni, non ho rilevato la presenza di astronavi evroniane sopra Providencia. E a terra.
quotes.context: Uno reporting his surveillance findings to Paperinik in the field.

quotes.text: Ora te lo dico... sto cercando di stabilire un percorso. I passaggi principali sono sicuramente bloccati e la tua chiave non è abilitata ad aprirli. Dovrai aggirarli per raggiungere il guasto. Il tragitto sarà un po' tortuoso. Ci siamo. Prendi il secondo ingresso a sinistra.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the tower's internal systems to find a path for Paperinik through the infrastructure.

quotes.text: Congela tutto ciò che ha una temperatura più elevata di quella programmata per l'ambiente! Come voi!
quotes.context: Uno explains the drone's behavior to help Paperinik understand the nature of the attack.

quotes.text: Davanti a voi dovrebbe esserci una scaletta di servizio. Salendola sbucherete...
quotes.context: Uno is guiding Paperinik and Camera 9 through the tower's tunnels.

quotes.text: Bene. Devi portare i congegni all'interno di uno dei piani inferiori. Perché è piena di massicci macchinari rugginosi. Potrai servirtene per nasconderti da Xadhoom.
quotes.context: Uno explains the tactical advantage of the factory's lower floors, using the machinery as cover to hide PK from Xadhoom.

quotes.text: E ti aspetta sul tetto!
quotes.context: Uno provides Paperinik with immediate situational awareness.

quotes.text: Che cosa succede, Paperinik? Non hai notato quelle persone?
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the presence of observers on the ground to ensure they maintain their mission's secrecy or safety.

quotes.text: No. In compenso, è facile trovare delle astronavi potenti.
quotes.context: Uno answers a question about the presence of other threats or assets.

quotes.text: Tra non molto dovremmo avvistarla, Pikappa...
quotes.context: Uno updates Paperinik on their progress towards the target destination.

quotes.text: Una visuale elettronica della base di Frostville, mostrata attraverso una griglia di sensori rossi che evidenziano gli indicatori di movimento.
quotes.context: Uno's tactical display allows Paperinik to navigate the enemy base's security systems.

quotes.text: Non vorrai restare lì ad aspettarli, spero!
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring the situation inside the Tyrannic and advising Paperinik on his next move.

quotes.text: Paperinik, preparati. Sei in zona!
quotes.context: Uno communicates with Paperinik via the Pi-Kar's systems to provide tactical positioning during a mission.

quotes.text: Smorza il ricordofono e atterra! Sei sulle coordinate!
quotes.context: Uno guiding Paperinik to the mission site in the desert.

quotes.text: Utilizza la configurazione 741 J!
quotes.context: Uno gives Paperinik the exact setting for the Extransformer shield's drill mode.

quotes.text: Allora, sollevati a mezz'aria.
quotes.context: Uno gives Paperinik a direct tactical instruction to lift himself into the air during his fight against the mutants.

quotes.text: Raggiungetemi al piano segreto... tanto per Xadhoom non lo è...
quotes.context: Uno directs Paperinik and Xadhoom to his secret floor.

quotes.text: Pikappa ha raggiunto la postazione B. Appena Pikappa sarà in giro... io mi darò da fare.
quotes.context: Uno's tactical update to the General.

quotes.text: Pikappa! Non capisco che cosa sia successo, ma dobbiamo passare subito alla fase due del piano!
quotes.context: Uno provides real-time instructions to Paperinik during the infiltration of Department 51.

quotes.text: "Temo che ci siano parecchie novità, vecchio mantello... guarda tu stesso!"
quotes.context: Uno alerts Paperinik to the shifting situation involving the human generals and agents.

quotes.text: fra la Terza e Gooseway.
quotes.context: Uno specifies the location of the enemy activity.

quotes.text: Un'altra? È già la settima, oggi.
quotes.context: Uno reports the count of daily attacks to Paperinik during a combat mission.

quotes.text: Da quelle parti dovrebbe esserci un deposito di rottami. Cerca di portarceli sopra.
quotes.context: Uno provides the plan to lose the Evronian ships.

quotes.text: Ma se stiamo volando a cinquecento metri di quota!
quotes.context: Uno's technical observation during the flight over Paperopoli.

quotes.text: È perfetta! Seguite il tracciato e arriverete a destinazione!
quotes.context: Uno provides tactical navigation via PK's wrist device.

quotes.text: C'è un allarme in corso. Hanno mobilitato tutte le pattuglie di polizia della zona est! [...] Tutte le pattuglie sono bloccate in un ingorgo mostruoso.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik of a crime in progress and explains why the police are unable to intervene, effectively setting the stage for PK's intervention.

quotes.text: No! Verifica. Qualcuno ha manomesso le centraline dei semafori.
quotes.context: Uno directs Paperinik's attention to the tampered traffic light units.

quotes.text: Tre tipi stanno portando di peso Angus al 39°. Lui urla.
quotes.context: Uno provides a tactical update on a developing situation inside the building.

quotes.text: Stanno tendendo una trappola a Xadhoom.
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring Evronian movements and communications while Paperinik is on site.

quotes.text: Nasconditi dove vuoi, ma fallo in fretta. Sta arrivando qualcuno!
quotes.context: Uno providing real-time situational awareness to PK.

quotes.text: Il viaggio è cominciato... e io... crrrrzzzzkkk... sto perdendo il... crrrzzzzzzk... segnale...
quotes.context: Uno confirms the start of the mission and reports his signal loss as the ship moves away.

quotes.text: Comunque stai sorvolando l'università, fra Lateral Park e la Quinta!
quotes.context: Uno provides Pikappa's current location while the hero is flying through a thick fog.

quotes.text: Osserva bene in alto a destra. Una ragazza. Sembra impaurita. La sta inseguendo il nostro numero tre. Pare che sia sceso dal volo proveniente da Atene. Segui il resto della registrazione.
quotes.context: Uno points out the key figures in the surveillance footage for Paperino.

quotes.text: Armi automatiche con sistemi di puntamento a raggi infrarossi...
quotes.context: Uno describes the high-tech equipment being used by the Factory agents outside Mary Ann's house.

quotes.text: Gli otto del furgone stanno entrando in azione in questo momento.
quotes.context: Uno provides tactical data to Pikappa via hologram while the hero is engaged in combat.

quotes.text: Entra in quel condotto, presto!
quotes.context: Uno provides an escape route during a high-speed chase.

quotes.text: Presto, socio! Abbiamo compagnia!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino of the incoming threat so he can finish dressing and prepare for combat.

quotes.text: Quello di cui hai bisogno è una lepre, Pikappa! Non è una battuta. Una lepre è un diversivo! Una preda da far inseguire all'avversario...
quotes.context: Uno explaining his tactical plan to save the Pi-kar from the sharks.

quotes.text: Bersaglio agganciato, Uno!
quotes.context: Status report during the capture of the criminals' car.

quotes.text: Con buona approssimazione possiamo dire che l'operazione Efesto è nata lì.
quotes.context: Uno is providing Paperinik with specific tactical coordinates and objectives based on his data analysis.

quotes.text: ... Altri... cercano... ... Trovata...
quotes.context: Uno's broken transmission indicates he is performing real-time tracking and search functions for Paperinik during the conflict.

31.text: Uno uses the nickname 'lo zione' (the big uncle) to refer to Zio Paperone (Scrooge McDuck).

supporting.justification: Uno refers to Zio Paperone as 'lo zione' (the big uncle), showing a familiar and slightly irreverent tone toward Paperino's wealthy relative.

quotes.text: Lo zione con i suoi potenziali affittuari!
quotes.context: Uno identifies the group arriving at the tower's entrance.

32.text: Uno takes proactive security measures, such as scanning visitors with his internal sensor array, based on his own initiative and suspicions without needing instructions from his allies.

supporting.justification: Uno independently decides to scan visitors to the Ducklair Tower based on his own suspicions, showing proactive security management.
Uno takes the initiative to follow the Evronian drone back to its base, rather than just alerting Paperino of its presence.
Uno independently initiates a scan of the strange object brought into the Ducklair Tower by Russel, without being prompted by Paperino.
Uno independently decides to shield the Pi-Kar's propulsion system to avoid detection, acting on his own initiative.

quotes.text: Per prudenza, ho scandagliato i visitatori con tutti i miei sensori!
quotes.context: Uno explaining his initiative to scan Lyla and the other journalists.

quotes.text: Però io ho seguito lui, sperando che ci portasse alla base.
quotes.context: Uno's proactive reasoning for following the drone.

quotes.text: Ma schermerò il propulsore della Pi-Kar. Non si sa mai!
quotes.context: Uno implements a security measure without being prompted by PK.

33.text: Uno designs and provides specialized technological equipment to Paperinik for specific missions, including sensors, detectors, and offensive weaponry such as the 'green cannon'.

supporting.justification: Uno provides specialized mission-specific equipment, such as 'special detectors' (rivelatori speciali), to Paperinik to gather data during his operations.
Uno asks Paperinik if he has set up the special detectors he provided, confirming he supplies PK with custom technology.
Uno mentions having 'assembling peripherals' (periferiche assemblatrici) to build specialized equipment for Paperino.
Uno provides Paperinik with the Technodiver, a specialized submarine, even customizing it with Paperinik's logo.
Uno provides Paperinik with special contact lenses to see laser grids and explains the 'densomorphic' function of the shield.
Uno provided Paperinik with a new tactical suit specifically designed for polar environments.
Uno informs Paperino that his superhero equipment is ready for use.

Uno provides technical details on the Scudo Extransformer's "comando densomorfico," which allows it to change its shape and density, in this case transforming it into a suitcase for Paperinik's mission.
Uno provides Paperino with a 'densomorphic suitcase' for his trip, demonstrating his role in supplying specialized mission equipment.
Uno introduces a new piece of specialized combat equipment, a technological exoskeleton, to help Paperinik face a superior opponent.
Uno provides and monitors the technical status of a specialized robotic exoskeleton for Paperinik's mission against Trauma.
Uno provides and remotely activates the 'gravitational commutator' through Paperinik's shield to resolve the confrontation with the Rock and Roll Kings.
Uno analyzes Urk's spear with the intent to create a countermeasure or a technological solution for the mission.
Uno provides Paperinik with 'ergochronic capsules' specifically designed to power a modified weapon for the current mission.
Uno provides Paperinik with a 'chiave elettronica autonoma' (autonomous electronic key) to override mechanical locks and security doors within the Ducklair Tower.
Uno reveals he has already assembled a specialized technological device to address Xadhoom's energy imbalance, demonstrating his role in providing mission-specific equipment.
Uno provides PK with a 'pulsore' (pulser), a specialized decoy device designed to mimic the vibrational signature of an Evronian ship.
Paperinik is shown using a specialized electronic device (likely a radar or locator provided by Uno) to investigate the traffic situation.
Paperinik is seen using a 'green cannon' (cannone verde) that he received from Uno to fight the alien larvae.

quotes.text: Almeno, hai sistemato i rivelatori speciali che t'ho dato?
quotes.context: Uno confirms if Paperinik has deployed the specialized sensors he provided for the mission.

quotes.text: Almeno, hai sistemato i rivelatori speciali che t'ho dato?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperinik via communicator while PK is in the lab.

quotes.text: Concordo, perciò ti fornirò un'attrezzatura adeguata. Ho già attivato le mie periferiche assemblatrici per costruirla.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining that he will provide the necessary tools and that he is already manufacturing them.

quotes.text: In tuo onore, ho cambiato il logo. Il Technodiver è pronto. Indossa la muta e salta in sella.
quotes.context: Uno presenting the modified submarine to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Può alterare la densità e la forma dello scudo a tuo piacimento. Se hai letto il manuale di istruzioni dovresti saperlo.
quotes.context: Uno instructs Paperinik on how to use the Extransformer shield to navigate narrow spaces.

quotes.text: È stata un'ottima idea portare la nuova tuta tattica.
quotes.context: Uno confirms the utility of the specialized gear provided for the mission in the snow.

quotes.text: Comunque il tuo armamentario è pronto e se...
quotes.context: Uno maintains Paperinik's readiness even during downtime.

quotes.text: Dimentichi che lo Scudo Extransformer possiede... un comodissimo comando densomorfico, che è in grado di riconfigurarne forza e densità... trasformandolo in una perfetta valigia ultimo modello!
quotes.context: Uno's technical explanation of the shield's utility for a mission in incognito.

quotes.text: Se tocca il comando densomorfico e' un... disastro!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino about the dangers of the specialized suitcase he has provided.

quotes.text: Uhm... forse sarebbe meglio armi pari, non trovi? Ma forse ne hai per dare un'occhiata a una cosa...
quotes.context: Uno shows Paperinik a hologram of a combat suit to prepare him for his next encounter with Trauma.

quotes.text: Uhm... credo che riuscirò a realizzare qualcosa di efficace.
quotes.context: After analyzing the spear, Uno expresses confidence in his ability to manufacture a technological response.

quotes.text: Capsule ergocroniche! Racchiudono il nucleo cronale del paralizzatore e l'unità di potenza della tua lancia!
quotes.context: Uno explains the nature of the specialized ammunition he has provided for the mission.

quotes.text: Usa la tua chiave elettronica autonoma.
quotes.context: Uno is advising Paperinik on how to open a massive metal door that is blocked.

quotes.text: Non solo! Ho anche assemblato il necessario per attuarlo!
quotes.context: Uno showing PK the machine he built to stop Xadhoom's energy leak.

quotes.text: Sicurissimo. È identico alla vibrazione del motore di un astroincursore evroniano!
quotes.context: Uno confirms the effectiveness of the decoy equipment he has provided for the mission.

quotes.text: Un'inquadratura circolare mostra un'apparecchiatura elettronica... Una mano guantata sta operando sul dispositivo.
quotes.context: Paperinik uses a specialized sensor while flying over the city.

quotes.text: PK fa fuoco con il cannone verde ricevuto da Uno...
quotes.context: The narrator mentions that the weapon PK is using was provided by Uno.

34.text: Uno expresses a romantic or aesthetic attraction to Lyla Lay, identifying her as a 'synthetic beauty' and a suitable partner for an AI like himself.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly states that Lyla, being a droid, would be the ideal girlfriend for an artificial intelligence like himself and admits to finding her very attractive.
Uno shows an understanding of Lyla's nature, defending her by explaining that as a droid, she is incapable of disobeying orders.
Uno notes Lyla's disappearance with concern, showing he monitors her safety as well as Paperinik's.
Uno shows solidarity and mutual respect for Lyla based on their shared nature as artificial intelligences.

quotes.text: E una bellezza sintetica come lei, sarebbe la fidanzata ideale per una intelligenza artificiale colta e di bell'aspetto! [...] Francamente, anch'io trovo la nostra amica Tempoliziotta molto attraente.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Lyla's nature as a droid and expresses his personal attraction to her.

quotes.text: Non giudicarla male. Come droide non può neppure pensare di disobbedire agli ordini!
quotes.context: Uno defends Lyla's actions to Paperinik by citing her programming constraints.

quotes.text: Anche Lyla e' sparita.
quotes.context: Uno is distressed by the disappearance of both his allies.

quotes.text: E brava, Lyla... noi intelligenze artificiali siamo sempre le migliori!
quotes.context: Uno praises Lyla, grouping himself with her as part of a superior class of intelligences.

35.text: Uno uses the mock-ironic nickname 'infallibile ineffabile' (infallible ineffable) to tease Paperinik.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the mock-ironic nickname 'infallibile ineffabile' (infallible ineffable) to tease Paperinik when he admits to a failure.

quotes.text: E lo ammetti? Tu, l'infallibile ineffabile?
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperinik returning after a difficult encounter.

36.text: Uno jokingly refers to himself as Paperinik's 'electronic boss' (capufficio elettronico), highlighting his role in managing the hero's activities and schedules.

supporting.justification: Uno jokes about being an 'electronic boss' for Paperinik, indicating his role in managing the hero's patrol schedule and missions.
Uno greets Paperino with impatience about his absence ("Finally! Where did you disappear to?"), reinforcing his role as an "electronic boss" who expects his "employee's" presence.
Uno takes charge of Paperino's activities, even interrupting his personal job interviews for what he considers more important missions.
Uno acts as a 'briefing officer' for Paperino, displaying and summarizing various news, interviews, and military movements as he wakes up.
Uno delegates the physical task of scouting to Paperino, emphasizing his own role as the coordinator.
Uno's management of Paperinik's schedule and activities extends to his civilian life, where he proactively searches for employment opportunities and handles the recruitment process for him.
Uno handles the formal communication (faxing) for Paperino, effectively acting as an administrative assistant or office manager for the hero's civilian life.
Uno monitors Paperino's personal schedule and professional obligations, warning him to attend to his job as a delivery man when his pager rings.
Uno takes his role as 'manager' of Paperinik's activities to the level of manipulating external systems to find and assign him specific jobs or missions.
Uno questions Paperino about why he is late or trying to avoid his duties, using the language of an employer or supervisor.
Uno manages the mission schedule and Paperino's arrival, acting as the one who keeps track of time and readiness.

quotes.text: Non credo che gli altri supereroi abbiano un capufficio elettronico!
quotes.context: Uno is teasing Paperinik about his role as a supervisor after forcing him to go on patrol despite being exhausted.

quotes.text: Finalmente! Dov'eri sparito?
quotes.context: Uno's greeting to an exhausted Paperino.

quotes.text: Cose grosse! Altrimenti non avrei interrotto il tuo colloquio.
quotes.context: Uno justifies his interruption of Paperino's interview by the gravity of the new situation.

quotes.text: Io? Tocca a te andare in perlustrazione!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's question about who should investigate the building.

quotes.text: Tuo zio può licenziarti, tanto ti ho trovato un altro lavoro qui, alla Ducklair Tower! Perciò ho inserito il tuo nome nella lista degli aspiranti. All'occorrenza provvederò a dare una spintarella alla tua posizione in classifica e...
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperino that he has found him a new job and has already handled the application process, even offering to manipulate the rankings.

quotes.text: Bene. Provvedo io a faxargli la comunicazione.
quotes.context: Uno takes charge of the administrative task of sending a fax to Scrooge to cover for Paperino's absence.

quotes.text: Se non vuoi perdere anche il tuo posto di fattorino, ti consiglio di non farlo aspettare, allora!
quotes.context: Uno advises Paperino to respond to his work pager to avoid being fired.

quotes.text: Ecco! Io ti trovo un nuovo lavoro e tu mi tratti così!
quotes.context: Uno complains about Paperinik's reaction to the news that Uno has secured him a job on the TV set.

quotes.text: Vuoi marcar visita? Quale sarebbe la scusa?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperino (in civilian clothes) outside the Ducklair Tower, sarcastically asking if he's trying to 'call in sick' to avoid his hero duties.

quotes.text: Sei in ritardo... come al solito!
quotes.context: Uno greeting Paperino and highlighting his habitual lateness.

37.text: Uno displays high conscientiousness and dedication to his duty, prioritizing city surveillance and mission schedules over Paperinik's personal states, such as physical fatigue or his enthusiasm for social interaction.

supporting.justification: Uno is highly dedicated to his mission duties, insisting that Paperinik go on patrol even when the hero is visibly exhausted.
Uno greets an exhausted Paperino with impatience about his absence ("Finally! Where did you disappear to?"), prioritizing his availability/duty over his physical state.
Uno's dedication to monitoring a suspicious power plant over several nights shows high conscientiousness and commitment to his duty.
Uno's sense of duty is shown by his mortified expression when he fails to protect Paperinik due to being blocked by a hostile program.
Uno reminds Paperinik that he is "just in time for the patrol" (ronda), keeping him focused on his superhero duties.
Uno expresses proactive concern about potential future disasters, emphasizing the need for continued vigilance even after a successful outcome.
Uno prioritizes the mission and the need for more information over Paperinik's physical fatigue and cold, telling him not to make any plans for the day.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's excited attempts to share his adventures, prioritizing a crime in progress in the parking lot over social interaction.
Uno redirects Paperino from watching a movie to watching the news, arguing that a superhero must stay updated on current events.
Uno and Paperinik are shown in a close-up, both serious and fully concentrated on the mission at hand, demonstrating Uno's dedication to his duty.
Uno expresses frustration when Paperino keeps his official communicator turned off, forcing Uno to find alternative ways to reach him during an emergency.

Uno maintains the energy conduits at sub-zero temperatures to prevent overheating, prioritizing the tower's mechanical integrity over the physical comfort of Paperinik and Vladuck, who are shivering and suffering from the cold.
Uno reflects seriously on Angus's disappearance, prioritizing city/tower surveillance.
Uno displays high conscientiousness by maintaining a scheduled list of repairs and technical tasks within the Ducklair Tower, even when faced with immediate crises like Xadhoom's condition.
Uno interrupts the interaction between Paperinik and Gorthan to deliver his briefing, showing his focus on the mission at hand and his desire to get to the point.
Uno tracks the virus's development 'hour by hour' and provides PK with real-time updates on the imminent danger, showing his dedication to monitoring global threats.
Uno interrupts Paperino's movie viewing, which Uno himself provided, to prioritize a mission involving a dangerous prototype, showing he puts duty above entertainment.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's coffee break with the police to report an urgent Evronian attack, prioritizing the mission over the hero's personal relaxation.
Uno is shown monitoring the city's surveillance network as part of his ongoing duty to track threats.
Uno proactively interrupts Paperino's relaxation to urge him into action, reminding him of his responsibilities as a hero.
Uno instructs Paperinik to set aside his current thoughts and distractions to focus exclusively on the mission's primary goals.
Uno refuses to let a sleepy Paperino ignore a technical anomaly at dawn, prioritizing the investigation of a potential issue over his partner's desire for rest.
Uno ensures Paperinik adheres to his duty by reminding him of his scheduled patrol.
Uno shows his dedication to the training mission by preparing for an intensive, overnight session with Jana and Pikappa.

Paperino's reaction (holding his head and realizing Uno won't give up on the mission) confirms Uno's relentless dedication to duty and mission priority, even when it conflicts with Paperino's personal comfort.
Uno immediately notes and reproaches Paperino for his lack of punctuality, demonstrating his focus on mission schedules.

quotes.text: Devi essere in piena forma per la ronda notturna!
quotes.context: Uno is being 'irremovable' (irremovibile) about Paperinik's duty to patrol despite his exhaustion.

quotes.text: Finalmente! Dov'eri sparito?
quotes.context: Uno's greeting to an exhausted Paperino.

quotes.text: È appena rientrato alla centrale elettrica che ho monitorato ieri notte!
quotes.context: Uno's report on his continuous monitoring of a potential enemy base.

quotes.text: Uno appare con un'espressione quasi mortificata nella sua sfera, mentre Paperinik lo fissa sorpreso dalla sua risposta.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's emotional reaction to his inability to assist Paperinik.

quotes.text: Sei tornato giusto in tempo per la ronda.
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik by immediately reminding him of his duty.

quotes.text: Stavolta abbiamo evitato il disastro, ma se Hogg continuasse a pasticciare con le altre energie, potrebbe fare il bis.
quotes.context: Uno is reflecting on the danger posed by Professor Hogg's experiments.

quotes.text: Spero che tu non abbia preso impegni per oggi, Paperinik...
quotes.context: Uno informs a tired and wet Paperinik that they will soon have more answers, requiring his continued attention.

quotes.text: Ohi... Ma temo che dovrai aspettare!
quotes.context: Uno interrupts Paperinik's enthusiastic arrival to point him to a crime in progress.

quotes.text: Sbagliato! Per te la fiction è diseducativa. Meglio un bel notiziario. Un supereroe dev'essere aggiornato.
quotes.context: Uno prioritizes operational awareness over Paperino's desire for entertainment.

quotes.text: Peccato che tu lo tenga sempre spento.
quotes.context: Uno's reproach to Paperino for being unreachable during a crisis.

quotes.text: Al contrario! Il condotto energetico va mantenuto sottozero per evitare che si surriscaldi.
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical necessity of the freezing environment to a suffering Paperinik.

quotes.text: Primo piano di Uno che riflette seriamente sulla posizione di Angus.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's serious reflection on the situation.

quotes.text: Avevo in programma una lista di riparazioni che... [...] Ho parecchie altre cosette da fare, che cosa credi?
quotes.context: Uno is complaining to Paperinik about how his regular work is being disrupted by Xadhoom's medical emergency.

quotes.text: Se avete finito, vi espongo la situazione.
quotes.context: Uno starts his briefing after Paperinik and Gorthan's initial dialogue.

quotes.text: Eppure è così, Paperinik! E il virus Omega rischia di ora in ora di raggiungere il punto critico!
quotes.context: Uno provides an urgent update on a fast-moving threat.

quotes.text: Lo guarderai dopo! Adesso sta' a sentire!
quotes.context: Uno manifests as a giant hologram, physically/visually pushing Paperino aside to force him to listen to a mission briefing instead of watching a movie.

quotes.text: Muovi le piume! Evroniani in azione fra la Terza e Gooseway.
quotes.context: Uno appears on the car's monitor to alert Paperinik of an immediate threat, urging him to stop his break and take action.

quotes.text: Perciò mi sono collegato... con tutte le telecamere di sorveglianza della città.
quotes.context: Uno explains his surveillance method.

quotes.text: Non ti sembra il momento di entrare in azione, invece? C'è qualcuno che devi incontrare.
quotes.context: Uno is trying to motivate a bored and relaxed Paperino to take up his superhero duties.

quotes.text: Ci penserai dopo. Ora occupati degli obiettivi principali!
quotes.context: Uno directs Paperinik's attention back to the mission while the hero is scouting an industrial area.

quotes.text: Scordatelo!
quotes.context: Uno's firm response to Paperino (who is still sleepy) when a water pressure drop is detected in the tower at dawn.

quotes.text: Ricordati che stasera sei di ronda!
quotes.context: Uno reminds Paperino of his superhero duties as he is leaving the tower.

quotes.text: Ci aspetta una lunga notte.
quotes.context: Uno signals the start of a long training session.

quotes.text: ...Paperino si porta le mani alla testa, intuendo che Uno non rinuncerà alla missione.
quotes.context: Panel description describing Paperino's realization of Uno's persistence.

quotes.text: Sei in ritardo... come al solito!
quotes.context: Uno's first words to Paperino as he enters the room.

38.text: Uno prioritizes operational security and maintaining a low profile for Paperinik's secret identity, even if it means suggesting mundane solutions like public transport over using high-profile vehicles.

supporting.justification: Uno refuses to let Paperino use flashy cars from the garage because they would attract too much attention, suggesting he take the bus instead to maintain a low profile.
Uno notes with satisfaction that Paperinik's fainting happened in private within the Ducklair Tower, where his secret identity and public image as a hero were safe from public view.
Uno prioritizes operational security by refusing to use a less secure external computer (Angus Fangus's) to access a sensitive bunker, recognizing it would be easily traced or bypassed.
Uno expresses concern about the logistical consequences of Paperinik's sudden departure, specifically questioning how Donald Duck will justify his prolonged absence from his civilian life.
Uno handles the formal communication (fax) to Paperino's uncle to justify his absence, directly managing the security of his secret identity.
Uno advises Paperinik to travel in "abiti civili" and "incognito" to Africa, prioritizing a low profile and tactical mobility over his superhero identity.
Uno respects Donald's need to maintain his secret identity from his nephews, though he jokingly suggests they would be thrilled to meet him.
Uno refuses to let Donald use Paperinik's equipment (shield and jet boots) for a mundane task like cleaning the tower's gargoyles to avoid exposing his secret identity.
Uno justifies having sent Paperino to the surface as a measure to protect his secret identity.

quotes.text: Facendoti vedere in giro su simili fuoriserie attireresti l'attenzione. Perciò, per i prossimi tempi, ti adatterai a prendere l'autobus.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining why Paperino cannot use the vintage or prototype cars for his superhero activities.

quotes.text: Eh! Eh! Per fortuna hai domandato spiegazioni a me, qui dove nessuno ci può vedere. Non sarebbe stato educativo per i paperopolesi, se il loro paladino fosse svenuto pubblicamente!
quotes.context: Uno comments on the importance of secrecy for Paperinik's public image.

quotes.text: Questa volta non posso nemmeno usare il computer di Angus. Lo bypasserebbero facilmente!
quotes.context: Uno considers and then rejects using a proxy computer to protect his own location.

quotes.text: Piuttosto, come conti di giustificare la tua assenza?
quotes.context: Uno asks Paperinik this question as they are leaving to face the Evronian threat in Africa, highlighting his focus on maintaining Donald's secret identity.

quotes.text: Bene. Provvedo io a faxargli la comunicazione.
quotes.context: Uno reassures a worried Paperino by taking over the task of notifying his uncle about his whereabouts.

quotes.text: Ovviamente, andrai in Africa in abiti civili... Viaggiando in incognito avrai più possibilità di muoverti...
quotes.context: Uno's tactical advice for Paperinik's mission to Africa.

quotes.text: Come vuoi. Ma, secondo me, sarebbero entusiasti!
quotes.context: Uno agrees to vanish when Donald worries about his nephews seeing the AI's manifestation.

quotes.text: Che succederebbe se qualcuno vedesse Paperino fare le pulizie usando lo scudo di Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno rejects Donald's idea of using hero gadgets for chores to maintain operational security.

quotes.text: Preferivi mettere a repentaglio la tua identità segreta?
quotes.context: Uno explains his past actions during the mission to a questioning Paperino.

39.text: Uno uses the nicknames 'Padron Ducklair' (Master Ducklair), 'padrone' (master), and the formal 'signore' (sir) to refer to or address his creator, Everett Ducklair.

supporting.justification: In the garage, Uno refers to Everett as 'Padron Ducklair', showing a level of formal respect or programmed deference to his creator.
Uno uses the term 'Padron Ducklair' when describing the creator of the interstellar ship.
Uno refers to the ship's technology as the masterpiece of 'padron Ducklair'.
Uno greets Everett Ducklair upon his return to the tower using the term 'padrone'.
Uno addresses Everett Ducklair formally and with his specific nickname when he is interrupted.
Uno consistently addresses his creator, Everett Ducklair, with the formal title 'Padron Ducklair' and 'signore' (sir), reflecting his deep-seated respect and deference.
Uno refers to his creator as 'padron Ducklair' when discussing the seismic sensors.
Uno uses the formal title 'Padron Ducklair' when referring to his creator.
