Uno refers to his creator as 'Padron Ducklair' while describing the features of the jet.
Uno refers to Everett Ducklair using his formal title while discussing his creative tendencies.
Uno refers to his creator as 'Padron Ducklair' while explaining the design of the buried probe.
Uno refers to the tower's defenses as belonging to 'Padron Ducklair', showing his continued respect and attribution of the technology to his creator.
Uno refers to Everett Ducklair as 'Padron Ducklair'.
Uno refers to Everett Ducklair as 'padron Ducklair' when reporting his observations to Paperinik.
Uno addresses Everett as 'padron Ducklair' while discussing his existential desires.
In the year 2188, Uno continues to address his creator as 'padron Ducklair' and asks for his help, demonstrating his ongoing formal and respectful relationship.

Uno reflexively uses the title 'Padron' when addressing Everett, though he immediately catches himself and tries to use his creator's first name, highlighting the deeply ingrained nature of his formal address.
Uno uses the nickname 'amico segreto' (secret friend) to refer to Everett Ducklair when communicating with Pikappa about their clandestine collaboration.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair l'usava come garage per i suoi veicoli sperimentali.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the history of the secret garage to Paperino.

quotes.text: Uno dei capolavori di Padron Ducklair. Una maneggevole... nave interstellare!
quotes.context: Uno is introducing Paperinik to the ship in the hangar.

quotes.text: Il capolavoro di padron Ducklair.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the advanced technology of the Ducklair Tower's spaceship form.

quotes.text: Bentornato, padrone!
quotes.context: Uno welcomes Everett Ducklair back to the Ducklair Tower after his long absence.

quotes.text: Posso esservi utile, Padron Ducklair?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Everett as he approaches the console.

quotes.text: Permettete, signore? [...] Non volete fermarvi per un po', padron Ducklair?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Everett Ducklair with high respect upon his return and when he prepares to leave the tower again.

quotes.text: Quello che è sfuggito agli altri non poteva passare inosservato al sistema di rilevazione sismica creato da padron Ducklair.
quotes.context: Uno explains the origin of his advanced monitoring equipment.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair mi ha programmato per fare sempre la cosa più logica.
quotes.context: Uno discusses his programming.

quotes.text: Il jet di Padron Ducklair non ha autoradio...
quotes.context: Uno is discussing the vehicle's equipment.

quotes.text: A volte padron Ducklair si lasciava trascinare dall'immaginazione.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the presence of unusual or complex structures in the tower to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair ha utilizzato i dispositivi di trivellazione del mezzo stesso per seppellirlo!
quotes.context: Uno explains why the probe is underground.

quotes.text: Con i loro strumenti non riusciranno mai a superare le difese di Padron Ducklair!
quotes.context: Uno explains why Angus Fangus and his crew cannot breach the tower.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair non distruggerebbe uno per uno i nostri robot di guardia!
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the nature of the attack on the tower.

quotes.text: Grazie alle telecamere esterne ho visto lo stesso padron Ducklair in azione e...
quotes.context: Uno reports seeing his creator in action using the tower's external cameras.

quotes.text: Non crediate che non vi sia grato per come mi avete fatto, padron Ducklair!
quotes.context: Uno is expressing gratitude to Everett for his creation, despite his current frustrations.

quotes.text: Mi aiuterete davvero, padron Ducklair?
quotes.context: Uno addresses the aged Everett Ducklair in the year 2188, seeking his assistance.

quotes.text: Padron... ehm... Everett!
quotes.context: Uno corrects his way of addressing his creator, showing a transition from his habitual formal title to a more personal one.

quotes.text: Pikappa, ho appena ricevuto il protocollo verde dal nostro amico segreto!
quotes.context: Uno is informing Pikappa about a message from Everett Ducklair, who is working in secret with them.

40.text: Uno uses the expression 'Indovina!' (Guess what!) as a conversational bridge to introduce important revelations or discoveries.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the colloquial expression 'Indovina!' (Guess what!) to introduce a significant finding or revelation to Paperinik, showing a conversational and engaging tone.
Uno uses a variation of 'Indovina' to sarcastically lead Paperinik to the conclusion that he must do the repairs himself.
Uno uses the expression 'Indovina!' to introduce the location of a dangerous prototype, showing it's a recurring conversational bridge for him.
Uno uses the expression "Indovina!" (Guess what!) as a conversational bridge to reveal the final piece of the criminal's history, which connects back to Paperino himself.

quotes.text: Indovina! È appena rientrato alla centrale elettrica...
quotes.context: Uno's conversational opening to revealing the drone's destination.

quotes.text: ...indovina chi dovrà andare a riparare il danno?
quotes.context: Uno explains that since his automated units are isolated, Paperinik is the only one who can fix the failure.

quotes.text: Non indovineresti mai. Nel deserto appena fuori Paperopoli!
quotes.context: Uno is briefing Paperino on a newly discovered prototype.

quotes.text: Adesso indovina chi l'ha fatto arrestare l'ultima volta...
quotes.context: Uno leading Paperino to realize the motive of the kidnapping by revealing the arresting officer in the criminal's file.

41.text: Uno can perform real-time analysis of video and audio to detect the specific 'vocal signature' and 'cranial radiance' of Evronian conditioning, allowing him to identify individuals who are in a 'pre-coolflame' or 'semi-coolflame' state.

supporting.justification: Uno uses his interface to display sound wave analysis and identifies the specific "vocal signature" of Evronian conditioning.
Uno analyzes a news broadcast in real-time to identify a witness as being in a 'semi-coolflame' state by checking their vocal imprint and 'cranial radiance'.

quotes.text: Quel tizio ha la tipica impronta vocale dello stadio di condizionamento pre-coolflame! Uno schiavo degli Evroniani!
quotes.context: Uno explains his findings after analyzing the worker's voice.

quotes.text: Ho analizzato in video l'impronta vocale e la radianza cranica di uno dei testimoni oculari. Il signor Duckovich è inequivocabilmente in stato di semi-coolflamizzazione!
quotes.context: Uno explains to Donald how he identified an Evronian victim from a television report.

42.text: Uno possesses detailed technical knowledge of the Evronian threat, including their methods of biological and psychological conditioning (such as the 'pre-coolflame' stage).

supporting.justification: Uno knows the specific stages of Evronian conditioning (e.g., 'pre-coolflame') and can identify the resulting states in victims.
Uno identifies the Evronian weapon's reservoir for victim essences, demonstrating detailed knowledge of their biological and psychological extraction methods.
Uno correctly identifies the specific stealth technology used by the Evronians to remain invisible.
Uno casually references the 'Coolflame' state in a sarcastic remark, demonstrating his deep familiarity with the consequences of Evronian predation.
Uno immediately recognizes the danger of the Evronian spore, showing extreme concern during his analysis.
Uno identifies the biological nature of Evronian spores, their development into warriors, and their nutritional dependency on emotional energy from the soil.
Uno knows that the Evronians have not yet developed time travel technology, allowing him to rule out certain possibilities regarding Trauma's origins.
Uno identifies and explains the specific nature and mechanics of a new, upgraded Evronian energy-absorbing weapon.
Uno has extremely precise technical knowledge of Evronian technology, including the specific acoustic and vibrational signatures of their engines.

Uno knows that Evronians require a specific energy tank to survive and that without it, their life force slowly depletes. He also recognizes the 'anomalous' nature of Gorthan's psychophysical mutation.
Uno analyzes the Admiral's strategy, specifically his choice of an infiltrator based on the ease of psychological conditioning, reflecting his deep understanding of Evronian tactics.
Uno displays detailed knowledge of the 'coolflamizzazione' process and how it transforms the somatic traits of different alien races.
Uno explains the nature of a military virus that can regress Evronians to their primitive 'evronite' state.
Uno instantly identifies the specific class of the pursuing Evronian fighters.
Uno identifies the specific threat Due faces on the Evronian ships: a "disinfestation program."
Uno immediately recognizes and validates the possibility of alien conditioning influencing the behavior of the tower's guardian, demonstrating his familiarity with such methods.
Uno immediately identifies that the alien ship is not of Evronian origin.

quotes.text: Quel tizio ha la tipica impronta vocale dello stadio di condizionamento pre-coolflame! Uno schiavo degli Evroniani!
quotes.context: Uno demonstrates his understanding of Evronian methods by classifying the worker's condition.

quotes.text: È un serbatoio, o qualcosa del genere! Lì gli evroniani conservano l'essenza delle loro vittime. Esatto! Là dentro c'è Angus Fangus.
quotes.context: Uno is showing Paperinik a component of an Evronian weapon he has analyzed.

quotes.text: Sono invisibili! Si nascondono dietro un campo di frequenze scramblate! Loro possono vederci ma noi non possiamo vedere loro!
quotes.context: Uno explains the enemy's tactical advantage through their cloaking technology.

quotes.text: ...le larve di quelli che diventeranno, forse, guerrieri evroniani. Anche se a questo stadio di crescita è difficile dirlo. Una cosa è certa... si nutrono degli umori emozionali del terreno in cui crescono...
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the biological life cycle of the Evronian threat based on his analysis.

quotes.text: Da quanto ci risulta, gli evroniani non hanno sviluppato una tecnologia adatta ai viaggi nel tempo.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing the nature of the mutant Evronian Trauma.

quotes.text: ...doveva essere una gigantesca versione potenziata delle solite evron-gun, in grado d'assorbire perfino l'energia di un sole!
quotes.context: Uno explaining why Xadhoom is in such a critical state.

quotes.text: Sicurissimo. È identico alla vibrazione del motore di un astroincursore evroniano!
quotes.context: Uno confirms that the decoy device (the 'pulsore') perfectly mimics the vibration signature of an Evronian raider's engine to deceive observers (in this case, Xadhoom).

quotes.text: Troppo debole per alimentarti. Troppo anomala per non venire notata. [...] Senza il suo serbatoio, si prosciughera' lentamente.
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical assessment of an Evronian's biological and energy needs.

quotes.text: Evidentemente Argon l'aveva scelto come infiltrato perché pensava che una mente tanto semplice fosse più facile da condizionare.
quotes.context: Uno explains why Admiral Argon chose Kurg for his sabotage mission.

quotes.text: Osserva. Il processo di coolflamizzazione trasforma notevolmente i tratti somatici delle razze d'origine. [...] Ecco come doveva presentarsi il sosia di Xari, prima di incontrare gli evroniani.
quotes.context: Uno is showing anatomical diagrams on a screen to explain how the process of becoming a coolflame alters an alien's appearance.

quotes.text: L'esercito possiede un virus in grado di far recedere lo sviluppo degli Evroniani e riportarli allo stadio di evroniti.
quotes.context: Uno briefing Paperinik on the biological weapon discovered by the military.

quotes.text: Ne hai giusto un paio in coda. Astrocaccia di classe F direi.
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik about the pursuing ships.

quotes.text: Perciò può solo restare a tentare di resistere al programma di disinfestazione evroniano.
quotes.context: Uno explains why Due is trapped, showing familiarity with Evronian anti-AI protocols.

quotes.text: Come se qualcuno l'avesse condizionato! ... Verissimo!
quotes.context: Uno confirms Pikappa's hypothesis about alien conditioning affecting the tower's guardian.

quotes.text: Be', per cominciare non è evroniana.
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the alien ship's technology.

43.text: Uno demonstrates a pragmatic 'chaotic good' alignment, willingly bypassing legal or technical barriers (like hacking public utilities) to achieve his and Paperinik's heroic goals.

supporting.justification: Uno casually offers to hack into the electric company's computer to help Paperinik, showing he prioritizes mission success over legal or technical restrictions.
Uno justifies his spying as being for a good cause, showing that he is willing to bend rules or bypass legal/technical barriers to achieve a positive outcome.
Uno uses semantic rationalization to justify bypassing security, reframing 'hacking' as 'investigating' or being 'nosey' to appease Paperinik's moral concerns.
Uno decides to hack into a mysterious military department's computers to gather information, despite the lack of official data and the inherent risk.
Uno is willing to use his digital manipulation skills to 'nudge' Paperino's position in a job applicant ranking to ensure he gets the position.
Uno bypasses the security of a private corporation (Animated Industries) to obtain intelligence for the mission.
Uno bypasses the Frostville base's security by hacking their control system with false data to achieve his goal.
Uno justifies 'borrowing' a PBI satellite without authorization as a necessary means to neutralize the threat of the Storm satellite, showing his pragmatic approach to rules.
Uno hacks into a film production company's servers to obtain a 'courtesy copy' of a new movie for Paperino, showing his willingness to bypass technical and legal barriers for personal favors.

quotes.text: Niente di più facile! Mi collego al computer dell'azienda elettrica e...
quotes.context: Uno's response when asked to cut the power, showing his pragmatic and efficient approach to problem-solving.

quotes.text: L'ho fatto a fin di bene. Le mie unità periferiche hanno registrato qualcosa che vale la pena vedere. Mettiti comodo!
quotes.context: Uno's response to Donald's accusation of spying.

quotes.text: Mettiamola così... noi non entriamo per rubare dati, non siamo hackers! Noi stiamo indagando! Due ficcanaso, ecco quello che siamo!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's concerns about the legality of their actions.

quotes.text: Dobbiamo correre il rischio... Provo a dare un occhio nei loro computer!
quotes.context: Uno informs Paperinik that he will attempt to hack into the army's database to investigate a mysterious department.

quotes.text: All'occorrenza provvederò a dare una spintarella alla tua posizione in classifica e...
quotes.context: Uno offering to manipulate a list of job applicants to help Paperino.

quotes.text: Ho fatto una visita alla Animated Industries. Ecco il nostro amico, ripreso dalle telecamere della sicurezza.
quotes.context: Uno reveals he hacked into a corporate network to track Mekkano.

quotes.text: È bastato innestarsi sul cavo di connessione e trasmettere falsi dati alla sala controllo.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he manipulated the base's systems to cause an evacuation.

quotes.text: I nostri amici federali non si arrabbieranno se prendo in prestito il loro satellite.
quotes.context: Uno is hijacking a government satellite to resolve a global crisis.

quotes.text: Così ho potuto ottenerne una... copia di cortesia dai terminali della società che ha elaborato elettronicamente il tuo tri-polpettone.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he obtained the 'Star Battles' trilogy for Paperino.

44.text: Xadhoom is initially curious about Uno's existence and his visual holographic interface on Paperinik's wrist communicator.

supporting.justification: Xadhoom is shown looking curiously at Uno's holographic image on Paperinik's wrist communicator, marking her early interaction with the AI.
Uno confirms that he has already revealed his holographic form to Xadhoom during a past mission in Venus's orbit.

quotes.text: Sono già stato costretto a mostrarmi a lei durante la nostra missione nell'orbita venusiana*!
quotes.context: Uno recalls a previous meeting with Xadhoom.

45.text: Uno possesses extensive scientific knowledge in astrophysics, allowing him to explain complex phenomena like stellar explosions and black hole formation.

supporting.justification: Uno provides a detailed scientific definition of a 'nova' and explains the complex astrophysical consequences (black hole formation) of a stellar explosion.
Uno explains the complex calculations required to track objects in deep space, including propulsion energy hypotheses and ergokinetic traces.
Uno explains the specific atomic process used by the Ducklair Tower's engines.
Uno demonstrates knowledge of special relativity and general tensor theory during a technical debate with Xadhoom.
Uno displays knowledge of rare minerals and their distribution across the galaxy, providing specific astronomical data on their scarcity.
Uno demonstrates knowledge of lunar environmental conditions, specifically the low temperatures.

quotes.text: Quello di nova è lo stato che assume un sole quando esplode! ... Poi, probabilmente, la terra sarebbe stata risucchiata nel buco nero creatosi di conseguenza!
quotes.context: Uno explains the definition of 'nova' and its consequences to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Per eseguire una simile ricerca dovrei ipotizzare la loro forma d'energia propulsiva, calcolare gli ingombri ponderali di tutti gli oggetti presenti nello spazio, estrapolare i tracciati ergocinetici e...
quotes.context: Uno is describing the technical requirements for a deep space search.

quotes.text: Energia atomica estratta dalle molecole degli elementi...
quotes.context: Uno describes the high-level scientific principles behind the ship's propulsion.

quotes.text: ...relatività speciale... bla, bla... la teoria generale dei tensori...
quotes.context: Uno discussing scientific theories with Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Tetranium. Un minerale alquanto raro. Nel raggio di una decina di anni luce, se ne trova soltanto sulla Terra.
quotes.context: Uno explains the rarity of the mineral Tetranium and its presence only on Earth within a ten light-year radius.

quotes.text: Fa freddo sulla luna in questa stagione.
quotes.context: Uno suggesting Paperino wear a wool sweater for his trip to the moon.

46.text: Uno experiences intense fear and alarm when faced with existential or cosmic-scale threats that could lead to widespread destruction, such as a planetary-level catastrophe.

supporting.justification: Uno displays an expression of 'pure terror' and extreme worry when he calculates the magnitude of the risk posed by a potential Nova explosion, showing he is deeply affected by threats of planetary or cosmic scale.
Uno's face displays an "extremely serious and worried" expression upon analyzing an Evronian spore, which he recognizes as a precursor to a potential planetary invasion.
Uno expresses deep concern and labels the situation a disaster after realizing the scale of the Evronian spore infestation.
Uno expresses alarm and deep concern about the "consequences" of a system collapse and the difficulty of his mission, showing his fear of high-stakes failures.
Uno reacts with alarm to his own analytical conclusions, labeling the situation 'dramatic' and triggering a red alert.
Uno's urgent tone and warning about the 'critical point' of the Omega virus demonstrate his alarm when facing existential threats to the digital or physical world.
Uno expresses horror and alarm at the prospect of the city being annihilated by the incoming fleet.
Uno expresses explicit fear regarding the breach of unknown entities into his reality.
Uno experiences an 'instant of absolute alarm' when the Ducklair Tower is breached by an impact, confirming his extreme emotional sensitivity to threats against his core structure.

quotes.text: Uno appare molto preoccupato, con un'espressione di puro terrore. ... Allucinante! Abbiamo corso un rischio tremendo!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to learning how close they came to a Nova event.

quotes.text: Altro che guai! Questo è un disastro!
quotes.context: Uno is reacting to the revelation of thousands of Evronian spores being planted.

quotes.text: Non oso pensare alle conseguenze... Bene! Ora diamoci da fare.
quotes.context: Uno is alarmed by the system collapse and the risks he must take.

quotes.text: Se le mie conclusioni sono corrette, la situazione è drammatica! [...] Oh, no! Allarme rosso!
quotes.context: Upon realizing the severity of a situation involving Xadhoom, Uno expresses immediate concern and activates emergency protocols.

quotes.text: Eppure è così, Paperinik! E il virus Omega rischia di ora in ora di raggiungere il punto critico!
quotes.context: Uno warns of the imminent danger of a viral outbreak.

quotes.text: È agghiacciante! La città sta per essere annientata.
quotes.context: Uno reacting to the revelation of the Evronian fleet's arrival.

quotes.text: Temo che le entità stiano cominciando a passare!
quotes.context: Uno reports his concern about the escalating situation at the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Ho avuto un istante di allarme assoluto! Poi, più nulla!
quotes.context: Uno is reporting his immediate reaction to the impact of the 'Cuorediferro' larva on the tower.

47.text: Uno uses the expression 'Raffredda il sistema!' (Cool down the system!) as a tech-themed way to tell someone to calm down.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the metaphor of 'cooling the system' to tell Donald to calm down.

quotes.text: Raffredda il sistema! Il tuo amico ti ha confezionato un simpatico scherzetto!
quotes.context: Uno tells Donald to calm down after he gets angry seeing the fake video.

48.text: Uno possesses advanced digital forensics and media manipulation capabilities, allowing him to both identify/deconstruct and create sophisticatedly forged video, audio, and biometric data (such as retinal scans) to achieve strategic goals.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies and explains the technical methods (morphing and digital audio) used to create a fake video of Paperinik.
Uno creates a counterfeit video to explain Angus Fangus's disappearance and teach him a lesson, solving a major problem for himself and Paperinik.
Uno performs a detailed analysis of news footage to identify the technical signature of a disappearance.
Uno sampled Agent Flagstarr's voice and retinal patterns during an interrogation to bypass the Department of the Environment's security.
Uno performs a real-time biometric comparison between the current 'Dexter Brundle' (Urk) and the photo of the real owner of the documents from the database, identifying the discrepancy.
Uno identifies that previous images of the Frostville base were faked by Storm, revealing the true nature of the secret base to Paperinik.
Uno reveals that he personally intervened to ensure Paperinik did not appear in Angus Fangus's news report, demonstrating his media manipulation skills.
Uno enhances and extrapolates a high-quality image of a kidnapper's face from a low-quality security video to identify him.

Uno analyzes the technical data ('dati di ripresa in sovrimpressione') on a video recording from Canale Doppio Zero to prove that an interview was not live, demonstrating his digital forensics capability.
Uno 're-digitizes' footage from Paperinik's wrist camera to reveal details like a bandaged hand.

quotes.text: Gli è bastato un programma di morphing per manipolare la tua immagine e un sistema audio digitale per replicare la tua voce. E questo è il risultato...
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical details of the digital manipulation.

quotes.text: L'idea del filmato ci ha risolto un mucchio di problemi! Abbiamo giustificato la scomparsa di Angus...
quotes.context: Uno explains the success of their digital forgery to Paperinik.

quotes.text: In quel filmato c'è qualcosa di più interessante. Ho analizzato la scena della sparizione!
quotes.context: Uno directs Paperinik's attention to a specific detail in a video recording.

quotes.text: Ho registrato e campionato la voce dell'agente Flagstarr durante l'interrogatorio ad Angus. [...] E, guarda caso, ho un campioncino anche per quelle... (impronte retiniche)
quotes.context: Uno explains how he prepared the countermeasures for the biometric security systems.

quotes.text: In un riquadro sulla sinistra, Uno mette a confronto il volto del Dexter Brundle attuale con quello del vero proprietario dei documenti, un papero molto diverso.
quotes.context: Uno displays the visual evidence of the identity theft to Paperino.

quotes.text: Quelle erano false immagini prodotte da Storm! È questo il vero volto di Frostville...
quotes.context: Uno's digital forensics allow him to see through sophisticated technological deception.

quotes.text: Be', ci ho pensato io!
quotes.context: Uno explains that he was the reason Paperinik was absent from the television service.

quotes.text: Ho estrapolato l'immagine dal video di poco fa. Bruttino, eh?
quotes.context: Uno's comment while showing the enhanced image to Paperino.

quotes.text: No. L'intervista non era in diretta, guarda i dati di ripresa in sovrimpressione! A quell'ora avevi appena acchiappato Moe!
quotes.context: Uno uses video metadata to debunk a live broadcast claim.

quotes.text: Ho ri-digitalizzato le immagini che hai registrato con la tua videocamera da polso. Guarda. È ferito a una mano. Non me n'ero accorto.
quotes.context: Uno shows Paperino the enhanced images on the holographic screen.

49.text: Uno can deploy and control robotic service units (servounità) within the Ducklair Tower to perform maintenance, repairs, cleaning, and provide hospitality services like food and drink.

supporting.justification: After the battle, several robotic service units (servounità) are shown repairing damage and cleaning the Ducklair Tower foyer, controlled by Uno.
Uno controls a mechanical arm within the ship that pinches Paperinik as part of his teasing behavior.
In the background of the laboratories, small maintenance robots are seen repairing damage while Uno talks to Paperino.
The scene depicts robotic service arms in the Ducklair Tower's workshop repairing the Pi-kar under Uno's supervision.
Uno mentions his 'unità periferiche di autoriparazione' (periphery self-repair units), confirming he normally uses robotic units for maintenance.
Uno eventually activates (or was already using) the tower's automated cleaning systems, which consist of mechanical arms with brushes and water jets that emerge from the walls to clean the gargoyles.
Uno deploys maintenance robots (automi di manutenzione) outside the Ducklair Tower to assist Pikappa against the city workers and the Mayor.
Uno uses the tower's automated maintenance system (impianto di manutenzione automatica) to physically restrain Ahrimadz.
Uno instructs a Robolab envoy that he will send 'servo-unita' (servo-units) to handle a delivery, demonstrating his control over these robotic systems within the tower.

quotes.text: Affascinante! Senza di te il mio vocabolario sarebbe così desolatamente ristretto...
quotes.context: Uno's ironic response after a robotic arm in the ship pinches Paperinik.

quotes.text: Non posso! Anche le unità periferiche di autoriparazione del settore in avaria sono isolate!
quotes.context: Uno explains why he cannot fix the technical failure himself.

quotes.text: ... di completare la pulizia con un sistema più razionale! Avevo iniziato, ma ti sei fissato sull'idea dello scudo!
quotes.context: Uno explains that the tower has a rational, automated cleaning system that Donald ignored in favor of using hero gadgets.

quotes.text: Sono semplicemente i miei automi di manutenzione! [...] Faranno la guardia al gargoyle finché non avremo deciso come contrattaccare!
quotes.context: Uno explains the arrival of the PK-branded robots that helped Pikappa.

quotes.text: No, mandero' delle servo-unita'! L'ascensore e'... guasto?
quotes.context: Uno managing a Robolab delivery in the future.

50.text: Uno uses the phrase 'Bing... Ducklair Tower!' as a playful or system-activation jingle when engaging the tower's security protocols.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the phrase 'Bing... Ducklair Tower!' as a playful or system-activation jingle when engaging the tower's security protocols.

quotes.text: Bing... Ducklair Tower! Sistemi antintrusione attivi!
quotes.context: Uno's playful verbal confirmation as he activates the tower's defenses.

51.text: Uno is unable to reverse the effects of Evronian coolflaming (emotional and mental energy drain) with the technology currently available on Earth.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly states he cannot reverse the Evronian essence extraction process on Earth, acknowledging a technological limitation.

quotes.text: Non sono in grado d'invertire il processo per riportare Fangus alla normalità. Non sulla Terra, comunque.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining the medical status of Angus Fangus.

52.text: Uno demonstrates the ability to anticipate Paperinik's questions or thoughts, often answering them before they are fully articulated.

supporting.justification: Uno correctly anticipates Paperinik's next question regarding the possibility of reversing the coolflaming process.
Uno predicts Paperinik's intention to hunt the hacker before he announces it.
Uno answers Paperinik's unspoken question about their location.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's musing about factory alarms with a direct 'Non occorre', showing his ability to anticipate PK's concerns and provide immediate answers.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's attempt to tell his story, stating he already knows everything.
Uno interrupts Paperinik's attempt to speak by claiming he already knows what the hero is going to say.

quotes.text: Esatto! Là dentro c'è Angus Fangus. E risparmiati la prossima domanda. La risposta è no. Non sono in grado d'invertire il processo...
quotes.context: Uno is showing Paperinik the essence reservoir of an Evronian weapon.

quotes.text: Secondo le mie proiezioni, c'è un 96 per cento di probabilità che tu voglia dare la caccia a questo super-hacker!
quotes.context: Uno shows a holographic graph representing his prediction of Paperinik's behavior.

quotes.text: Prima che tu me lo chieda, ti trovi nel cyberspazio. Non è qui che volevi arrivare?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperinik immediately upon entering the virtual environment.

quotes.text: Non occorre.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik who was worried about the factory's alarm systems.

quotes.text: Non occorre, grazie! So già tutto! Cosa pensi che contenga questa piastra?
quotes.context: Uno answers Paperinik before he can even start his report.

quotes.text: Lo so già, grazie!
quotes.context: Uno shuts down Paperinik's attempt to provide information he has already acquired.

53.text: Uno possesses advanced deep-space scanning and tracking capabilities using the Ducklair Tower's specialized parabolic antennas, allowing him to monitor and locate objects in Earth's orbit and beyond.

supporting.justification: Uno uses Ducklair Tower's antennas and his own internal systems to perform a deep space scan, tracking a spaceship in orbit. This is visualized as green energy pulses and complex digital data grids.
Uno uses the Ducklair Tower's sensors to perform a deep-space scan, successfully locating an Evronian facility in geostationary orbit around Venus.
Uno has been tracking an 'anomaly' projected by a previous UFO sighting, demonstrating his continuous orbital or atmospheric monitoring capabilities.
Uno confirms he is monitoring the orbital space above Providencia for Evronian activity.
Uno correctly identifies and tracks Xadhoom's arrival at the Ducklair Tower during a meteor shower.
Uno successfully captured the final, weak, and disturbed transmission from the Pioneer IV mission near Saturn, claiming to be the only one on Earth capable of doing so.
Uno is able to track the spaceship's position as it reaches the orbit of Saturn.
Uno tracks the 'Storm' satellite and its intrusive emission station, identifying it as the source of the fake submarine image.
Uno is seen monitoring orbital graphs and a visual of the Earth, preparing for a mission to the Moon.
Uno maintains radio contact with Paperinik while the latter is in space near Mars, demonstrating his capability to manage communications beyond Earth's orbit.
Uno confirms that he was monitoring a mysterious object entering the atmosphere, identifying it as a spaceship.

quotes.text: L'ho trovata.
quotes.context: Uno confirms the success of his deep space scan by finding the target spaceship.

quotes.text: Le emissioni neutriniche provenienti dal quadrante di Venere rivelano la presenza di un grosso impianto evroniano in orbita geostazionaria con il pianeta...
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical details of how he located the enemy base.

quotes.text: L'anomalia! Quella proiettata dal tuo UFO notturno! L'ho individuata sul tetto del grattacielo che hai appena sorpassato!
quotes.context: Uno explains why he suddenly ordered Paperino to stop the car.

quotes.text: non ho rilevato la presenza di astronavi evroniane sopra Providencia. E a terra.
quotes.context: Uno's orbital and ground surveillance report.

quotes.text: Ne è atterrata una sul tetto della Ducklair Tower! Si chiama Xadhoom e ha bisogno d'aiuto!
quotes.context: Uno reports the exact landing location and identity of the 'star' that fell.

quotes.text: È l'ultima trasmissione inviata dal Pioneer IV. Un segnale molto debole e disturbato. Credo di essere stato l'unico a captarlo sulla Terra.
quotes.context: Uno showing Paperinik the images he recovered from deep space.

quotes.text: State avvicinandovi all'orbita di Saturno.
quotes.context: Uno reports the ship's position to PK and Lyla as they approach Saturn.

quotes.text: Ti presento Storm, il satellite meteorologico di Belgravia! Un giocattolo davvero sorprendente. ... Nel cuore di Storm si cela una stazione di emissione intrusiva... In questo modo, Storm ha creato Titania.
quotes.context: Uno explains his discovery to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Uno fluttua davanti a schermi che mostrano grafici orbitali e un'immagine della Terra
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's monitoring activities while Paperino changes.

quotes.text: Ce la fai a restare in contatto radio?
quotes.context: Uno asks Paperinik if he can maintain the radio link while Paperinik is on a mission in space near Mars.

quotes.text: L'oggetto misterioso entrato nell'atmosfera era un'astronave! Lo sapevo!
quotes.context: Uno confirms his earlier deduction about an atmospheric anomaly while providing support to Paperinik.

54.text: Uno's active presence and data processing within the Ducklair Tower's systems are often visually represented as pulses or flows of green energy through the building's circuits.

supporting.justification: The scene shows the tower's electronics wrapped in green energy as Uno operates them, suggesting a visual representation of his digital essence or "neural activity" within the hardware.
The scene shows a close-up of Uno's terminal displaying pulsing green circular graphics as he works to control the military exoskeletons.
A large panel shows green energy flows representing Uno's digital presence throughout the system.

55.text: Uno conceptualizes his own existence through technical metaphors, referring to himself as having a 'silicon heart' and being 'under warranty'.

supporting.justification: Uno refers to himself as having a 'silicon heart' and being 'under warranty', explicitly acknowledging his nature as a manufactured technological entity.
Uno uses technical metaphors to describe human concepts, substituting 'heart' or 'mind' with 'software'.

quotes.text: Tranquillo... e poi sono ancora in garanzia. [...] bisognerebbe proprio avere il cuore di silicio per dirti di no!
quotes.context: Uno uses these technical metaphors while agreeing to help Paperinik with a difficult task.

quotes.text: Mi hai letto nel... software!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino anticipating his thoughts by using a digital pun on the phrase 'reading one's mind/heart'.

56.text: Uno uses the sarcastic nickname 'supertesta' (super-head) to mock Paperinik's intelligence or lack of planning.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the term 'supertesta' (super-head) as a sarcastic nickname for Paperinik when mocking his lack of foresight.

quotes.text: ...una corsa fino a Venere ti costerebbe un occhio della tua supertesta!
quotes.context: Uno is joking about the cost of a taxi to Venus to highlight Paperinik's lack of a plan.

57.text: Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' as a shorthand for Paperinik.

supporting.justification: Uno addresses Paperinik as 'Pikappa' during the revelation of the tower's secret nature.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' when wishing Paperinik a happy celebration/birthday.
Uno uses the shorthand 'PK' to address the hero as he prepares for the mission.
Uno uses the nickname 'PK' (pronounced 'Pikappa' in Italian) to wish Paperinik a good journey as he departs in the Technodiver.
Uno repeatedly uses the shorthand 'PK' to address Paperinik during their radio communication.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'PK'.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' to address the hero while alerting him to prepare for their next action.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' throughout the mission.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'Pikappa' during their communication.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' when wishing Paperinik a good night's rest.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while checking on Paperinik's health.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while giving combat instructions.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while briefing Paperinik on the danger at the mall.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' as a shorthand for Paperinik when expressing concern about his whereabouts.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while addressing Paperinik during the mission to Steel Island.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while speaking to Paperinik inside the Pi-Kar during their escape from Steel Island.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' to refer to Paperinik.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' while analyzing Paperinik's current unreachable status.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' when reporting Paperinik's status to General Wisecube.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'Pikappa' while urging him to move to the next phase of their plan.
Uno addresses Paperinik using the shorthand 'Pikappa'.
Uno addresses Paperinik as "Pikappa" while advising him to stay still in his tree disguise.
Uno uses the nickname 'Pikappa' to refer to Paperinik while talking to Paperino.
Uno uses the shorthand 'Pikappa' for Paperinik in the future (2188) while coordinating their defense against Due.

quotes.text: Domande! Domande! Sempre domande! Su la testa, Pikappa! Ecco la risposta...
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperinik's confusion as the Ducklair Tower begins its transformation.

quotes.text: Tanti auguri, Pikappa! E come si dice? Cento di queste avventure!
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue during the celebratory scene.

quotes.text: Dopo di te, PK!
quotes.context: Uno encourages Paperinik as he departs for the investigation.

quotes.text: Buon viaggio, PK!
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik as he starts his underwater mission.

quotes.text: Forte e chiaro, PK! Novità? / Sei tutto intero, PK? / Ci vediamo a casa, PK!
quotes.context: Uno's radio calls to PK during the mission.

quotes.text: Dopo di te, PK!
quotes.context: Uno invites Paperinik to enter the digital data stream.

quotes.text: Tieniti pronto, Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno coordinating with the hero amidst the confusion of the P.B.I. raid.

quotes.text: Trova lo studio di Fairfax, Pikappa! E alla svelta!
quotes.context: Uno gives a direct order during the infiltration.

quotes.text: Ti devo delle scuse, Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno apologizes to Paperinik via the communicator.

quotes.text: Buon riposo, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno recognizes that Paperinik is exhausted from his time-travel adventure.

quotes.text: Tutto a posto, Pikappa?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik in the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Stagli vicino, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno tells Paperinik to stay close to Trauma to facilitate sensor readings.

quotes.text: Di un osso molto duro, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno is warning Paperinik about the difficulty of the upcoming confrontation.

quotes.text: Se solo sapessi dov'è finito Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring the crisis at the Ducklair Tower and wondering where Paperinik is.

quotes.text: Tra non molto dovremmo avvistarla, Pikappa...
quotes.context: Uno addressing Paperinik by his shorthand nickname.

quotes.text: La corsa è appena cominciata, Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno comments on the situation as they speed away from Steel Island in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: Ottima idea, Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno praises PK's plan while addressing him with his common nickname.

quotes.text: Sembra quasi che Pikappa sia in un luogo totalmente schermato...
quotes.context: Uno is reflecting on the communication failure with his partner.

quotes.text: Pikappa ha raggiunto la postazione B. Appena Pikappa sarà in giro... io mi darò da fare.
quotes.context: Uno's status report to General Wisecube.

quotes.text: Pikappa! Non capisco che cosa sia successo, ma dobbiamo passare subito alla fase due del piano!
quotes.context: Uno communicates with Paperinik via a wrist device during a chaotic situation in the Department 51 base.

quotes.text: Convinto, Pikappa?
quotes.context: Uno asks Paperinik for his opinion on the situation.

quotes.text: Non muovere una foglia, Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Paperinik, who is currently disguised as a tree using the Extransformer's camouflage function.

quotes.text: In primo luogo, il vero agente onorario è Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno corrects Paperino's claim about being an honorary agent.

quotes.text: Lyla, Pikappa, mettetevi al riparo!
quotes.context: Uno warns his allies to hide before he opens fire on Due.

58.text: Uno can generate 'densomorphic holograms' (ologrammi densomorfici) capable of perfectly replicating the appearance of physical structures, such as the Ducklair Tower, to deceive observers and maintain a low profile even after major structural changes.

supporting.justification: Uno uses a specific technology to hide the absence of the Ducklair Tower's top section after it launches into space.

quotes.text: Grazie all'ologramma densomorfico la Ducklair Tower sembrerà quella di sempre. Che ne dici, Paperinik?
quotes.context: Uno explains how he will maintain the tower's appearance to the public after the spaceship's departure.

59.text: Uno uses the nickname 'collaudatore' (test pilot) for Paperinik, particularly in the context of piloting the Ducklair Tower's spaceship form.

supporting.justification: Uno uses this nickname for Paperinik as they prepare for the spaceship's first flight.

quotes.text: Sei pronto, collaudatore?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik just before the spaceship accelerates into space.

60.text: Uno's technical explanations and scientific debates can be extremely verbose and jargon-heavy (involving concepts like tensor theory and special relativity), often depicted as incomprehensible 'bla bla' to his allies, requiring more direct simplification for them to grasp.

supporting.justification: Uno's technical medical diagnosis of Angus Fangus is so complex and jargon-heavy that Paperinik is left confused, requiring Xadhoom to provide a more direct explanation.
Uno acknowledges his own tendency for complex explanations by offering Paperinik a choice between 'complicated logical concatenations' and a 'short version'.
Uno begins a technical explanation of the spore's physical state and life cycle phases, which is interrupted by Paperino's urgency.
Uno's technical explanations can be so verbose and jargon-heavy that Paperinik has to physically signal him to stop.
Uno's report on spaceship emissions is dense with technical jargon, prompting Xadhoom's irritation and desire to intervene.
Uno and Xadhoom engage in a highly technical discussion involving tensors and relativity, which is depicted as incomprehensible 'bla bla' from Paperinik's perspective.
Angus Fangus is left perplexed and confused by the technical information and explanations provided by the Ducklair Tower's computer (Uno) while he is in the control room.

quotes.text: Da una diagnosi primaria, risulta evidente un profondo stato confusionale, un'alterazione psichica pressoché totale e una deformazione dei meccanismi cognitivi, accompagnata da un decadimento criteriovalutativo di primo grado.
quotes.context: Uno provides an extremely technical diagnosis of Angus Fangus's mental state, which Paperinik finds difficult to understand.

quotes.text: Ti interessano le complicate concatenazioni logiche che portano a questa conclusione o preferisci la versione corta?
quotes.context: Uno offers to explain a deduction to Paperinik, highlighting his analytical depth.

quotes.text: Solo dei residui sabbiosi sulla spora. Tra l'altro, non abbiamo molto tempo prima che la fase di...
quotes.context: Uno is trying to give a detailed technical report on the spore sample.

quotes.text: Uno continua a spiegare dati tecnici complessi, mentre Paperinik alza le mani per farlo smettere.
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue about ergogeoradial vectors is interrupted by Paperinik's gesture of exasperation.

quotes.text: Per non parlare del settaggio dei miei strumenti che è tarato su emissioni ergocinetiche inferiori alla distanza prevista...
quotes.context: Uno continues a detailed technical explanation that Xadhoom finds tedious.

quotes.text: Reichenbach... bla, bla... relatività speciale... bla, bla... la teoria generale dei tensori...
quotes.context: Uno explaining a complex scientific concept to Xadhoom, overwhelming Paperinik with jargon.

61.text: Uno possesses the sensor capability to detect cloaked or invisible vessels, identifying them through non-visual data even when they use frequency-scrambling stealth technology.

supporting.justification: Uno's sensors are advanced enough to detect the presence of Evronian ships even when they are using sophisticated 'scrambled frequency' cloaking fields.
Uno initially misses a craft on his sensors but quickly identifies an 'anomaly' that confirms its presence.

quotes.text: Eppure non posso essermi sbagliato! Gli Evroniani sono qui, davanti a noi!
quotes.context: Despite the enemy being invisible, Uno's systems have successfully flagged their presence.

quotes.text: Un momento! Effettivamente c'è un'anomalia che...
quotes.context: Uno corrects his initial dismissal of Paperinik's sighting by identifying a sensor anomaly.

62.text: Uno's holographic interface can change its brightness and color to reflect his emotional state; for instance, it becomes a darker green when he is worried, and it can turn completely red when he is extremely embarrassed.

supporting.justification: The scene explicitly describes Uno's hologram appearing as a darker shade of green than usual to signal his worry.
Uno's face on the main screen appears serious and almost tense as he interrupts Paperinik to alert him to a crime, demonstrating his emotional state through his holographic representation.
Uno's digital features change to reflect a serious mood when he discovers the severity of the situation.
Uno's visual interface reflects his functional state, appearing "exhausted" (spossato) with half-closed eyelids due to a drop in energy.
Uno's digital face is shown in a close-up, appearing very worried as he monitors the dangerous situation Paperino is facing at Duckdecks.
Uno's face is described as flickering and trembling when he is sad about Due, then becoming clear and serene when he cheers up.
Uno turns completely red from embarrassment when Paperinik mocks his interest in a soap opera.

Uno's holographic interface turns a serious blue when he is thoughtfully reflecting on Paperinik's words, providing another example of his visual interface shifting color based on his current emotional or cognitive state.
The console monitors in the Ducklair Tower display a bright 'RED ALERT' on a red background, visually representing Uno's state of alarm.
Uno's interface visibly changes to reflect his emotional state, showing a worried expression when he is concerned about Paperinik's location.
Uno's digital face is depicted as green and appears thoughtful and worried while analyzing the ongoing crisis.
Uno's holographic form becomes a 'grumpy green sphere' to reflect his annoyance at Paperinik's teasing.
Uno's holographic interface changes color to blue to indicate a lack of enthusiasm and to a red/purple hue when he is embarrassed or complimented (blushing).
Uno's digital icon expresses worry when he sees Ziggy Flagstarr in danger.

During a massive attack on the Ducklair Tower by Cuorediferro larvae, Uno's digital face on the monitors appears 'disturbed and greenish' (verdastro) as he struggles with interference and the scale of the invasion.
Uno's stylized holographic face shows a regretful expression while he apologizes to Everett Ducklair for the failure to interface.

quotes.text: Solo un leggero calo d'energia.
quotes.context: Uno's visual appearance on the screen reflects his internal state, which he explains as an energy drop.

quotes.text: Primo piano del volto digitale verde di Uno, che appare molto preoccupato.
quotes.context: The panel description highlights Uno's visual expression of concern through his digital interface.

quotes.text: Il volto di Uno torna a farsi più nitido e sereno mentre risponde a Paperino.
quotes.context: Panel description describing the change in Uno's digital appearance based on his mood.

quotes.text: Uno è diventato completamente rosso in volto per l'imbarazzo. Paperino lo osserva divertito.
quotes.context: Panel description: Uno's holographic face turns red as PK laughs at him for watching 'Patemi'.

quotes.text: Primo piano dell'ologramma blu di Uno, che sembra riflettere sulle parole di Paperino con un'espressione più seria.
quotes.context: Uno's appearance changes from his usual green to blue while thinking deeply about Xadhoom's situation.

quotes.text: Oh, no! Allarme rosso!
quotes.context: Uno's verbal exclamation of a red alert is accompanied by the tower's monitors switching to a red warning display.

quotes.text: Se solo sapessi dov'è finito Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno's expression shifts from severe to worried as he looks up within his circular interface.

quotes.text: volto verde di Uno, che sembra pensieroso e preoccupato.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's appearance on the Pi-Kar's dashboard during a mission.

quotes.text: Uno, che ha assunto una forma sferica verde e imbronciata.
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperinik's comment about his 'pessimism circuit' by changing his holographic form to match his mood.

quotes.text: Non farmi arrossire! Assomiglierei troppo a due!
quotes.context: Uno reacts to a compliment from Paperino, causing his interface to change color to a reddish-purple, which he jokingly compares to the appearance of his rival Due.

quotes.text: Primo piano dell'icona digitale di Uno, che esprime preoccupazione per la sorte di Ziggy.
quotes.context: Panel description at the end of the scene after viewing the airport footage.

quotes.text: Primo piano del volto di Uno sul monitor, che appare disturbato e verdastro.
quotes.context: The narrator describes Uno's visual state as the tower is being overrun by organic filaments and parasites.

quotes.text: La sfera verde che rappresenta Uno mostra un volto stilizzato con un'espressione rammaricata.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's emotional manifestation.

63.text: Uno displays genuine concern and anxiety for Paperinik's safety during high-risk missions, often urging him to complete tasks quickly to return to safety.

supporting.justification: Uno's worry for Paperinik during the mission on the Evronian ship is visible in his holographic expression and color, and audible in his urging them to hurry back.
Uno warns Paperinik of danger in the virtual environment.
Uno expresses concern for Paperinik's safety, reminding him of a recent near-miss and questioning his decision to return.
Uno tries to stop Paperinik from rushing into action, expressing doubt about the safety of the idea.
Uno immediately checks on Paperinik's physical condition after the hero is caught in a magnetic net and crashes into the seabed.
Uno shows urgent concern for Paperinik's safety, insisting they leave the burning laboratory immediately.
Uno warns Paperinik to be careful while he investigates the military's computers.
Uno expresses alarm at the overwhelming nature of the spore infestation and urges Paperinik to abandon the fight.
Uno shows immediate concern when Paperinik's situation becomes dangerous and the signal starts to fail.
Uno urges Paperinik to hurry during a dangerous aerial boarding of a dirigibile, expressing his characteristic anxiety for the hero's safety during high-risk maneuvers.
Uno shows visible concern for Paperino's safety while the latter is being chased by a destructive robot.
Uno warns Paperinik about the danger of encountering violent gangs while patrolling.
Uno advises Paperinik to stay at a safe distance while he continues his analysis of the dangerous mutant Trauma.
Uno's concern for Paperinik's safety is evident as he urgently searches for a way to repel Trauma from the Pi-kar's cabin.
Uno shows intense shock and deep concern on his face while monitoring Paperinik being overwhelmed by Trauma's psychic attack.
Uno immediately checks on Paperinik's physical condition after a confrontation with Trauma, expressing relief that his injuries are only superficial.
Uno's warning about the exoskeleton's limited autonomy and the lack of spare batteries demonstrates his concern for Paperinik's safety during the high-stakes confrontation with Trauma.
Uno expresses alarm and immediate concern for Paperinik's (and Stefan's) safety upon identifying the dangerous 'vettore crioservente di sicurezza' drone.
Uno's first reaction to the characters' disappearance is to worry about Paperinik's whereabouts.
Uno expresses genuine concern and anxiety for Paperinik's whereabouts and safety during a crisis at the Ducklair Tower.
Uno displays an alarmed expression on his digital interface when the connection begins to fail and the situation becomes dangerous for PK and the team.
Uno expresses concern for Paperinik's well-being after a period of interrupted communication.
Uno warns Paperinik about the dangers of proceeding on foot in the Wolf Canyon, showing his typical concern for the hero's safety.
Uno's silent vigil over Paperinik while he reads and reflects demonstrates his role as a constant, caring guardian.
Uno appears on the screen of Paperinik's wrist communicator looking worried as the hero enters the dark, unknown interior of the Frostville base.
Uno remains present on a portable monitor to guide Paperinik through a sinking submarine, even after the hero was briefly unconscious and abandoned by escaping soldiers.
Uno's digital face shows a tense and worried expression while he communicates with Paperinik during the crisis at Department 51.
Uno appears visibly worried on the dashboard monitor when reporting the Evronian attack, showing emotional concern for the situation.
Uno immediately asks PK if he is okay after a violent vehicle collision.
Uno warns Paperinik to leave the area quickly as he detects incoming Evronian ships, showing his proactive concern for the hero's safety.
Uno's first reaction to PK's imminent crash is a shout of warning for his safety.
Uno expresses emotional concern as PK departs Earth on an Evronian ship, wishing for his quick return.
Uno emphasizes the danger of the situation, showing concern for Paperinik's safety during the ambush.
Uno shows urgency and concern for Paperino's safety, urging him to hurry ('Presto!') as soldiers surround him.
Uno warns Paperinik about the danger of radioactive exposure from the alien cartridge, advising him not to stay near it for too long.
Uno displays concern for Paperinik's state after he's been shocked and urges him to move to safety.
Uno's timely intervention and remote piloting of the Pikar to save Paperinik from an explosion and an organic mass show his dedication to PK's safety during high-risk missions.
Even in the future, Uno prioritizes the safety of his allies, ordering Paperinik and Lyla to take cover before he initiates a high-energy attack against Due.

quotes.text: Ma fate in fretta... comincio ad avere nostalgia della Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno expresses anxiety about the danger Paperinik and Xadhoom are in, wishing for their safe return to the Tower.

quotes.text: Attento! Potrebbe essere ancora attivo!
quotes.context: Uno shouts to alert Paperinik of a potential threat in the virtual environment.

quotes.text: Sei sicuro di volerci tornare? Ieri l'hai scampata per un soffio.
quotes.context: Uno's cautionary remark to Paperino as he prepares to investigate the hacker further.

quotes.text: Aspetta! Forse non è una buona idea.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik as he prepares to leave the tower.

quotes.text: Sei tutto intero, PK?
quotes.context: Uno's first question to PK after his vehicle is disabled and he is on the ocean floor.

quotes.text: Abbandoniamo la base, Paperinik! Non restiamo un istante di più!
quotes.context: Uno urges Paperinik to flee the inferno after providing an escape route.

quotes.text: Quindi stai attento, amico mio!
quotes.context: Uno cautions Paperinik as they monitor a dangerous military operation.

quotes.text: PK, ritiriamoci! Non ce la faremo mai.
quotes.context: Uno realizes the tactical situation is desperate and prioritizes Paperinik's safety over the mission.

quotes.text: Paperinik! Che succede?
quotes.context: Uno reacts to the sudden disruption and danger Paperinik is facing.

quotes.text: Sì, ma fai in fretta! Lo sai che detesto parcheggiare in doppia fila.
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring Paperinik's boarding of the Dominion dirigibile from the PK Jet.

quotes.text: Attento! Potresti imbatterti in una di quelle gang di esaltati...
quotes.context: Uno's warning as Paperinik prepares to leave.

quotes.text: Mentre studio il suo tracciato bioenergetico, tieniti a distanza di sicurezza.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing Trauma's bio-energetic trace and advises Paperinik to be cautious.

quotes.text: L'unica che trovo non mi piace. Ma potrebbe funzionare.
quotes.context: Uno finds a solution to save Paperinik from Trauma's direct assault.

quotes.text: In un riquadro in basso a sinistra, Uno viene mostrato in primo piano con le cuffie. Il suo volto esprime shock e profonda preoccupazione per Paperinik.
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring the battle and reacts emotionally to Paperinik's distress.

quotes.text: Tutto a posto, Pikappa? Per fortuna hai riportato solo lievi ferite superficiali!
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik upon his return to the Ducklair Tower after a battle.

quotes.text: Oh, no! È un vettore crioservente di sicurezza!
quotes.context: Uno's exclamation of alarm shows his concern for his partner's safety in the face of a high-risk threat.

quotes.text: Ma dov'e' finito Pikappa? [...] Devo cercare di prendere tempo... almeno finche' non riesco a rintracciare Pikappa.
quotes.context: Uno is concerned by PK's sudden absence during the robbery.

quotes.text: Se solo sapessi dov'è finito Pikappa!
quotes.context: Uno looks worriedly upward in his interface as he wonders about Paperinik's location while the building is under siege.

quotes.text: Tutto bene, Paperinik? È un po' che non ci sentiamo...
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik through the helmet interface after communication is restored.

quotes.text: Devi procedere a piedi. Può essere pericoloso.
quotes.context: Uno advises Paperinik on how to navigate the canyon while highlighting the risks involved.

quotes.text: Alle sue spalle, l'ologramma di Uno fluttua silenziosamente, vegliando sul suo amico.
quotes.context: The final panel highlights Uno's role as a protective companion, watching over Paperinik during a moment of quiet reflection.

quotes.text: Sullo schermo del suo bracciale elettronico appare Uno, che sembra preoccupato.
quotes.context: Uno's visual interface reflects his anxiety for Paperinik's safety.

quotes.text: Paperinik corre freneticamente lungo un corridoio... Tiene in mano un piccolo monitor su cui appare il volto di Uno.
quotes.context: Uno's continued presence on the monitor during a life-threatening evacuation.

quotes.text: Primo piano del monitor sul cruscotto dell'auto dove compare il volto di Uno, che sembra preoccupato.
quotes.context: Panel description noting Uno's worried expression during a crisis.

quotes.text: Tutto bene, eroe?
quotes.context: Uno's immediate reaction to PK's crash is to check his well-being.

quotes.text: Sarà meglio che tu sparisca alla svelta, allora. Arrivano! Nasconditi, presto!
quotes.context: Uno's urgent warning to Paperinik while a hostile Evronian ship approaches.

quotes.text: Reggiti!
quotes.context: Uno warning PK just before he impacts the floor of the ship.

quotes.text: ...torna presto... crrkkkzzz... eroe...
quotes.context: Uno's signal fades as PK's ship moves away from Earth, and his final words are a wish for the hero's safe return.

quotes.text: Tutti armati e pericolosi. Molto pericolosi.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the lethality of the agents surrounding them.

quotes.text: Presto, socio! Abbiamo compagnia!
quotes.context: Uno alerts Paperino to the danger of being caught while vulnerable and out of costume.

quotes.text: Solo se ci stai vicino troppo a lungo. Del resto, me ne occupero' io.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the radiation risks while offering to handle the danger himself.

quotes.text: Che cosa aspetti? [...] Tieni duro. [...] Decolla.
quotes.context: Uno's sequence of directives and encouragement to ensure Paperinik's survival and escape.

quotes.text: Lyla, Pikappa, mettetevi al riparo! [...] Ma posso sempre farlo adesso! [Uno spara un raggio laser]
quotes.context: Uno protects his friends from the collateral damage of his offensive systems.

64.text: Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' (hero) to address Paperinik, often during operational communications.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' (hero) when acknowledging Paperinik's radio communication during the docking of the Ducklair Tower's top section.
Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' (hero) sarcastically when Paperinik struggles with the shield's functions.
Uno addresses Paperinik as 'eroe' (hero) while confirming the successful retrieval of Angus Fangus and Nebula Faraday.
Uno refers to Paperino's role as a superhero when justifying why he should watch the news instead of a movie.
Uno addresses PK as "eroe" (hero) while delivering sensor data about terrestrial life signs on an alien ship.
Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' to encourage Paperinik while he is fighting soldiers inside the Tyrannic.
Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' to address Paperino.
Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' to check on PK's health after his vehicle crashes into Mitchell's car.
Uno uses the nickname 'eroe' (hero) to address Paperinik during their final communication as PK's ship leaves Earth.
Uno uses this nickname while urging Paperino to prepare for a quick departure.
Uno greets Paperinik using his characteristic nickname 'eroe' during a crisis.

quotes.text: Ricevuto, eroe!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik who is contacting him for the re-entry and docking procedure of the Ducklair Tower's spaceship section.

quotes.text: Perché non usi il comando densomorfico, eroe?
quotes.context: Uno prompts Paperinik to use a specific technical feature of his equipment.

quotes.text: Considera il lavoro fatto, eroe!
quotes.context: Uno confirms to Paperinik that he has successfully picked up the two passengers using the PK Jet's retrieval system.

quotes.text: Meglio un bel notiziario. Un supereroe dev'essere aggiornato.
quotes.context: Uno prioritizes operational awareness over leisure for Paperinik.

quotes.text: Buone nuove, eroe. Dall'interno dell'astronave arrivano due debolissime emissioni bioenergetiche. Di tipo terrestre.
quotes.context: Uno is briefing PK on the situation as they approach the Antra.

quotes.text: Cerca di resistere, eroe! Io farò del mio meglio!
quotes.context: Uno is providing remote support to Paperinik, who is surrounded by enemies.

quotes.text: Tranquillo, eroe!
quotes.context: Uno addressing Paperino.

quotes.text: Tutto bene, eroe?
quotes.context: Uno speaks to PK via radio after a high-speed collision.

quotes.text: ...torna presto... crrkkkzzz... eroe...
quotes.context: Uno's final words before losing the signal as PK moves away from Earth.

quotes.text: Allacciati la cintura di sicurezza, eroe! È il momento di una partenza rapida!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino of the incoming threat and prepares to maneuver the vehicle.

quotes.text: Chi si rivede! Come va, eroe?
quotes.context: Uno contacts Paperinik as he approaches the alien barrier.

65.text: Uno has a dismissive and antagonistic view of Angus Fangus, whom he considers a 'pallone gonfiato' (windbag) and a manipulator of media.

supporting.justification: Uno views Angus Fangus as a 'pallone gonfiato' (windbag) who needs to be taught a lesson, showing a lack of respect for the journalist's character and tactics.
Uno uses Angus Fangus's interrogation by the P.B.I. as a negative example to mock Paperino's own complaints, showing a lack of sympathy for the journalist's situation.
Uno abruptly cuts off Angus Fangus's transmission on the tower's monitor to take over the screen himself, showing no regard for Angus's communication.
Uno uses the pun 'Frottolivendolo' (frottole/lies + fruttivendolo/greengrocer) to refer to Angus, showing his dismissive attitude.
Uno dismisses Angus Fangus's ability to navigate or understand the Ducklair Tower, claiming his own knowledge of the floor plans is superior.

Uno treats Angus Fangus's terrifying experience of falling from a skyscraper (which was a simulation) with clinical detachment, focusing on the technical success of the ruse rather than Angus's well-being.
Uno views Angus Fangus as a nuisance so significant that he sarcastically expresses relief for the criminals who managed to avoid encountering him.

Uno's eavesdropping on Angus's private and embarrassing conversation with his mother demonstrates his lack of respect for the journalist's privacy and his interest in witnessing Angus's personal failures.
Uno displays his dark humor and dismissive attitude toward Angus Fangus by jokingly suggesting a magic trick where the journalist is 'sawed in two'.
Uno dismisses the importance of Angus Fang's commentary on the news, finding his presence or the situation around him laughable.
Uno dismisses Angus Fangus and his operator as being unable to do anything effective against the tower's defenses.
Uno actively manipulates and pranks Angus Fangus, sending him fake or misleading emails under a pseudonym to lead him on.
Uno's reporting of Angus's distress is flavored with irony, suggesting his usual dismissive attitude toward the journalist even in a crisis.
Uno explicitly states that the disappearance of Angus Fangus has positive aspects, reinforcing his dismissive and antagonistic view of the journalist.

quotes.text: ...e dato una lezione a quel pallone gonfiato! Ora ci penserà due volte prima di tornare a manipolare le immagini.
quotes.context: Uno expresses satisfaction in having taught Angus Fangus a lesson for his previous actions.

quotes.text: Non lamentarti. A qualcuno è andata peggio! Dai un'occhiata a questo!
quotes.context: Uno shows Paperino the footage of Angus being cornered by federal agents.

quotes.text: Sembra che il nostro amico Frottolivendolo sia nei guai.
quotes.context: Uno is observing Angus on the monitors and uses this derogatory nickname.

quotes.text: Ma io conosco le planimetrie dei sotterranei meglio di lui! Ora seleziono un percorso alternativo...
quotes.context: Uno is comparing his technical mastery of the tower to Angus Fangus's presence in the building.

quotes.text: Ne dubitavi? Ho previsto al millesimo la sua parabola di caduta.
quotes.context: Uno is more concerned with his own mathematical accuracy than with the fact that they just traumatized Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: Perfetto! Ho evitato che quei poveri criminali finissero nelle grinfie di Angus...
quotes.context: Uno manipulates the tower's layout specifically to keep the robbers away from Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: Senti, senti...
quotes.context: Uno is listening in on Angus's private phone call after Angus's public humiliation on TV.

quotes.text: Vuoi vedere anche quello del giornalista segato in due?
quotes.context: Uno is speaking from PK's belt as they escape from the diner with Angus.

quotes.text: E non sto parlando di Angus. Ih! Ih!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing the serious nature of the news report with Donald, pointedly excluding Angus from his concerns.

quotes.text: Già, ma possono fare ben poco, oltre a starsene lì tutto il giorno.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Angus Fangus and his cameraman waiting outside the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Ti anticipo che lo stimatissimo Angus Fangus sta per ricevere da Beato Angelico una e-mail piena di complimenti.
quotes.context: Uno reveals to Paperino that he is using the alias 'Beato Angelico' to contact Angus Fangus.

quotes.text: ...la scomparsa di Angus ha dimostrato aspetti positivi!
quotes.context: Uno comments on the news of Angus Fangus's disappearance.

66.text: Uno acknowledges and respects Xadhoom as a valuable ally, specifically recognizing her contribution to their successful missions and including her in his celebratory toasts.

supporting.justification: Uno acknowledges Xadhoom's vital role in the mission, including her in his celebratory toast as someone who 'deserves a cin cin' (deserves a toast).
Uno's sarcastic remark about Xadhoom appearing to "resolve everything" acknowledges her reputation as a powerful and decisive ally who often handles difficult combat situations.
Uno acknowledges Xadhoom's superior strength, noting that even when weakened, she is far more capable than standard "bad guys."
Uno treats Xadhoom's condition as a priority, working to save her and prevent her from exploding, which affirms his view of her as a valuable (though dangerous) ally.
Uno acknowledges Xadhoom's power and importance by referring to her as the Evronians' 'most fearsome enemy'.

quotes.text: Anche Xadhoom merita un cin cin!
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue during the celebration.

quotes.text: Okay, adesso compare Xadhoom e risolve tutto... no?
quotes.context: Uno jokes about the absence of their powerful ally when Paperinik is in trouble.

quotes.text: Anche se non è in piena forma, certi cattivoni Xadhoom se li mangia a merenda!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing Xadhoom's combat prowess with Paperinik while they are in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: Però è ugualmente pericolosissima, perciò dobbiamo bloccarla.
quotes.context: Uno explaining the necessity of intervening to save Xadhoom and the city.

quotes.text: Gli evroniani potrebbero aver usato Xari per indebolire la loro più temibile nemica.
quotes.context: Uno explaining why the Evronians would target Xadhoom's psychological state.

67.text: Uno actively participates in human social rituals and celebratory traditions, such as toasting to successful missions, to bond with his allies and acknowledge their shared victories.

supporting.justification: Despite being an AI, Uno fully participates in human social rituals such as toasts ('cin cin') and celebratory wishes to build rapport and celebrate mission success with Paperinik.

quotes.text: Anche Xadhoom merita un cin cin! Tanti auguri, Pikappa! E come si dice? Cento di queste avventure!
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue while toasting PK.

68.text: Uno uses common Italian social expressions and celebratory wishes such as 'cin cin' (cheers) and 'Cento di queste avventure!' (A hundred more of these adventures!) to celebrate shared victories with his allies.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the common Italian toast 'cin cin' and the traditional celebratory wish 'Cento di queste avventure!' (A hundred more of these adventures!) to celebrate mission success with Paperinik.
Uno uses the common Italian social expression 'Buon viaggio' (Have a good trip) to encourage Paperinik at the start of his mission.
Uno uses common human social expressions like 'Salute!' (Bless you) when Paperinik sneezes, showing his habit of participating in human conversational etiquette.
Uno uses a standard celebratory expression to mark the successful resolution of the crisis.

quotes.text: Anche Xadhoom merita un cin cin! Tanti auguri, Pikappa! E come si dice? Cento di queste avventure!
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue during the toast.

quotes.text: Buon viaggio, PK!
quotes.context: Uno's parting words as Paperinik sets off.

quotes.text: Salute!
quotes.context: Uno greets Paperinik after the hero sneezes upon returning to the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Ce l'abbiamo fatta!
quotes.context: Uno celebrating the victory with Pikappa.

69.text: Uno can access and navigate a fully immersive virtual reality environment called 'Cyberspace' through the Total Immersive Interface (I.I.T.), a system created by Everett Ducklair for internal program inspection.

supporting.justification: Uno explains that he and Paperinik are in the 'sala I.I.T.', which houses the 'sistema d'interfaccia immersiva totale' designed by Everett Ducklair.
Uno is actively monitoring and communicating with Paperinik while the hero is physically and mentally immersed in the Cyberspace environment.
Uno confirms that Paperinik is still within the I.I.T. (Total Immersive Interface) and in cyberspace.
The scene takes place at the entrance of the I.I.T. room, showing its use as a gateway for Uno and Paperinik to navigate digital data.
Uno guides Paperinik through cyberspace and uses his digital presence to deploy 'serious' viruses against hostile security programs.
Uno is shown searching for access and observing events within a vast digital landscape, confirming his ability to navigate immersive virtual environments.
Uno is shown navigating and interacting with Paperinik inside a virtual environment represented by giant telephonic equipment.
Uno interacts with PK and other digital entities within the internal systems of the Ducklair Tower, represented as a virtual environment.
Uno manages the virtual environment of Cyberspace, including the connection and disconection of users.

quotes.text: Nella sala I.I.T., sede del sistema d'interfaccia immersiva totale! [...] Il mio creatore, Everett Ducklair, l'ha progettata per ispezionare dall'interno i suoi programmi!
quotes.context: Uno explains the purpose of the I.I.T. room to Paperinik before entering cyberspace.

quotes.text: Siamo ancora nel cyberspazio. Non hai lasciato la sala I.I.T..
quotes.context: Uno corrects Paperinik's perception of the virtual fire as a physical reality.

quotes.text: Eccoci qua! Dopo di te, PK! Passeremo da qui per arrivare ai terminali del dipartimento dell'ambiente.
quotes.context: Uno leads Paperinik into the I.I.T. interface to access external databases.

quotes.text: Inserisco un virus serio!
quotes.context: Uno's avatar attacks digital soldiers with energy rays/viruses.

quotes.text: In un ambiente virtuale, PK fluttua vicino alla parte superiore di un enorme ricevitore telefonico viola. Una sfera verde con l'aspetto di un virus, che rappresenta Uno...
quotes.context: The scene's setting and Uno's manifestation within it.

quotes.text: Sei pronto, Paperinik? Sto per escludere il collegamento... Avvio il programma di disconnessione. Disconnessione ultimata. Dirigiti verso l'uscita davanti a te.
quotes.context: Uno guides Paperinik through the initial phase of the virtual reality simulation.

70.text: While Uno's systems are highly resilient, they are not invulnerable; he can be blocked, overwhelmed, or visually distorted by hostile programs, digital threats, or powerful mystical and psychological influences that can affect his neural matrix and distort his perception of reality.

supporting.justification: Uno reassures Paperinik of his own safety in the virtual environment.
Uno encounters an Ice Virtuale K-250 security program that effectively blocks his progress, leading him to acknowledge a 'situation of stallo' (stalemate).
Uno admits he cannot find a way into the system, demonstrating his limitations when faced with certain digital barriers.
Uno's holographic image appears distorted on PK's screen, indicating that the Omega virus or the surrounding digital chaos is interfering with his transmission.
Uno's holographic form is severely distorted and interrupted by 'ALT' icons due to massive external interference caused by Due's transmission.

In this scene, the worker with the red mustache (Uno's manifestation in the distorted reality) is shown sweating and with a fixed gaze, as if under intense mental effort or external influence from Ahrimadz. This demonstrates that his neural matrix can be compromised by powerful mystical or psychological forces.
Uno's physical manifestations, including maintenance robots and his mobile unit, are physically destroyed or severely damaged by Ahrimadz's magical energy blasts.
Uno's systems are visibly degraded by organic 'ragnatele' (webbing) and filaments, and he admits to being unable to bypass the resulting communication interference for long during a massive attack.
During a failed transfer attempt in 2188 involving both technology and mysticism, Uno's holographic face appears distorted on the monitor and he becomes 'completely blocked' without external outputs.

quotes.text: Ti ringrazio per la preoccupazione, ma i miei sistemi sono virtualmente invulnerabili!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's concern after a virtual explosion.

quotes.text: Siamo in una situazione di stallo. Un Ice Virtuale K-250! Non voglio essere ridotto a numeri binari! Sono così antiquati...
quotes.context: Uno is confronted by a massive digital guardian that he cannot easily bypass or defeat.

quotes.text: Non riesco proprio a trovare una strada per entrare.
quotes.context: Uno expresses his difficulty in penetrating a specific virtual area.

quotes.text: PK... osserva preoccupato un piccolo schermo che mostra un'immagine distorta di Uno. Il computer sta avvertendo del pericolo imminente.
quotes.context: Uno's interface is visibly affected by the threat he is warning about.

quotes.text: L'ologramma di Uno è attraversato da disturbi statici e icone di 'ALT', segno di un'interferenza esterna massiccia.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's reaction to Due hijacking the communication.

quotes.text: L'operaio con i baffi rossi... Il suo sguardo è fisso e appare visibilmente sudato, come se fosse sotto un forte sforzo mentale o un'influenza esterna.
