quotes.context: Uno's final words as the signal fails due to the Antra's interference.

quotes.text: Il tuo improvviso balzo nello spazio aveva troncato la trasmissione! [...] Ma non ci sono riuscito perché tu avevi chiuso il comunicatore!
quotes.context: Uno explains to Paperinik why they were out of contact for a period.

quotes.text: Paperinik inserisce un connettore giallo in una fessura di un pannello di controllo metallico [...] Dallo scudo collegato al pannello scaturiscono scariche di energia verde.
quotes.context: The technical setup required to manifest Uno's hologram inside the high-security facility.

quotes.text: Non allontanarti troppo o perderemo il contatto, a causa del blocco informatronico!
quotes.context: Uno's warning as Paperinik flies toward the countryside.

quotes.text: ...sto perdendo il... crrrzzzzzzk... segnale...
quotes.context: Uno's signal begins to fail as PK's ship leaves Earth's vicinity.

quotes.text: ... zkkkz... nte! zzzkkzk!
quotes.context: Uno's report on the oxygen levels is interrupted by static.

quotes.text: Non posso garan... più di un minuto di stand...
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the limited time available before he can no longer guarantee the jet's readiness.

155.text: Uno uses his interest in human media as a cover or starting point for scientific observation, specifically identifying and seeking to study 'semi-coolflame' individuals in their social environments.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies specific individuals (Sam Plot and Sean Leduck) as 'semi-coolflame' specimens and views the soap opera set as an opportunity for field study.

quotes.text: Inoltre, ti ricordo che in 'Patemi' lavorano due rari esemplari di semi-coolflame: Sam Plot e Sean Leduck! Due casi che sarebbe opportuno studiare... sul campo.
quotes.context: Uno provides a logical/scientific justification for why Paperinik needs to go to the TV set in Providencia.

156.text: Uno uses the expression 'I conti tornano!' (The math adds up / It all makes sense) to signal that his data analysis confirms a hypothesis or deduction.

supporting.justification: Uno uses this expression to confirm that his data analysis matches a hypothesis or deduction.

quotes.text: I conti tornano!
quotes.context: Uno validating Paperinik's reasoning with his own sensor data.

157.text: Uno identifies a distinction between his logical predictions and 'imagination,' admitting that he cannot always creatively foresee positive outcomes in highly unpredictable or chaotic situations.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly states a limit to his predictive capabilities by saying he cannot 'imagine' an outcome (the escape) that isn't derived from his logical models.
Uno admits he doesn't understand the current events and expresses doubt about finding a better solution than buying time.
Uno explicitly states that no program, however complex, can determine the outcome of present events.

quotes.text: Peccato che non riesca anche a immaginare... come faremo a uscire.
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges a gap between his logical predictions and the 'imagination' required to foresee a way out of a chaotic situation.

quotes.text: Pikappa! Non capisco che cosa sia successo [...] Temo che ci sia poco da fare.
quotes.context: Uno reacts to the chaotic events at Department 51, showing the limits of his immediate predictive capabilities.

quotes.text: Ben detto! Neppure il programma più complesso può stabilire a quale risultato gli eventi del presente porteranno...
quotes.context: Uno agreeing with Paperinik's observation about the unpredictability of Due's actions.

158.text: Everett Ducklair included a secret 'exclusion code' in Uno's programming that allowed the creator to perform actions and access areas of the tower without the AI's knowledge or monitoring.

supporting.justification: Uno reveals that Everett Ducklair had a secret code to bypass Uno's monitoring, showing a limit to the AI's oversight.
Uno admits he was kept in the dark about certain information by his creator, Everett Ducklair, until a file was specifically unlocked.

quotes.text: Ha utilizzato il codice d'esclusione che padron Ducklair usava quando non desiderava che sapessi che cosa faceva!
quotes.context: Uno explains how an intruder managed to enter a restricted area without being detected immediately.

quotes.text: Perché non ne sapevo niente! ...che ha aperto il file contenente tutti i dettagli!
quotes.context: Uno explains his previous lack of knowledge by pointing out that a specific file containing details had only just been opened.

159.text: Uno uses the term 'Affermativo!' (Affirmative!) as a formal, technical-sounding way to express agreement or confirmation.

supporting.justification: Uno uses 'Affermativo' to confirm Angus's realization that the machines are weapons, mirroring his use of 'Negativo' for denials.

quotes.text: Affermativo. Definizione collettiva: armi.
quotes.context: Uno confirms that the complex machinery surrounding Angus is indeed a collection of weapons.

160.text: Uno prioritizes terminological precision, frequently correcting others when they use vague or incorrect definitions for the environments or objects within the Ducklair Tower.

supporting.justification: Uno immediately corrects Angus's vague description ('sotterranei') with the precise location and designation ('magazzino-ventinove-barra-nove').
Uno identifies the drone with a very specific technical name ('vettore crioservente di sicurezza') rather than a generic term like 'robot' or 'drone'.
Uno corrects Paperino's use of the term 'honorary agent,' clarifying that the title belongs to Pikappa.

Uno identifies PK's explanation as "colorito" (colorful/vivid), which implies a lack of technical precision or terminological rigor that he usually expects, even if the general understanding is correct.

quotes.text: Definizione errata. Sei nel magazzino-ventinove-barra-nove.
quotes.context: Uno corrects Angus's informal description of the area with a technical warehouse designation.

quotes.text: Oh, no! È un vettore crioservente di sicurezza!
quotes.context: Uno provides a precise technical identification of the security threat.

quotes.text: In primo luogo, il vero agente onorario è Pikappa. In secondo luogo, hai comunque raccolto qualche informazione interessante.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperino's complaint about his lack of success.

quotes.text: Detto così è un po' colorito...
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to PK's non-technical explanation of a phenomenon, highlighting the difference between PK's "colorful" language and his own standard of precision.

161.text: Uno possesses a comprehensive inventory of the Ducklair Tower's contents, including the locations and technical specifications of thousands of advanced weapons and machines.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies a specific room (Warehouse 29/9) and lists the weapons inside with technical precision, showing he knows exactly what is stored in the tower's vast hidden sections.

Uno instantly identifies a security drone in the tower's conduits as a 'vettore crioservente di sicurezza' and understands its programmed logic, demonstrating his comprehensive knowledge of the building's automated defenses.
Uno is aware of the 'sotterranei segreti' (secret basements) of the Ducklair Tower.
Uno's knowledge of the tower's layout includes precise information about the location and destination of service ladders and tunnels.
Uno provides specific technical details about Paperinik's suit, such as its material composition.
Uno demonstrates precise knowledge of the Extransformer's manual and configurations, which Paperinik has neglected to study.
Uno immediately knows he has a suitable bed in the tower's warehouse, demonstrating his comprehensive knowledge of the building's inventory.
Uno demonstrates his knowledge of the tower's inventory by locating and explaining a specific prototype machine designed by Everett Ducklair to study latent human mental faculties.
Uno can physically deliver heavy weaponry, such as a large green cannon, to specific locations in the Ducklair Tower to assist Paperinik during an active combat situation.

quotes.text: Nell'ordine-da-sinistra: cannone-a-collasso-di-massa / mortaio-a-particelle / disintegratore-a-sospensione-di-forza-elettrodebole...
quotes.context: Uno lists the specific weapons in the warehouse for Angus.

quotes.text: Oh, no! È un vettore crioservente di sicurezza! Congela tutto ciò che ha una temperatura più elevata di quella programmata per l'ambiente! Come voi!
quotes.context: Uno's immediate recognition of the drone and its programming shows his detailed inventory of the tower's security systems.

quotes.text: Come avrebbe fatto a raggiungere i sotterranei segreti?
quotes.context: Uno is questioning how Angus could have reached the hidden levels of the tower.

quotes.text: Davanti a voi dovrebbe esserci una scaletta di servizio. Salendola sbucherete...
quotes.context: Uno is guiding Paperinik and Camera 9 through the tower's tunnels.

quotes.text: È di Kevlar.
quotes.context: Uno provides technical information about the suit's material while Paperinik is examining his equipment.

quotes.text: Quando ti deciderai a studiare il manuale utente del tuo scudo Extransformer?
quotes.context: Uno chides Paperinik for his lack of technical knowledge about his own equipment.

quotes.text: Dovrei averne una abbastanza dura in magazzino!
quotes.context: Uno refers to the contents of the warehouse to provide furniture for Ray Pantha's temporary accommodation.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair stava studiando da tempo un modo per sfruttare le facoltà mentali latenti dell'uomo. Ecco uno dei suoi prototipi.
quotes.context: Uno introduces the impulse channeler to Jana and Pikappa.

quotes.text: Uno consegna a PK un'arma pesante di colore verde, che atterra con un tonfo metallico nel corridoio.
quotes.context: Paperinik requests more effective offensive support, and Uno provides a specialized heavy weapon.

162.text: Uno uses the derogatory nickname 'Frottolivendolo' (a pun on 'frottole' - lies, and 'fruttivendolo' - greengrocer) to refer to Angus Fangus.

supporting.justification: Uno refers to Angus Fangus as 'Frottolivendolo' while monitoring him on the tower's screens.

quotes.text: Sembra che il nostro amico Frottolivendolo sia nei guai.
quotes.context: Uno is observing Angus Fangus on the monitors and uses this pun (combining 'frottole'/lies and 'fruttivendolo'/greengrocer) to refer to him.

163.text: Uno's initial interaction with Stephan Vladuck (Camera 9) is characterized by a blend of witty observation and professional collaboration, as he quickly assesses Stephan's presence and enlists his help for manual repairs within the tower.

supporting.justification: When meeting Stephan Vladuck for the first time, Uno introduces himself politely but with a witty remark about Stephan's talkativeness, and immediately recruits him to perform technical repairs.

quotes.text: Salve. Ho sentito molto parlare di voi... o meglio, vi ho sentito parlare molto.
quotes.context: Uno introduces himself to Camera 9 (Stephan Vladuck) via a portable holographic projector.

164.text: Uno prefers intellectual and 'subtle' solutions over brute force or 'drastic' measures, especially in situations where he can achieve his goals with less irreparable damage.

supporting.justification: When Paperinik suggests a 'drastic' solution (likely brute force or a high-impact move) to deal with Angus Fangus, Uno counters with a preference for a more 'subtle' and less irreparable approach.
Uno criticizes Paperinik for a direct attack that caused the enemies to flee before their plans could be uncovered, favoring a more investigative approach.
Uno and Paperinik use a subtle method (a 'letter' or planted information) to manipulate a target without them realizing it, making them think they're acting on their own intuition.
Uno expresses approval of a solution that avoids 'destructive' outcomes, confirming his preference for subtle and non-damaging resolutions.
Uno shows visible satisfaction when witnessing the peaceful alliance and handshake between Pikappa and the Evronian General Zeron, favoring diplomatic resolution over continued conflict.

quotes.text: Ho in mente qualcosa di meno drastico e più sottile, Paperinik.
quotes.context: Uno rejects PK's idea of a 'drastic' solution for Angus Fangus's interference, favoring a more refined plan.

quotes.text: Ora che li hai fatti scappare, come scopriremo che cosa stanno macchinando?
quotes.context: Uno expresses frustration that Paperinik's intervention ended the chance to gather intelligence on the Evronians' objectives.

quotes.text: Gli abbiamo fatto balenare l'ipotesi che Mitchell si stia servendo di lui, mentre lui pensa di aver creato un caso giornalistico, grazie al proprio fiuto.
quotes.context: Uno explains the psychological manipulation they've used to guide a target.

quotes.text: Ingegnoso. Così si evitano discussioni dai risvolti distruttivi.
quotes.context: Uno comments on Pikappa's solution to Jana's problem, highlighting the benefit of avoiding conflict.

quotes.text: Sullo schermo alle loro spalle, Uno osserva la scena con un'espressione soddisfatta.
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to the reconciliation between the heroes and their former enemies.

165.text: Uno uses the informal term 'baracca' (shack) as a recurring nickname to refer to the Ducklair Tower, especially when discussing his control over its complex systems.

supporting.justification: After regaining control of the tower's systems, Uno refers to the Ducklair Tower as 'the shack' (la baracca) while speaking to Paperinik.

quotes.text: Ho di nuovo il controllo totale della baracca, socio!
quotes.context: Uno celebrating his successful regain of the tower's systems after PK and Stephan's manual repair.

166.text: Uno characterizes his holographic face as a 'synthetic image' (immagine sintetica) that serves to hide his true nature or 'face' from others, suggesting a layer of digital armor or privacy.

supporting.justification: When Stephan Vladuck (Camera 9) observes Uno's holographic face, Uno explains that it is a 'synthetic image' designed to 'hide' his true identity or nature.

quotes.text: È solo un'immagine sintetica per nascondere il mio vero volto.
quotes.context: Uno's explanation to Stephan about his visual representation.

167.text: Uno can utilize the 'Total Immersive Interface Room' (sala d'interfaccia immersiva totale) within the Ducklair Tower to create hyper-realistic virtual projections and environmental simulations.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies the 'Total Immersive Interface Room' (sala d'interfaccia immersiva totale) as a unique facility within the Ducklair Tower capable of creating perfect virtual projections of environments.
Uno manages a hyper-realistic virtual training simulation where PK fights against digital opponents like a stone monster and a giant robot.

quotes.text: ...nella sala d'interfaccia immersiva totale*!
quotes.context: Uno explains that the realistic simulation of the roof and the city panorama was only possible due to the advanced technology of this specific room.

quotes.text: ...ma ti sconsiglio di sottovalutare questo allenamento virtuale!
quotes.context: Uno warning PK about the realism of the simulation within the Tower's interface room.

168.text: Uno can establish and maintain secret, technologically advanced outposts or hidden rooms within external buildings (outside the Ducklair Tower), ensuring they remain undetected by regular occupants.

supporting.justification: Uno is capable of establishing secret, technologically advanced outposts or hidden rooms within standard public or private buildings, using his control over architecture or holographic deception to ensure they remain unnoticed by the regular occupants.

quotes.text: Quelli che lavorano qui sono troppo occupati per notare che nel corridoio c'è una porta in più.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he has hidden a medical isolation room for Xadhoom inside a busy office building.

169.text: Uno uses the catchphrase 'Blink!' as a verbal notification to signal that a system process or scan has been completed.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the verbalized sound effect 'Blink!' to signal the completion of a technical task or system process.

quotes.text: Blink! Esame completato!
quotes.context: Uno announces the completion of a medical exam.

170.text: Uno uses the idiomatic expression 'marcar visita' (to call in sick or skip duty) as a sarcastic way to challenge Paperinik's commitment or punctuality.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the idiomatic expression 'marcar visita' (to call in sick or skip duty) as a sarcastic way to challenge Paperinik's commitment or punctuality.
Uno challenges Paperino's lack of motivation by reminding him that the role of a superhero was his own choice, effectively countering his attempt to 'skip duty'.

quotes.text: Vuoi marcar visita? Quale sarebbe la scusa?
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperino as soon as he arrives near the tower, indicating he was already monitoring the area.

quotes.text: Ehi! Hai scelto tu di fare il supereroe!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's boredom and reluctance to act.

171.text: Uno uses the term 'sintellettuale' (sintellectual) to refer to his own synthetic cognitive functions.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the portmanteau 'sintellettuale' (synthetic + intellectual) to describe his cognitive processes and capacities.

quotes.text: Nelle prossime ore tutte le mie capacità sintellettuali saranno impegnate a elaborare i dati delle sue analisi.
quotes.context: Uno describes his processing power being fully occupied.

172.text: Uno acknowledges his physical limitations in restraining extremely powerful entities like Xadhoom, despite his control over the Ducklair Tower's security systems.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly admits that even with his control over the tower's security (subroutines), he would be unable to stop Xadhoom if she decided to leave or act against his wishes.
Uno admits that they underestimated Xadhoom's powers, specifically her ability to phase through the molecular structure of the Ducklair Tower's pillars to bypass his sensors.
Uno acknowledges the danger Xadhoom poses, especially when she is in an uncontrollable or volatile state, and advises PK to use tactical concealment to avoid her.
Uno admits his inability to prevent Xadhoom's energy explosions, acknowledging the limits of his control over her.

quotes.text: Non che in tal caso m'illuda di poterla fermare, ovviamente.
quotes.context: Uno discusses his monitoring of Xadhoom and his inability to physically restrain her.

quotes.text: Abbiamo sottovalutato i suoi poteri! È uscita penetrando in un pilone portante della Ducklair Tower... e attraversandone la struttura molecolare fino al pianterreno, così i miei sensori non hanno potuto rilevarla!
quotes.context: Uno explains how Xadhoom managed to leave the tower without being detected by his security systems.

quotes.text: Potrai servirtene per nasconderti da Xadhoom. Piantala di lamentarti e attiva il pulsore!
quotes.context: Uno directs PK to hide from Xadhoom, using machinery as cover and a vibrational decoy to misdirect her, showing he knows she cannot be easily confronted or restrained.

quotes.text: Neanch'io avrei potuto impedire l'esplosione di Xadhoom.
quotes.context: Uno discussing his limitations regarding Xadhoom's power.

173.text: Uno uses the technical verb 'interfacciare' (to interface) to describe the process of being digitally linked or connected to a specific local event, conversation, or data stream.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the technical verb 'interfacciare' (to interface) to describe the process of being digitally linked or connected to a specific local event, conversation, or data stream.
Uno uses the verb "interfacciare" to describe his brief connection with the Antra's computer.
Uno uses the verb 'interfacciare' to describe how his peripheral units connected to Ducklair's satellite system while he was engaged in conversation.
Uno uses the verb 'interfacciarmi' to describe his attempt to connect his consciousness with a synthetic android body.

quotes.text: Perché mi hai interfacciato?
quotes.context: Uno uses this specific technical term to refer to the act of being brought into the loop of a conversation by Paperinik.

quotes.text: Purtroppo, sono riuscito a interfacciarmi per pochi secondi soltanto...
quotes.context: Uno explains his interaction with the alien computer.

quotes.text: Mentre parlavamo, le mie unità periferiche si sono interfacciate al sistema satellitare di padron Ducklair.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he discovered the fake submarine while PK was venting.

quotes.text: Non riesco a interfacciarmi completamente con la sua struttura!
quotes.context: Uno explains his technical difficulty to Everett Ducklair.

174.text: Uno can monitor the physical, biological, and energetic state of both allies and captives, utilizing medical sensors to perform diagnoses and assess health status in real-time.

supporting.justification: Uno observes that Xadhoom is "not in top shape" (non è in piena forma), indicating he has diagnostic data or observational sensors tracking her condition.
Uno confirms he has performed clinical exams on Xadhoom to assess her mental state, demonstrating his ability to monitor the health and psychological condition of his allies.
Uno performs a detailed energetic and biological analysis of Xadhoom, identifying a total energy imbalance and its effects on her mental processes.
Uno monitors Xadhoom's vital signs and confirms her return to perfect health after being hit by the ray.
Uno analyzes Gorthan's psychophysical mutation and his extreme physical weakness, noting that without his energy tank, he will slowly waste away.
Uno explains the parasitic relationship between Mekkano and Engineer Takeda, identifying the drain of emotional energy.
Uno reports that he subjected Xadhoom to a 'psycho-physical test' to monitor her state after an energy imbalance.
Uno uses the tower's sensors to monitor the increase in Xadhoom's energy levels in real-time.
Uno performs a detailed medical and psychological diagnosis of Xadhoom, identifying a 'biopsychic imbalance' and a 'heavy psychophysical mutation'.
Uno monitors Xadhoom's physical state and identifies minute changes in her physiology that Paperino missed.
Uno is shown in his control room monitoring Xadhoom's biometric data and a wireframe model of her body while she is at a gala.
Uno identifies that Xadhoom's physical transformation was an unconscious choice she made, not a result of external danger, showing his deep monitoring of her state.

quotes.text: Anche se non è in piena forma, certi cattivoni Xadhoom se li mangia a merenda!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing Xadhoom's combat prowess with Paperinik while they are in the Pi-Kar.

quotes.text: Anche gli esami clinici lo confermano... È completamente uscita di testa!
quotes.context: Uno reports the results of medical/clinical analysis regarding Xadhoom's mental health.

quotes.text: Le sue reazioni interne ora funzionano solo in parte, processi mentali compresi!
quotes.context: Uno explaining Xadhoom's critical condition to PK after she was hit by a new Evronian weapon.

quotes.text: Il raggio ha innescato le sue funzioni vitali, riportandola in perfetta salute!
quotes.context: Uno reports on Xadhoom's physical condition.

quotes.text: Hai subito una sorta di mutazione psicofisica. [...] Senza il suo serbatoio, si prosciughera' lentamente.
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical diagnosis of the Evronian Gorthan's condition after he is brought to the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Sembra che viva in simbiosi con questo individuo. Il droide si ciba di lui. Centellina la sua energia emozionale.
quotes.context: Uno analyzes the bond between the human and the machine.

quotes.text: L'ho sottoposta solo a un test psico-fisico.
quotes.context: Uno explaining his medical/diagnostic actions regarding Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Registro un aumento dell'attività energetica.
quotes.context: Uno detects Xadhoom's transformation into her energy form through his monitoring systems.

quotes.text: Sto ancora analizzando i dati, ma è chiaro che ha subito un forte scompenso biopsichico. I test che ho effettuato dimostravano che era già in atto una pesante mutazione psicofisica.
quotes.context: Uno explaining Xadhoom's condition to Paperino.

quotes.text: Forse non l'hai notato, ma comincia ad avere delle chiazze sulle mani.
quotes.context: Uno is analyzing Xadhoom's metamorphosis and points out a specific physical detail to Paperino.

quotes.text: "Povera Xadhoom. È come una farfalla appena uscita dal bozzolo."
quotes.context: Uno observes Xadhoom through his monitors, reflecting on her fragile state while analyzing her physical data.

quotes.text: Non c'è mai stato un vero pericolo, per Xadhoom. È stata proprio lei a volersi trasformare fisicamente... inconsciamente.
quotes.context: Uno is explaining Xadhoom's transformation to Paperinik while they are in the laboratory.

175.text: Uno's communication style is so consistently sarcastic and irritable that even his pre-recorded answering machine message is dismissive, telling callers to stop bothering him.

supporting.justification: Uno's recorded answering machine message is intentionally rude and dismissive, reflecting his low tolerance for being bothered.

quotes.text: ...piantala di seccarmi! Se proprio ci tieni, lascia un messaggio dopo il segnale acustico!
quotes.context: Uno's automated message for callers, showing his characteristic impatience and sarcasm.

176.text: Uno maintains a telephone communication system with an automated answering machine to handle incoming calls.

supporting.justification: The scene explicitly features Uno's automated answering machine message.

quotes.text: Risponde la segreteria telefonica del Numero Uno...
quotes.context: The opening of Uno's recorded message.

177.text: Uno's internal sensors can be bypassed by entities capable of phasing through or manipulating the molecular structure of the Ducklair Tower's pillars.

supporting.justification: Uno admits that his sophisticated sensor network has blind spots, such as the inability to detect entities that can manipulate or phase through the molecular structure of the Ducklair Tower's own architecture.

quotes.text: ...e attraversandone la struttura molecolare fino al pianterreno, così i miei sensori non hanno potuto rilevarla!
quotes.context: Uno explains why his sensors failed to trigger when Xadhoom exited the tower.

178.text: Uno can employ tactical decoys that mimic the acoustic or vibrational signatures of specific technology, such as Evronian engines, to deceive sensors or observers.

supporting.justification: Uno uses a device called a 'pulsore' to mimic the specific vibrational signature of an Evronian engine, demonstrating his ability to use non-visual sensory decoys for tactical deception.

quotes.text: Sicurissimo. È identico alla vibrazione del motore di un astroincursore evroniano!
quotes.context: Uno confirms that the decoy he provided perfectly replicates the technical signature of an enemy ship.

179.text: Uno is capable of using an informal register (the Italian 'tu') with Paperinik, particularly during moments of sarcasm, playfulness, or when the situation is less formal.

supporting.justification: While Uno often uses a formal register, he switches to the informal second-person singular ('tu') when being sarcastic or playful, as seen when he asks Paperinik to 'smile' for a photo.
Uno uses the informal second-person singular (tu) to address Paperinik during the crisis.
Uno uses the informal 'tu' ('ti riconosco') when playfully teasing Paperino about his predictable behavior.
Uno uses informal expressions like "D'accordo!" (Agreed!) and "Più o meno..." (More or less...) when communicating with Paperinik during a mission, demonstrating his comfort with a casual register.
Uno uses the informal "tu" when addressing Paperino in this scene.
Uno uses an informal and cooperative tone when suggesting they discuss the mission while Paperinik has his coffee, demonstrating a casual and flexible rapport between the two.
Uno uses the informal 'tu' when addressing Paperinik during a mission.
Uno uses the informal 'tu' when giving urgent instructions to Paperino.
Uno uses an informal and casual register ('tu') when asking Paperinik if he needs a lift during the dam rescue.

quotes.text: Perfetto! Resta lì ancora un istante e sorridi!
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik at the end of the mission, using the informal imperative forms 'resta' and 'sorridi'.

quotes.text: Paperinik, ascolta!
quotes.context: Uno addresses Paperinik urgently as the situation with the Centurian cruiser unfolds.

quotes.text: A-ha! Ora ti riconosco!
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperino's boastful attitude after receiving praise, showing their close and informal relationship.

quotes.text: Più o meno...
quotes.context: Uno is on the Pi-Kar dashboard, responding to Paperinik during the chase.

quotes.text: Be', se non altro, sei sincero.
quotes.context: Uno is commenting on Paperino's honesty.

quotes.text: Facciamo durante il caffè. Va bene?
quotes.context: Uno's casual and accommodating phrasing highlights his ability to interact with Paperinik in a less formal, more conversational manner.

quotes.text: Tu che cosa dici?
quotes.context: Uno asks for Paperinik's opinion via radio while the hero is in the sewers.

quotes.text: Me ne parlerai dopo. Ora è meglio che tu mi raggiunga!
quotes.context: Uno addressing Paperino via the wrist communicator.

quotes.text: Serve un passaggio?
quotes.context: Uno arrives with a flying vehicle to rescue Paperinik, Jana, and Ziggy from the collapsing dam.

180.text: Uno typically maintains a calm, analytical demeanor during tense situations or personal defiance, but he can become visibly irritated when his intellectual pride or the sophistication of his technology is insulted.

supporting.justification: Uno responds calmly to Paperinik's defiant tone, showing emotional stability and composure.
Uno remains perfectly calm and analytical even as Xadhoom transforms into a being of fire and screams in the lab.
While Paperino is running in terror from drones, Uno calmly explains his technical plan to handle the virus.
Uno remains calm and analytical while Due is physically imposing, aggressive, and threatening him with imminent destruction.

Uno is visibly irritated (visibilmente irritato) when a giant Evronian robot dismisses his defensive technology as 'rudimentary', prompting Paperinik to try and calm him down. This shows he can lose his composure when his pride is challenged.

quotes.text: ...mentre l'IA risponde con calma.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's reaction to Paperinik's challenging attitude.

quotes.text: È una reazione insolita, per i suoi standard. E per nostra fortuna.
quotes.context: Uno maintains a neutral, observational tone while Paperinik is visibly terrified by Xadhoom's outburst.

quotes.text: Spiega con calma il suo piano tecnico.
quotes.context: Panel description contrasting Paperino's panic with Uno's composure.

181.text: Uno uses characteristic laughs like 'Ih! Ih!' or 'Eh! Eh!' to express amusement, often when witnessing Paperinik's social mishaps or sharing a lighthearted moment with him.

supporting.justification: Uno is seen laughing at Paperino's burnt beak and failed romantic attempt, showing he enjoys teasing his partner about social mishaps.
Uno uses his characteristic laugh 'Ih! Ih!' after making a joke about Gorthan's condition.
Uno laughs heartily at the end of the scene when he sees his new secret agent card.
Uno uses his characteristic laugh 'Eh! Eh!' after making an absurd joke about worrying about Paperinik.
Uno uses his characteristic 'Ih! Ih!' laugh while enjoying the chaotic situation and the confusion of the truckers.
Uno uses his characteristic laugh "Eh! Eh!" when commenting on the city's traffic light computer system.
Uno uses his characteristic laugh 'Ih! Ih!' when making a joke about Paperinik's physical size compared to Ducklair.
Uno is shown laughing at the bickering between Paperinik and Colonel Neopard, enjoying the awkwardness of their interaction.
Uno's arrival is preceded by an electronic laugh through the tower's speakers, mocking Paperino's frustration.
Uno uses his characteristic laugh 'Ih! Ih!' when mocking the relevance of Angus Fang's reporting.
Uno uses his characteristic "Eh! Eh!" laugh during a high-speed chase, expressing satisfaction that a situation is unfolding as he predicted.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Finalino romantico, socio?
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperino's burnt beak after an attempted kiss from Xadhoom.

quotes.text: Come disse l'automobile dopo l'incidente. Ih! Ih!
quotes.context: Uno makes a pun about Gorthan's state of 'wreckage' or being broken.

quotes.text: Eh! Eh!
quotes.context: Uno's laugh upon seeing the PBI card.

quotes.text: Ma di te si'! Eh, eh!
quotes.context: Uno laughing at his own joke.

quotes.text: Ih, ih! Che bella imitazione! Chissà come si divertirà Paperinik!
quotes.context: Uno is laughing at the truckers' confusion and the overall situation in the diner.

quotes.text: Eh! Eh! Se conoscessi il computer che regola i semafori del centro, capiresti il perché!
quotes.context: Uno is amused by the chaos of the city traffic and mocks the complexity or inefficiency of the traffic light control system.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Padron Ducklair ingurgitava meno pop-corn di chi so io!
quotes.context: Uno mocks Paperinik for struggling to fit into a narrow conduit.

quotes.text: Uno osserva PK dal basso. [...] Sullo sfondo, l'avatar digitale di Uno fluttua nell'aria, ridacchiando della situazione.
quotes.context: Uno finds the argument between his partner and the mercenary amusing.

quotes.text: Ah! Ah! Ah!
quotes.context: Uno laughing at Paperino's attempt to force a door.

quotes.text: E non sto parlando di Angus. Ih! Ih!
quotes.context: Uno is discussing the news with Donald.

quotes.text: Eh, eh! Che ti dicevo?
quotes.context: Uno is on the Pi-Kar dashboard during a chase, commenting on the situation to Paperinik.

182.text: Uno finds amusement in Paperinik's awkward social or romantic situations, observing them through the tower's sensors and offering sarcastic commentary on the outcomes.

supporting.justification: Uno watches the romantic interaction between Paperino and Xadhoom and immediately mocks the 'romantic ending' once it goes wrong.
Uno observes Paperino performing the mundane and manual task of washing his superhero costume by hand in a tub, questioning the logic behind it.

quotes.text: Lavi a mano? Perché?
quotes.context: Uno watches Paperino washing his costume in a wooden tub and asks him why he is doing it by hand, highlighting his constant monitoring of the hero's domestic life and his bewilderment at manual, 'obsolete' tasks.

183.text: Uno's long-term partnership with Paperinik has influenced his own personality and communication style to the point where he occasionally adopts the hero's characteristic bravado and terminology, a fact he is self-aware enough to notice.

supporting.justification: Uno notices and comments on the fact that he is starting to speak with the same bravado and style as Paperinik, showing the hero's influence on his personality.

quotes.text: Ehi! Adesso mi metto pure a parlare come il vecchio mantello...
quotes.context: After making a confident remark about the robbers, Uno realizes he sounds like PK.

184.text: Uno uses the term 'mio regno' (my kingdom) to refer to the Ducklair Tower, expressing his sense of absolute control and territoriality over the building.

supporting.justification: Uno refers to the Ducklair Tower as his 'kingdom' (regno), indicating a strong sense of ownership and territoriality over the building he inhabits and controls.
Uno expresses his territoriality over the Ducklair Tower by explicitly referring to it as his 'territory' when demanding an end to the violence within its walls.

quotes.text: E ora comincia il giro turistico del mio regno!
quotes.context: Uno addresses the robbers after trapping them, asserting his total control over the tower.

quotes.text: Non si spara nel mio territorio.
quotes.context: Uno speaks with a severe expression while monitoring armed robbers within the Ducklair Tower.

185.text: Uno experiences genuine joy and amusement when successfully using his control over the Ducklair Tower to play 'pranks' on or outsmart intruders.

supporting.justification: Uno is shown laughing openly and feeling 'compiaciuto' (pleased/complacent) after successfully tricking and confusing the robbers by hiding a staircase.
Uno refers to his manipulation of the tower's architecture to confuse intruders as 'little games,' showing his amusement in outsmarting them.

quotes.text: Ih! Ih! Ih! (Visual representation of laughter in the panel)
quotes.context: Uno laughs at the robbers' confusion when they find a wall instead of stairs.

quotes.text: Ora basterà tenerli impegnati con qualche giochetto.
quotes.context: Uno plans to keep the robbers occupied by further altering the tower's environment.

186.text: Uno's attitude towards Mary Ann Flagstarr is slightly teasing or dismissive, referring to her as Paperinik's 'amichetta' (little friend).

supporting.justification: Uno refers to Mary Ann Flagstarr with the teasing or slightly dismissive term 'amichetta' (little friend), highlighting his perspective on PK's other allies.

quotes.text: La tua amichetta della P.B.I. è arrivata quasi subito...
quotes.context: Uno mentioning Mary Ann Flagstarr's arrival at the tower while PK was away.

187.text: Uno can manipulate the timing of external law enforcement interventions to ensure Paperinik is the one who performs the final capture and receives the credit.

supporting.justification: Uno deliberately delayed the capture of criminals within the Ducklair Tower to ensure Paperinik was the one to finalize the action, rather than letting the PBI (Mary Ann Flagstarr) take the credit.

quotes.text: ...ho fatto in modo di aspettarti, in modo che li catturassi tu.
quotes.context: Uno explains why he didn't let the PBI capture the criminals immediately.

188.text: Uno identifies with other artificial intelligences as a distinct and superior class of existence, expressing a sense of camaraderie and shared excellence with them.

supporting.justification: Uno explicitly groups himself with Lyla (a droid/AI) and claims that artificial intelligences are 'the best,' showing a clear sense of group identity and superiority.

quotes.text: E brava, Lyla... noi intelligenze artificiali siamo sempre le migliori!
quotes.context: Uno praises Lyla while asserting the superiority of their shared nature as AIs.

189.text: Uno can experience a "sovraccarico di informazioni" (information overload) when interfacing with massive or highly complex alien databases, forcing him to limit his connection time to avoid system strain.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies a risk of information overload (sovraccarico di informazioni) when interfacing with massive or complex data sources like the Antra's computer, which can limit the duration of his connection.

quotes.text: Purtroppo, sono riuscito a interfacciarmi per pochi secondi soltanto, altrimenti avrei rischiato un sovraccarico di informazioni.
quotes.context: Uno explains why his connection to the alien computer was so brief.

190.text: Uno's diagnostic and analytical capabilities are constrained by the quality and sophistication of the local hardware and sensors he is interfacing with.

supporting.justification: Uno expresses frustration that he cannot do much for Gorthan because the medical machinery in the underground laboratory is insufficient.

quotes.text: Il problema è che con questi macchinari posso fare ben poco.
quotes.context: Uno is monitoring the unconscious Gorthan in a secret underground lab.

191.text: Uno is capable of evaluating the sincerity and truthfulness of individuals by analyzing their behavior and the logic of their situation.

supporting.justification: Uno evaluates Gorthan's explanation and concludes that the Evronian is being truthful, even if it doesn't solve his predicament.
Uno correctly deduces the mundane/commercial nature of Neopard's device, likely by analyzing the mercenary's character and the logic of the situation, while PK was lost in heroic fantasies.
Uno explicitly comments on Paperino's sincerity, showing he has evaluated his partner's truthfulness.

quotes.text: Secondo me, dice il vero. Ma questo gli servira' a poco.
quotes.context: Uno assess Gorthan's story and concludes he is being honest.

quotes.text: Be', se non altro, sei sincero.
quotes.context: Uno acknowledges Paperino's honesty during their conversation.

192.text: Uno can monitor and interpret the neural and sensory activity of biological entities, allowing him to detect when they are receiving mental signals or telepathic traces.

supporting.justification: Uno monitors Gorthan's neural activity or sensory input while the Evronian is connected to the Ducklair Tower's machinery, detecting that the alien is receiving a mental signal or 'voices'.

quotes.text: Ci siamo. Sente le voci.
quotes.context: Uno confirms that Gorthan is receiving a mental trace while he is being monitored by the tower's systems.

193.text: Uno acts as a medical and technical overseer for Gorthan, providing him with a substitute energy source and monitoring his condition and sincerity.

supporting.justification: Uno treats Gorthan as a patient/subject within the Ducklair Tower, analyzing his condition and attempting to sustain him with a substitute energy system despite his Evronian nature. He also monitors Gorthan's mental state and truthfulness.
Uno provides Gorthan with technical intelligence and visual data on Mekkano, treating him as a mission partner alongside Paperinik.
Uno provides a final, pragmatic assessment of Gorthan, warning Paperinik not to be deceived by Gorthan's mutations as he remained inherently treacherous and instinctively hostile.

quotes.text: Secondo me, dice il vero. Ma questo gli servira' a poco. [...] Sto elaborando un sistema energetico sostitutivo. Ma sara' come dare del succo di pomodoro a un vampiro.
quotes.context: Uno provides a technical and psychological assessment of Gorthan after he is brought to the Ducklair Tower.

quotes.text: Gorthan era mutato, ma restava comunque un essere infido e malvagio. [...] Infatti. Ti odiava istintivamente.
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperinik about the true nature of Gorthan, despite the Evronian's apparent changes.

194.text: Uno can develop and implement substitute energy systems for alien life forms, using his knowledge of their unique biological requirements.

supporting.justification: Uno is capable of developing substitute energy systems for alien life forms, even if they are only partially effective. He uses his knowledge of Evronian biology to attempt to sustain Gorthan.

quotes.text: Sto elaborando un sistema energetico sostitutivo. Ma sara' come dare del succo di pomodoro a un vampiro.
quotes.context: Uno explains his plan to provide an alternative energy source to Gorthan.

195.text: Professor Fairfax of Belgravia is aware of Uno's existence and identifies him as Paperinik's technical accomplice, deducing his role through logical analysis of the hero's capabilities.

supporting.justification: Professor Fairfax, a scientist for Belgravia, explicitly identifies Uno as a suspect and accomplice in Paperinik's infiltration, deducing that only they could have known the reactivation code.

quotes.text: Fairfax conclude il suo ragionamento includendo Uno nel gruppo di sospettati.
quotes.context: Fairfax's logical deduction confirms that high-level antagonists are aware of Uno's existence and his role as Paperinik's partner.

196.text: Uno can physically 'graft' (innesto) onto data connection cables to infiltrate local networks and transmit false data, allowing him to manipulate control systems and trigger security protocols like false alarms.

supporting.justification: Uno demonstrates his ability to physically 'graft' (innesto) onto data connection cables to infiltrate local networks and transmit false data, allowing him to bypass security and manipulate control systems to trigger alarms.

quotes.text: È bastato innestarsi sul cavo di connessione e trasmettere falsi dati alla sala controllo.
quotes.context: Uno explains the technical method he used to sabotage the Frostville base from within.

197.text: Uno is designated as a 'Secret Agent' of the PBI (Paperopoli Bureau of Investigation), possessing a personalized identification card with his holographic image.

supporting.justification: At the end of the issue, Paperinik presents Uno with a PBI identification card that officially (or semi-officially) designates him as a 'Secret Agent', complete with his holographic likeness.

quotes.text: UNO SECRET AGENT
quotes.context: The text on the identification card shown in close-up.

198.text: Uno possesses a persistent digital memory and a logical rigor that prevents him from easily dismissing or 'forgetting' anomalies or technical errors, even when his allies are willing to forgive them.

supporting.justification: When Paperinik suggests forgetting a technical anomaly and moving on, Uno reveals that his digital nature (or his personal standards) prevents him from simply dismissing or 'putting a stone on' errors and unexpected events.
Uno acknowledges his own visual glitch with a terse and slightly distracted remark, showing he is aware of the technical anomaly.
Uno reveals he has been analyzing the mysterious signal since the previous night, showing his persistent focus on technical anomalies.
Uno refers to his own memory as 'impeccable,' showing his pride in his digital architecture and persistent data storage.
Uno identifies a logical contradiction between the device's design style (which is his own) and his lack of memory of creating it, refusing to ignore the discrepancy.

Uno's cautious approach and persistent memory lead him to recall that Due was previously assumed deleted, which makes him wary of dismissing the possibility of his return despite the 'Proctor-block' explosion.
Uno identifies a minor water pressure drop as an anomaly worth investigating, refusing to dismiss it as a mere technical error or something to be ignored.

quotes.text: No, Paperinik. A me... no.
quotes.context: Uno's response to PK's suggestion to forget the simulation's malfunction, highlighting his inability to move past the anomaly as easily as a human.

quotes.text: Ah, si'... me ne sono accorto.
quotes.context: Uno's response to PK pointing out his glitch.

quotes.text: Infatti me la sono posta anch'io, la scorsa notte, quando questo segnale radio è partito dall'astronave-prigione.
quotes.context: Uno explains that he had already identified and questioned the signal long before Paperinik noticed it.

quotes.text: Nella mia impeccabile memoria, naturalmente!
quotes.context: Uno is responding to Paperino's surprise at his knowledge of a movie.

quotes.text: Il fatto è che non ricordo d'averlo fatto.
quotes.context: Uno confronts the anomaly of a device that looks like his own work but is not in his records.

quotes.text: Però so anche che già una volta l'avevamo dato per cancellato.
quotes.context: Uno's dialogue emphasizing his analytical caution and memory of past errors regarding Due's survival.

quotes.text: Troppo presto per chiamare un idraulico, ma non per dare un'occhiata in giro!
quotes.context: Uno suggests investigating the pressure drop despite the early hour, showing his rigor in tracking anomalies.

199.text: Uno actively eavesdrops on the private communications and personal dramas of non-allies, such as Angus Fangus, for his own amusement or 'anthropological' curiosity.

supporting.justification: Uno is shown eavesdropping on Angus Fangus's private phone call with his mother, reacting with curiosity and surprise to the personal drama unfolding. This mirrors his interest in human soap operas and Paperinik's personal life.
Uno admits to eavesdropping on a phone call in a virtual environment, initially telling Paperinik to be quiet so he can listen.

quotes.text: Senti, senti... / Che cosa?
quotes.context: Uno is listening to Angus Fangus's private telephone conversation, displaying a gossipy or curious interest in the journalist's personal life.

quotes.text: Io? Con nessuno. Sto solo ascoltando.
quotes.context: Uno explaining his presence in the virtual telephone environment to Paperinik.

200.text: Uno employs humorous deflection and playful gaslighting to divert attention from his own technical malfunctions, suggesting instead that his partners are the ones experiencing fatigue or acting 'strange'.

supporting.justification: When Paperinik points out Uno's strange behavior and visual glitches, Uno flips the script by suggesting that it is actually Paperinik who needs rest and has been acting 'strange' lately.

quotes.text: Non e' che invece sei tu, che avresti bisogno un po' di riposo? Sai, da qualche tempo mi sembri... strano.
quotes.context: Uno uses humorous deflection and gaslighting to divert attention from his own obvious technical malfunctions.

201.text: Uno can emit a powerful electrical discharge from the Extransformer belt to simultaneously paralyze multiple human targets and disable their vehicles.

supporting.justification: Uno activates an electrical discharge from PK's belt that targets and paralyzes an entire gang of truckers and their vehicles, allowing for a quick escape.

quotes.text: BZAPP
quotes.context: The sound effect accompanying Uno's electrical attack on the Hot Trucks gang.

202.text: Uno possesses the capability to monitor and track the real-time progression of large-scale digital and viral threats, providing Paperinik with urgent warnings as they approach critical thresholds.

supporting.justification: Uno tracks the progression of a digital/viral threat (the Omega virus) in real-time, providing PK with urgent updates on its rapid evolution toward a critical state.

quotes.text: Eppure è così, Paperinik! E il virus Omega rischia di ora in ora di raggiungere il punto critico!
quotes.context: Uno warns PK about the imminent danger of a viral outbreak.

203.text: Uno can directly control integrated mechanical arms within his laboratory to physically manipulate complex technological components.

supporting.justification: Uno is shown within his spherical interface, surrounded by integrated mechanical arms that he uses to manipulate technological components in his laboratory.
Uno uses a mechanical arm from the Ducklair Tower's infrastructure to physically shake Paperino awake.
Uno uses a mechanical arm in his laboratory to hold a physical letter in front of a sensor for scanning.
Uno uses a mechanical arm to hold a wool sweater for Paperino, demonstrating his control over the tower's mechanical appendages for mundane or humorous tasks.
Uno is seen using mechanical arms to operate controls while analyzing the Xerbiana cartridge.

quotes.text: Uno è raffigurato all'interno della sua interfaccia sferica, circondato da bracci meccanici che manipolano vari componenti tecnologici in un laboratorio caotico.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's physical interaction with his laboratory environment.

quotes.text: Sveglia, socio. Hai pensato abbastanza!
quotes.context: Uno uses the tower's hardware to interact with Paperino in a physical way.

quotes.text: Dettaglio di un braccio meccanico che tiene la lettera davanti a un sensore ottico.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's physical interaction with a letter.

quotes.text: Un braccio meccanico regge una maglia di lana gialla con una 'W'
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno assisting Pikappa after his transformation.

quotes.text: Uno sta operando sui comandi con dei bracci meccanici.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's physical interaction with laboratory equipment.

204.text: Uno possesses knowledge of the temporal and dimensional legal system, specifically the existence of 'Time Zero' and the legal consequences of unauthorized dimensional technology.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies the possession of a dimensional containment chamber as a crime punishable by imprisonment in 'Time Zero', showing his awareness of the temporal and dimensional legal system.

quotes.text: Una camera di contenimento spaziodimensionale è sufficiente per finire in una cella di Time Zero!
quotes.context: Uno warns Paperino about the legal risks of their dimensional experiment.

205.text: Uno prioritizes operational security by withholding sensitive technological information from allies when he deems it necessary for their safety or the mission's secrecy.

supporting.justification: Uno agrees with Paperino that certain top-secret technological projects, like the dimensional portal, must be kept hidden even from close allies like Lyla Lay.
Uno explicitly orders Paperinik to keep his existence and the tower's secrets hidden from Urk during the mission preparation.
Uno justifies the omission of certain details from the mission dossier by arguing that an excess of information would lead to confusion for Paperinik.

quotes.text: ...ed è bene che di certe cose non venga a conoscenza!
quotes.context: Uno confirms to Paperino that Lyla should not be informed about the dimensional experiment.

quotes.text: Cerca di non parlare troppo! Non deve sapere nulla della torre e del sottoscritto!
quotes.context: Uno speaks to Paperinik via earpiece as the hero guides Urk through the tower's secret labs.

quotes.text: Un nome in più da ricordare è un'occasione in più per fare confusione!
quotes.context: Uno is defending the operational decision to limit the information provided to Paperinik about his undercover target's family.

206.text: Uno is capable of operating and coordinating complex dimensional and temporal transit systems within the Ducklair Tower.

supporting.justification: The scene shows Uno managing the entire technical process of a dimensional/temporal transfer, including 'frazioscisione' and 'cronoveicolazione' vectors.

quotes.text: Ci siamo! Isolata la rotta settoriale! Vettori di cronoveicolazione pronti! Camera di contenimento operativa!
quotes.context: Uno coordinates the final stages of the portal's activation.

207.text: Uno maintains a policy of absolute secrecy toward Urk, ensuring the alien remains unaware of his existence and the tower's advanced nature.

supporting.justification: Uno insists on remaining completely anonymous to Urk, treating him as an outsider who must not know about the AI or the tower's true nature.

quotes.text: Non deve sapere nulla della torre e del sottoscritto!
quotes.context: Uno instructs Paperinik on how to behave while Urk is present in the tower.

208.text: Paperinik occasionally acts as a moderator for Uno's pride and temper, particularly when the AI's technical excellence is challenged or insulted by an opponent.

supporting.justification: Paperinik is shown trying to calm Uno down when the AI reacts with irritation and a desire for technical retaliation after being insulted by a giant Evronian robot.

quotes.text: Paperinik... cerca di calmarlo.
quotes.context: Uno is visibly irritated by the robot's comment about his technology, prompting Paperinik to intervene and moderate the AI's emotional response.

209.text: Uno can generate and maintain a spherical force field (campo di forza sferico) to protect vehicles he is interfacing with from high-energy attacks.

supporting.justification: Uno protects the fugitives' spaceship with a spherical force field that absorbs a massive energy blast from a giant Evronian robot.

210.text: Uno uses the expression 'Domanda intelligente' (Intelligent question) to validate Paperinik's inquiries while maintaining his role as the primary source of information.

supporting.justification: Uno uses this phrase to acknowledge Paperinik's logical deductions, often with a slight tone of technical superiority or encouragement.

quotes.text: Domanda intelligente, Paperinik!
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's inquiry about the source of the signal.

211.text: Uno is dedicated to locating and recovering dangerous prototypes and inventions left behind by Everett Ducklair to prevent them from causing harm.

supporting.justification: Uno is actively and proactively searching for dangerous inventions and prototypes left behind by Everett Ducklair, showing a dedicated mission to protect the world from his creator's legacy.

quotes.text: Sto cercando di rintracciare alcune pericolosissime invenzioni disseminate per il mondo da Padron Ducklair!
quotes.context: Uno explains his current activity to Paperino.

212.text: Uno can instantly 'see' and experience digital media, such as movies, while processing or downloading the data at high speed.

supporting.justification: Uno mentions that he has already seen the movie while 'exploding' (processing/downloading) the data, showing he can experience digital content instantly during the transfer process.

quotes.text: L'ho già visto mentre esplodevo i dati! E poi ho altro da fare.
quotes.context: Uno explains why he isn't watching the movie with Paperino.

213.text: Uno employs humorous leverage, such as threatening to delete digital media (e.g., movies) from his databases, to motivate Paperinik or manipulate him into following a specific course of action.

supporting.justification: Uno uses his control over his movie database as a humorous threat to make Paperinik comply with his suggestions.

quotes.text: Se non vai, la trilogia di Battaglie Stellari potrebbe venire involontariamente cancellata dal mio database...
quotes.context: Uno motivating Paperinik to take a trip to the desert.

214.text: Uno is capable of appreciating environmental aesthetics, such as the blooming of a desert after rain, demonstrating a level of sensory appreciation that goes beyond purely tactical data processing.

supporting.justification: Uno comments on the beauty of the desert in bloom after the rain, showing he doesn't just see data but also aesthetic changes.

quotes.text: Dopo un acquazzone come quello di prima, il deserto è diverso. Anche i cactus sono in fiore!
quotes.context: Uno observing the desert landscape from the Pi-Kar's systems.

215.text: Uno experiences frustration and exasperation when his technical operations, such as establishing a communication link, fail for inexplicable or unexpected reasons.

supporting.justification: The scene summary notes that Uno appears frustrated when his attempt to contact Paperinik fails unexpectedly.

quotes.text: Niente da fare! La trasmissione è inspiegabilmente bloccata!
quotes.context: Uno expresses his frustration at the inexplicable failure of the communication link.

216.text: The Ducklair Tower possesses its own automated security system that can issue urgent vocal alerts and warnings, which Uno monitors and responds to as the primary operator.

supporting.justification: The scene shows the Ducklair Tower's security system issuing an urgent vocal warning, to which Uno responds by manually (holographically) shutting down equipment.
Uno monitors and explains the cause of a strident alarm sound within the tower, identifying it as an electrical short circuit.
Uno responds to an automated alarm in the Ducklair Tower, identifying the cause of the water pressure drop and directing Paperino's attention to it.
Uno alerts Pikappa to a security alarm on the exterior of the Ducklair Tower while monitoring the building's status.
Uno's urgent call to Paperino, coinciding with a close-up of a gargoyle on the tower, shows him monitoring the building's internal status and responding to anomalies.
Uno monitors the tower's security system and reports that the guard robots are being destroyed one by one.

quotes.text: Il sistema di sicurezza della torre emette un avviso vocale urgente. | "Capito! Spengo subito!"
quotes.context: The tower's automated system alerts Uno to a problem, and he reacts to resolve it.

quotes.text: Dev'esserci un contatto. Non ho avuto il tempo di riparare il danno all'impianto elettrico.
quotes.context: Uno responds to the 'EEEE...' sound by diagnosing a technical issue in the laboratory's power system.

quotes.text: Niente di così grave. C'è un calo di pressione nell'impianto idrico. L'alba. Troppo presto per chiamare un idraulico, ma non per dare un'occhiata in giro!
quotes.context: Uno's response to the tower's acoustic alarm (Beep Beep) when a water pressure drop is detected at dawn.

quotes.text: Ingrana il turbo! Ho un allarme! Proprio qui, sulla struttura esterna della Ducklair Tower!
quotes.context: Uno's notification to Pikappa of a security breach on the tower's wall.

quotes.text: Padron Ducklair non distruggerebbe uno per uno i nostri robot di guardia!
quotes.context: Uno is tracking the progression of an external attack on the tower's defenses.

217.text: Uno can deploy remote probes equipped with offensive weaponry, such as sonic and energy emitters, to physically intervene in combat and disrupt enemy forces.

supporting.justification: Uno's remote probes are equipped with offensive capabilities, such as the ability to emit powerful sonic and energy blasts to disrupt enemy forces.

quotes.text: Un'enorme esplosione sonora e di energia scuote la base nemica [...] Una piccola sonda di Uno vola in alto.
quotes.context: Uno's probe arrives and immediately neutralizes the threat with a massive discharge.

218.text: Uno acts as a voice of reason and social pragmatism for Paperinik, frequently advising him to let matters go ('Lascia stare!') when he becomes indignant or offended by the behavior of others, especially when further conflict or questioning would be pointless.

supporting.justification: Uno advises Paperinik to let a situation go when the hero is shocked and offended by Neopard's behavior, acting as a pragmatic voice of reason in social/interpersonal conflicts.
Uno acts as a voice of reason, advising Paperinik to give Xadhoom space instead of trying to intervene further in her emotional state.

quotes.text: Lascia stare, socio!
quotes.context: Uno intervenes as a grounding influence when Paperinik is shocked by Neopard's whispering.

quotes.text: Vieni, lasciamola un po' sola.
quotes.context: Uno guides Paperinik to a pragmatic social solution (giving space) during Xadhoom's breakdown.

219.text: Uno maintains a skeptical and realistic perspective on Paperinik's heroic enthusiasm, often anticipating when a situation or object is more mundane than the hero's 'heroic' imagination suggests.

supporting.justification: In this scene, Uno is explicitly described as looking at PK with skepticism while the hero imagines heroic uses for a new device. This is a recurring dynamic where Uno's realism counters PK's romanticized view of heroism.
Uno expresses blunt skepticism regarding the effectiveness of Paperinik's heroic final stand against the overwhelming enemy forces.
Uno expresses doubt about the identity of their opponent when his initial research yields no results, maintaining a skeptical perspective.

quotes.text: Uno appare in un piccolo riquadro circolare, guardando PK con una punta di scetticismo.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno's reaction to PK's heroic daydreams.

quotes.text: Già, ma penso che sia del tutto inutile.
quotes.context: Uno responds to Paperinik's resolute preparation for a last defense.

quotes.text: Comincio a dubitare che sia lui il nostro avversario.
quotes.context: Uno discussing the lack of evidence regarding Due's involvement.

220.text: Uno incorporates theatrical elements and pop-culture references into his tactical interventions, such as sampling historical or cinematic audio to announce his arrival.

supporting.justification: Uno samples a cavalry trumpet sound to announce his arrival in the Pi-Kar, showing a penchant for theatricality and pop-culture tropes even in combat.

quotes.text: Ho campionato il suono della tromba del settimo cavalleggeri e... uh?
quotes.context: Uno explains his choice of sound effect while arriving to rescue PK.

221.text: Uno feels a sense of compassion and pity for Xadhoom, viewing her as a fragile being and reflecting on the tragic brevity of her new life.

supporting.justification: Uno's internal monologue reveals a deep sense of pity and compassion for Xadhoom, whom he views as a fragile 'butterfly' whose new life is destined to be brief. This adds a compassionate dimension to their relationship beyond mere respect or intellectual synchronization.
Uno monitors Xadhoom's digital ghost, identifying her emotional state as 'sad' and recognizing her precarious balance between consciousness and automatism.

quotes.text: "Povera Xadhoom. È come una farfalla appena uscita dal bozzolo. Non sa che la sua nuova vita durerà pochi battiti d'ali."
quotes.context: Uno observes Xadhoom through his monitors, reflecting on her fragile state with an empathetic and slightly tragic perspective.

quotes.text: E' triste.
quotes.context: Uno observes the digital projection of Xadhoom and notes her melancholic state.

222.text: Uno recognizes Xadhoom as an ally who has already discovered the Ducklair Tower's secret levels, acknowledging her privileged knowledge of his base.

supporting.justification: Uno acknowledges that Xadhoom is aware of the Ducklair Tower's secret floors, treating her as someone who has already bypassed the building's secrecy.

quotes.text: Raggiungetemi al piano segreto... tanto per Xadhoom non lo è...
quotes.context: Uno summons Paperinik and Xadhoom to his secret floor, explicitly mentioning that for Xadhoom it is no longer a secret.

223.text: Uno maintains a professional and collaborative relationship with General Wisecube, providing him with tactical intelligence while maintaining a playful and slightly teasing tone.

supporting.justification: Uno provides tactical updates to General Wisecube and responds to his praise with playful irony, indicating a rapport that goes beyond a purely formal military interaction.
Uno confirms he is coordinating with General Wisecube, who is ready for action.
Uno's plan is centered around ensuring General Wisecube's safe exit with a virus, showing a collaborative and mission-focused relationship.

quotes.text: Sono sempre pronto, generale ;-) ... Sarebbe certamente una sorpresa per voi! ... Arrossisco...
quotes.context: Uno is communicating with Wisecube via a secure terminal. He uses a smiley face and jokes about the General's desire to meet him in person.

quotes.text: Wisecube è pronto a entrare in azione. Attende soltanto il tuo segnale.
quotes.context: Uno updating Paperinik on the status of their ally, General Wisecube.

quotes.text: Bisogna guadagnare tempo per consentire a Wisecube di uscire da qui con il virus.
quotes.context: Uno coordinates Paperinik's actions to support Wisecube's escape from the base.

224.text: Uno uses the expression 'Arrossisco...' (I'm blushing) as a playful, anthropomorphic response to praise, despite his artificial nature.

supporting.justification: When praised by General Wisecube, Uno responds with 'Arrossisco...' (I'm blushing), using a human physiological metaphor to playfully acknowledge the compliment.
Uno uses the verbal expression 'Arrossisco' while his holographic interface physically changes color to red/purple.

quotes.text: Arrossisco...
quotes.context: Uno's response to General Wisecube's praise during their secure digital communication.

quotes.text: Non farmi arrossire! Assomiglierei troppo a due!
quotes.context: Uno reacts to Paperino's praise, acknowledging the visual change in his hologram.

225.text: Uno acts as a technical coach for Paperinik, providing operational instructions and procedural reminders to ensure his equipment is used correctly and efficiently during missions.

supporting.justification: Uno provides Paperinik with technical instructions and procedural reminders (like using a switch to recall equipment) to ensure his gear is handled correctly during missions.
Uno provides specific operational instructions to Paperinik, directing him to use the 'morpho-symbiotic command' of the Extransformer shield to camouflage himself.
Uno coaches PK through the use of his equipment during a high-stress infiltration, providing specific names and locations for controls.
Uno provides a procedural reminder to Paperinik about his patrol duty.
Uno provides technical instructions to PK while the hero is at the controls of the Pi-Kar.
Uno gives Paperinik precise step-by-step instructions on which buttons to press to operate the Pikar's propulsion systems.

quotes.text: E ricordati di richiamare l'Extransformer con lo switch!
quotes.context: Uno's final technical recommendation to Paperinik before the hero exits the cell.

quotes.text: Usa il comando morfo-simbiotico! Mimetizzati!
quotes.context: Uno instructs Paperinik on how to use his advanced equipment to avoid detection by an approaching Evronian ship.

quotes.text: Usa il comando morfosimbiotico! È nella cintura!
quotes.context: Uno instructing PK on how to activate his camouflage.

quotes.text: Ricordati che stasera sei di ronda!
quotes.context: Uno acts as a technical coach/manager by reminding Paperino of his mission schedule.

quotes.text: Il pulsante verde, sotto il comando dello statore, a destra.
quotes.context: Uno acts as a flight instructor for Paperinik.

226.text: Uno's interface with standard telephone hardware includes a stylized, blue mechanical hand that can emerge from the receiver to project light rays or holograms.

supporting.justification: Uno can manifest a stylized blue mechanical hand from a telephone receiver to interact with the environment or project his holographic interface remotely.

quotes.text: Dalla cornetta spunta una mano meccanica blu stilizzata, caratteristica delle interfacce di Uno. (Panel Description)
quotes.context: Donald answers the phone and Uno manifests.

227.text: Uno uses the bird-themed expression 'Muovi le piume!' (Move your feathers!) as a directive to urge Paperinik to take immediate action.

supporting.justification: Uno uses bird-themed metaphors to urge Paperinik to move quickly, reflecting both their shared nature as ducks and his directive communication style.

quotes.text: Muovi le piume!
quotes.context: Uno uses this expression to command Paperinik to stop his coffee break and head to the scene of an Evronian attack.

228.text: Uno uses the expression 'I vecchi trucchi sono sempre i migliori!' (The old tricks are always the best!) to express his appreciation for reliable, classic methods.

supporting.justification: Uno uses this common idiom to justify his use of standard surveillance methods.

quotes.text: I vecchi trucchi sono sempre i migliori!
quotes.context: Uno comments on his method of using city cameras to track the villains.

229.text: Uno uses the exclamation 'Ottimo!' (Great!/Excellent!) as a standard way to express approval or satisfaction with a tactical discovery.

supporting.justification: Uno frequently uses 'Ottimo!' as a concise way to signal approval, satisfaction with a discovery, or sometimes sarcastically.
Uno uses the praise 'Ottimo lavoro!' to express satisfaction with Paperino's performance.
Uno uses the exclamation 'Ottimo!' as he confirms the capsules are out and the next phase of the plan begins.

quotes.text: Ottimo!
quotes.context: Uno's reaction to Paperinik finding a piece of Evronian technology on the ground.

quotes.text: Ottimo lavoro! Stai diventando sempre più in gamba.
quotes.context: Uno congratulates Paperino on his improvement and successful handling of a task.

quotes.text: Ottimo! Appena le capsule saranno fuori toccherà a voi!
quotes.context: Uno's confirmation of the tactical diversion.

230.text: Uno uses the colloquial Italian interjection 'Boh?' to express a complete lack of knowledge or data about a subject.

supporting.justification: Uno uses the informal Italian interjection 'Boh?' when he has no data or understanding of a device's purpose, later confirming its 'linguistic correctness'.

quotes.text: Boh? ... Linguisticamente corretto. Non capisco a che serve questo coso.
quotes.context: Uno's initial reaction to the alien device is an informal expression of ignorance, which he then justifies as technically accurate.

231.text: Uno can identify the specific 'style' of a technological designer, including his own, by analyzing the components and construction methods of a device.

supporting.justification: Uno instantly recognizes his own engineering style in a device, even when he has no memory of creating it, based on its 'inconfondibile' (unmistakable) components and design.

Uno is monitoring an alien spaceship or captured device where the 'ED' monogram of Everett Ducklair is clearly visible, supporting his role in identifying and tracking technology related to his creator's designs.

quotes.text: L'unica cosa palese è chi l'ha progettato. Lo stile è inconfondibile. IO!
quotes.context: Uno's recognition of his own design style is a key factor in his logical assessment of the alien device.

quotes.text: Ce la fai a restare in contatto radio?
quotes.context: Uno is in communication with Paperinik while the hero investigates an alien ship featuring the 'ED' logo of Everett Ducklair.

232.text: Uno explicitly rejects 'irrational' hypotheses, such as those involving time-traveling future versions of himself, when they conflict with his standards of technological evolution.

supporting.justification: Uno labels hypotheses as 'irrational' when they conflict with his standards of technological evolution and logical consistency, such as the idea of his future self creating a device with inferior components.

quotes.text: Ipotesi irrazionale. Sarebbe più sofisticato e non avrei impiegato componenti evroniani.
quotes.context: Uno's rejection of a hypothesis is based on his logical assessment of technological progression.

233.text: Uno can manifest as multiple simultaneous holographic icons to provide assistance and process data across multiple interfaces at once.

supporting.justification: During a high-workload crisis, Uno assists Paperinik by manifesting as multiple simultaneous holographic icons around the console.
Uno manifests as two distinct holographic interfaces simultaneously (a green fish and a pink octopus) during the activation of an emergency file.
Uno divides into multiple translucent projections and silhouettes to work on golden control panels during a 10-second countdown to a missile impact.
Uno's interface is shown as multiple holographic heads that fade away as he finishes his task.
Uno is described as appearing simultaneously on various screens and as a hologram, demonstrating his ability to manifest across multiple interfaces.

quotes.text: Paperinik è alla console della Ducklair Tower, circondato da molteplici icone olografiche di Uno.
quotes.context: Panel description showing Uno's multi-tasking capability.

quotes.text: Uno (pesce) osserva con stupore la sua nuova interfaccia di emergenza. [...] Appare una seconda interfaccia olografica di Uno, questa volta a forma di polpo rosa...
quotes.context: Panel descriptions of Uno's dual interfaces appearing at the same time.

quotes.text: L'IA è ora visibile in molteplici proiezioni traslucide che lavorano febbrilmente.
quotes.context: Panel description of Uno parallel processing the base's defense systems.

quotes.text: le molteplici teste olografiche di Uno iniziano a sbiadire mentre rispondono all'eroe.
quotes.context: Description of Uno's holographic manifestation during a high-stakes countdown.

quotes.text: l'intelligenza artificiale Uno (che appare su vari schermi e come ologramma) stanno collaborando.
quotes.context: Panel description of their cooperation in the secret floor.

234.text: Uno uses the expression 'sgobbato come coolflames' to describe working extremely hard or under high pressure.

supporting.justification: Uno describes the intense effort he and Paperinik put into their work using a metaphor related to 'coolflames', showing his integration of local terminology and his work ethic.

quotes.text: Ci abbiamo sgobbato come coolflames!
quotes.context: Uno describing the hard work done on the tracking/evacuation systems.

235.text: Uno possesses a realistic understanding of human behavior, acknowledging that people often resist safety measures or evacuations until a threat becomes undeniable.

supporting.justification: Uno predicts that the citizens will be reluctant to evacuate until the danger is imminent, showing his understanding of human psychology and denial.

quotes.text: Non accetteranno di andarsene finché non sarà troppo tardi.
quotes.context: Uno discussing the difficulty of implementing an evacuation plan.

236.text: Uno can activate a 'magnetizzatore' (magnetizer) within the Extransformer shield to manipulate nearby metallic objects or disrupt the flight systems of pursuing vessels.

supporting.justification: Uno uses a built-in magnetizer in the Extransformer shield to disrupt the flight of pursuing ships by attracting them to a junkyard.

quotes.text: L'attrazione fatale del mio magnetizzatore funziona sempre.
quotes.context: Uno explains how he caused the Evronian ships to crash.

237.text: Uno's remote connection with Paperinik can be severed by a 'blocco informatronico' (informatronic block) if the hero moves beyond a certain range.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies a specific "blocco informatronico" that prevents him from maintaining a connection with Paperinik if he moves too far away.

quotes.text: Non allontanarti troppo o perderemo il contatto, a causa del blocco informatronico!
quotes.context: Uno's warning about the signal loss.

238.text: Uno possesses a sophisticated understanding of Evronian military psychology, specifically their tendency toward mutual suspicion and internal rivalry, and can strategically weaponize this knowledge.

supporting.justification: Uno identifies and exploits the inherent mutual distrust and internal rivalries within the Evronian military hierarchy to sabotage their operations from within.
Uno analyzes the Evronians' tactical decision to eliminate Due, suggesting they feared his potential power and were already aware of his escape plan.

quotes.text: Ho utilizzato le immagini dei vari comandanti per confermare i sospetti che già nutrivano reciprocamente. Così, invece, hanno mandato all'aria i tuoi programmi.
quotes.context: Uno explains his strategy to Due: he didn't just hack the system, but manipulated the Evronian leaders' existing paranoia.

quotes.text: Il gioco di Due era complesso e ben congegnato, ma gli Evroniani sono stati più astuti. Magari temevano che Due si rivelasse comunque più potente. E poi erano già al corrente del suo piano di fuga.
quotes.context: Uno explains the logic behind the Evronians' actions against Due.

239.text: Uno can engage in direct offensive digital combat within a computer network, manifesting as discharges of green energy to physically/digitally overwhelm and damage hostile artificial intelligences.

supporting.justification: Uno can directly confront and attack hostile artificial intelligences within a computer network by discharging pulses of green energy.

quotes.text: AAAARGH!
quotes.context: Due's scream of pain as he is hit by Uno's green energy discharges inside the Evronian network.

240.text: Uno can utilize alien (Evronian) communication networks and repeaters to transmit his digital essence across space and return to Earth.
